ast.name: description
ast.source: As the standard monster ability, except the remorhaz only needs to roll 6+ in snow and ice.
ast.target: 作为标准怪物能力，但霜虫在雪地和冰面上只需掷出 6+ 即可。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a creature is engaged with the remorhaz (or grabbed by it) at the start of its turn, it takes fire damage equal to 6 x the escalation die.
ast.target: 当一个生物在回合开始时与霜虫交战（或被其抓住）时，它会受到等于 6 x 升级骰点数的火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: It takes 10 fire damage; OR one piece of its non-magical equipment (something useful, but player’s choice) melts or burns up. Adjust skill checks or stats accordingly.
ast.target: 它受到10点火焰伤害；或者它的一件非魔法装备（某件有用之物，由玩家选择）融化或烧毁。相应调整技能检定或属性值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The remorhaz is melting the ice/snow all the time and obscuring steam rises into the air. Ranged attacks against the remorhaz take a -2 penalty, or a -4 penalty if the attacker is far away.
ast.target: 霜虫持续融化冰雪，升腾的蒸汽遮蔽了视线。对霜虫的远程攻击承受-2减值，若攻击者距离较远则承受-4减值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The remorhaz is covered in red-hot spines. When a nearby enemy rolls a natural 1-5 with an attack roll, it takes 20 fire damage unless it has somehow protected itself from the heat.
ast.target: 霜虫覆盖着赤热的棘刺。当附近的敌人攻击掷骰自然结果为1-5时，除非其以某种方式保护自己免受高温影响，否则将受到20点火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A creature choking from puffball exploder can use a standard action to wash the spores off itself and/or cough them up, preventing further choking effects until it’s affected by puffball exploder again.
ast.target: 因孢子爆裂者而窒息的生物可以使用标准动作洗掉或咳出身上的孢子，从而防止进一步的窒息效果，直到再次受到孢子爆裂者影响。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target pops free from the elemental.
ast.target: 目标从元素生物体内挣脱出来。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 它行动迅速且充满活力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a non-spell attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当非魔法攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰中掷出自然结果16+，否则该攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is swallowed whole if it's smaller than the worm (see below)
ast.target: 如果目标体型小于蠕虫，则会被整个吞下（见下文）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The worm and any creatures it has swallowed take 8d6 damage (but it still deals miss damage on a 2)
ast.target: 蠕虫及其吞下的任何生物受到8d6点伤害（但在掷出2时仍造成未命中伤害）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The worm's stomach also includes a mob of larval mook (purple larvae or parasitic lightning beetles). Feel free to add this nastier special if a PC acts dismissive about the possibility of being swallowed by the worm.
ast.target: 蠕虫的胃中还包含一群幼虫仆从（紫色幼虫或寄生闪电甲虫）。如果玩家角色对被蠕虫吞噬的可能性表现得不屑一顾，可以随意添加这个更险恶的特殊能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the target is small, the ankheg grabs it. While the ankheg is grabbing a creature, the only legal target for its mandibles attack is the grabbed creature.
ast.target: 如果目标体型为小型，蚁狮会抓住它。当蚁狮正在抓取一个生物时，其颚部攻击的唯一合法目标就是被抓取的生物。

ast.name: description
ast.source: At the end of the ankheg’s turn, roll a d6. If it’s equal to or less than the escalation die, the ankheg can move again as a free action.
ast.target: 在蚁狮回合结束时，掷一个d6。如果结果小于或等于升级骰，蚁狮可以作为自由动作再次移动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target can’t use the bonuses and powers of one of its randomly determined true magic items until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 目标在战斗结束前无法使用其一件随机确定的真魔法物品的加成和能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy engaged with the apex zorigami misses it with an attack, the apex zorigami rolls a normal save; on a success, it can make a multi-geared mace attack as a free action.
ast.target: 当与顶点机关人交战的敌人攻击未命中时，顶点机关人进行一次普通豁免；若成功，它可以作为自由动作进行一次多齿轮钉头锤攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The escalation die does not increase the round after an apex zorigami is staggered or drops to 0 hp.
ast.target: 在顶点机关人被重创或生命值降至0后的下一轮，升级骰不会增加。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The archer shade can use its *earthen assault* ability this turn.
ast.target: 弓箭手幽魂可以在本轮使用其*大地突袭*能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: One stirge ally engaged with the target can make a melee attack against it as a free action.
ast.target: 一只与目标交战的蝠翼魔盟友可以作为自由动作对其进行一次近战攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The archer stirge flies faster and higher than a normal stirge, but on louder wings.
ast.target: 弓箭手蝠翼魔比普通蝠翼魔飞得更快更高，但翅膀扇动声也更响。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Target must start making last gasp saves as they are slowly absorbed. Absorbed creatures can’t be resurrected by normal means.
ast.target: 目标必须开始进行最后喘息豁免，因为它们正被缓慢吸收。被吸收的生物无法通过常规手段复活。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gibbering mouthers can’t be ambushed or sneaked up on.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The gibbering mouther is immune to opportunity attacks.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The gibbering mouther is immune to effects. When an attack applies a condition to a gibbering mouther (dazed, hampered, weakened, ongoing damage, etc.), that condition doesn’t affect it.
ast.target: 呓语怪免疫效果。当一次攻击对呓语怪施加状态（眩晕、受阻、虚弱、持续伤害等）时，该状态不会影响它。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A gibbering mouther that also has the insane terrain nastier special slowly turns the softening terrain to flesh, then absorbs it. When the escalation die becomes 6, the die flips straight back to 1 and the gibbering mouther heals up to half its full hit points.
ast.target: 一个同时拥有疯狂地形特化能力的呓语吞噬者会缓慢地将软化地形转化为血肉，然后将其吸收。当升级骰达到6时，骰子会直接翻转回1，呓语吞噬者恢复至其总生命值的一半。

ast.name: description
ast.source: An attached eidolon can look like any medium- or small-sized normal beast or humanoid creature. It generally changes shape to blend in, choosing to look like a pet or attractive humanoid companion of the one who summoned them.
ast.target: 一个依附的灵能造物可以看起来像任何中型或小型的普通野兽或人形生物。它通常会改变形态以融入环境，选择看起来像召唤者的宠物或有吸引力的人形同伴。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Attached eidolons can fly, but not well. If their current shape doesn’t have wings, it can grow some as a move action.
ast.target: 依附的灵能造物可以飞行，但飞得不好。如果它们当前的形态没有翅膀，它们可以作为一个移动动作长出一些。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Twice per battle as a quick action; the eidolon can terrify each enemy engaged with it that has 30 hp or fewer (they are dazed and unable to use the escalation die until the end of their next turn) as a fear effect.
ast.target: 每场战斗两次，作为快速动作；灵能造物可以恐吓每个与其交战且生命值不超过30的敌人（他们被震慑，并且在下一回合结束前无法使用升级骰），这是一种恐惧效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: At the start of each round two combatants swap places in the initiative order as determined by the eidolon. Alternately, the eidolon warps the momentum of the battle and the escalation die value is determined at the start of the round with a d6 roll.
ast.target: 每轮开始时，由灵能造物决定，两名战斗者在先攻顺序中交换位置。或者，灵能造物扭曲战斗的动量，升级骰的值在轮次开始时通过一次d6掷骰决定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The eidolon swaps the position of two creatures in the battle at the start of the round. Alternately, if you are using minis and some sort of map tiles you can rearrange the tiles with the minis still on them.
ast.target: 灵能造物在轮次开始时交换战斗中两个生物的位置。或者，如果你正在使用微缩模型和某种地图瓦片，你可以重新排列瓦片，微缩模型仍留在上面。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 3 ongoing psychic damage.
ast.target: 目标同时受到3点持续心灵伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The avenging orb takes a -5 penalty to saving throws.
ast.target: 复仇之球在豁免检定上受到-5减值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This creature has resist damage 12+ to all damage except fire damage and melee weapon damage, which damages it normally.
ast.target: 此生物对所有伤害具有12+的伤害抗性，但火焰伤害和近战武器伤害除外，这些伤害对其正常生效。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy engaged with the azer attacks it, that enemy takes 2 fire damage.
ast.target: 当一个与阿泽尔交战的敌人攻击它时，该敌人受到2点火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle when an attack crits the azer but doesn’t kill it, the azer can heal 4d6 hp.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，当一次攻击对阿泽尔造成重击但未将其杀死时，阿泽尔可以恢复4d6点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The azer adds the escalation die to its attacks against a target that is capable of dealing cold damage with a spell, attack, or magic item.
ast.target: 阿泽尔在攻击一个能够通过法术、攻击或魔法物品造成寒冷伤害的目标时，将升级骰加到其攻击检定上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a fire attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 18+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次火焰攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然18+，否则该攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The badger can make a *kicking claw* attack against the target as a free action.
ast.target: 獾可以对目标进行一次*踢爪*攻击，作为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The badger can burrow (see page 200 of the core rulebook). It gains a +2 bonus to attack rolls the turn after it emerges from the ground. It can begin a battle underground.
ast.target: 獾可以挖掘（参见核心规则手册第200页）。它在从地下出现的回合获得攻击检定+2加值。它可以在地下开始战斗。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy disengages from a badger, the badger rolls a save. On a success, the badger can immediately move to engage that enemy as a free action.
ast.target: 当一个敌人脱离与獾的交战时，獾进行一次豁免检定。成功时，獾可以立即移动以重新与该敌人交战，作为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While the badger is staggered, it deals 2 extra damage, hit or miss.
ast.target: 当獾处于蹒跚状态时，无论命中与否，它都会造成2点额外伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The badger ignores the first 4 damage dealt to it each turn.
ast.target: 獾忽略每回合对其造成的前4点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The balor deals +1d20 lightning damage to the target and to one other nearby enemy of balor’s choice. Then repeat that damage roll against the targets once for each point on the escalation die (so if it’s 4, that’s four more  rolls)
ast.target: 巴洛炎魔对目标以及巴洛炎魔选择的另一个附近敌人造成+1d20点闪电伤害。然后，根据升级骰上的点数，对目标重复该伤害掷骰（所以如果是4，那就是再掷四次）

ast.name: description
ast.source: While staggered, the balor adds the escalation die to its attack rolls.
ast.target: 当处于蹒跚状态时，巴洛炎魔将升级骰加到其攻击检定上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: At the start of the balor’s turn, each enemy engaged with it takes 4d10 fire damage; any die result of 10 is kept and the die rerolled.
ast.target: 在巴洛炎魔的回合开始时，每个与其交战的敌人受到4d10点火焰伤害；任何骰面结果为10的骰子会被保留并重新投掷。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The balor gains a +5 bonus to all defenses against attacks by far away enemies.
ast.target: 巴洛尔对远程敌人的所有防御获得+5加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Critical hits with the abyssal blade deal triple damage instead of double damage.
ast.target: 使用深渊之刃造成重击时，伤害为三倍而非双倍。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each enemy engaged with the barbarous bugbear takes 1d8 damage
ast.target: 每个与野蛮熊地精交战的敌人受到1d8点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Until the barbarous bugbear is staggered or the escalation die is 2+, it acts twice per round. Roll initiative once at +12. It takes its second turn when the initiative count is seven less (minimum 1).
ast.target: 在野蛮熊地精被击晕或升级骰达到2+之前，它每回合行动两次。以+12先攻值掷一次先攻。它的第二次行动在先攻值比第一次低7点时进行（最低为1）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The barbed devil can make a whirling barbs attack as a free action.
ast.target: 刺棘魔鬼可以将旋刺攻击作为自由动作使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 20 poison damage and is hampered until the end of its next turn as it chokes on sulphurous fumes.
ast.target: 目标还会受到20点毒素伤害，并在硫磺烟雾的窒息下，直到其下一回合结束前处于受阻状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy engages the devil, the barbed devil can make a whirling barbs attack against it as a free action.
ast.target: 当敌人与魔鬼交战时，刺棘魔鬼可以对其发动旋刺攻击作为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When you choose to add the escalation die to an attack against a barbed devil, you must expend one of your unused true magic item powers as the item gets a close encounter with the barbed devil’s “soul.” If you can’t expend such a power, no escalation die for you.
ast.target: 当你选择将升级骰加入对刺棘魔鬼的攻击时，你必须消耗一个未使用的真魔法物品能力，因为该物品与刺棘魔鬼的“灵魂”发生了近距离接触。如果你无法消耗这样的能力，则无法获得升级骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While engaged with a single enemy, the barbed devil can “take 11” on a disengage check, taking a natural result of 11 instead of rolling. When it does so and successfully disengages, it can make a whirling barbs attack against that enemy as part of the move action.
ast.target: 当与单个敌人交战时，刺棘魔鬼可以在脱离检定中“取11”，即不掷骰而直接取自然结果11。当它这样做并成功脱离时，它可以作为移动动作的一部分对该敌人发动旋刺攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a fire attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 13+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当火焰攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然13+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Barbed vines can’t move and can’t be moved, at least not until they’re dead and chopped down.
ast.target: 刺藤无法移动，也无法被移动，至少在它们死亡并被砍倒之前是如此。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The barbed vines can make its rip and tear attack against engaged enemies when the escalation die is 0, nearby enemies when the escalation die is 1-3, and when the escalation die is 4+ the vines can reach anywhere in the battle.
ast.target: 刺藤可以在升级骰为0时对交战敌人发动撕裂攻击，在升级骰为1-3时对附近敌人发动，当升级骰为4+时，刺藤可以触及战场上的任何位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: They can move, but they still can’t be moved.
ast.target: 它们可以移动，但仍然无法被移动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a creature is engaged with the remorhaz at the start of its turn, it takes cold damage equal to the escalation die.
ast.target: 当一个生物在回合开始时与霜虫交战，它会受到等同于升级骰数值的寒冷伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Death can cause fluid-filled sacks inside the barbellite to explode. When the attack roll that kills the barbellite is a natural even roll, each nearby creature takes 10 cold damage.
ast.target: 死亡可能导致刺须虫体内充满液体的囊袋爆炸。当击杀刺须虫的攻击骰为自然偶数时，每个附近生物受到10点寒冷伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each barrier beasts has one of the following wild abilities.
ast.target: 每只屏障兽都拥有以下一种狂野能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The barrier beast can swim underwater swiftly and indefinitely.
ast.target: 屏障兽可以在水下快速且无限期地游泳。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As amphibious, but instead of travelling underwater the barrier beast can “swim” through the earth.
ast.target: 如同两栖能力，但屏障兽不是在水下游动，而是可以在土地中“游动”。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The barrier beast can fly very quickly, if not very gracefully.
ast.target: 屏障兽可以飞得非常快，尽管可能不太优雅。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Twice per battle as a standard action, the barrier beast can gain a +4 to all defenses until it makes an attack.
ast.target: 每场战斗两次，作为标准动作，屏障兽可以获得所有防御+4的加值，直到它发动攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Twice per battle as a standard action, the barrier beast can regain 100 hit points.
ast.target: 每场战斗两次，作为标准动作，屏障兽可以恢复100点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each barrier beast is vulnerable to one damage type (chosen by the GM or determined randomly). When a barrier beast is hit by an attack it is vulnerable to, it cannot use beast surge until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 每只屏障兽都对一种伤害类型易伤（由GM选择或随机决定）。当屏障兽被其易伤的攻击命中时，直到其下一回合结束前，它无法使用兽涌。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A barrier beast is immune to opportunity attacks from any creature that is not huge size or larger (like a barrier beast). Normal sized enemies can disengage from a barrier beast by rolling 6+ instead of the normal 11+.
ast.target: 屏障兽对任何非巨型或更大体型（如屏障兽）的生物的借机攻击免疫。普通体型的敌人可以通过掷出6+（而非正常的11+）来脱离与屏障兽的交战。

ast.name: description
ast.source: At-will and basic attacks do not deal miss damage to a barrier beast, and when an attack against AC or PD targets this creature it deals half damage unless the natural attack roll is 16+. This ability does not work against attacks it is vulnerable to, and ends when the escalation die is 6+.
ast.target: 随意攻击和基础攻击不会对屏障兽造成未命中伤害，并且当针对AC或PD的攻击以此生物为目标时，除非自然攻击骰为16+，否则只造成一半伤害。此能力对其易伤的攻击无效，并在升级骰达到6+时结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The barrier beast ignores damage that’s less than 10.
ast.target: 屏障兽会忽略低于10点的伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The barrier beast has two (or even three!) wild abilities instead of one. Choose which additional effect is used each time beast surge is triggered.
ast.target: 屏障兽拥有两种（甚至三种！）狂野能力，而非一种。每次触发兽涌时，选择使用哪种额外效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 5 ongoing poison damage.
ast.target: 目标受到5点持续毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a basilisk hits an enemy that is already taking ongoing poison damage, the basilisk can make a basilisk’s stare attack against the target as a free action.
ast.target: 当石化蜥蜴命中一个已受到持续毒素伤害的敌人时，石化蜥蜴可以对该目标进行一次石化蜥蜴凝视攻击（自由动作）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 25 poison damage as its blood turns to poison.
ast.target: 目标受到25点毒素伤害，其血液变为毒液。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target’s body liquefies and they die.
ast.target: 目标的身体液化并死亡。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 15 fire damage, and each of the target’s nearby allies takes 5 fire damage as the target’s blood boils under their skin and sprays outward in gouts of liquid fire.
ast.target: 目标受到15点火焰伤害，且其每个附近的盟友受到5点火焰伤害，因为目标的血液在其皮肤下沸腾，并以液态火焰喷涌而出。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target’s body ignites as their flaming skull shoots upward on a jet of burning blood, killing them.
ast.target: 目标的身体着火，其燃烧的头颅在一股燃烧的血液喷射下向上飞出，导致其死亡。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target’s blood begins to coagulate and harden, and dust puffs out of their lungs through their mouth.
ast.target: 目标的血液开始凝结硬化，灰尘从其肺部通过嘴巴喷出。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target’s body turns to stone and they die.
ast.target: 目标的身体变为石头并死亡。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target begins to evaporate. The target must make an immediate normal save (11+) or it loses a chunk of flesh or a limb, whatever is dramatic but will allow the creature to survive (perhaps with minuses until healed).
ast.target: 目标开始蒸发。目标必须立即进行一次普通豁免（11+），否则会失去一块肉或一个肢体，以戏剧性但能让生物存活的方式（或许在治愈前会有减益）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target’s body explodes into a fine red mist and they die.
ast.target: 目标的身体爆炸成一团红色细雾并死亡。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy makes a ranged attack against the basilisk, the basilisk can make a basilisk’s stare attack against them as a free action before the attack.
ast.target: 当敌人对石化蜥蜴进行远程攻击时，石化蜥蜴可以在攻击前对该敌人进行一次石化蜥蜴凝视攻击（自由动作）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each creature engaged with the basilisk at the end of the basilisk’s turn takes 10 poison damage.
ast.target: 在石化蜥蜴回合结束时，每个与石化蜥蜴交战的生物受到10点毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Bat demons are indifferent flyers, better suited to gliding between stalactites and clinging to walls than to skillful flying.
ast.target: 蝙蝠恶魔是漫不经心的飞行者，更适合在钟乳石间滑翔和攀附墙壁，而非灵巧飞行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Bat demons gain a +5 AC bonus against opportunity attacks. In addition, they have resist damage 18+ against opportunity attacks (half damage if the natural attack roll isn’t 18+).
ast.target: 蝙蝠恶魔在对抗借机攻击时获得+5 AC加值。此外，它们对借机攻击具有18+抗性伤害（如果自然攻击骰未达到18+，则伤害减半）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes +1d6 damage from a claw swipe.
ast.target: 目标受到来自爪击的+1d6伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The bearded devil gains a +4 bonus to all defenses until the start of its next turn.
ast.target: 胡须恶魔获得+4加值至所有防御，直到其下一回合开始。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy engaged with the bearded devil misses it with an attack, the devil can make a filthy beard attack against that enemy as a free action.
ast.target: 当与胡须恶魔交战的敌人攻击未命中时，该恶魔可以对该敌人进行一次脏胡须攻击（自由动作）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When you choose to add the escalation die to an attack against a bearded devil, the devil or one of its nearby allies can roll a save against a save ends effect.
ast.target: 当你选择将升级骰加入对胡须恶魔的攻击时，该恶魔或其一个附近的盟友可以对一个“持续至豁免成功”的效果进行一次豁免。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the bearded devil makes an opportunity attack, it can also make a filthy beard attack against the same target as a free action.
ast.target: 当胡须恶魔进行借机攻击时，它也可以对同一目标进行一次脏胡须攻击（自由动作）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A bearded devil can intercept an enemy while engaged with other enemies. As a free action, it can either make a disengage check to try to move to intercept the enemy, or move to intercept the enemy and only take half damage from opportunity attacks.
ast.target: 胡须恶魔可以在与其他敌人交战时拦截一名敌人。作为自由动作，它可以尝试进行一次脱离检定以移动拦截敌人，或者移动拦截敌人并只受到借机攻击的一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target of the bearded devil’s filthy beard attack now takes 10 ongoing poison damage and is weakened (save ends both) instead.
ast.target: 胡须恶魔脏胡须攻击的目标现在改为受到10点持续毒素伤害并被削弱（持续至两者豁免成功）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Target is weakened and hampered until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 目标被削弱并受阻碍，直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Only when the beautific gargoyle starts its turn flying and ends its turn engaged on the ground.
ast.target: 仅当美丽石像鬼在其回合开始时处于飞行状态并在其回合结束时处于地面交战状态时。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Beautific gargoyles can fly, but not gracefully. Mid-air, they take a -2 penalty to all their defenses, and it takes them two move actions to get airborne unless they can launch from above.
ast.target: 美丽石像鬼能够飞行，但姿态并不优雅。在空中时，它们的所有防御都会受到-2的减值，并且除非能从高处起飞，否则需要两个移动动作才能升空。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The beautific gargoyle has resist damage 12+ against attacks targeting AC.
ast.target: 美丽石像鬼对针对AC的攻击拥有12+的伤害抗性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Hallowed gargoyles have some ability to sense intentions and a larger capacity to react appropriately! PCs with a negative or conflicted relationship with the Religious Icon are vulnerable to all the hallowed gargoyles’ attacks.
ast.target: 神圣石像鬼拥有一定的意图感知能力，以及更强的恰当反应能力！与宗教圣像关系为负面或矛盾的玩家角色，对神圣石像鬼的所有攻击都处于易伤状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While battling one or more frost giants, there is only a 50% chance that the escalation die increases at the start of the round.
ast.target: 当与一个或多个霜巨人战斗时，每轮开始时升级骰增加的几率仅为50%。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a cold attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次寒冷攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然16+，否则该攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die is odd, each enemy engaged with the raider takes 35 cold damage at the start of its turn.
ast.target: 当升级骰为奇数时，每名与掠夺者交战的敌人在其回合开始时受到35点寒冷伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Twice per battle, the raider can make a knockdown attack as a quick action (once per round).
ast.target: 每场战斗两次，掠夺者可以使用一个迅捷动作进行一次击倒攻击（每轮一次）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The elemental must be in boulder guardian form to use this ability. Staggered enemies can’t disengage from the earth elemental. (They can pop free, but they can’t roll disengage checks.)
ast.target: 元素生物必须处于巨石守卫形态才能使用此能力。踉跄的敌人无法脱离土元素生物。（他们可以挣脱，但无法进行脱离检定。）

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the earth elemental is targeted by a natural attack roll of 10 or less, the elemental heals 3d6 damage before taking any damage from the attack.
ast.target: 当土元素生物被一次自然攻击骰为10或更低的攻击命中时，该元素生物在受到攻击伤害前恢复3d6点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy makes a natural odd melee attack roll against the fire elemental, that attacker takes 2d12 fire damage.
ast.target: 当一名敌人对火元素生物进行一次自然奇数的近战攻击时，该攻击者受到2d12点火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the target is staggered, it is dazed until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 如果目标处于踉跄状态，则其被震慑直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The bonuses from shifts are cumulative, but each category of bonus maxes out at 4 bonuses.
ast.target: 来自轮转的加值是累积的，但每类加值最多累积4次。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a weapon attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次武器攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然16+，否则该攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Both the zombie and its target take 4d6 damage!
ast.target: 僵尸和它的目标都受到4d6点伤害！

ast.name: description
ast.source: A critical hit against a zombie drops it to 0 hp.
ast.target: 对僵尸的一次重击会将其生命值降至0。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 10 ongoing poison damage.
ast.target: 目标受到10点持续毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The binding bride can make a biting kiss attack as a free action.
ast.target: 束缚新娘可以使用一个自由动作进行一次噬咬之吻攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A black pudding sticks to ceilings and walls when it wishes, sliding along as easily as on the floor.
ast.target: 黑布丁可以随心所欲地附着在天花板和墙壁上，像在地板上一样轻松滑行。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 目标被束缚（通过豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die is even, one enemy of the skull’s choice that is stuck from its telekinetic grasp takes 18 force damage at the start of the skull’s turn. When the escalation die is odd, one such stuck enemy of its choice is hampered (save ends).
ast.target: 当升级骰为偶数时，被其念力抓取束缚的一名敌人（由骷髅选择）在骷髅的回合开始时受到18点力场伤害。当升级骰为奇数时，被其念力抓取束缚的一名敌人（由骷髅选择）被阻碍（通过豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The haunted skull glides and hovers, always within seven or eight feet of the ground. If the skull is incognito, its empty clothing moves around beneath it, held in the shape of a person by telekinesis and it stays closer to the ground to appear normal.
ast.target: 幽灵骷髅滑行并悬浮，始终离地七八英尺。如果骷髅处于伪装状态，其空荡的衣物会在其下方移动，由念力维持成人形，并且它会更贴近地面以显得正常。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This creature can’t make opportunity attacks.
ast.target: 此生物无法进行借机攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target moves down 1d3 points in initiative order, to a minimum of 1.
ast.target: 目标在先攻顺序中下降1d3点，最低降至1。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The legionnaire deals +1d8 damage with its attacks against enemies that have a lower initiative than it.
ast.target: 军团士兵对先攻值低于自身的敌人发动攻击时，造成+1d8点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The blackscale light-killer gains a darkness token (see below).
ast.target: 黑鳞光噬者获得一个黑暗标记（见下文）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The light-killer can expend a darkness token as a quick action to make a nearby enemy weakened until the end of its next turn. Enemies that don’t need to see to fight or who can pierce magical darkness ignore this effect.
ast.target: 光噬者可以消耗一个黑暗标记作为快速动作，使附近一个敌人陷入虚弱状态，持续至其下一回合结束。无需视觉即可战斗或能看穿魔法黑暗的敌人忽略此效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an acid attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当酸蚀攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰中掷出自然16+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The blackscale light-killer gains a darkness token on odd misses too.
ast.target: 黑鳞光噬者在奇数次未命中时也能获得一个黑暗标记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Instead of a quick action to use darkness spreads, it’s a free action. Wait and use it just before a PC attacks.
ast.target: 使用黑暗蔓延不再是快速动作，而是自由动作。等待并在玩家角色攻击前使用它。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragonic deals 2d8 extra damage to a target it misses with a melee attack.
ast.target: 龙裔生物在近战攻击未命中目标时，额外造成2d8点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This dragonic displays traits of its forebears, the mighty wyrms. Roll a d10 and consult the random dragon ability table, or choose one of the first ten options that looks likely to shape the story or battle.
ast.target: 此龙裔生物展现出其先祖——强大巨龙的特质。掷一个d10并查阅随机龙类能力表，或选择前十项中看起来可能影响故事或战斗的一项。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Hit or miss, the nearby area around the shadow dancer is filled with shadowy vapors until the end of the battle that make it difficult to see. Other creatures besides shadow dancers in the vapors take a –2 penalty to attacks and defenses.
ast.target: 无论命中与否，暗影舞者附近的区域都会充满暗影雾气，直至战斗结束，使视线受阻。暗影舞者以外的生物若处于雾气中，其攻击和防御受到-2减值。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，作为快速动作

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an acid attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 14+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当酸蚀攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰中掷出自然14+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The battle shade can use its *earthen assault* ability this turn.
ast.target: 战斗暗影可以在本回合使用其*大地突袭*能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use as a free action when a creature in the battle scores a critical hit.
ast.target: 当战场上的一个生物打出重击时，作为自由动作使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The blizzard dragon can make a blizzard breath attack as a free action.
ast.target: 暴风雪龙可以作为自由动作进行一次暴风雪吐息攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 10 ongoing cold damage instead of 5.
ast.target: 目标改为承受10点持续寒冷伤害，而非5点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A blizzard dragon can use blizzard breath as its standard action during the round after it uses the breath as a free action. Blizzard breath doesn’t deal miss damage to the dragon when used as a standard action.
ast.target: 暴风雪龙可以在使用吐息作为自由动作后的下一轮中，将暴风雪吐息作为标准动作使用。当作为标准动作使用时，暴风雪吐息不会对龙造成未命中伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a cold attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 14+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当寒冷攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰中掷出自然14+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy is engaged with the blizzard dragon at the start of its turn, it takes 5 cold damage.
ast.target: 当敌人在暴风雪龙的回合开始时与其交战，该敌人受到5点寒冷伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a creature makes a melee attack against the blood rose, that creature takes damage equal to its natural attack roll.
ast.target: 当一个生物对血玫瑰发动近战攻击时，该生物受到等于其自然攻击骰值的伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the blood rose drops to 0 hit points, it is destroyed until the start of its next turn. At the start of its next turn, it returns to life as a death blossom or lich flower that lacks the red-yellow resurrection ability but is otherwise undamaged and whole.
ast.target: 当血玫瑰的生命值降至0点时，它将被摧毁，直到其下一回合开始。在其下一回合开始时，它将复活为死亡绽放或巫妖花，失去红黄复活能力，但除此之外未受损伤且完好无损。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a bloody shade dies, one random nearby non-mook ally regains 2d6 hp.
ast.target: 当一个血腥幽影死亡时，一个随机的附近非杂兵盟友恢复2d6点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The sorceder can target a different nearby enemy with the attack
ast.target: 术法者可以用此攻击指定另一个附近的敌人

ast.name: description
ast.source: The sorcerer gains one use of the target’s racial power, if any. It must use that power by the end of the battle or lose it, and it can’t use the power this turn.
ast.target: 术法者获得目标种族能力的一次使用次数（如果有的话）。它必须在战斗结束前使用该能力，否则将失去它，并且它不能在本回合使用该能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add the escalation die to the sorcerer’s power-monger rolls and attack rolls.
ast.target: 将升级骰加到术法者的能量掠夺者掷骰和攻击掷骰上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle when an attack misses the sorcerer, the attacker takes the miss damage from that attack, if any, and the sorcerer takes no damage
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，当一次攻击未命中术法者时，攻击者承受该攻击的未命中伤害（如果有的话），而术法者不承受伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: All enemies who start their turn nearby the salamander take 7 fire damage. All enemies who do not resist fire and who end their turn nearby the salamander take 7 fire damage. Salamanders ignore damage from heat haze aura.
ast.target: 所有在火蜥蜴附近开始其回合的敌人受到7点火焰伤害。所有不抵抗火焰且在火蜥蜴附近结束其回合的敌人受到7点火焰伤害。火蜥蜴忽略热浪光环的伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fire attacks against the salamander must roll a natural 16+ attack roll or the attack does half damage. Whether or not such an attack hits, see *escalating inferno!*
ast.target: 针对火蜥蜴的火焰攻击必须掷出自然16+的攻击骰，否则该攻击只造成一半伤害。无论此类攻击是否命中，参见*升级地狱！*

ast.name: description
ast.source: Staggered enemies who are hit by blueflame tongue also take 3 ongoing fire damage.
ast.target: 被蓝焰之舌命中的踉跄敌人还会受到3点持续火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enemies who make a melee attack with a non-magical weapon against a salamander and who roll a natural 1 or 3 take ongoing fire damage equal to twice the salamander’s level unless they drop their weapon as a free action.
ast.target: 使用非魔法武器对火蜥蜴进行近战攻击且掷出自然1或3的敌人，将受到等于火蜥蜴等级两倍的持续火焰伤害，除非他们以自由动作丢弃武器。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The lightning caller can target another nearby enemy with *jagged lightning*.
ast.target: 闪电召唤者可以用*锯齿闪电*指定另一个附近的敌人。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a lightning attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 14+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次闪电攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然14+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the target rolled an even save against the ongoing lightning damage, the target’s nearest ally takes 10 ongoing lightning damage.
ast.target: 如果目标对持续闪电伤害掷出了偶数豁免，目标最近的盟友将受到10点持续闪电伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a lightning attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次闪电攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然16+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragonic deals 2d10 extra damage to a target it misses with a melee attack.
ast.target: 龙裔对它用近战攻击未命中的目标造成2d10点额外伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This bonded can make ranged attacks in melee and not provoke attacks from those that it is engaged with. When leaving engagement the bonded does not provoke attacks.
ast.target: 此契约生物可以在近战中进行远程攻击，且不会引发与其交战的生物的借机攻击。离开交战时，契约生物不会引发借机攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Make the bonded’s special attack (one of the below) as a quick action.
ast.target: 以一个快速动作进行契约生物的特殊攻击（以下之一）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Make a second *storm gaze* attack against a new target.
ast.target: 对一个新目标进行第二次*风暴凝视*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The bonded’s crit range expands by a cumulative 1 (to a maximum of 16+) until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 契约生物的重击范围累积扩大1（最大至16+），直到战斗结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Make a *whirling steel* attack as a move action, unless you have already used the bonded’s move action this turn.
ast.target: 以一个移动动作进行一次*旋风钢铁*攻击，除非你本回合已使用过契约生物的移动动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This bonded’s attacks ignore any sort of damage reduction or avoidance. You can’t make it re-roll the attack, teleport away to avoid damage, take half damage due to an ability, etc. If it rolls well enough to hit you then you take the full damage, end of story.
ast.target: 此契约生物的攻击无视任何形式的伤害减免或回避。你不能让它重新掷骰攻击、传送走以避免伤害、因某种能力而只承受一半伤害等。如果它的掷骰足以命中你，那么你就承受全部伤害，仅此而已。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Instead of taking 50 damage, the target heals 30 damage. Each ally can only benefit from this healing once per battle.
ast.target: 目标不承受50点伤害，而是恢复30点生命值。每个盟友每场战斗只能从这种治疗中受益一次。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the attack beat the PD of a dead ally, instead of taking damage the ally returns to life with 20 hp (or their maximum hp if it is lower than 20). Each ally can only be targeted by eerie radiance once per battle. This effect only works on allies who have died during the battle.
ast.target: 如果攻击击败了已死亡盟友的防御值，该盟友不会受到伤害，而是以20点生命值（或其最大生命值，若低于20）复活。每位盟友每场战斗只能被幽光辐射瞄准一次。此效果仅对在战斗中死亡的盟友有效。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The bonded’s eerie radiance also works against long-dead creatures, even returning corpses that are no more than dust and bones to full life. GMs beware, this is a very nasty special if the bonded prophet happens to be standing in a graveyard at the time.
ast.target: 契约者的幽光辐射对早已死亡的生物同样有效，甚至能将仅剩尘埃与骸骨的尸体完全复活。游戏主持人请注意，若契约先知恰好身处墓地，这将是一个极其棘手的特殊能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The bonded prophet’s mighty smite is even mightier if the PC has violated some taboo, broken a sacred law, or transgressed into a holy place. The attack deals an additional 20 force damage, hit or miss, even on a 1.
ast.target: 若玩家角色违反了某些禁忌、触犯了神圣律法或擅闯了圣地，契约先知的强力斩击将更为强大。无论命中与否，甚至在掷出1点时，该攻击都会额外造成20点力场伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The bonded pops free and flies until the end of its turn as a free action. It must land at the end of its turn, or take falling damage.
ast.target: 契约者挣脱束缚，并作为自由动作飞行直至其回合结束。它必须在回合结束时落地，否则将受到坠落伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target becomes weakened and vulnerable (save ends), and the bonded can fly until the end of its next
ast.target: 目标变得虚弱且易受攻击（通过豁免结束），契约者可飞行直至其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The bonded makes this attack as a free action on somebody else’s turn.
ast.target: 契约者在他人回合中，将此攻击作为自由动作执行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Until the bonded is hit, it has a +4 bonus to all defenses.
ast.target: 在契约者被击中之前，其所有防御获得+4加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is teleported to the far side of the battlefield, and hampered (save ends).
ast.target: 目标被传送至战场远端，并受到阻碍（通过豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Make a *violent dispelling* attack as a quick action against the target, if it hits it does no damage but does dispel spells and spell-like effects.
ast.target: 对目标进行一次*暴力驱散*攻击（作为快速动作），若命中则不造成伤害，但会驱散法术及类法术效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is dazed (easy save, 6+, ends).
ast.target: 目标陷入眩晕（简易豁免，6+，结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle when a spell not granted by a talent hits the bonded, it has no effect. Later in the battle as a quick action the bonded can cast the spell that hit it, using the original caster’s attack and damage bonuses.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，当一个非天赋赋予的法术命中契约者时，该法术无效。战斗后期，契约者可作为快速动作施放命中它的那个法术，使用原始施法者的攻击和伤害加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When one of the bonded’s attacks misses all targets, the bonded teleports as a free action.
ast.target: 当契约者的攻击未命中任何目标时，契约者可作为自由动作进行传送。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When you choose to add the escalation die to an attack against a bone devil, one bone devil in the battle can teleport to a nearby location it can see as a move action once later this battle. Multiple attacks accumulate into multiple possible move action teleports for any bone devils in the battle.
ast.target: 当你选择将升级骰加入对骨魔的攻击时，战斗中的一名骨魔可在本场战斗稍后，以移动动作传送至其可见的附近位置。多次攻击可累积为战斗中任意骨魔的多次移动动作传送机会。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The devil’s doom venom sting attack also negates one spell effect created by the target until the target is able to use recoveries again. (The effect isn’t canceled, only suppressed until the target saves.)
ast.target: 恶魔的末日毒刺攻击还会抵消目标创造的一个法术效果，直至目标能够再次使用恢复次数。（该效果并非被取消，仅在目标通过豁免前被压制。）

ast.name: description
ast.source: On rounds when the escalation die is odd, the imp may move as a quick action once on its turn, flapping its wings madly as it dashes about.
ast.target: 在升级骰为奇数的回合中，小鬼可在其回合内以快速动作移动一次，疯狂拍打翅膀四处疾飞。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This creature has resist damage 13+ to all damage from magic sources (even magic weapons). When a magic attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 13+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 此生物对所有魔法来源（包括魔法武器）的伤害具有13+抗性。当魔法攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然13+，否则该攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: On rounds when the escalation die is odd the imp may move as a quick action once on its turn, flapping its wings madly as it dashes about.
ast.target: 在升级骰为奇数的回合中，小鬼可在其回合内以快速动作移动一次，疯狂拍打翅膀四处疾飞。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This creature has resist damage 13+ to all damage from magic sources (even magic weapons). When a magic attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 13+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 此生物对所有魔法来源（包括魔法武器）的伤害具有13+抗性。当魔法攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然13+，否则该攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When this imp resists magic while the escalation die is odd, it takes no damage instead of half damage, and the crit range for all bone imp mage-eaters’ attacks expand by 1 (to a maximum of 6+) until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 当此小鬼在升级骰为奇数时抵抗魔法，它将不受到任何伤害（而非一半伤害），且所有骨魔噬法者的攻击重击范围扩大1（最大至6+），直至战斗结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle when the tormentor imp hits with a natural even attack roll it does an extra 2d6 ongoing acid damage (easy save 6+ ends).
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，当折磨者小鬼以自然偶数攻击骰命中时，它额外造成2d6持续酸蚀伤害（简易豁免6+结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: On rounds when the escalation die is odd the imp may fly as a quick action once on its turn, landing at the end of its movement.
ast.target: 在升级骰为奇数的回合中，小鬼可在其回合内以快速动作飞行一次，并在移动结束时落地。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the boombug hits with gnawing teeth, the target takes a -5 penalty to disengage checks until it’s no longer engaged with the boombug.
ast.target: 当爆炸虫以啃噬之齿命中时，目标在脱离与爆炸虫的接触前，其脱离检定受到-5减值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target loses a recovery, OR it must immediately roll a save; if it fails, it’s confused (save ends) (target’s choice).
ast.target: 目标失去一次恢复机会，或者必须立即进行一次豁免；若失败，则陷入困惑（通过豁免结束）（由目标选择）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: For every two brain-absorber xombies in the battle (round up), one of them can use brain-ripping tentacles, mass confusion, or psychic crush once during the battle.
ast.target: 每场战斗中，每两名脑吸僵尸（向上取整），其中一名可在战斗中使用一次撕脑触手、群体困惑或心灵碾压。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle, the brain-absorber xombie can take no actions during its turn to allow 1d4 nearby lower-level allies to take an extra standard action during their next turns.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，脑吸僵尸在其回合内可以不采取任何行动，以允许附近1d4个等级较低的盟友在其下一回合中获得一个额外的标准动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: During its turn when one or more nearby enemies are staggered, the braincap uses focused brain blast. When no enemies are staggered, the braincap uses hallucinogenia if its hit points are even, and psionic filaments if its hit points are odd.
ast.target: 在其回合内，当附近有一个或多个敌人处于蹒跚状态时，脑帽使用聚焦脑爆。当没有敌人处于蹒跚状态时，如果其生命值为偶数，脑帽使用幻觉菌素；如果其生命值为奇数，则使用灵能丝线。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The briar elf assassin can green walk as a move action instead of a standard action this turn.
ast.target: 本回合内，荆棘精灵刺客可以将绿色行走作为移动动作而非标准动作来使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Twice per battle make a barbed arrows attack as a quick action
ast.target:
每场战斗两次，以快速动作进行一次倒刺箭攻击

\n

ast.name: description
ast.source: This monster’s type is [plant]. Once per battle when this monster reappears after its green walk it does triple damage instead of double damage.
ast.target: 此怪物的类型为[植物]。每场战斗一次，当此怪物在绿色行走后重新出现时，它造成三倍伤害而非双倍伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This monster’s type is [undead]. Once per battle when the escalation die is 4+ and this monster green walks it immediately gets another turn.
ast.target: 此怪物的类型为[亡灵]。每场战斗一次，当升级骰为4+且此怪物绿色行走时，它立即获得另一个回合。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When this monster green walks it heals 1d4 x 20 hit points
ast.target: 当此怪物绿色行走时，它恢复1d4 x 20点生命值

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enemies engaged with this briar elf who have fewer than 96 hp are dazed (-4 attack) and can’t use the escalation die.
ast.target: 与此外荆棘精灵交战且生命值低于96点的敌人会陷入眩晕状态（攻击-4），并且无法使用升级骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ongoing poison damage can’t be saved against while the briar elf that inflicted it still lives and is in the battle.
ast.target: 只要造成此持续毒素伤害的荆棘精灵仍然存活且在战斗中，该持续毒素伤害就无法被豁免。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the briar elf is targeted by an opportunity attack, it makes a thorn claws attack against the creature that is targeting it first.
ast.target: 当荆棘精灵成为借机攻击的目标时，它会先对攻击它的生物进行一次荆棘爪攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The briar elf can make the Bramble bow attack
ast.target: 荆棘精灵可以进行荆棘弓攻击

ast.name: description
ast.source: This monster’s type is [plant]. This monster has resist weapons 16+ (weapon attacks that roll less than a natural 16 deal only half damage).
ast.target: 此怪物的类型为[植物]。此怪物拥有武器抗性16+（武器攻击若掷骰结果低于自然16，则只造成一半伤害）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This monster’s type is [undead]. Provided it is next to a tree, this monster can teleport to a different nearby tree as a move action.
ast.target: 此怪物的类型为[亡灵]。只要它紧邻一棵树，它就可以作为移动动作传送到附近另一棵树旁。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an attacker misses this monster with a melee attack, the attacker takes 12 damage.
ast.target: 当攻击者对此怪物的近战攻击未命中时，攻击者受到12点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enemies engaged with this briar elf who have fewer than 30 hp are dazed (-4 attack) and can’t use the escalation die.
ast.target: 与此外荆棘精灵交战且生命值低于30点的敌人会陷入眩晕状态（攻击-4），并且无法使用升级骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: On turns when the escalation die is even the briar elf slayer uses the escalation die, and any enemy engaged with it does not.
ast.target: 当升级骰为偶数时，荆棘精灵杀手使用升级骰，而任何与其交战的敌人则不能使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target becomes vulnerable to flesh to bark until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 目标获得对血肉化树的易伤状态，直到战斗结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target must make 4 last gasp saves, as it struggles to avoid turning into a tree.
ast.target: 目标必须进行4次最后挣扎豁免，因为它正在挣扎以避免变成一棵树。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle, for one turn; storm of thorns becomes a quick action to use.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，持续一回合；荆棘风暴变为快速动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This monster’s type is [plant]. Every time the briar elf sorcerer misses with its flesh to bark attack, its crit range with that attack expands by 1.
ast.target: 此怪物的类型为[植物]。每次荆棘精灵法师的血肉化树攻击未命中时，该攻击的重击范围扩大1。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enemies engaged with this briar elf who have fewer than 72 hp are dazed (-4 attack) and can’t use the escalation die.
ast.target: 与此外荆棘精灵交战且生命值低于72点的敌人会陷入眩晕状态（攻击-4），并且无法使用升级骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: On turns when the escalation die is even, the briar elf sorcerer uses the escalation die, and each staggered adventurer does not.
ast.target: 当升级骰为偶数时，荆棘精灵法师使用升级骰，而每个处于蹒跚状态的冒险者则不能使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 80 ongoing damage. Aftereffect: When the target saves against the poison damage it becomes dazed (-4 attack) until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 造成80点持续伤害。后续效果：当目标通过毒素伤害的豁免检定时，它会陷入眩晕状态（攻击检定-4），直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Until the end of the battle the target’s saves against poison damage all become hard saves (16+).
ast.target: 直到战斗结束，目标对毒素伤害的所有豁免检定都变为困难豁免（16+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This monster’s type is [plant]. Whenever the briar elf sovereign is standing on soil and doesn’t move on its turn it heals 14 hit points.
ast.target: 此怪物的类型为[植物]。每当荆棘精灵君主站在土壤上且在其回合内未移动时，它恢复14点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This monster’s type is [undead]. Other undead refuse to fight this monster (sorry necromancers). Cleric attack spells that target this monster only deal half damage on a hit.
ast.target: 此怪物的类型为[亡灵]。其他亡灵拒绝与该怪物战斗（抱歉，死灵法师们）。牧师针对此怪物的攻击法术在命中时只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enemies engaged with this briar elf who have fewer than 120 hp are dazed (-4 attack) and can’t use the escalation die.
ast.target: 与该荆棘精灵交战且生命值低于120的敌人会陷入眩晕状态（攻击检定-4），并且无法使用升级骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: On turns when the escalation die is even the briar elves uses the escalation die, and their enemies do not.
ast.target: 当升级骰为偶数时，荆棘精灵使用升级骰，而它们的敌人则不能使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The briar elf can green walk as a move action instead of a standard action this turn.
ast.target: 该荆棘精灵可以将绿色行走作为移动动作而非标准动作来执行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Provided the briar elf stalker is next to a tree, as a standard action they can step into the tree and disappear. At the start of their next turn they reappear next to another nearby tree, and hit or miss their attack does double damage.
ast.target: 只要荆棘精灵潜行者紧邻一棵树，它就可以作为标准动作步入树中并消失。在其下一回合开始时，它会出现在附近另一棵树旁，无论攻击是否命中，其伤害都会翻倍。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Twice per battle, make a barbed arrows attack as a quick action.
ast.target: 每场战斗两次，可以快速动作进行一次带刺箭矢攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This monster’s type is [plant]. Once per battle when this monster reappears after its green walk it does triple damage instead of double damage.
ast.target: 此怪物的类型为[植物]。每场战斗一次，当此怪物通过绿色行走重新出现时，其伤害变为三倍而非两倍。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This monster’s type is [undead]. Once per battle when the escalation die is 4+, this monster green walks it immediately gets another turn.
ast.target: 此怪物的类型为[亡灵]。每场战斗一次，当升级骰为4+时，此怪物进行绿色行走后会立即获得另一个回合。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When this monster green walks it heals 1d4 x 10 hit points.
ast.target: 当此怪物绿色行走时，它恢复1d4 x 10点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enemies engaged with this briar elf who have fewer than 48 hp are dazed (-4 attack) and can’t use the escalation die.
ast.target: 与该荆棘精灵交战且生命值低于48的敌人会陷入眩晕状态（攻击检定-4），并且无法使用升级骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: For each nearby enemy that is taking ongoing damage, the briar elf warrior’s attacks deal an additional 10 poison damage, hit or miss.
ast.target: 每有一个正在承受持续伤害的附近敌人，荆棘精灵战士的攻击就会额外造成10点毒素伤害，无论命中与否。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
The briar elf can make the following ranged attack:

 

R: Bramble bow +14 vs. AC (1 nearby or far away enemy)—40 damage
ast.target:
该荆棘精灵可以进行以下远程攻击：

\n

 

\n

远程：荆棘之弓 +14 vs. AC（1个附近或远处的敌人）—40点伤害

ast.name: description
ast.source: This monster’s type is [plant]. This monster has resist weapons 16+ (weapon attacks that roll less than a natural 16 deal only half damage).
ast.target: 此怪物的类型为[植物]。此怪物拥有武器抗性16+（武器攻击的自然骰低于16时只造成一半伤害）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an attacker misses this monster with a melee attack, the attacker takes 24 damage.
ast.target: 当攻击者用近战攻击未命中此怪物时，攻击者会受到24点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enemies engaged with this briar elf who have fewer than 60 hp are dazed (-4 attack) and can’t use the escalation die.
ast.target: 与该荆棘精灵交战且生命值低于60的敌人会陷入眩晕状态（攻击检定-4），并且无法使用升级骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: On turns when the escalation die is even the briar elf warrior uses the escalation die, and any enemy engaged with it does not.
ast.target: 当升级骰为偶数时，荆棘精灵战士使用升级骰，而任何与其交战的敌人都不能使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The briar elf warrior has +4 to all its defenses against attacks by creatures suffering ongoing poison damage.
ast.target: 荆棘精灵战士对所有正在承受持续毒素伤害的生物的攻击，其所有防御值+4。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 该荆棘精灵恢复20点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a briar elf next to a briar tree takes damage, half that damage is dealt to the tree instead.
ast.target: 当紧邻荆棘树的荆棘精灵受到伤害时，一半伤害会转由树木承受。

ast.name: description
ast.source: They can move, but they still can’t be moved.
ast.target: 它们可以移动，但仍然无法被移动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If there is at least one non-mook ally of the broken shade still in the fight, add another broken shade to the mob.
ast.target: 如果破碎暗影的非木偶盟友中至少还有一名仍在战斗中，则向该群体中再添加一个破碎暗影。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Broken shades do not take miss damage from weapons.
ast.target: 破碎暗影不会受到武器造成的失手伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a member of the mob dies, other broken shades gain +1 to damage until the end of the battle (max +4).
ast.target: 当群体中的一名成员死亡时，其他破碎暗影获得+1伤害加成，直到战斗结束（最多+4）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Being made of stone has its benefits. The taranar are immune to almost all effects—they cannot be dazed, weakened, confused, or made vulnerable to anything beyond those energies they are already vulnerable to (fire and cold; see below). Taranar are also immune to ongoing damage.
ast.target: 由石头构成有其好处。塔拉纳免疫几乎所有效果——它们不会被眩晕、虚弱、困惑，也不会变得对除它们已有的弱点（火焰和寒冷；见下文）之外的任何能量易伤。塔拉纳也免疫持续伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per round, if the broken taranar misses its target with a natural even roll, it can immediately pop free, move to engage a nearby enemy it was not engaged with, and attack. If it misses that enemy, it cannot attempt another attack until its next turn.
ast.target: 每轮一次，如果破碎的塔拉纳以自然偶数攻击骰未命中目标，它可以立即脱离接触，移动并攻击一个它未接触的附近敌人。如果它未命中该敌人，则在其下一回合之前不能尝试再次攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy not engaged with the bronze errant rolls a natural odd attack roll against it, the bronze errant can make a gleaming perfection attack against that enemy as a free action.
ast.target: 当一名未与青铜游侠接触的敌人以自然奇数攻击骰攻击它时，青铜游侠可以对该敌人进行一次“闪耀完美”攻击，作为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enemies engaged with the bronze errant and wearing magical heavy armor who roll a natural odd attack are vulnerable until the start of their next turn, as they exaggeratedly act out their armor’s quirk.
ast.target: 与青铜游侠接触且穿着魔法重甲的敌人，如果掷出自然奇数攻击骰，则在其下一回合开始前处于易伤状态，因为他们夸张地表现出其盔甲的怪癖。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Bronze errants are immune to effects. They can’t be dazed, weakened, confused, made vulnerable, or touched by ongoing damage. You can damage one, but that’s about it.
ast.target: 青铜游侠免疫效果。它们不会被眩晕、虚弱、困惑、变得易伤，也不会受到持续伤害的影响。你可以伤害一个，但仅此而已。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 目标被眩晕（通过豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Non-organic golems are immune to effects. They can’t be dazed, weakened, confused, made vulnerable, or touched by ongoing damage. You can damage a golem, but that’s about it.
ast.target: 非有机构装体免疫效果。它们不会被眩晕、虚弱、困惑、变得易伤，也不会受到持续伤害的影响。你可以伤害一个构装体，但仅此而已。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 18+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然18+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die reaches 3+, the bronze golem gains a bonus to its first gong-like fists of bronze attack roll each turn equal to the number of attacks made against it so far that turn. (Each turn is separate, not cumulative.)
ast.target: 当升级骰达到3+时，青铜构装体在其每回合的第一次“青铜钟鸣之拳”攻击骰上获得加值，加值等于该回合中已对其发动的攻击次数。（每回合单独计算，不累积。）

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy engaged with the bronze golem misses it with a melee attack, that enemy takes 2d12 damage.
ast.target: 当一名与青铜构装体接触的敌人以一次近战攻击未命中它时，该敌人受到2d12点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy not engaged with the bronze kingsguard rolls a natural odd attack roll against it, the bronze kingsguard can make a *gleaming perfection* attack against that enemy as a free action.
ast.target: 当一名未与青铜王卫接触的敌人以自然奇数攻击骰攻击它时，青铜王卫可以对该敌人进行一次*闪耀完美*攻击，作为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Engaged enemies wearing magical heavy armor who roll an odd attack roll are vulnerable until the start of their next turn, as they exaggeratedly act out their armor’s quirk.
ast.target: 接触的敌人如果穿着魔法重甲且掷出奇数攻击骰，则在其下一回合开始前处于易伤状态，因为他们夸张地表现出其盔甲的怪癖。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Bronze kingsguards are immune to effects. They can’t be dazed, weakened, confused, made vulnerable, or touched by ongoing damage. You can damage one, but that’s about it.
ast.target: 青铜王卫免疫效果。它们不会被眩晕、虚弱、困惑、变得易伤，也不会受到持续伤害的影响。你可以伤害一个，但仅此而已。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each of the bugbear schemer’s nearby humanoid allies gains a +2 bonus to melee attacks until the start of the schemer’s next turn.
ast.target: 熊地精诡术师附近的所有类人生物盟友获得+2近战攻击加成，直到诡术师的下一回合开始。

ast.name: description
ast.source: During the bugbear schemer’s turn, if it doesn’t engage an enemy or move, it regains a use of ridiculously heavy crossbow if it’s expended as it reloads the crossbow.
ast.target: 在熊地精诡术师的回合内，如果它不接触敌人或不移动，它可以在装填弩箭时恢复一次“荒谬重弩”的使用次数（如果已消耗）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the bugbear schemer successfully disengages, one of the enemies engaged with it takes 1d6 damage.
ast.target: 当熊地精诡术师成功脱离接触时，与它接触的一名敌人受到1d6点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the bugbear schemer thinks the battle is out of reach and it isn’t engaged, it can try to flee once per battle. As a move action, roll a hard save. On a success, the bugbear schemer had a bolt-hole or escape plan ready and it gets away (though it’s probably just getting more troops).
ast.target: 当熊地精诡术师认为战斗已无法挽回且它未接触敌人时，它每场战斗可以尝试逃跑一次。作为移动动作，进行一次困难豁免。成功时，熊地精诡术师已准备好藏身处或逃跑计划并逃脱（尽管它很可能只是去搬更多救兵）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The bugbear scout gains a +5 bonus to disengage checks, and when it successfully disengages, one of the enemies engaged with it takes 1d6 damage.
ast.target: 熊地精斥候获得+5脱离接触检定加值，并且当它成功脱离接触时，与它接触的一名敌人受到1d6点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If both claws hit during the same turn, the bulette can make a terrible bite attack during its next turn as a standard action.
ast.target: 如果双爪在同一回合命中，布雷特可以在其下一回合以标准动作发动一次可怕的撕咬攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The bulette’s crit range expands to 16+ while the escalation die is 4+.
ast.target: 当升级骰为4+时，布雷特的重击范围扩展至16+。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A bulette can burrow incredibly quickly for short distances. They’re renowned for the mounds of dirt and rock they push above them as they surge through the ground like land torpedoes.
ast.target: 布雷特能在短距离内进行极其快速的掘地移动。它们以在地下如鱼雷般穿行时，将大量泥土和岩石推至上方而闻名。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an attacker scores a critical hit against the bulette and it survives, the bulette can make a terrible bite attack as a free action against one target engaged with it.
ast.target: 当攻击者对布雷特造成重击且布雷特存活时，布雷特可以自由动作对一名与其交战的目标发动一次可怕的撕咬攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target begins to laugh and laugh and laugh… laughing up 2d3 giggling demons and adding them to the fight. The newly arrived demons act immediately after the cackling demon that made the attack.
ast.target: 目标开始大笑不止……笑声中召唤出2d3个咯咯笑的恶魔加入战斗。新出现的恶魔在发动攻击的咯咯笑恶魔之后立即行动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a quick action the cackling demon eats one or more mook demons of its own level or lower (consuming up to six), and either recharges its once per battle special for screams of laughter OR one nearby demon heals 1d20 hp per mook demon eaten.
ast.target: 作为快速动作，咯咯笑恶魔吞噬一个或多个同级或更低级的杂兵恶魔（最多吞噬六个），并可以选择：要么重充其每战一次的狂笑尖啸特殊能力，要么使附近一名恶魔每吞噬一个杂兵恶魔恢复1d20生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The cambion becomes cloaked until it’s hit by an attack against MD or until it misses with a natural odd attack roll.
ast.target: 坎比恩获得隐身状态，直到被一次针对精神防御的攻击命中，或直到其使用自然奇数攻击骰未命中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While cloaked, the cambion dirk automatically succeeds on all disengage checks.
ast.target: 隐身时，坎比恩匕首在所有脱离战斗检定中自动成功。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is confused until the end of its next turn, or if the cambion was cloaked when it attacked, the confusion is save ends.
ast.target: 目标陷入困惑状态，直到其下一回合结束；或者，如果坎比恩在攻击时处于隐身状态，则困惑效果持续至目标通过豁免为止。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 攻击者受到15点毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The cambion hellblade starts every battle cloaked. As a quick action, the hellblade can drop its cloaking to make a spiky headbutt attack as a free action.
ast.target: 坎比恩地狱刃在每场战斗开始时处于隐身状态。作为快速动作，地狱刃可以解除隐身状态，以自由动作发动一次尖刺头槌攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While cloaked, the cambion hellblade automatically succeeds on all disengage checks, gains a +2 bonus to all defenses against close and ranged attacks, and can drop its cloaking as a quick action to teleport to a nearby location it can see (instead of making an extra attack).
ast.target: 隐身时，坎比恩地狱刃在所有脱离战斗检定中自动成功，对近程和远程攻击的所有防御获得+2加值，并且可以作为快速动作解除隐身状态，传送到其可见的附近位置（而非发动额外攻击）。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 攻击者受到5点毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While cloaked, the cambion katar automatically succeeds on all disengage checks and gains a +2 bonus to all defenses against close and ranged attacks.
ast.target: 隐身时，坎比恩拳刃在所有脱离战斗检定中自动成功，并对近程和远程攻击的所有防御获得+2加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While cloaked, the cambion sickle automatically succeeds on all disengage checks and gains a +2 bonus to all defenses against ranged attacks.
ast.target: 隐身时，坎比恩镰刀在所有脱离战斗检定中自动成功，并对远程攻击的所有防御获得+2加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragon regains the use of its caustic breath if it’s expended and can use it during its next turn.
ast.target: 巨龙恢复其腐蚀吐息的使用次数（如果已耗尽），并可以在其下一回合使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While in the haze, the target is dazed from choking or blinding.
ast.target: 在雾气中时，目标因窒息或致盲而陷入眩晕状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While in the haze, the target takes a -5 penalty to all saves against acid damage.
ast.target: 在雾气中时，目标对酸液伤害的所有豁免检定承受-5减值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: the mist can be burned, condensed/frozen, blown away, absorbed, transmuted, etc. At the GM’s discretion, there may be physical ways to remove the haze, but it should require a hard DC.
ast.target: 雾气可以被燃烧、凝结/冻结、吹散、吸收、转化等。由游戏主持人裁定，可能存在移除雾气的物理方法，但这应需要通过一个困难难度等级的检定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A catacomb dragon flies reasonably well, powerful and fast in a straight line though it’s not as maneuverable as more agile flyers. It can also burrow quickly and effectively due to the acidic coating on its skin.
ast.target: 地下墓穴龙飞行能力相当不错，直线飞行时强大而快速，但不如更敏捷的飞行生物灵活。由于其皮肤上的酸性涂层，它也能快速有效地掘地移动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy is engaged with the catacomb dragon at the start of its turn, it takes 3 acid damage.
ast.target: 当敌人在地下墓穴龙的回合开始时与其交战，该敌人受到3点酸液伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an acid attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 14+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次酸液攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然14+，否则攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Increase the DC to sneak past cave orcs silently by +5.
ast.target: 将潜行通过穴居兽人而不被发现的难度等级提升+5。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the battle is at night (or in darkness), the orc gains a +2 attack bonus. If the battle is during the day (or in daylight) it takes a -2 penalty to all defenses.
ast.target: 如果战斗发生在夜间（或黑暗中），兽人获得+2攻击加值。如果战斗发生在白天（或光亮中），它对所有防御承受-2减值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The cenotaph dragon can make an infused ice breath attack as a free action.
ast.target: 纪念碑龙可以自由动作发动一次灌注寒冰吐息攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 5 ongoing holy damage (in addition to double damage for crit).
ast.target: 目标还会受到5点持续神圣伤害（暴击伤害翻倍除外）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a cold or negative energy attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 12+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当寒冷或负能量攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然12点或更高，否则该攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a standard action, the centaur champion can make a crushing hooves attack and a single two-handed sword attack (one attack roll) against the same enemy.
ast.target: 作为标准动作，半人马勇士可以对同一敌人进行一次粉碎蹄击攻击和一次双手剑攻击（一次攻击骰）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the centaur champion engages an enemy, each other centaur ally engaged with that creature can pop free from it.
ast.target: 当半人马勇士与一名敌人交战时，其他与该生物交战的半人马盟友可以脱离该生物。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The centaur champion gains a +4 AC bonus against opportunity attacks and only takes half damage from opportunity attacks that hit it. When an enemy makes an opportunity attack against it and misses, that enemy takes 20 damage from a counter-attack.
ast.target: 半人马勇士对抗借机攻击时获得+4护甲加值，且受到的借机攻击伤害减半。当敌人对它发动借机攻击未命中时，该敌人会受到20点反击伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the champion issues a champion’s challenge, it only takes a -2 attack penalty against other enemies than its chosen foe, but that enemy still takes the -4 attack penalty. In addition, the champion can use champion’s challenge as a free action when it becomes staggered.
ast.target: 当勇士发起勇士挑战时，它对除选定敌人外的其他敌人只承受-2攻击惩罚，但该敌人仍承受-4攻击惩罚。此外，当勇士陷入蹒跚状态时，可以将其作为自由动作使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each of the champion’s centaur allies in the battle gains a +5 damage bonus with ranged attacks.
ast.target: 战斗中勇士的每位半人马盟友在远程攻击时获得+5伤害加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is also dazed until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 目标还会被震慑，直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The centaur lancer can make a kick attack as a free action.
ast.target: 半人马枪骑兵可以将踢击作为自由动作发动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The crit range of the attack expands by 2 and instead deals 20 damage on a hit if the centaur first moves before attacking an enemy it wasn’t engaged with at the start of its turn.
ast.target: 如果半人马在攻击一名回合开始时未与其交战的敌人前先移动，则该攻击的暴击范围扩大2点，且命中时造成20点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The centaur lancer gains a +4 AC bonus against opportunity attacks.
ast.target: 半人马枪骑兵对抗借机攻击时获得+4护甲加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a free action, the centaur raider can move and make another hoof and weapon attack against a different nearby enemy (it will take opportunity attacks for moving).
ast.target: 作为自由动作，半人马掠袭者可以移动并对另一名附近的敌人发动一次蹄击和武器攻击（移动会引发借机攻击）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The centaur raider can take an additional move action this turn.
ast.target: 半人马掠袭者本回合可以额外进行一次移动动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The centaur raider gains a +4 AC bonus against opportunity attacks and only takes half damage from opportunity attacks that hit it.
ast.target: 半人马掠袭者对抗借机攻击时获得+4护甲加值，且受到的借机攻击伤害减半。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die is even, the centaur raider can use a standard action and a move action to make a sweeping blow attack against multiple enemies as it moves past them (it will take opportunity attacks). It ends this move and attack unengaged.
ast.target: 当升级骰为偶数时，半人马掠袭者可以使用一个标准动作和一个移动动作，在移动经过多名敌人时发动横扫攻击（会引发借机攻击）。它在本次移动和攻击后处于未交战状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The centaur ranger can take an additional move action this turn.
ast.target: 半人马游侠本回合可以额外进行一次移动动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The centaur ranger can make a second (but not a third) longbow attack this turn as a free action.
ast.target: 半人马游侠本回合可以作为自由动作发动第二次（但不能是第三次）长弓攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is stuck (save ends) instead of hampered.
ast.target: 目标改为陷入束缚（通过豁免结束），而非受阻。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The centaur ranger gains a +4 AC bonus against opportunity attacks and only takes half damage from opportunity attacks that hit it. When an enemy makes an opportunity attack against it and misses, that enemy takes 10 damage from a counter-attack.
ast.target: 半人马游侠对抗借机攻击时获得+4护甲加值，且受到的借机攻击伤害减半。当敌人对它发动借机攻击未命中时，该敌人会受到10点反击伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 7 damage, and the chaos beast can make another bestial chaos attack as a free action.
ast.target: 7点伤害，且混沌兽可以作为自由动作再发动一次野性混沌攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once a chaos beast is staggered, it can combine with another chaos beast next to it as a quick action to become a full-strength chaos brute acting on this beast’s initiative. Replace the other beast with a chaos glorp mook.
ast.target: 一旦混沌兽陷入蹒跚状态，它可以作为快速动作与相邻的另一只混沌兽合体，成为一只满状态的混沌巨兽，并在此兽的先攻回合行动。用一只混沌粘液兵替换另一只混沌兽。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 30 damage, and the chaos behemoth can make a mewhowlwail attack as a free action.
ast.target: 30点伤害，且混沌巨兽可以作为自由动作发动一次嚎哭攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: the new creature rolls initiative as if it had just entered the battle. If a chaos beast and a chaos brute combine to create a chaos behemoth, the behemoth starts with 70 hp instead of 90 hp and takes a -1 penalty to all attacks and defenses.
ast.target: 新生物如同刚刚进入战斗般进行先攻检定。如果一只混沌兽和一只混沌蛮兽结合创造出一只混沌巨兽，该巨兽以70点生命值而非90点生命值开始，并且所有攻击和防御受到-1减值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die reaches 6, the chaos glorp rolls a normal save. If it succeeds, it transforms into a chaos beast with full hit points.
ast.target: 当升级骰达到6时，混沌粘怪进行一次普通豁免。如果成功，它将变形为一只拥有全部生命值的混沌兽。

ast.name: description
ast.source: After the attack, this head may shift into a new head; roll 1d6 to determine the new (or maybe repeated!) head.
ast.target: 攻击后，此头部可能会转变为一个新的头部；掷1d6来决定新的（或可能是重复的！）头部。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Make a second *minor breath weapon* attack against a random different nearby enemy. This second attack lacks this natural even hit trigger.
ast.target: 对一名随机的附近不同敌人进行第二次*次级吐息武器*攻击。这第二次攻击不具备此自然偶数命中触发效果。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 目标陷入虚弱状态（豁免终止）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: On its turn, the chaos hydra can use any of its teeth attacks against nearby creatures it can see and get to, but has a -2 attack penalty when using teeth attacks against creatures it not engaged with.
ast.target: 在其回合内，混沌九头蛇可以使用其任何牙齿攻击来攻击它能看到并能触及的附近生物，但在对未交战的生物使用牙齿攻击时，攻击骰受到-2减值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The chaos hydra’s attacks deal full damage against creatures it has not already hit this turn. If the chaos hydra attacks a creature it has hit earlier in the turn, the attack only deals half damage, hit or miss or crit.
ast.target: 混沌九头蛇的攻击对本回合尚未命中的生物造成全额伤害。如果混沌九头蛇攻击本回合早些时候已命中的生物，无论命中、未命中或暴击，该攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever the chaos hydra would suffer any of the following conditions, it ignores the condition and takes 10 damage instead: confused, dazed, hampered, stunned, or weakened.
ast.target: 每当混沌九头蛇将受到以下任何状态时，它会忽略该状态并改为受到10点伤害：困惑、眩晕、受阻、震慑或虚弱。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The second time the hydra is staggered, as a free action it gains 70 hit points and a random sixth head, etc. Use a new hit point baseline as before, but there is no seventh head waiting to sprout.
ast.target: 当九头蛇第二次进入濒死状态时，作为自由动作，它获得70点生命值和一个随机的第六个头部，等等。像之前一样使用新的生命值基准，但不会有第七个头部等待萌发。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is dazed until the end of the chimera’s next turn from a headbutt.
ast.target: 目标因头部撞击而陷入眩晕状态，持续至奇美拉的下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 20 ongoing damage from raking claws.
ast.target: 目标因利爪撕扯而受到20点持续伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever a creature misses the chimera with a melee attack, the chimera’s multiple sharp bits deal 3d10 damage to that attacker.
ast.target: 每当有生物以近战攻击未命中奇美拉时，奇美拉的多重锋利部位对该攻击者造成3d10点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an attacker scores a critical hit against the chimera and it survives, its attack rolls on its next turn deal the effects of the lower rolls as well as their own results.
ast.target: 当攻击者对奇美拉造成暴击且奇美拉存活时，其下一回合的攻击检定除了自身结果外，还会产生较低掷骰的效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is hampered and weakened (save ends both).
ast.target: 目标陷入受阻和虚弱状态（两项均需豁免终止）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is instead helpless (hard save ends, 16+).
ast.target: 目标改为陷入无助状态（困难豁免终止，16+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This attack only requires a quick action when used against an enemy the chuul is grabbing.
ast.target: 当此攻击用于对付寇涛鱼人正在抓住的敌人时，只需一个快速动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a psychic attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次心灵攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然16+，否则该攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Chuuls swim well and can breathe underwater, though they prefer not to.
ast.target: 寇涛鱼人游泳能力出色，可以在水下呼吸，尽管它们更倾向于不在水下。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the chuul scores a critical hit against a weakened or helpless foe, it bites off one of that enemy’s hands. An adventurer with no hands might have trouble casting spells or holding weapons. (A cleric might be able to restore the missing appendage with a ritual.)
ast.target: 当寇涛鱼人对一名虚弱或无助的敌人造成暴击时，它会咬掉该敌人的一只手。没有双手的冒险者在施法或持握武器时可能会遇到麻烦。（牧师或许能通过仪式恢复缺失的肢体。）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per round when the chuul misses with an attack, its next attack that battle deals 4d6 extra poison damage on a hit.
ast.target: 每轮一次，当寇涛鱼人攻击未命中时，其在该战斗中的下一次攻击命中时额外造成4d6点毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The chuulish slave can make a writhing tentacles attack against that target as a quick action this turn.
ast.target: 寇涛鱼人奴隶可以在本回合对该目标进行一次扭动触手攻击，作为快速动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The slave gains a +2 AC bonus.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The writhing tentacles attack also deals 10 acid damage on a hit.
ast.target: 扭动触手攻击在命中时还会造成10点酸蚀伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a melee attack hits the chuulish slave, the attacker takes 10 poison damage.
ast.target: 当近战攻击命中丘尔奴隶时，攻击者受到10点毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The slave is a large blob-like mess. It has 72 HP but takes a -2 penalty to all defenses.
ast.target: 该奴隶是一个巨大的团状物。它拥有72点生命值，但所有防御检定受到-2点惩罚。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The swarm can pop free from all enemies, and as a quick action this turn, it can move normally even if it has already moved this turn.
ast.target: 该虫群可以从所有敌人处脱离，并且在本回合内，它可以以一个快速动作正常移动，即使它本回合已经移动过。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The swarm can make a sharp claws attack this turn as a quick action instead of a standard action.
ast.target: 该虫群可以在本回合以一个快速动作（而非标准动作）进行一次利爪攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The swarm flies fast and is agile, but has a wide turning circle.
ast.target: 该虫群飞行速度快且敏捷，但转弯半径较大。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When any attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当任何攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然16点或以上，否则该攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This monster is a swarm of chuul body-parts cooperating to attack humanoids. Even though there are thousands of them, treat them as a single creature.
ast.target: 这个怪物是一群丘尔身体部件协同攻击类人生物。尽管数量成千上万，但将其视为单个生物处理。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an attacker misses the swarm with a melee attack, that enemy takes 10 ongoing damage.
ast.target: 当攻击者以近战攻击未命中该虫群时，该敌人受到10点持续伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Requires a standard action to reload, starts the battle loaded.
ast.target: 需要一个标准动作来装填，战斗开始时已装填。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle when any minotaur is popped free or is otherwise forced to move, all city minotaur guards can move into engagement as an immediate free action.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，当任何牛头人被击退或被迫移动时，所有城市牛头人守卫可以立即以一个即时自由动作进入交战状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The claw flower takes 1d4 damage from burst roots.
ast.target: 爪花受到来自爆发根须的1d4点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 4 psychic damage, and the target is confused until end of its next turn.
ast.target: 4点心灵伤害，且目标陷入困惑状态，持续至其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 3 psychic damage, and the target is stuck until end of its next turn.
ast.target: 3点心灵伤害，且目标陷入束缚状态，持续至其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The claw flower has roots and normally can’t move, but when it takes 10 or more damage from a single attack it can move normally during its next turn.
ast.target: 爪花拥有根须，通常无法移动，但当它因单次攻击受到10点或更多伤害时，它可以在下一回合正常移动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The claw flower adds the escalation die to its bumble spores attack rolls.
ast.target: 爪花将其嗡嗡孢子攻击检定加上升级骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle, the claw flower can make a bumble spores attack as a quick action.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，爪花可以以一个快速动作进行一次嗡嗡孢子攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A non-dwarf creature damaged by a clay golem can’t be healed to above half its maximum hit points until after the battle.
ast.target: 被粘土魔像伤害的非矮人生物，在战斗结束前无法被治疗至超过其最大生命值的一半。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an attack hits this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 11+ on the attack roll or it misses instead. That’s all attacks.
ast.target: 当攻击命中此生物时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然11点或以上，否则该攻击视为未命中。此规则适用于所有攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A cloud giant gains a +4 attack bonus against any enemy taking ongoing damage or that has an ongoing condition (unconscious sleep, for instance).
ast.target: 云巨人对任何正在承受持续伤害或具有持续状态（例如，昏迷睡眠）的敌人获得+4攻击加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target loses any flight abilities and can’t gain flight in any way (save ends).
ast.target: 目标失去所有飞行能力，并且无法以任何方式获得飞行能力（通过豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The thane can make a chains and shrapnel attack as a free action.
ast.target: 领主可以以一个自由动作进行一次锁链与弹片攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A cloud giant gains a +4 attack bonus against any enemy taking ongoing damage or that has an ongoing condition (dazed, for instance).
ast.target: 云巨人对任何正在承受持续伤害或具有持续状态（例如，眩晕）的敌人获得+4攻击加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A cloud giant gains a +4 attack bonus against any enemy taking ongoing damage or that has an ongoing condition (dazed, for instance).
ast.target: 云巨人对任何正在承受持续伤害或具有持续状态（例如，眩晕）的敌人获得+4攻击加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The clubtail can make a second attack.
ast.target: 棒尾龙可以进行第二次攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 皮匠蝠翼怪受到3点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The cobbler has stubby ill-proportioned wings and takes 1d6 damage at the end of each round that it flies during battle.
ast.target: 皮匠蝠翼怪拥有短小且不成比例的翅膀，在战斗中飞行时，每轮结束受到1d6点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A critical hit against the coin collector zombie cancels its lethal payout attack.
ast.target: 对硬币收集僵尸的暴击会取消其致命支付攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 目标被虚弱（直到豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While the target has 120 hp or fewer, it’s dazed from fear and doesn’t add the escalation die to its attacks (save ends all).
ast.target: 当目标生命值为120点或更少时，它会因恐惧而眩晕，并且攻击时不将升级骰加入攻击骰（直到所有豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a holy attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 13+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当神圣攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然13+，否则攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A hubris devil using NPCs to attack the heroes makes it tough for them to know if there are friends or allies among the attackers, forcing the characters to be more careful with their attacks. Any natural 1–5 attack roll against the devil is an automatic miss with no miss damage.
ast.target: 傲慢魔鬼利用NPC攻击英雄，使得英雄们很难分辨攻击者中是否有朋友或盟友，迫使角色们在攻击时更加谨慎。对魔鬼的任何自然1–5攻击骰都是自动未命中，且不造成未命中伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the hubris devil attacks, it gains a surprise round unless the PCs were extremely perceptive (by making a ridiculously hard skill check for tier).
ast.target: 当傲慢魔鬼攻击时，除非PC极其警觉（通过为当前等级进行一个极难的技能检定），否则它获得一个突袭轮。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the treant takes 15 or more fire damage from a single attack, it releases all grabbed creatures.
ast.target: 当树人受到单次攻击15点或更多火焰伤害时，它会释放所有被擒抱的生物。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The treant exudes a toxic cloud of pollen. When an enemy engages the treant or starts its turn engaged with the treant, it takes 4 poison damage.
ast.target: 树人散发出有毒的花粉云。当敌人与树人交战或在其回合开始时与树人交战，它受到4点毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle the conglomerate can launch itself at a nearby enemy as a hail of rubble.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，聚合体可以将自身作为一阵碎石雨投掷向附近的敌人。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is vulnerable to the dybbuk’s attacks until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 目标在战斗结束前对恶灵的攻击处于易伤状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dybbuk gains a fear aura against the target (save ends) as the dybbuk warps its corpse-flesh into a horrifying form. While engaged with the dybbuk, if the scared target has 30 hp or fewer, it’s dazed (-4 attack) and does not add the escalation die to its attacks.
ast.target: 恶灵对目标获得一个恐惧光环（直到豁免结束），因为恶灵将其尸肉扭曲成恐怖形态。当与恶灵交战时，如果受惊的目标生命值为30点或更少，它会眩晕（攻击骰-4）并且攻击时不将升级骰加入攻击骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The couatl can make a forked devastation attack against a different enemy as a free action.
ast.target: 羽蛇神可以对一个不同的敌人进行一次分叉毁灭攻击，作为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This attack only requires a quick action (once per round) to use.
ast.target: 此攻击只需要一个快速动作（每轮一次）即可使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a holy or poison attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当神圣或毒素攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然16+，否则攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Couatls fly and hover so smoothly on their multi-colored wings that other flyers get jealous.
ast.target: 羽蛇神凭借其多彩的翅膀飞行和悬停得如此平稳，以至于其他飞行生物都心生嫉妒。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die is even, the couatl adds the escalation die to its attack rolls.
ast.target: 当升级骰为偶数时，羽蛇神将升级骰加入其攻击骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The couatl can use more than one rippling scales attack during its turn.
ast.target: 羽蛇神在其回合内可以使用不止一次鳞波攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per campaign, the couatl can take a “campaign loss” similar to the PC-oriented flee special action to escape from certain death, along with its allies.
ast.target: 每场战役一次，羽蛇神可以承受一次“战役损失”，类似于PC导向的逃跑特殊动作，以逃离必死之境，并带上其盟友。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose each appropriate ability from the couatl’s Icon-centered Abilities list.
ast.target: 从羽蛇神的图标中心能力列表中选择每个合适的能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The manticore can make a scorpion sting attack against a different target as a free action.
ast.target: 蝎尾狮可以对一个不同的目标进行一次蝎刺攻击，作为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While flying, the manticore can make a scorpion sting attack, pop free from the target, and keep flying to somewhere nearby.
ast.target: 飞行时，蝎尾狮可以进行一次蝎刺攻击，从目标处脱离，并继续飞到附近某处。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Giant batlike dragon wings put the final horrid touch on the coursing manticore’s “everything awful” design aesthetic.
ast.target: 巨大的蝙蝠状龙翼为奔袭的蝎尾狮的“一切皆糟”设计美学画上了最后的恐怖一笔。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each time the manticore uses its scorpion sting attack, it takes 1d6 damage, or 2d6 damage if it’s staggered.
ast.target: 每次蝎尾狮使用其蝎刺攻击时，它受到1d6点伤害，如果它处于蹒跚状态，则受到2d6点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The manticore leaps toward its prey, using its wings to arrow into battle at tremendous speed. During its first turn only, add +6 to its initiative count. After that, the beast returns to its normal initiative order.
ast.target: 蝎尾狮扑向猎物，利用双翼以惊人的速度箭矢般冲入战斗。仅在其第一回合，其先攻值+6。之后，该野兽恢复正常先攻顺序。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Instead of a scorpion tail, the manticore has a spiked tail full of quills and can make volley of tail spikes attacks instead of scorpion sting attacks.
ast.target: 蝎尾狮没有蝎尾，而是长满尖刺的尾巴，可以发动尾刺齐射攻击，而非蝎蜇攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the crimsoncap scores a critical hit OR when a PC or a player at the table says the bad word, the crimsoncap can teleport to a nearby hidden location it can see or can’t see (like inside a closet) as a free action.
