ast.target: 当红帽菇造成重击，或者当桌边的玩家或角色说出禁忌词时，红帽菇可以作为一个自由动作，传送到一个它能看见或看不见的附近隐蔽位置（例如壁橱内）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the crimsoncap starts its turn and no enemy can see it, it can make a pop-out and slash ’em attack that turn as a standard action
ast.target: 当红帽菇开始其回合且没有敌人能看见它时，它可以在该回合以标准动作发动一次突袭斩击攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The crimsoncap has two bad words instead of one. And the PCs find that out the hard way. Write the words down ahead of time to prove you’re not just being a mean GM.
ast.target: 红帽菇有两个禁忌词，而不是一个。玩家角色们会以艰难的方式发现这一点。提前写下这些词，以证明你并非只是个刻薄的GM。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The crustycap can make a single big bloody axe attack against a different nearby enemy as a free action.
ast.target: 老皮帽可以作为一个自由动作，对一名不同的附近敌人发动一次强力血腥斧击攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a PC or a player at the table says the bad word, the crustycap can take an extra standard action during its next turn. Feel free to let the extra actions stack a few times if someone gets cocky.
ast.target: 当桌边的玩家或角色说出禁忌词时，老皮帽可以在其下一回合获得一个额外的标准动作。如果有人过于嚣张，不妨让额外动作累积几次。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Some dainty lizards have a soporific bite that allows them to inject a powerful anesthetic into the wound from a gland located in the roof of its mouth. Make a *soporific bite* triggered attack as a follow-up when the nasty nip attack hits with a natural even roll.
ast.target: 一些纤巧的蜥蜴拥有催眠咬击能力，可以通过位于上颚的腺体向伤口注入强效麻醉剂。当恶毒啃咬攻击以自然偶数骰命中时，作为后续动作，发动一次*催眠咬击*触发攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also moves down 1d6 points in initiative order.
ast.target: 目标的先攻顺序也下降1d6点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The escalation die does not increase the round after a dawn zorigami drops to 0 hp.
ast.target: 当黎明座钟降至0生命值后，下一回合的升级骰不会增加。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 1d6 extra negative energy damage for each unexpended recovery it has.
ast.target: 目标每拥有一次未使用的恢复，就额外受到1d6点负能量伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the target currently has less than its maximum recoveries, it gains a recovery! Gaining a recovery is not healing, but it can use that recovery later to heal as normal.
ast.target: 如果目标当前恢复次数少于其最大恢复次数，它获得一次恢复！获得恢复并非治疗，但它可以稍后像往常一样使用该恢复进行治疗。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the death blossom drops to 0 hit points, it’s destroyed until the start of its next turn. At the start of its next turn, it returns to life as a blood rose or poison dandelion that lacks the black-gray resurgence ability but is otherwise undamaged and whole.
ast.target: 当死亡花降至0生命值时，它被摧毁，直到其下一回合开始。在其下一回合开始时，它复活为一朵血玫瑰或毒蒲公英，该形态缺乏黑灰复苏能力，但除此之外完好无损。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Nearby targets who attack the death knight and roll a 1 take 20 negative energy damage.
ast.target: 攻击死亡骑士并掷出1的附近目标受到20点负能量伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Until the end of the battle, when the target tries to spend a recovery they have to succeed at a save (11+) first. If they fail, they haven’t used their action but can’t spend recoveries that turn.
ast.target: 直到战斗结束，当目标试图使用恢复时，必须先通过一次豁免（11+）。如果失败，它不会消耗动作，但该回合无法使用恢复。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The save to spend a recovery is now a hard save (16+).
ast.target: 使用恢复所需的豁免现在是困难豁免（16+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Until the end of the battle the target cannot spend recoveries.
ast.target: 直到战斗结束，目标无法使用恢复。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Death markers can float on unseen winds, moving through solid objects and creatures as though they were not there. The death marker must still end its move on solid ground and not inside an object or creature.
ast.target: 死亡标记可以漂浮在无形的风中，穿过固体物体和生物，仿佛它们不存在。死亡标记仍必须在坚实的地面上结束移动，且不能位于物体或生物内部。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is dazed until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 目标直到其下一回合结束前处于目眩状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Death shades can hover and fly about easily.
ast.target: 死亡幽影可以轻松悬浮和飞行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a quick action, a death shade can pass through a small or narrow solid object or pop free from all enemies engaged with it. When a creature intercepts a death shade, that creature takes 11 negative energy damage.
ast.target: 作为一个快速动作，死亡幽影可以穿过一个小型或狭窄的固体物体，或从所有与之交战的敌人身边脱离。当一个生物拦截死亡幽影时，该生物受到11点负能量伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A death shade gains a +2 attack bonus against the last creature in the battle to roll a death save. Death shades specifically target dying or helpless creatures unless somebody is actively attacking them while standing over the body of the dying or helpless creature.
ast.target: 死亡幽影对战斗中最后一个进行死亡豁免的生物获得+2攻击加值。死亡幽影专门攻击濒死或无助的生物，除非有人正站在濒死或无助生物的尸体旁积极攻击它们。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target can now only save against the confusion with a natural 20 (or until the warbanner drops) and can’t flee if the rest of the PCs choose to do so.
ast.target: 目标现在只能通过自然20（或直到战旗倒下）来对抗困惑状态进行豁免，并且如果其余玩家角色选择逃跑，它无法逃跑。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per round as a quick action, the warbanner can fly directly above a lower-level ally in its band and designate that ally as its bearer. Alternately, it can release itself from a bearer and fly free.
ast.target: 每轮一次，作为快速动作，战旗可以飞至其战团中一名较低等级盟友的正上方，并指定该盟友为其持旗者。或者，它可以脱离持旗者并自由飞行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While the warbanner has a bearer it moves with the bearer and is engaged by enemies that engage the bearer. The bearer is vulnerable to all attacks but it can use the escalation die.
ast.target: 当战旗拥有持旗者时，它会随持旗者移动，并被攻击持旗者的敌人所牵制。持旗者易受所有攻击，但可以使用升级骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Mooks fighting in the warbanner’s band gain a bonus to their hit points equal to the warbanner’s level (3).
ast.target: 在战旗战团中战斗的杂兵，其生命值获得等同于战旗等级（3）的加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The deep bulette’s crit range expands by 4 while the escalation die is 4+.
ast.target: 当升级骰为4+时，深潜土龙的重击范围扩大4。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the bulette hits an enemy engaged with it with an attack, that target pops free from it and is hampered (save ends).
ast.target: 当土龙用一次攻击命中一名与其交战的敌人时，该目标会从它身上脱离并陷入受阻状态（通过豁免终止）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The deep bulette engages each nearby enemy in front of it as it pushes its bulk inexorably forward down the tunnel. Enemies pushed ahead of it this way don’t get to make opportunity attacks.
ast.target: 深潜土龙在隧道中不可阻挡地向前推进时，会与前方每个近处的敌人交战。被以此方式向前推动的敌人无法进行借机攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 1/battle, and only targeting a creature that is presently saving against the effect of a Protector Icon priest’s staff attack.
ast.target: 每场战斗1次，且只能以当前正在对抗守护者神徽牧师法杖攻击效果的生物为目标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Demon drakes fly like bat-winged dragons. Funny that.
ast.target: 恶魔飞龙像蝙蝠翼龙一样飞行。真有趣。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The demon bow eats at the ranger’s arm and the ranger takes 1d6 damage.
ast.target: 恶魔弓啃噬游侠的手臂，游侠受到1d6点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever an attacker hits the ranger with a melee attack, that creature takes 1d6 damage as the bow chews on it.
ast.target: 每当有攻击者用近战攻击命中游侠时，该生物会因弓的啃噬而受到1d6点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 2 ongoing poison damage (normal save ends).
ast.target: 目标受到2点持续毒素伤害（通过普通豁免终止）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is stuck so long as the Demonic Icon fanatic does not move or die (normal save ends), and the Demonic Icon fanatic’s next *strangling cord* attack against the target gains a +2 bonus to attack and damage.
ast.target: 只要恶魔神徽狂热者不移动或死亡，目标就会被定身（通过普通豁免终止），且恶魔神徽狂热者对该目标的下一次*绞杀之索*攻击在攻击和伤害上获得+2加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is dazed (normal save ends).
ast.target: 目标陷入眩晕状态（通过普通豁免终止）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: One nearby ally gains a +4 bonus to hit on its next attack.
ast.target: 一名近处的盟友在其下一次攻击时获得+4命中加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: All nearby allies get a +1 AC bonus (cumulative!) until the Demonic Icon priest drops to 0 hit points.
ast.target: 所有近处的盟友获得+1护甲加值（可累积！），直到恶魔神徽牧师生命值降至0。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Every use of *liturgy of the Abyss* reduces one random nearby Demonic Icon fanatic to 0 hp. If there are no Demonic Icon fanatics nearby, the Demonic Icon priest cannot use *liturgy of the Abyss*.
ast.target: 每次使用*深渊圣言*会随机将一名近处的恶魔神徽狂热者生命值降至0。如果附近没有恶魔神徽狂热者，则恶魔神徽牧师无法使用*深渊圣言*。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Demonic Icon wizard can make an *accursed bolt* attack against a second nearby enemy, followed by a third and final different nearby enemy if the second attack is also a natural even hit.
ast.target: 恶魔神徽法师可以对第二名近处的敌人进行一次*诅咒之矢*攻击，如果第二次攻击也是自然偶数命中，则可以紧接着对第三名不同的近处敌人进行最后一次攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Demonic Icon wizard can make an *abyssal curse* attack as a free action.
ast.target: 恶魔神徽法师可以作为自由动作进行一次*深渊诅咒*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 1/ battle, and generally after trying to corrupt at least one icon relationship.
ast.target: 每场战斗1次，且通常在尝试腐化至少一个神徽关系之后。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ogre gains a random demonic advantage (see below) until the end of the battle. All demonic advantages end if the ogre experiences a demonic eruption.
ast.target: 食人魔获得一项随机的恶魔优势（见下文），直到战斗结束。如果食人魔经历恶魔爆发，所有恶魔优势终止。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The tarket takes 10 ongoing fire damage
ast.target: 目标受到10点持续火焰伤害

ast.name: description
ast.source: Begin making demonic eruption rolls when the escalation die is 5+ instead of 6+. Also use stronger demons for the options that the ogre could turn into.
ast.target: 当升级骰为5+而非6+时，开始进行恶魔爆发检定。同时，为食人魔可能变化成的选项使用更强的恶魔。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While the derro berserker is staggered, it deals 4 extra damage when it hits with an attack.
ast.target: 当狂暴德罗格处于踉跄状态时，其攻击命中时额外造成4点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The derro berserker ignores the first 6 points of damage it takes each turn.
ast.target: 狂暴德罗格每回合忽略其受到的前6点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a derro berserker drops to 0 hp, it doesn’t die. Instead, it can take one final turn, and then it dies. Once the berserker drops, it can’t be healed.
ast.target: 当狂暴德罗格生命值降至0时，它不会死亡。相反，它可以进行最后一个回合，然后死亡。一旦狂暴德罗格倒下，它将无法被治疗。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy targets the derro berserker with an attack against MD and gets a natural odd roll, that enemy is dazed until the end of its next turn. This effect occurs whether the attack hits or misses.
ast.target: 当敌人以狂暴德罗格为目标进行针对MD的攻击，并投出自然奇数时，该敌人将被震慑直到其下一回合结束。无论攻击命中与否，此效果均会触发。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The derro can cast one of the following close-quarters spells as a quick action this turn.
ast.target: 德罗格可以将其一个近战法术作为快速动作在本回合施放。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 5 ongoing poison damage.
ast.target: 目标同时受到5点持续毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As above, and the derro maniac can make another light repeating crossbow attack as a free action.
ast.target: 如上所述，且狂乱德罗格可以作为一个自由动作再进行一次轻型连弩攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: All nearby derro gain a +1 bonus to attacks and defenses until the end of the derro maniac’s next turn (cumulative).
ast.target: 所有附近的德罗格获得+1攻击和防御加值，直到狂乱德罗格的下一回合结束（可叠加）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Two random nearby non-derro creatures take 2d4 thunder damage.
ast.target: 两个随机的附近非德罗格生物受到2d4点雷鸣伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The derro sage can make another mind scream attack against a different nearby target as a free action.
ast.target: 贤者德罗格可以作为一个自由动作，对另一个附近目标进行一次心灵尖啸攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: All nearby derro gain a +1 bonus to attacks and defenses until end of the derro sage’s next turn (cumulative).
ast.target: 所有附近的德罗格获得+1攻击和防御加值，直到贤者德罗格的下一回合结束（可叠加）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Two random nearby non-derro creatures take 2d8 thunder damage.
ast.target: 两个随机的附近非德罗格生物受到2d8点雷鸣伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is teleported to a nearby location the seer can see. It can’t be moved directly into dangerous terrain, over a cliff, etc.
ast.target: 目标被传送至先知可见的一个附近位置。它不能被直接移动到危险地形、悬崖边缘等位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The seer is dazed until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 先知被震慑直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a quick action, the seer can teleport a nearby ally it can see to any location that the seer can see.
ast.target: 作为快速动作，先知可以将其可见的一个附近盟友传送至其可见的任何位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle, as an interrupt action when a critical hit is scored against the derro seer’s ally, the seer can turn it into a normal hit instead.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，当先知德罗格的盟友受到重击时，作为中断动作，先知可以将其转化为普通命中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The first time each turn that the seer teleports an ally using not here but there, that ally heals 4 hp.
ast.target: 每回合第一次，当先知使用“不在此处而在彼处”传送盟友时，该盟友恢复4点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target’s closest nearby ally takes 4 psychic damage.
ast.target: 目标最近的附近盟友受到4点心灵伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enemies engaged with the derro whisperer take a –2 penalty to attack rolls and saving throws.
ast.target: 与低语德罗格交战的敌人在攻击骰和豁免骰上承受-2减值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an attacker targets the derro whisperer’s MD and misses with a natural 1–5 attack roll, that enemy must reroll the attack against itself.
ast.target: 当攻击者以低语德罗格的MD为目标，并投出自然1-5的攻击骰而未命中时，该敌人必须对自己重投该次攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die is odd, cutting whisper targets 1d3 nearby enemies in a group instead.
ast.target: 当升级骰为奇数时，切割低语改为以一个群体中的1d3个附近敌人为目标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The despoiler can pop free from the target.
ast.target: 掠夺者可以从目标处脱离。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The despoiler mage can pop free from the target.
ast.target: 掠夺法师可以从目标处脱离。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes extra damage equal to half the amount the destroying sword took from the last attack that hit it this battle.
ast.target: 目标受到额外伤害，其数值等于毁灭之剑在本场战斗中最后一次被命中时所受伤害的一半。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The destroying sword takes a -5 penalty to saving throws.
ast.target: 毁灭之剑在豁免检定上承受-5减值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes +2d6 damage from a claw swipe.
ast.target: 目标因爪击额外受到+2d6伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dire bear gains a +2 attack bonus against staggered enemies.
ast.target: 恐爪熊对踉跄的敌人获得+2攻击加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Roll randomly unless you know this beast’s story already.
ast.target: 除非你已知晓此兽的故事，否则请随机掷骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dire boar can make a bash attack against a different target as a free action.
ast.target: 恐野猪可以自由动作对一个不同的目标进行猛击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy’s attack has an effect on the dire boar other than damage, the boar can roll an immediate hard save (16+); on a success, it negates that effect.
ast.target: 当敌人的攻击对恐野猪造成伤害以外的效果时，野猪可以立即进行一次硬豁免（16+）；成功则抵消该效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: pile on damage to drop it to -60 hp, or trust the save roll to go their way.)
ast.target: 堆叠伤害将其生命值降至-60，或寄希望于豁免检定能如愿以偿。)

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the dire boar can make a bash attack, if it isn’t engaged with a different enemy, as a free action it can pop free of the enemy engaged with it and move to a nearby enemy to make that bash attack.
ast.target: 当恐野猪可以进行猛击时，若它未与另一个敌人交战，它可以自由动作脱离当前交战的敌人，并移动至附近敌人处进行该猛击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This creature gains a +1 attack bonus per other dire rat engaged with the target it’s attacking.
ast.target: 此生物每有一只其他恐鼠与它正在攻击的目标交战，便获得+1攻击加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy moves to engage the dire tiger while it’s unengaged, it can meet that enemy halfway and make a pounce atStack as an interrupt action before the target’s attack.
ast.target: 当敌人移动与未交战的恐虎交战时，恐虎可以中途拦截，并在目标攻击前以中断动作进行一次猛扑攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the dire tiger is unengaged and moves to engage an enemy (with a springing leap), it can make a pounce attack as a standard action.
ast.target: 若恐虎未交战并移动与敌人交战（通过跳跃扑击），它可以标准动作进行一次猛扑攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This creature gains a +2 bonus to attack and damage for each other ally engaged with the target (max +4 bonus).
ast.target: 此生物每有一名其他盟友与目标交战，便获得+2攻击和伤害加值（最高+4加值）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Disgraced legionnaire can make a *confusing orders* attack as a free action
ast.target: 耻辱军团士兵可以自由动作进行一次*混乱命令*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Target is also confused (same save ends).
ast.target: 目标同时陷入困惑（相同的豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This creature has resist damage 12+ to all damage except holy damage. A ghost can move through solid objects, but can’t end its turn inside them.
ast.target: 此生物对所有伤害（神圣伤害除外）具有12+伤害抗性。幽灵可以穿过固体物体，但不能在其内部结束回合。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each enemy that has one or more icon relationship points with the Leader Icon that misses an attack with a natural odd roll takes a -2 penalty to all its defenses until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 每名与领袖徽记有徽记关系点数的敌人，若以奇数自然骰未命中攻击，则在战斗结束前所有防御承受-2减值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Increases the escalation die by 1 (cumulative), and until the end of the battle, the djinn adds the escalation die to its attacks
ast.target: 使升级骰增加1（累积），并且在战斗结束前，巨灵将其升级骰加到攻击上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is hampered until the end of its next turn
ast.target: 目标在下一回合结束前受到阻碍。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Genies fly extremely well, but lumber, at best, when walking on the ground.
ast.target: 精灵飞行能力极佳，但在地面上行走时，充其量只能蹒跚而行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While not staggered, the djinn gains resist spell damage 16+ against all spells except those cast by a PC that has at least a one point icon relationship with the icon that is channeling the djinn.
ast.target: 当未踉跄时，巨灵对所有法术伤害获得16+法术伤害抗性，但由与引导巨灵的徽记至少有一点徽记关系的PC施放的法术除外。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy makes a melee attack against the djinn and misses, it takes 2d20 damage.
ast.target: 当敌人对巨灵进行近战攻击并失手时，它受到2d20伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The djinn gains a random demonic feature (see Demon).
ast.target: 巨灵获得一个随机恶魔特征（见恶魔）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever a nearby enemy attempts to trigger a magic item power, there’s a 50% chance that the power fails. If it does, the item refuses to let its owner use that power until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 每当附近敌人试图触发魔法物品能力时，有50%几率该能力失败。若失败，该物品在战斗结束前拒绝让其主人使用该能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The djinn’s assault of the whirlwind attack can also target far away enemies.
ast.target: 巨灵的*旋风突袭*攻击也可以瞄准远处的敌人。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Twice per battle as a free action, the djinn can turn an ally’s normal save into an easy save (6+), or an enemy’s normal save into a hard save (16+).
ast.target: 每场战斗两次，作为自由动作，巨灵可以将一名盟友的普通豁免变为简易豁免（6+），或将一名敌人的普通豁免变为困难豁免（16+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While not staggered, the djinn has resist melee damage 16+.
ast.target: 当未被击晕时，巨灵拥有对近战伤害的抗性16+。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The djinn takes a –1 penalty to all defenses. While not staggered, its crit range expands by 3.
ast.target: 巨灵的所有防御值受到-1减值。当未被击晕时，其重击范围扩大3。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Until the target is engaged with the salamander, it will use its move and standard actions to move and become engaged with the salamander!
ast.target: 在目标与火蜥蜴交战之前，它将使用其移动和标准动作移动并与火蜥蜴交战！

ast.name: description
ast.source: Any unattended flammable objects ignite (straw in a stable, the party’s tents, trees, etc.) and nearby liquids boil. Provided that there was anything flammable in the area the salamander gets to use its escalating inferno power.
ast.target: 任何无人看管的可燃物（马厩里的稻草、队伍的帐篷、树木等）都会被点燃，附近的液体会沸腾。如果区域内有任何可燃物，火蜥蜴可以使用其不断升级的地狱之火能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each enemy engaged with the specter (including the target) takes 20 negative energy damage.
ast.target: 每个与幽魂交战的敌人（包括目标）受到20点负能量伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a move action when the escalation die is odd, the specter can teleport anywhere nearby, dematerializing from its location to materialize in another.
ast.target: 当升级骰为奇数时，幽魂可以使用移动动作传送到附近的任何位置，从当前位置非物质化并物质化到另一位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy attacks the specter and misses, it takes 24 negative energy damage.
ast.target: 当敌人攻击幽魂并失手时，该敌人受到24点负能量伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While a specter is in the battle, the PCs don’t add the escalation die to attack rolls, but it does.
ast.target: 当幽魂在场时，玩家角色在攻击检定中不加入升级骰，但幽魂可以。

ast.name: description
ast.source: At the start of each of the specter’s turns, if any enemy in the battle has 60 hp or fewer, the specter can make a death grasp attack against one of those enemies as a free action. Be sure to let players see this one coming.
ast.target: 在幽魂每回合开始时，如果战斗中有任何敌人生命值为60或更低，幽魂可以作为自由动作对其中一名敌人进行死亡之握攻击。务必让玩家预见到这一招。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While engaged with this creature, enemies that have 15 hp or fewer are dazed (-4 attack) and do not add the escalation die to their attacks.
ast.target: 当与此生物交战时，生命值为15或更低的敌人会陷入眩晕（攻击-4），并且其攻击不加入升级骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The drider can make a poison bite attack as a free action.
ast.target: 卓尔蜘蛛可以作为自由动作进行一次毒咬攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The drider can make a lightning bolt spell attack against a second nearby enemy, followed by a third and final different nearby enemy if the second attack is also a natural even hit.
ast.target: 卓尔蜘蛛可以对第二个附近的敌人进行一次闪电束法术攻击，如果第二次攻击也是自然偶数命中，则可以接着对第三个不同的附近敌人进行攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While mounted, the drow cavalry deals +15 damage with its attacks, hit or miss, against unmounted enemies.
ast.target: 当骑乘时，卓尔骑兵对其攻击命中的未骑乘敌人造成+15伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reduce the drow cavalry’s attack damage by 50 when it’s not riding a spider.
ast.target: 当卓尔骑兵未骑乘蜘蛛时，其攻击伤害减少50。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Bite—The spider makes a bite attack.
ast.target: 咬击——蜘蛛进行一次咬击攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The spider and its rider pop free from all enemies and can move somewhere nearby.
ast.target: 蜘蛛及其骑手从所有敌人处脱离，并可以移动到附近的某个位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Web—The spider makes a web attack.
ast.target: 蛛网——蜘蛛进行一次蛛网攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the drow soldier drops to 0 hp, one enemy engaged with it takes 2 poison damage before the drow soldier dies.
ast.target: 当卓尔士兵生命值降至0时，一名与其交战的敌人在卓尔士兵死亡前受到2点毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each time the spider-mage misses with an attack, the crit range of attacks by drow and spiders in the battle expands by 1.
ast.target: 每次蜘蛛法师攻击失手时，战斗中卓尔和蜘蛛的攻击重击范围扩大1。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The first time each battle an enemy hits the spider-mage with a melee attack, that attacker takes 8 ongoing poison damage from her familiar.
ast.target: 每场战斗中，当敌人首次用近战攻击命中蜘蛛法师时，该攻击者会从她的魔宠那里受到8点持续毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each time the spider-sorceress misses with an attack, the crit range of attacks by drow and spiders in the battle expands by 1.
ast.target: 每次蜘蛛女巫攻击失手时，战斗中卓尔和蜘蛛的攻击重击范围扩大1。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The first time each battle an enemy hits the spider-sorceress with a melee attack, that attacker takes 16 ongoing poison damage from her familiar.
ast.target: 每场战斗中，当敌人首次用近战攻击命中蜘蛛女巫时，该攻击者会从她的魔宠那里受到16点持续毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The spider-sorceress has a true magic item (probably an implement) and uses it to her benefit (adjust stats accordingly).
ast.target: 蜘蛛女巫拥有一件真正的魔法物品（可能是一件法器）并利用其获益（相应调整属性）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each other enemy engaged with the sword maiden takes 10 damage.
ast.target: 每个与剑之少女交战的其他敌人受到10点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per round when an attack misses the sword maiden, she can move or make a cruel cutlass attack as a free action.
ast.target: 每回合一次，当一次攻击未命中剑之少女时，她可以移动或作为自由动作进行一次残忍弯刀攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The sword maiden has a true magic item (probably a weapon) and uses it to her benefit (adjust stats accordingly).
ast.target: 剑之少女拥有一件真正的魔法物品（可能是一件武器）并利用其获益（相应调整属性）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Deal damage equal to the natural d20 roll to both the target and the drudge citizen.
ast.target: 对目标和苦工市民造成等同于自然d20掷骰结果的伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle when the drudge moves it does not provoke opportunity attacks and if it makes a clumsy scythe attack immediately after it moves it gets a +2 bonus to its attack and deals half damage on a miss.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，当苦工移动时不会引发借机攻击，如果它在移动后立即进行一次笨拙镰刀攻击，则其攻击获得+2加值，且失手时造成半额伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle the drudge gets to reroll a missed clumsy scythe attack, and deals 5 damage if it still miss.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，苦工可以重掷一次未命中的笨拙镰刀攻击，如果仍然未命中，则造成5点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 目标受到阻碍（持续到豁免成功）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target can’t heal using its own recoveries (save ends).
ast.target: 目标无法使用自身的恢复值进行治疗（持续到豁免成功）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The escalation die increases by one.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The escalation die decreases by one.

ast.name: description
ast.source: While it’s staggered, the dusk zorigami uses the escalation die.
ast.target: 当被击晕时，黄昏机关师使用升级骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the earth elemental is targeted by a natural attack roll of 10 or less, the elemental heals 1d12 damage before taking any damage from the attack.
ast.target: 当土元素被自然攻击检定10或更低的目标锁定时，该元素在受到攻击伤害前恢复1d12点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The earthshaker can use whipcrack only when the escalation die is even. With such a long tail, it takes the earthshaker a little time to ready its inbuilt whip.
ast.target: 撼地者仅在升级骰为偶数时才能使用鞭尾击。由于尾巴如此之长，撼地者需要一点时间来准备其内置的鞭子。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The adjudicator can make an *echo of decay* attack as a free action.
ast.target: 裁决者可以作为自由动作进行一次*衰亡回响*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Nearby enemies of the adjudicator are vulnerable to all attacks.
ast.target: 裁决者附近的敌人对所有攻击都处于易伤状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add the escalation die to the damage.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes a –4 penalty to all its defenses until the end of the eye’s next turn.
ast.target: 目标的所有防御值受到-4减值，持续到巨眼的下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 1/battle after the Ebon Gauntlet eye has hit with at least one mind spike attack.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，在黑曜石之手套巨眼至少命中一次心灵尖刺攻击后。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per hit it has scored this battle, as a move action, the eye can teleport to any nearby location it can see.
ast.target: 每场战斗中，每命中一次，巨眼可以使用移动动作传送到它能看到的任何附近位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle, as an interrupt action, the eye can gain resist damage 18+ against attacks that target AC or PD. The resistance ends when the eye makes an attack.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，作为打断动作，巨眼可以获得对攻击AC或PD的抗性伤害18+。当巨眼进行攻击时，该抗性结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target lies prostrate in front of the inquisitor until the beginning of their next turn. While in this position, enemies gain a +4 attack bonus against the target.
ast.target: 目标匍匐在审判官面前，直到其下一回合开始。在此姿态下，敌人对目标获得+4攻击加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once a round, as a quick action, the inquisitor can spur a nearby ally into making an at-will attack as a free action.
ast.target: 每回合一次，作为快速动作，审判官可以激励一名附近的盟友作为自由动作进行一次随意攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The inquisitor sits upon a flying throne. As a rule, it can’t fly extremely high, but it can usually fly just a little faster than a victim can run.
ast.target: 审判官坐在一个飞行王座上。通常，它不能飞得极高，但通常能比受害者跑得稍快一些。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The inquisitor can use the vision of the echo attack.
ast.target: 审判官可以使用回响之视攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target loses all fire resistance until the end of the battle and is hampered (save ends)
ast.target: 目标失去所有火焰抗性直到战斗结束，并受到阻碍（持续到豁免成功）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Efreet don’t fly as well or as quickly as djinn, but they are able to get around okay.
ast.target: 火巨灵不像巨灵那样飞得好或快，但它们能够正常移动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: f you want an efreet to be even tougher, add a nastier special depending on which icon or icons the efreet is presently working for. The abilities represent the innate magic of the genie being channeled through the influence of the icon.
ast.target: 如果你想让火巨灵更强大，可以根据它当前服务的徽记添加一个更恶劣的特殊能力。这些能力代表了精灵的内在魔法通过徽记的影响被引导出来。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The eidolon can make its divine proclamation this turn as a quick action, but it is still only once per battle.
ast.target: 幻灵可以在本回合使用其神圣宣告作为快速动作，但每场战斗仍然只能使用一次。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This eidolon chooses to manifest wings, though its ability to fly has very little to do with flapping them.
ast.target: 这个幻灵选择显现翅膀，尽管其飞行能力与拍打翅膀关系不大。

ast.name: description
ast.source: PCs with positive icon relationships with the Religious Icon roll those dice at the start of the battle, until the end of the battle subtract the total rolled amount from any holy damage the adventurer would otherwise take. This includes holy damage from creatures that are not the eidolon.
ast.target: 拥有与宗教徽记正面关系的玩家角色在战斗开始时掷那些骰子，直到战斗结束，从冒险者原本会受到的任何神圣伤害中减去掷出的总值。这包括来自非幻灵生物的神圣伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Until the eidolon makes its divine proclamation, natural odd attack rolls against it miss.
ast.target: 在幻灵使用其神圣宣告之前，针对它的自然奇数攻击检定会失手。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose a damage type for the attack: acid, cold, fire, lightning, poison, or thunder.
ast.target: 为攻击选择一种伤害类型：酸液、寒冷、火焰、闪电、毒素或雷鸣。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose a damage type for the attack: force, holy, negative energy, or psychic.
ast.target: 为攻击选择一种伤害类型：力场、神圣、负能量或心灵。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As above, and the eidolon grabs the target if doesn’t already have a creature grabbed.
ast.target: 如上所述，如果幻灵尚未抓取一个生物，则抓取目标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each time a hit enemy rolls the save against weakened, one of its allies (of the eidolon’s choice) takes 14 psychic damage.
ast.target: 每次一个被命中的敌人对虚弱状态进行豁免检定时，其一名盟友（由幻灵选择）受到14点心灵伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The naga gains resist spell damage 16+ against the target spells until the end of the battle
ast.target: 纳迦获得对目标法术的抗性法术伤害16+，持续到战斗结束

ast.name: description
ast.source: The naga and each of its nearby allies can use the escalation die unless the naga has been hit by two enemy spells since its last turn.
ast.target: 纳迦及其附近的每个盟友都可以使用升级骰，除非纳迦自上一回合以来已被敌方的两个法术命中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each nearby enemy takes 10 thunder damage.
ast.target: 每个附近的敌人受到10点雷鸣伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The naga and each of its nearby allies can use the escalation die unless the naga has been hit by two enemy spells since its last turn.
ast.target: 纳迦及其附近的每个盟友都可以使用升级骰，除非纳迦自上一回合以来已被敌方的两个法术命中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 15 ongoing poison damage.
ast.target: 目标还受到15点持续毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 目标陷入困惑（持续到豁免成功）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is hampered until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 目标受到阻碍，持续到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If all three attacks hit, each nearby enemy takes 4d10 fire damage.
ast.target: 如果三次攻击全部命中，每个附近的敌人受到4d10点火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target slips into madness and becomes a cannibal cultist or wendigo or some other terrible demon-thing of the GM’s or player’s choice in 2d10 hours.
ast.target: 目标陷入疯狂，在2d10小时内变成食人教徒、温迪戈或游戏主持人或玩家选择的其他可怕恶魔生物。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The elder wendigo can walk on the wind. It is not a graceful flyer, but it moves as fast as the wind that carries it.
ast.target: 远古温迪戈可以御风而行。它不是优雅的飞行者，但移动速度与承载它的风一样快。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The elder wendigo gains a +5 bonus to all defenses against attacks by far away enemies.
ast.target: 远古温迪戈对远距离敌人的所有防御值获得+5加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per round when a nearby or far away enemy attacks the elder wendigo and rolls a natural odd miss, the wendigo can make a horrific gaze attack against that attacker as a free action.
ast.target: 每回合一次，当一名附近或远距离的敌人攻击远古温迪戈并掷出自然奇数失手时，温迪戈可以作为自由动作对该攻击者进行一次恐怖凝视攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a ranged attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll 2d20 and take the lowest result.
ast.target: 当远程攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须掷2d20并取最低结果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When this creature rolls a natural even hit with an attack, it can pop free from the target of that attack.
ast.target: 当此生物的攻击掷出自然偶数命中时，它可以脱离该攻击的目标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each enemy engaged with this creature at the start of its turn takes lightning damage equal to this creature’s level × 3.
ast.target: 在每回合开始时，与此生物交战的每个敌人受到等同于此生物等级×3的闪电伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Any attack against this creature’s nearby ally that deals lightning damage instead targets this creature.
ast.target: 任何针对此生物附近盟友的造成闪电伤害的攻击，改为以此生物为目标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an effect would move this creature, roll a save. On a success, the creature doesn’t move.
ast.target: 当一个效果要移动此生物时，进行一次豁免检定。成功时，该生物不移动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This creature gains a +2 bonus to MD.

ast.name: description
ast.source: This creature takes normal damage from critical hits. In addition, once per battle as a free action, it can take only half damage from an attack that hits.
ast.target: 此生物受到来自重击的正常伤害。此外，每场战斗一次，作为自由动作，它可以从一次命中的攻击中只受到半额伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The creature gains the burrower trait if it does not already have it.
ast.target: 如果此生物尚未拥有掘地者特性，则获得该特性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When this creature moves before making an attack, it deals additional damage equal to 2*@lvl on a hit.
ast.target: 当此生物在攻击前移动时，命中时造成额外等同于2*@lvl的伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle as a standard action, this creature can heal 15 hp or 20% of its maximum health, whichever is higher. It can only use this ability while it is in contact with the ground.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，作为标准动作，此生物可以恢复15点生命值或其最大生命值的20%，以较高者为准。此能力仅在与地面接触时可用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each enemy engaged with this creature at the start of its turn takes ongoing fire damage equal to this @lvl*2.
ast.target: 每回合开始时，与此生物交战的每个敌人将受到等同于@lvl*2的持续火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy hits this creature with a melee attack, it takes damage equal to @lvl*3.
ast.target: 当敌人以近战攻击命中此生物时，该敌人将受到等同于@lvl*3的伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When this creature is hit with cold damage, it gains temporary hit points equal to @lvl*4.
ast.target: 当此生物受到寒冷伤害时，它将获得等同于@lvl*4的临时生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When this creature is targeted by fire or lightning attacks, it gains a cumulative +1 bonus to attack rolls until the end of the battle (max: +4)
ast.target: 当此生物成为火焰或闪电攻击的目标时，它将获得攻击骰的累积+1加值，直到战斗结束（上限：+4）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy engaged with this creature heals using a recovery, it gains only half the normal healing.
ast.target: 当与此生物交战的敌人使用恢复进行治疗时，该敌人只能获得正常治疗量的一半。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This creature rerolls all natural 2 attack rolls.
ast.target: 此生物重掷所有自然骰为2的攻击骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy intercepts this creature, it takes cold damage equal to @lvl*3.
ast.target: 当敌人拦截此生物时，该敌人将受到等同于@lvl*3的寒冷伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This creature can disengage freely without needing to roll a disengage check.
ast.target: 此生物可以自由脱离战斗，无需进行脱离检定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While this creature is staggered, its crit range expands by 2.
ast.target: 当此生物处于踉跄状态时，其重击范围扩大2点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While fighting underwater or in a watery environment (heavy rain, knee-deep swamp), this creature gains a +1 bonus to all defenses and to saving throws.
ast.target: 当此生物在水下或潮湿环境（大雨、齐膝深的沼泽）中战斗时，它将获得所有防御和豁免检定的+1加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This creature gains a +2 bonus to attack rolls against creatures that attacked it during the last round.
ast.target: 此生物对上一轮攻击过它的生物获得攻击骰的+2加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ember imp’s skull constantly burns with flame, casting bright flickering light in the nearby area. In addition, any enemy that fumbles a melee attack against the imp takes 5 ongoing fire damage.
ast.target: 余烬小鬼的头骨持续燃烧着火焰，在附近区域投射出明亮闪烁的光芒。此外，任何对小鬼进行近战攻击失手的敌人将受到5点持续火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When you choose to add the escalation die to an attack against an ember imp, the imp’s flaming coal dust lugey attack gains a cumulative +1 damage bonus.
ast.target: 当你选择将升级骰加入对余烬小鬼的攻击时，小鬼的燃烧煤渣唾液攻击将获得累积+1伤害加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a fire attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 13+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当火焰攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然骰13+，否则该攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target can’t use recoveries until end of its next turn.
ast.target: 目标在其下一回合结束前无法使用恢复。

ast.name: description
ast.source: One enemy that hit the dragon since the dragon’s last turn takes 12 damage.
ast.target: 自龙上回合以来，命中过龙的一个敌人受到12点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target moves to a nearby non-harmful location of the dragon’s choice as a free action. This movement can provoke opportunity attacks.
ast.target: 目标作为自由动作移动到龙选择的附近无害位置。此移动可能引发借机攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Take 25 damage; OR roll twice for each attack roll it makes that turn, taking the lower result.
ast.target: 受到25点伤害；或者该回合进行的每次攻击骰掷两次，取较低结果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: An empyrean dragon can use venom breath 1d2 +1 times per battle, but never two turns in a row.
ast.target: 天界龙每场战斗可以使用毒息1d2 +1次，但不能连续两回合使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enduring shield is engaged and an enemy attempts to move past it, the enduring shield can roll a disengage check to intercept it as an interrupt action (once per round). If the attempt fails, the enduring shield takes 1d6 psychic damage.
ast.target: 当坚盾守卫处于交战状态且敌人试图从其身边经过时，坚盾守卫可以进行一次脱离检定来拦截该敌人（作为中断动作，每轮一次）。如果尝试失败，坚盾守卫将受到1d6点心灵伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The enduring shield takes a -5 penalty to saving throws.
ast.target: 坚盾守卫在豁免检定上承受-5减值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an attack hits the enduring shield, it gains a +5 bonus to the defense that the attack targeted until the end of the battle or until another attack hits it, in which case the bonus switches to the defense most recently hit.
ast.target: 当一次攻击命中坚盾守卫时，它将获得针对该攻击所针对防御的+5加值，直到战斗结束或直到另一次攻击命中它，在这种情况下，加值将转移到最近被命中的防御上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the earth elemental is targeted by a natural attack roll of 10 or less, the elemental heals 5d6 damage before taking any damage from the attack.
ast.target: 当土元素成为自然骰为10或更低的攻击目标时，该元素在受到攻击伤害前恢复5d6点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy engaged with the epic earth elemental heals using one or more recoveries, the elemental heals 5d6 hit points.
ast.target: 当与史诗土元素交战的敌人使用一次或多次恢复进行治疗时，该元素恢复5d6点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy makes a natural odd melee attack roll against the fire elemental, that attacker takes 3d12 fire damage.
ast.target: 当敌人以自然骰为奇数的近战攻击骰攻击火元素时，该攻击者将受到3d12点火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fire elementals that can fly are rare. This one can, and it only touches the ground to set something ablaze.
ast.target: 能飞行的火元素很罕见。这个可以，它只在点燃某物时才接触地面。

ast.name: description
ast.source: For every separate mob of epic haunting mooks in the battle (mobs start with at least four mooks), add a +1 bonus to the epic haunting’s attacks and +5 to its damage.
ast.target: 对于战斗中每个独立的史诗幽魂暴徒群（暴徒群至少由四名暴徒组成），史诗幽魂的攻击获得+1加值，伤害获得+5加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This creature has resist damage 14+ to all damage except holy damage. A ghost can move through solid objects, but can’t end its turn inside them.
ast.target: 此生物对除神圣伤害外的所有伤害具有14+伤害抗性。幽灵可以穿过固体物体，但不能在其内部结束回合。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While there are three or more lesser, major, or epic haunting mooks in a battle, the fear abilities of their allies affect enemies with half again as many hit points as usual.
ast.target: 当战斗中有三个或更多低级、主要或史诗幽魂暴徒时，其盟友的恐惧能力对敌人的影响范围扩大为通常生命值上限的1.5倍。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While engaged with this creature, enemies that have 36 hp or fewer are dazed (-4 attack) and do not add the escalation die to their attacks.
ast.target: 当与此生物交战时，生命值为36或更少的敌人将陷入眩晕状态（攻击-4），并且不将升级骰加入其攻击骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dybbuk hovers eerily, roughly 6 feet off the ground.
ast.target: 恶灵阴森地悬浮着，大约离地6英尺。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a melee attack that doesn’t deal holy damage targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 18+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当不造成神圣伤害的近战攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然骰18+，否则该攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a standard action, an ettercap acolyte can deal 2d6 poison damage to one dazed, hampered, or stuck enemy engaged with it. The ettercap acolyte also takes 7 damage from this kamikaze action, killing it.
ast.target: 作为标准动作，蛛化精灵侍僧可以对与其交战的一个眩晕、受阻或被困的敌人造成2d6点毒素伤害。蛛化精灵侍僧也会因这次自杀式行动受到7点伤害，从而死亡。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy of level 3 or lower rolls a natural 1-5 with a melee attack against an ettercap acolyte, that enemy is dazed (save ends).
ast.target: 当3级或更低的敌人以近战攻击攻击蛛化精灵侍僧并掷出自然骰1-5时，该敌人将陷入眩晕状态（通过豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy of level 4 or lower rolls a natural 1-5 with a melee attack against an ettercap hunter, that enemy is dazed (save ends).
ast.target: 当4级或更低的敌人以近战攻击攻击蛛化精灵猎手并掷出自然骰1-5时，该敌人将陷入眩晕状态（通过豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While one or more lower-level non-mook ettercap allies are nearby it, the ettercap keeper gains resist damage 16+.
ast.target: 当一个或多个较低等级的非暴徒蛛化精灵盟友在其附近时，蛛化精灵看守者获得16+伤害抗性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy of level 6 or lower rolls a natural 1-5 with a melee attack against an ettercap keeper, that enemy is dazed (save ends).
ast.target: 当6级或更低的敌人以近战攻击攻击蛛化精灵看守者并掷出自然骰1-5时，该敌人将陷入眩晕状态（通过豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy of level 5 or lower rolls a natural 1-5 with a melee attack against an ettercap supplicant, that enemy is dazed (save ends).
ast.target: 当5级或更低的敌人以近战攻击攻击蛛化精灵祈求者并掷出自然骰1-5时，该敌人将陷入眩晕状态（通过豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ettercap warrior can make a poison bite attack as a free action.
ast.target: 蛛化精灵战士可以作为自由动作进行一次毒咬攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy of level 5 or lower rolls a natural 1-5 with a melee attack against an ettercap warrior, that enemy is dazed (save ends).
ast.target: 当5级或更低的敌人以近战攻击攻击蛛化精灵战士并掷出自然骰1-5时，该敌人将陷入眩晕状态（通过豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If an ettin’s first save against an effect fails, it can roll a second save.
ast.target: 如果双头巨人的首次豁免检定失败，它可以进行第二次豁免检定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ettin deals double damage with its attacks against staggered enemies.
ast.target: 双头巨人对踉跄状态的敌人造成双倍伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the escalation die is 3+, the ettin can target two engaged enemies with its first big swing attack.
ast.target: 如果升级骰为3+，双头巨人的第一次大挥击攻击可以指定两个交战的敌人。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is confused until the end of its next turn instead of dazed.
ast.target: 目标陷入困惑状态，直到其下一回合结束，而非眩晕状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a fallen derro dies, it makes a psychotic scream attack as a free action.
ast.target: 当堕落的德罗死亡时，它将作为自由动作进行一次精神尖啸攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a quick action, a fallen derro can take 5 damage to end one ongoing effect on a creature in its mob.
ast.target: 作为一项快速动作，一个倒下的德罗可以承受5点伤害，以结束其群体中一个生物身上的一个持续效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use as a free action once per turn at the start of the Fallen Icon’s turn.
ast.target: 在堕落圣像的回合开始时，每回合可作为自由动作使用一次。

ast.name: description
ast.source: At the start of its turn, the Fallen Icon can change its creature type to beast, elemental, or plant. This ends all conditions affecting it.
ast.target: 在回合开始时，堕落圣像可以将其生物类型变为野兽、元素或植物。这会结束影响它的所有状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Fallen Icon has resist poison 16+. In addition, as a beast it has resist cold 16+. As a plant it has resist lightning 16+. As an elemental it has resist fire 16+.
ast.target: 堕落圣像具有毒素抗性16+。此外，作为野兽时，它具有寒冷抗性16+。作为植物时，它具有闪电抗性16+。作为元素时，它具有火焰抗性16+。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Fallen Icon can sprout wings to clumsily fly, and can swim indefinitely at any depth.
ast.target: 堕落圣像可以长出翅膀笨拙地飞行，并且可以在任何深度无限期地游泳。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Fallen Icon’s existence disrupts arcane magic and divine magic (but not druidic magic): natural odd hits by arcane and divine spells miss the Fallen Icon, while odd misses are rerolled against an enemy engaged with the Fallen Icon. Natural 1s target the caster.
ast.target: 堕落圣像的存在会扰乱奥术魔法和神圣魔法（但不包括德鲁伊魔法）：奥术和神圣法术的自然奇数命中会未命中堕落圣像，而奇数未命中则会重新掷骰对抗与堕落圣像交战的敌人。自然1点则会针对施法者。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a move action, the Fallen Icon can destroy one ordinary structure it can reach, such as a house, castle wall, temple, or ship. The structure is automatically rendered useless, and each creature inside or on the structure is subject to a collapse attack.
ast.target: 作为移动动作，堕落圣像可以摧毁一个它能够到的普通建筑，例如房屋、城堡墙壁、神殿或船只。该建筑会自动变得无用，建筑内或建筑上的每个生物都会受到一次坍塌攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a creature engaged with or next to the Fallen Icon dies (including the last mook of a mob), the Fallen Icon consumes it and regains 100 HP.
ast.target: 当一个与堕落圣像交战或在其旁边的生物死亡（包括群体中的最后一个喽啰）时，堕落圣像会吞噬它并恢复100点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target pops free and takes extra damage equal to the attack roll.
ast.target: 目标脱离接触，并受到等于攻击骰结果的额外伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Fallen Icon makes another *hammer of golden sovereignty* attack against the enemy it missed.
ast.target: 堕落圣像对它未命中的敌人再进行一次*黄金主权之锤*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When first staggered, the Fallen Icon makes a behind the mask attack against the enemy that caused the triggering damage as a free action.
ast.target: 当首次进入濒死状态时，堕落圣像会作为自由动作，对造成触发伤害的敌人进行一次面具之后攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Fallen Icon can deal 4d6 damage to itself and teleport someplace it can see nearby as a move action.
ast.target: 作为移动动作，堕落圣像可以对自己造成4d6点伤害，并传送到它能看到的附近某处。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die is even, the Fallen Icon rolls 2d20 instead of 1d20 and uses the higher result whenever it attacks or rolls a save.
ast.target: 当升级骰为偶数时，堕落圣像在攻击或进行豁免检定时掷2d20而非1d20，并使用较高的结果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: An epic-tier dwarf, forgeborn, or human slain by the Fallen Icon will arise at the end of the battle as a bronze kingsguard, loyal gatherer, or royal bearer—whichever seems most appropriate.
ast.target: 被堕落圣像杀死的史诗级矮人、锻铸裔或人类将在战斗结束时复活为青铜王卫、忠诚采集者或皇家持盾者——以最合适的为准。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Human, dwarf, and forgeborn characters may not use their racial power until the escalation die reaches 4 or higher, and not when engaged with the Fallen Icon (so standard humans are simply out of luck).
ast.target: 人类、矮人和锻铸裔角色在升级骰达到4或更高之前，以及与堕落圣像交战时，不能使用他们的种族能力（因此标准人类就完全没辙了）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Roll a second or third *tongue strike* against a different enemy.
ast.target: 对另一个敌人进行第二次或第三次*舌击*。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 60 psychic damage, and 15 120 psychic damage, and 30 ongoing negative energy damage (hard save ends)
ast.target: 60点心灵伤害，以及15 120点心灵伤害，以及30点持续负能量伤害（强韧豁免结束）

ast.name: description
ast.target: 目标处于易伤状态（豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the last mook in a mob is slain nearby, or when a creature drops to 0 hit points or dies in some other fashion nearby, the Fallen Icon’s Maw heals hit point equal to 10 × the creature (or mob’s) level.
ast.target: 当附近群体中的最后一个喽啰被杀死，或者当一个生物因其他方式在附近降至0生命值或死亡时，堕落圣像之颚会恢复等于该生物（或群体）等级×10的生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While engaged with this creature, if the target has 120 hp or fewer, it’s dazed (–4 attack) and does not add the escalation die to its attacks.
ast.target: 当与该生物交战时，如果目标生命值为120或更低，它会陷入眩晕状态（攻击-4），并且不将升级骰加到其攻击上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Target also takes 50 ongoing negative energy damage.
ast.target: 目标还受到50点持续负能量伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the last mook in a mob is slain nearby, or when a creature drops to 0 hit points or dies in some other fashion nearby, the Fallen Icon’s Shadow heals hit point equal to 10 × the creature (or mob’s) level.
ast.target: 当附近群体中的最后一个喽啰被杀死，或者当一个生物因其他方式在附近降至0生命值或死亡时，堕落圣像之影会恢复等于该生物（或群体）等级×10的生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While engaged with this creature, if the target has 144 hp or fewer, it’s dazed (–4 attack) and does not add the escalation die to its attacks.
ast.target: 当与该生物交战时，如果目标生命值为144或更低，它会陷入眩晕状态（攻击-4），并且不将升级骰加到其攻击上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 20 ongoing fire damage.
ast.target: 目标受到20点持续火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The fallen lammasu can make a second fiery hoof attack (but not a third) as a free action.
ast.target: 堕落拉玛苏可以作为自由动作进行第二次烈焰蹄击（但不能进行第三次）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 10 ongoing fire damage instead of 20 fire damage, and until that ally saves against that damage, it adds the escalation die to its attacks.
ast.target: 目标受到10点持续火焰伤害，而非20点火焰伤害，并且在该盟友对该伤害进行豁免检定成功之前，它将升级骰加到其攻击上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 15 ongoing fire damage.
ast.target: 目标还受到15点持续火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the fallen lammasu fails a save against an effect created by an enemy, each enemy engaged with it takes 3d10 fire damage.
ast.target: 当堕落拉玛苏对一个由敌人创造的效果豁免失败时，每个与其交战的敌人受到3d10点火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the fallen lammasu makes an attack that deals fire damage and the attack roll beats the target’s fire resistance, the target loses its fire resistance until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 当堕落拉玛苏进行一次造成火焰伤害的攻击，并且攻击骰超过目标的火焰抗性时，目标将失去其火焰抗性，直到战斗结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The lammasu gains an Abyssal curse attack.
ast.target: 拉玛苏获得一次深渊诅咒攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 同时造成11点持续火焰伤害

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target pops free from each enemy and moves next to the Devil, which engages and grabs it. (The Devil can grab any number of enemies simultaneously.) If it has quick actions left, it will use its devil’s beak and cutting talon attacks.
ast.target: 目标脱离每个敌人的接触，并移动到恶魔旁边，恶魔会与它交战并抓住它。（恶魔可以同时抓住任意数量的敌人。）如果它还有快速动作剩余，它将使用其恶魔之喙和利爪攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 20 ongoing damage.
ast.target: 目标还受到20点持续伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This ability only requires a quick action (once per round) to use.
ast.target: 此能力仅需一个快速动作（每回合一次）即可使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When you choose to add the escalation die to an attack against Fang Devil, you are hampered until the end of your next turn after you make the attack.
ast.target: 当你选择将升级骰加到对獠牙恶魔的攻击上时，你将在进行攻击后的下一个回合结束前处于受阻状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an energy attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 13+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次能量攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然13+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The xombie pops free from the target and can move to engage a nearby or faraway enemy.
ast.target: 丧尸脱离目标的接触，并可以移动去与一个附近或远处的敌人交战。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The xombie pops free from the target.

ast.name: description
ast.source: While the escalation die is 1 or below, the fast xombie can engage a nearby or faraway enemy as a move action.
ast.target: 当升级骰为1或更低时，快速丧尸可以作为移动动作与一个附近或远处的敌人交战。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a fire attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次火焰攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然16+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: One ally engaged with targeted enemy can make an attack as an interrupt action.
ast.target: 一个与目标敌人交战的盟友可以作为中断动作进行一次攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose either Path of the Sword or Path of Song.

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Swap PD and MD, and:

Fanfare—If horn of power misses all targets, two nearby allies may roll one saving throw each as a free action.
ast.target:
交换物理防御和魔法防御，并：

\n

号角齐鸣—若力量号角未命中任何目标，两名附近的盟友可各自进行一次豁免检定，视为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The bandleader gains the other destiny benefit, and adds 1 to its lower defense.
ast.target: 乐队指挥获得另一项命运恩惠，并将其较低的防御值增加1点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shin kick—On a natural even hit with swift hoof, the target is hampered until the end of enchanter’s next turn.
ast.target: 胫踢—当迅捷蹄击造成自然偶数命中时，目标将受到阻碍，持续至吟游诗人下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Swap PD and MD, and:

Lullaby—On a critical hit with whispered sonata, the target must begin making last gasp saves instead of being dazed. On the fourth failure, it falls unconscious.
ast.target:
交换物理防御和魔法防御，并：

\n

摇篮曲—当低语奏鸣曲造成重击时，目标必须开始进行濒死豁免检定，而非陷入眩晕。第四次失败后，目标将陷入昏迷。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The enchanter gains the other destiny benefit, and adds 1 to its lower defense.
ast.target: 吟游诗人获得另一项命运恩惠，并将其较低的防御值增加1点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reroll the attack against a random nearby creature.
ast.target: 对一名随机的附近生物重新进行攻击检定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Barbed arrowhead—Pinning shot deals 1d6 extra damage on a natural even hit.
ast.target: 倒刺箭头—钉刺射击在造成自然偶数命中时，额外造成1d6点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Swap PD and MD, and:

Entangling arrows—On a natural odd hit with pinning shot, the target is hampered until the end of its next turn. The target or an adjacent creature may spend a standard action to remove this effect.
ast.target:
交换物理防御和魔法防御，并：

\n

缠绕之箭—当钉刺射击造成自然奇数命中时，目标将受到阻碍，持续至其下一回合结束。目标或一名相邻生物可花费一个标准动作来移除此效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The harrier gains the other destiny benefit, and adds 1 to its lower defense.
ast.target: 游侠获得另一项命运恩惠，并将其较低的防御值增加1点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sweep the leg—On a natural odd hit with gnarled staff, the target loses its next move action.
ast.target: 扫堂腿—当盘根节杖造成自然奇数命中时，目标失去其下一个移动动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The keeper gains the other destiny benefit, and adds 1 to its lower defense.
ast.target: 守卫者获得另一项命运恩惠，并将其较低的防御值增加1点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The outlaw also steals a random consumable magic item or wealth of equivalent value from the target.
ast.target: 法外之徒还会从目标身上偷取一件随机的消耗性魔法物品或等值的财富。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target instead loses all actions during its next turn and does nothing as it gets tangled up.
ast.target: 目标在其下一回合失去所有动作，并因被缠住而无法行动。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 每场战斗2次，作为移动动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sucker punch—Feint & dodge now deals 7 damage on a miss.
ast.target: 偷袭—佯攻与闪避在未命中时现在造成7点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Swap PD and MD, and:

Blink—Thief’s dagger can be used against a nearby enemy if the outlaw is not engaged. It does not provoke opportunity attacks.
ast.target:
交换物理防御和魔法防御，并：

\n

闪烁—若法外之徒未被交战，盗贼匕首可用于攻击一名附近的敌人。此攻击不会引发借机攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The outlaw gains the other destiny benefit, and adds 1 to its lower defense.
ast.target: 法外之徒获得另一项命运恩惠，并将其较低的防御值增加1点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Faun outlaws that flee from battle are quick and boosted with magic that’s all about escape. Pursuers must have some powerful magic or iconic advantage to have a chance of catching them.
ast.target: 从战斗中逃离的半身人法外之徒行动迅捷，并被专注于逃脱的魔法所加持。追击者必须拥有强大的魔法或标志性的优势，才有机会追上他们。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Make a second longsword attack, but ignore this trigger for the second attack.
ast.target: 进行第二次长剑攻击，但忽略第二次攻击的此触发条件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Barbed arrowhead—Pinning shot deals 1d12 extra damage on a natural even hit.
ast.target: 倒刺箭头—钉刺射击在造成自然偶数命中时，额外造成1d12点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ranger gains the other destiny benefit, and adds 1 to its lower defense.
ast.target: 游侠获得另一项命运恩惠，并将其较低的防御值增加1点。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 目标受到阻碍（简单豁免检定结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Cannot be used on two consecutive rounds.
ast.target: 不能在连续两个回合内使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gang leader—Creatures hit by heckle are vulnerable to attack by the troubadour’s allies until the start of the troubadour’s next turn.
ast.target: 帮派头目—被嘲弄命中的生物在吟游诗人下一回合开始前，将受到吟游诗人盟友的攻击时变得脆弱。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Swap PD and MD, and:

Throw your voice—Targets of heckle may not attack the troubadour until the end of their next turn.
ast.target:
交换物理防御和魔法防御，并：

\n

投声术—嘲弄的目标在下一回合结束前不得攻击吟游诗人。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If an enemy rolls a natural 1 on an attack against the faun troubadour, use heckle as a free action, but only against the triggering enemy. This does not count as a use of heckle.
ast.target: 若一名敌人对半身人吟游诗人的攻击掷出自然1，可作为自由动作对触发此效果的敌人使用嘲弄。此使用不计入嘲弄的使用次数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The troubadour gains the other destiny benefit, and adds 1 to its lower defense.
ast.target: 吟游诗人获得另一项命运恩惠，并将其较低的防御值增加1点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: he target can now only save against the confusion with a natural 20 (or until the warbanner drops) and can’t flee if the rest of the PCs choose to do so.
ast.target: 目标现在只能通过掷出自然20（或直到战旗倒下）来对抗困惑状态进行豁免检定，并且如果队伍的其他成员选择逃离，它不能逃跑。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unless an ally in the warbanner’s band dropped to 0 hp since the start of the current round, an enemy attacking the warbanner must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only takes half damage. This ability has no effect if the warbanner has no allies in its band.
ast.target: 除非战旗小队中的盟友在当前回合开始后生命值降至0，否则攻击战旗的敌人必须在攻击检定中掷出自然16+，否则只造成一半伤害。若战旗小队中没有盟友，此能力无效。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Mooks fighting in the warbanner’s band gain a bonus to their hit points equal to the warbanner’s level (2).
ast.target: 在战旗小队中战斗的喽啰获得等同于战旗等级（2）的生命值加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: An unengaged fire bat can move, make a burning contrail attack, and move away from the target as a standard action without taking an opportunity attack from the target.
ast.target: 一名未被交战的火焰蝠可以移动、进行一次燃烧尾迹攻击，然后作为标准动作远离目标，且不会引发目标的借机攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy engaged with the fire bat attacks it, that enemy takes 2 fire damage.
ast.target: 当一名与火焰蝠交战的敌人攻击它时，该敌人受到2点火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a fire attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次火焰攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然16+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fire bats are agile fliers, especially when riding hot air currents. They slow down a bit away from warmth.
ast.target: 火焰蝠是敏捷的飞行者，尤其是在借助热气流时。远离温暖环境时，它们会稍微减速。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy makes a natural odd melee attack roll against the fire elemental, that attacker takes 1d12 fire damage.
ast.target: 当一名敌人对火元素进行自然奇数的近战攻击检定时，该攻击者受到1d12点火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 每场战斗1次，作为标准动作

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enemies engaged with a fire giant holy warrior at the end of their turn take fire damage equal to the escalation die value times five (@ed*5) if they have not taken fire damage since the end of their last turn. Enemies who resist fire damage ignore this fire giant’s fire aura.
ast.target: 在回合结束时，与火焰巨人圣武士交战的敌人，若自上一回合结束以来未受到火焰伤害，则受到等同于升级骰数值乘以五（@ed*5）的火焰伤害。具有火焰伤害抗性的敌人忽略此火焰巨人的火焰光环。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle, the fire giant holy warrior gains an additional use of breath of Unyr when they become staggered.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，当火焰巨人圣武士陷入踉跄时，获得一次额外的尤尼尔之息使用次数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Up to three nearby enemies take 20 ongoing fire damage.
ast.target: 最多三名附近的敌人受到20点持续火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Target is vulnerable to fire damage (save ends).
ast.target: 目标对火焰伤害易伤（豁免检定结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Standard action when the escalation die is even.
ast.target: 当升级骰为偶数时的标准动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever the fire giant priest-general makes an attack that staggers a target or reduces a target to 0 hp or fewer, each non-mook fire giant in the battle heals 25 hp.
ast.target: 每当火焰巨人祭司将军的攻击使目标陷入踉跄或生命值降至0或更低时，战场上的每个非喽啰火焰巨人恢复25点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a fire attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 18+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次火焰攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然18+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enemies engaged with a fire giant at the end of their turn take fire damage equal to the escalation die value times ten (@ed*10) if they have not taken fire damage since the end of their last turn. Enemies who resist fire damage take half damage from this fire giant’s fire aura.
ast.target: 在回合结束时，与火焰巨人交战的敌人，若自上一回合结束以来未受到火焰伤害，则受到等同于升级骰数值乘以十（@ed*10）的火焰伤害。具有火焰伤害抗性的敌人受到此火焰巨人火焰光环一半的伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle, the fire giant priest- general can use Unyr’s divine fist as a quick action.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，火焰巨人祭司将军可以将尤尼尔的神圣之拳作为快速动作使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever the fire giant priest-general makes an attack that staggers a target or reduces a target to 0 hp or fewer, enemies lose their fire resistances until the escalation die next advances.
ast.target: 每当火焰巨人祭司将军的攻击使目标陷入踉跄或生命值降至0或更低时，敌人失去其火焰抗性，直到升级骰下次增加。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fire attacks that miss the fire giant do not damage it and have no effect, and the fire giant instead heals hp equal to five times the attacker’s level.
ast.target: 未命中火焰巨人的火焰攻击不会对其造成伤害且无效，火焰巨人反而恢复等同于攻击者等级五倍的生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The armor and/or shield is shattered, the target now counts as unarmored with no shield. Magic armors and shields get a save (12 minus the magical AC bonus—so between 11+ for a +1 shield to 7+ for cursed epic +5 armor) to avoid shattering.
ast.target: 护甲和/或盾牌被粉碎，目标现在被视为无甲且无盾。魔法护甲和盾牌有一次豁免机会（12减去魔法护甲加值——因此+1盾牌的豁免值为11+，被诅咒的史诗级+5护甲的豁免值为7+）以避免被粉碎。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once the target saves against the ongoing fire damage, until the end of the day each time they spend a recovery they also take 2d10 fire damage.
ast.target: 一旦目标成功豁免了持续火焰伤害，直到当天结束，每次他们使用恢复时，也会受到2d10点火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，作为快速动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fire attacks that miss the fire giant smith do not damage it and have no effect, and the fire giant instead heals hp equal to twice the attacker’s level.
ast.target: 未命中火焰巨人铁匠的火焰攻击不会对其造成伤害且无效，火焰巨人反而会恢复等于攻击者等级两倍的生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 10 ongoing fire damage.
ast.target: 目标同时受到10点持续火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The fire giant warlord adds the escalation die to its attacks against targets taking ongoing fire damage.
ast.target: 火焰巨人督军在攻击正在承受持续火焰伤害的目标时，将升级骰加入其攻击骰中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a standard action, the warlord can command one nearby ally that has resistance to fire to make a melee attack as a free action.
ast.target: 作为标准动作，督军可以命令一名拥有火焰抗性的附近盟友进行一次近战攻击，作为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enemies engaged with the fire giant warlord take a -5 penalty to saves against ongoing fire damage.
ast.target: 与火焰巨人督军交战的敌人，在对抗持续火焰伤害的豁免检定上受到-5减值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The fire giant adds the escalation die to its attacks against targets taking ongoing fire damage.
ast.target: 火焰巨人在攻击正在承受持续火焰伤害的目标时，将升级骰加入其攻击骰中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a fire giant becomes staggered, it deals 10 ongoing fire damage to each enemy engaged with it.
ast.target: 当火焰巨人进入蹒跚状态时，它会对与其交战的每个敌人造成10点持续火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Twice per battle, the giant can make a slam attack as a quick action (once per round).
ast.target: 每场战斗两次，巨人可以作为快速动作（每轮一次）进行一次猛击攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hydra’s next gnashing teeth attack, if it has an attack left this turn, can be against any nearby enemy instead of against a creature engaged with it.
ast.target: 九头蛇的下一次利齿撕咬攻击（如果它本轮还有攻击次数），可以针对任何附近的敌人，而非仅限于与其交战的生物。

ast.name: description
ast.source: confused, dazed, hampered, stunned, or weakened.
ast.target: 困惑、眩晕、受阻、震慑或虚弱。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the hydra has at least two gnashing teeth attacks left during a turn, it can expend one of those attacks to move to engage a nearby enemy as a free action (but it will take opportunity attacks for doing so).
ast.target: 如果九头蛇在一轮中至少还有两次利齿撕咬攻击次数，它可以消耗其中一次攻击，作为自由动作移动以与一名附近的敌人交战（但这样做会引发借机攻击）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The first time the hydra is staggered, as a free action it gains 40 hit points and a sixth gnashing teeth attack, and is considered undamaged at its new hit point total. Using the hydra’s current hit points as a new baseline, the hydra will be staggered again when it drops below 50% of that total.
ast.target: 九头蛇第一次进入蹒跚状态时，作为自由动作，它获得40点生命值和第六次利齿撕咬攻击，并在其新的生命值总数下被视为未受损。以九头蛇当前的生命值作为新的基准，当其生命值降至该总数的50%以下时，它将再次进入蹒跚状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The second time the hydra is staggered, as a free action it gains 40 hit points and a seventh gnashing teeth attack, etc. Use a new hit point baseline as before, but there is no eighth head waiting to sprout.
ast.target: 九头蛇第二次进入蹒跚状态时，作为自由动作，它获得40点生命值和第七次利齿撕咬攻击，依此类推。如前所述使用新的生命值基准，但不会有第八个头等待长出。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The phoenix may move again this turn as a free action if it has already made a flying move on its turn.
ast.target: 如果凤凰在本轮已经进行过飞行移动，它可以作为自由动作再次移动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The flamebird phoenix can fly extremely well.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The flamebird phoenix deals 4 fire damage to each enemy that ends it turn engaged with the phoenix.
ast.target: 焰鸟凤凰对每个在其回合结束时与其交战的敌人造成4点火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the phoenix is dealt a critical hit, it must roll an easy save (6+). If the save fails, the phoenix drops to 0 hit points; see the *reborn in fire* ability below!
ast.target: 当凤凰受到重击时，它必须进行一次简易豁免（6+）。如果豁免失败，凤凰的生命值降至0；请参见下方的*浴火重生*能力！

ast.name: description
ast.source: If a fire attack against the flamebird phoenix fails to beat its resistance, then instead of taking damage the flamebird phoenix heals that amount instead.
ast.target: 如果一次火焰攻击未能突破焰鸟凤凰的抗性，那么焰鸟凤凰不会受到伤害，而是恢复该数量的生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the breath targeted multiple enemies, the target takes 25 ongoing fire damage instead of 15. If the breath targeted a single enemy, the target takes 60 ongoing fire damage instead of 30.
ast.target: 如果吐息攻击针对多个敌人，目标受到25点持续火焰伤害，而非15点。如果吐息攻击针对单个敌人，目标受到60点持续火焰伤害，而非30点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A flamewreathed dragon can use primal fire breath 1d4 +2 times per battle, but never two turns in a row.
ast.target: 焰缠龙每场战斗可以使用原始火焰吐息1d4 +2次，但不能连续两轮使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While engaged with this creature, enemies with 120 hp or fewer are dazed (-4 attacks), do not add the escalation die to their attacks, and take 4d20 fire damage at the start of their turn.
ast.target: 当与此生物交战时，生命值120点或以下的敌人会陷入眩晕（攻击骰-4），不将升级骰加入其攻击骰，并在其回合开始时受到4d20点火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragon’s will and magic are so powerful that it ignores the fire resistance of creatures battling it.
ast.target: 龙的意志和魔法如此强大，以至于它无视与之战斗的生物的火焰抗性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is confused (easy save ends, 6+).
ast.target: 目标陷入困惑（简易豁免结束，6+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The haunted skull can glide and hover, always within seven or eight feet of the ground.
ast.target: 幽魂骷髅可以滑翔和悬浮，始终保持在离地七八英尺的高度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever a spell that causes cold, fire, force, lightning, or negative energy damage targets one of the flesh golem’s nearby allies, the flesh golem has a 50% chance of becoming the main target instead. Therefore, spells that affect groups would spread out from the flesh golem.
ast.target: 每当一个造成寒冷、火焰、力场、闪电或负能量伤害的法术以血肉魔像的一名附近盟友为目标时，血肉魔像有50%的几率成为主要目标。因此，影响群体的法术会从血肉魔像处扩散开来。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Flesh golems are not immune to effects.
ast.target: 血肉魔像对效果没有免疫。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target pops free from enemies it’s engaged with and can’t engage any enemies until it saves against the ongoing force damage.
ast.target: 目标从与其交战的敌人处脱离，并且在成功豁免持续力场伤害之前，无法与任何敌人交战。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target heals using a recovery, but the true-fomori gains the hit points.
ast.target: 目标使用一次恢复进行治疗，但真正的弗莫里获得这些生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enemies engaged with the true-fomori who have 120 hp or fewer are dazed and cannot use the escalation die.
ast.target: 与真正的弗莫里交战且生命值120点或以下的敌人会陷入眩晕，且不能使用升级骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: At the start of its turn, the fomori torturer heals 5 hp for each fomorian that can see or hear it, and also heals 5 hp if at least one unclean-one can see or hear it. This effect affects the fomori even if it’s dead, healing it from 0 hp.
ast.target: 弗莫里折磨者在其回合开始时，为每个能看到或听到它的弗莫里亚人恢复5点生命值，并且如果至少有一个污秽者能看到或听到它，也会恢复5点生命值。此效果即使弗莫里已死亡也会影响它，将其从0点生命值恢复。

ast.name: description
ast.source: These fomori sing songs that drive listeners to insanity.
ast.target: 这些弗莫里亚人唱着令听者陷入疯狂的歌曲。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ears of all non-fomori creatures in the battle begin to bleed, and continue to do so until the end of the day. Until the next full heal-up, those creatures take a –4 penalty to skill checks involving social situations or detecting sounds.
ast.target: 战场上所有非弗莫里亚人生物的耳朵开始流血，并持续到当天结束。在下一次完全恢复之前，这些生物在涉及社交情境或侦测声音的技能检定上受到-4减值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The first time each battle the true fomori is staggered, each of its enemies in the battle is hampered until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 每场战斗中，当真正的弗莫里第一次进入蹒跚状态时，战场上的每个敌人都会陷入受阻状态，直到其下一个回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: These fomori usually have lots of eyes, or a single prominent eye, and fly by hovering.
ast.target: 这些弗莫里亚人通常有很多眼睛，或者一只突出的大眼睛，通过悬浮飞行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This creature flies, its host’s unwashed and diseased feet hovering inches above the ground.
ast.target: 这种生物飞行，其宿主未清洗且患病的脚悬浮在离地几英寸的空中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per turn as a quick action, the fomori can fire a powerful *eye beam* from one or more of its eyes.
ast.target: 每轮一次，作为快速动作，弗莫里亚人可以从其一只或多只眼睛中发射一道强大的*眼光束*。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a creature is staggered, it begins to feel as if its eyes are being pulled out by an invisible force. It takes a –1 penalty to hit and damage. Enemies that die in the presence of this fomori do indeed have their eyes sucked out as the fomori absorbs the eyeballs.
ast.target: 当一个生物进入蹒跚状态时，它会开始感觉自己的眼睛正被一股无形的力量拉出。它在命中和伤害上受到-1减值。在此弗莫里亚人面前死亡的敌人，确实会被吸出眼球，因为弗莫里亚人会吸收这些眼球。

ast.name: description
ast.source: These fomori shift their forms instinctually, constantly devolving into ever-more horrible creatures.
ast.target: 这些弗莫里亚人本能地变换形态，不断退化成越来越可怕的生物。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the true-fomori is hit by an attack that targets PD or MD, until the start of its next turn, the values of its PD and MD switch and it gains a bonus to AC equal to the escalation die.
ast.target: 当真正的弗莫里被一次针对强韧防御或意志防御的攻击命中时，直到其下一个回合开始，其强韧防御和意志防御的数值互换，并且其护甲等级获得等于升级骰的加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: After a battle with the fomori, the character with the lowest MD (randomly choose on a tie) has a nightmare during the following night, with a 50% chance that the nightmare somehow comes true the next day.
ast.target: 与弗莫里亚人战斗后，意志防御最低的角色（平局时随机选择）会在接下来的夜晚做噩梦，并且有50%的几率噩梦会在第二天以某种方式成真。

ast.name: description
ast.source: These true-fomori tend to have lots of legs and can control spiders, scorpions, ticks, and other arachnids.
ast.target: 这些真正的弗莫里往往有很多条腿，并且可以控制蜘蛛、蝎子、蜱虫和其他蛛形纲动物。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The true-fomori can climb like a spider and squeeze its body down to scuttle swiftly under low openings.
ast.target: 真正的弗莫里可以像蜘蛛一样攀爬，并能将身体收缩以在低矮的开口下快速爬行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per turn as a quick action, the true-fomori can make a *draining bite* attack to inject acid into its victim and drink its innards.
ast.target: 每轮一次，作为快速动作，真正的弗莫里可以进行一次*吸血啃咬*攻击，向受害者注入酸液并吸食其内脏。

ast.name: description
ast.source: These true-fomori have plumage or fur in unnatural madness-causing colors.
ast.target: 这些真正的弗莫里拥有能引发疯狂的非自然颜色的羽毛或皮毛。

ast.name: description
ast.source: An enemy making a ranged attack against the true-fomori takes a penalty to the attack equal to the escalation die and can’t use the escalation die for that attack.
ast.target: 对真正的弗莫里进行远程攻击的敌人，其攻击骰受到等于升级骰的减值，并且不能为该攻击使用升级骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Only against a target that is stuck from its crushing embrace attack.
ast.target: 仅针对被其碾压擒抱攻击所困住的目标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is helpless instead of hampered.
ast.target: 目标处于无助状态，而非受阻状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enemies engaged with the true-fomori who have 72 hp or fewer are dazed and cannot use the escalation die.
ast.target: 生命值不超过72点的敌人若与真·弗莫尔交战，将陷入眩晕状态，且无法使用升级骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: At the start of its turn, the fomori tyrant heals 5 hp for each fomorian that can see or hear it, and also heals 5 hp if at least one unclean-one can see or hear it. This effect affects the fomori even if it’s dead, healing it from 0 hp.
ast.target: 在弗莫尔暴君的回合开始时，它每有一个能看见或听见它的弗莫尔，便恢复5点生命值；若至少有一个不洁者能看见或听见它，它也恢复5点生命值。此效果即使弗莫尔已死亡也依然生效，可将其从0点生命值恢复。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The cultist is repulsive almost beyond comprehension, but its twisted form grants it the ability to withstand blows. It gains +2 to AC and +1 to PD.
ast.target: 邪教徒的外形丑陋得几乎令人难以理解，但其扭曲的身躯赋予了它承受打击的能力。它的护甲等级获得+2加值，强韧防御获得+1加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The unclean-one gains a +1d10 bonus to its initiative. It has a +2 attack bonus against enemies that started the battle with lower initiative scores.
ast.target: 不洁者的先攻获得+1d10加值。它对在战斗开始时先攻值低于它的敌人拥有+2攻击加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The cultist has a perfect and unaging physical body, a counterpoint to its increasingly corrupted soul. It gains +2 to PD and MD.
ast.target: 邪教徒拥有完美且不朽的肉体，与其日益腐化的灵魂形成鲜明对比。它的强韧防御和意志防御获得+2加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a melee attack hits the unclean-one, sores and pustules on its body burst, and the attacker takes 5 acid damage (champion: 10 damage; epic 15 damage).
ast.target: 当不洁者被近战攻击命中时，其身上的疮口和脓包会破裂，攻击者将受到5点酸蚀伤害（冠军级：10点伤害；史诗级：15点伤害）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The unclean-one cultist can move in strange ways, crawling up walls like a giant bug, skittering along the ground, and so forth. It gains a +2 bonus to disengage checks.
ast.target: 不洁者邪教徒能以奇特的方式移动，如巨型昆虫般攀爬墙壁、贴地疾行等。它的脱离检定获得+2加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die is odd, the unclean-one heals hit points equal to its level times the escalation die value (@lvl*@ed) at the start of its turn.
ast.target: 当升级骰为奇数时，不洁者在其回合开始时恢复的生命值等于其等级乘以升级骰数值（@lvl*@ed）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once one target has been hit by this attack, no further evil eye attacks can be made by any fomorian this battle.
ast.target: 一旦此攻击命中一个目标，本次战斗中任何弗莫尔都无法再发动邪恶之眼攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If there are at least three other fomorians engaged with the target, the fomorian brute can make the bite attack.
ast.target: 若目标周围至少有其他三个弗莫尔与之交战，弗莫尔蛮兵便可发动啃咬攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The fomorian brute mook counts as two 5th level mooks when you are building battles.
ast.target: 在构建战斗时，弗莫尔蛮兵喽啰算作两个5级喽啰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die is odd, the fomorian can make one extra melee attack per round as a quick action.
ast.target: 当升级骰为奇数时，弗莫尔每轮可额外发动一次近战攻击，作为快速动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The fomorian has a cluster of small eyes in the back of its head, a huge eye on a shoulder, a slug-like eye stalk, etc. The fomorian can’t be surprised or ambushed, and it has true sight (spells like blur, invisibility, etc. don’t work on it).
ast.target: 弗莫尔的后脑长有一簇小眼睛，肩膀上有一只巨眼，还有一条蛞蝓般的眼柄等。弗莫尔不会被突袭或伏击，并且拥有真实视域（模糊术、隐形术等法术对其无效）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per turn as a free action, the fomorian can make the evil eye attack.
ast.target: 每回合一次，作为自由动作，弗莫尔可发动邪恶之眼攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an attack against MD targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当针对意志防御的攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然16或更高，否则攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the fomorian is moving, it only takes half damage from attacks—it isn’t really tougher, it just doesn’t notice some wounds.
ast.target: 当弗莫尔移动时，它只受到攻击的一半伤害——并非因为它更坚韧，而是因为它没有注意到某些伤口。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The fomorian can make a third attack as a free action.
ast.target: 弗莫尔可作为自由动作发动第三次攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Twice per battle, if the fomorian is next to a dead body, as a move action it can eat part of the corpse, healing 1d6*10 hp.
ast.target: 每场战斗两次，若弗莫尔紧邻一具尸体，它可消耗一个移动动作啃食部分尸体，恢复1d6*10点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the fomorian top-cannibal heals from eating a corpse, it gains a bonus to damage with its next attack, hit or miss, equal to the hit points it healed.
ast.target: 当弗莫尔顶级食尸者通过啃食尸体恢复生命值时，其下一次攻击（无论命中与否）的伤害获得加值，加值等于其恢复的生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The forge wolf gains +1 to its AC against melee attacks for each other forge wolf engaged with its target (max +4 AC).
ast.target: 锻铸狼对近战攻击的护甲等级获得加值，加值等于与其目标交战的其他锻铸狼数量（最高+4护甲等级）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever the last mook in a mob of forge wolves dies it deals 2d12 fire damage to anybody engaged with it at the time. Creatures that resist fire damage ignore this effect.
ast.target: 当锻铸狼群中最后一个喽啰死亡时，它会对当时与之交战的所有生物造成2d12点火焰伤害。具有火焰伤害抗性的生物忽略此效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enemies take a -5 penalty to disengage checks against the wolf pack.
ast.target: 敌人对狼群进行脱离检定时承受-5减值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever the frenzy demon misses with a melee attack, it gains a +1 attack bonus and deals +1d4 damage until the end of the battle (maximum bonus +4, +4d4).
ast.target: 每当狂乱恶魔的近战攻击未命中时，其攻击加值获得+1，并造成+1d4伤害，持续至战斗结束（最高加值+4，+4d4）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per round, if a frog knight is unengaged, and an ally is targeted by an attack against AC anywhere on the battlefield, the frog knight may immediately leap to its ally’s side and give that ally a +2 bonus to AC for the rest of the round as an interrupt action.
ast.target: 每轮一次，若青蛙骑士未处于交战状态，且战场上任何地方有盟友成为针对护甲等级的攻击目标，青蛙骑士可立即跃至盟友身边，并作为中断动作给予该盟友+2护甲等级加值，持续至本轮结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: You should certainly use one ability per frogspawn, occasionally two. For frogspawn mooks, treat the abilities as usable once per battle.
ast.target: 你当然应该为每个蛙卵使用一种能力，偶尔使用两种。对于蛙卵喽啰，将这些能力视为每场战斗可使用一次。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The frogspawn deals @lvl poison damage to any character that pops free of it or successfully disengages from it. (Teleporting away is probably tongue-free unless the GM is hopping mad.)
ast.target: 蛙卵会对任何脱离或成功脱离交战的角色造成@lvl点毒素伤害。（传送离开可能不受影响，除非游戏主持人勃然大怒。）

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the frogspawn is unengaged at the start of its turn, choose a random nearby enemy the frogspawn can see. The frogspawn leaps into engagement with that enemy and its crit range with melee attacks expands by 3 until the end of the turn.
ast.target: 若蛙卵在其回合开始时未处于交战状态，选择一个蛙卵能看到的随机附近敌人。蛙卵跃入与该敌人的交战状态，其近战攻击的重击范围扩大3，持续至回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle, when struck by an attack that targets AC, take half damage from that attack instead.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，当被针对护甲等级的攻击命中时，改为只受到该攻击的一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: On a natural 16+, a hit from a frog knight’s club inflicts 5 ongoing poison damage (save ends).
ast.target: 当青蛙骑士的棍棒攻击掷出自然16或更高命中时，将造成5点持续毒素伤害（通过豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The frogspawn champion can use its whole turn to leap high into the sky, taking it out of combat (or at least making it really hard to hit, your call). The following turn the great-one lands on top of or next to an enemy and makes a *death from above* attack.
ast.target: 蛙卵冠军可消耗整个回合跃入高空，脱离战斗（或至少使其极难被命中，由你决定）。下一回合，这位伟人者会降落在敌人头顶或身旁，并发动一次*天降死亡*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Nearby enemies who roll a natural 1 save or attack roll get an item of theirs stolen by the frogspawn champion—probably their weapon.
ast.target: 附近敌人若在豁免或攻击骰上掷出自然1，其一件物品会被蛙卵冠军偷走——很可能是他们的武器。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enemies now get their items taken away on a natural 1, 2, or 3.
ast.target: 敌人现在在掷出自然1、2或3时，其物品会被夺走。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Frogspawn deceivers are experts at disguising themselves as other less froggy races, it requires a DC 25 skill check to see the truth beneath their veils or deep cloaks and lifelike masks. Once they attack what they are becomes obvious.
ast.target: 蛙卵欺骗者是伪装成其他非蛙类种族的专家，需要通过DC 25的技能检定才能看穿其面纱、深色斗篷和逼真面具下的真相。一旦他们发动攻击，其真实身份便显而易见。

ast.name: description
