ast.source: These froggy assassins can jump huge distances. When the escalation die is even frogspawn deceivers can jump as a quick action, leaping over enemies and past obstacles in a way that can’t be intercepted and that doesn’t provoke attacks.
ast.target: 这些蛙类刺客能跳跃极远的距离。当升级骰为偶数时，蛙卵欺骗者可将跳跃作为快速动作，跃过敌人和障碍物，此方式无法被拦截，且不会引发借机攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Frogspawn deceivers do not take miss damage.
ast.target: 蛙卵欺骗者不会受到未命中伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When using a frogspear, a natural attack roll of 16+ inflicts 3 ongoing poison damage.
ast.target: 使用蛙矛时，攻击骰掷出自然16或更高命中，将造成3点持续毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a frogspawn monk is slain, it may make a poison burst attack as an interrupt action.
ast.target: 当蛙卵僧侣被击杀时，它可作为中断动作发动一次毒爆攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If it wasn’t killed by the attack, the ally heals 60 hit points and immediately moves as a free action.
ast.target: 如果盟友未被该攻击杀死，它将恢复60点生命值，并立即进行一次移动动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target’s next move action is controlled by the old one.
ast.target: 目标的下一次移动动作由古者控制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The next time the target attacks, if it includes the old one in the attack the old one may make a free mindblast attack against the target.
ast.target: 目标下一次攻击时，若其攻击包含古者，古者可对目标发动一次自由心灵冲击攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enemies who miss with a melee attack must save (11+) or become confused until the end of their next turn. The save is easy (6+) for characters who missed with a longish weapon like a staff or spear, hard (16+) for those who missed with an unarmed attack.
ast.target: 近战攻击未命中的敌人必须进行豁免（11+成功），否则陷入困惑状态，持续至其下一回合结束。对于使用长柄武器（如长杖或长矛）未命中的角色，豁免难度为简单（6+成功）；对于使用徒手攻击未命中的角色，豁免难度为困难（16+成功）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This spellcroaker counts as two spellcroakers for the purposes of the croaking chorus.
ast.target: 就蛙鸣合唱而言，此咒蛙算作两个咒蛙。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This monster counts as two mooks when building battles.
ast.target: 在构建战斗时，此怪物算作两个喽啰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target loses its next move action, and if it’s engaged with the giant, it pops free.
ast.target: 目标失去其下一次移动动作，若其与巨人处于交战状态，则脱离交战。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy the frost giant adventurer is engaged with scores a critical hit against the giant, that enemy is hampered (hard save ends, 16+).
ast.target: 当与霜巨人冒险者交战的敌人对巨人造成重击时，该敌人将陷入受阻状态（困难豁免结束，16+成功）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The giant can make a frost touch attack against the target as a free action.
ast.target: 巨人可以对目标进行一次霜冻触碰攻击，此为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target and one other nearby enemy takes 18 cold damage as the area freezes over.
ast.target: 目标及附近一名其他敌人受到18点寒冷伤害，因为该区域被冻结了。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As the standard monster ability, except the remorhaz only needs to roll 6+ in snow.
ast.target: 与标准怪物能力相同，但雷莫哈兹在雪地中只需掷出6+即可。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a creature is engaged with the remorhaz at the start of its turn, it takes cold damage equal to twice the escalation die.
ast.target: 当一个生物在雷莫哈兹的回合开始时与其交战，它将受到等于升级骰两倍的寒冷伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Death can cause fluid-filled sacks inside the frost-würm to explode. When the attack roll that kills the frost-würm is a natural even roll, each nearby creature takes 20 cold damage.
ast.target: 死亡可能导致霜龙体内充满液体的囊袋爆炸。当击杀霜龙的攻击骰为自然偶数时，附近每个生物受到20点寒冷伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is stuck until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 目标被束缚，直到其下一个回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Both the fungaloid and its target take 1d4 damage.
ast.target: 真菌体及其目标各受到1d4点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a fungaloid creeper scores a critical hit with an attack, all nearby fungaloids move to engage the fungaloid’s target, even if that target has dropped to 0 hp. The move is a free action, and engaged creepers can roll disengage attempts instead of taking opportunity attacks.
ast.target: 当真菌爬行者以攻击命中并造成重击时，所有附近的真菌体都会移动并交战于该真菌体的目标，即使该目标生命值已降至0。此移动为自由动作，已交战的爬行者可以进行脱离尝试，而非承受借机攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever the escalation die is even, each creeper must succeed on a normal save at the start of its turn or lose its move action that turn.
ast.target: 每当升级骰为偶数时，每个爬行者必须在其回合开始时通过一次普通豁免，否则该回合失去移动动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The drudge can make a fungal attack this turn as a quick action.
ast.target: 苦工可以在本回合以快速动作进行一次真菌攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: At the end of each of the empress’ turns, if there are fewer than two elder spores (see below) per enemy, add a number of elder spores to the battle so that there are two spores per enemy. A spore can “sprout” already engaged with a nearby or far away enemy or on its own, it’s up to you.
ast.target: 在女皇的每个回合结束时，如果每个敌人对应的长老孢子少于两个（见下文），则向战斗中添加足够数量的长老孢子，使每个敌人对应两个孢子。孢子可以“萌发”并已与附近或远处的敌人交战，或独自出现，由你决定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fungus grows on everything in the area! Whenever a non-fungus creature attempts to move, it must make a DC 18 Dexterity or Strength check to do so or it loses its move action. If the creature uses a standard action to clear away fungus, it can move normally that turn.
ast.target: 真菌在该区域的所有东西上生长！每当一个非真菌生物试图移动时，它必须通过一次DC 18的敏捷或力量检定，否则失去移动动作。如果该生物使用标准动作清除真菌，则该回合可以正常移动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: One nearby fungaloid can make a fungal attack as a free action.
ast.target: 一个附近的真菌体可以以自由动作进行一次真菌攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Up to three nearby fungaloids can each make a fungal attack as a free action.
ast.target: 最多三个附近的真菌体可以各自以自由动作进行一次真菌攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The monarch’s attacks deal +1 damage for each other allied creature with the plant type in the battle (max +10).
ast.target: 君主的攻击为每个其他具有植物类型的盟友生物（最多+10）提供+1伤害加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If there are not enough nearby fungaloids to use up all the fungal attacks granted by the mycotic scepter, skip the extra fungal attacks but add a full-strength fungaloid drudge to the battle next to the fungaloid monarch.
ast.target: 如果附近没有足够的真菌体来使用菌丝权杖赋予的所有真菌攻击，则跳过额外的真菌攻击，但在真菌君主旁边向战斗中添加一个全强度的真菌苦工。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 8 psychic damage and 8 ongoing psychic damage (that feels like a terminal case of guilt).
ast.target: 目标还受到8点心灵伤害和8点持续心灵伤害（感觉像是严重的负罪感）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 30 psychic damage instead.
ast.target: 目标改为受到30点心灵伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Attacks against a fury devil take a -4 penalty unless the devil is hellbent against that attacker.
ast.target: 对狂怒魔的攻击受到-4惩罚，除非该魔物对该攻击者处于地狱狂怒状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When you choose to add the escalation die to an attack against a fury devil, the fury devil deals 1d10 extra damage with its next attack this battle, hit or miss.
ast.target: 当你选择将升级骰加入对狂怒魔的攻击时，狂怒魔在本次战斗中的下一次攻击（无论命中与否）将额外造成1d10点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fury devils fly from place to place but fight on their feet.
ast.target: 狂怒魔在地点间飞行，但战斗时站立。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy intercepts the fury devil, the next attack this battle the devil makes against that enemy that hits is a critical hit instead.
ast.target: 当敌人拦截狂怒魔时，该魔物在本次战斗中对该敌人的下一次命中攻击将改为重击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The gargoyle can make two more melee attacks as a free action (but never more than three total attacks per standard action, even if you roll another 11+).
ast.target: 石像鬼可以以自由动作再进行两次近战攻击（但即使你掷出另一个11+，每次标准动作的总攻击次数也绝不超过三次）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The gargoyle has resist damage 12+ against attacks targeting AC.
ast.target: 石像鬼对针对AC的攻击具有12+的伤害抗性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Because they often look like statues, gargoyles are capable of springing a surprise on inattentive PCs. When there’s a chance of such an ambush, give the PCs a champion-tier skill check (DC 20) to notice the gargoyles and avoid being surprised.
ast.target: 因为它们通常看起来像雕像，石像鬼能够对疏忽的玩家角色发动突袭。当存在此类伏击的可能性时，给予玩家角色一次冠军级技能检定（DC 20）以注意到石像鬼并避免被突袭。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Target takes a cumulative –2 penalty to disengage checks until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 目标在战斗结束前，其脱离检定受到累积-2惩罚。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gelatinous creatures have no brains, sometimes they just do things. When the escalation die is odd, instead of making an attack or moving, roll a d6 to see what the cubahedron does. If an option is not viable (you roll a 5 but there is no engulfed enemy), reroll until you get a valid option.
ast.target: 胶状生物没有大脑，有时它们只是随机行动。当升级骰为奇数时，不进行攻击或移动，而是掷一个d6来决定立方体做什么。如果某个选项不可行（你掷出5但没有被吞噬的敌人），则重新掷骰直到获得有效选项。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 1. The cubahedron jiggles in place. Each nearby enemy takes 5 acid damage. Each creature engulfed by the cube takes a -4 penalty to its saves until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 1. 立方体原地抖动。附近每个敌人受到5点酸蚀伤害。被立方体吞噬的每个生物在其下一个回合结束前，其豁免检定受到-4惩罚。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 2. The cubahedron moves as a quick action. If the cube ends its move engaged with enemies, each of those enemies must roll a save; on a failure, the cubahedron grabs them (but they’re not engulfed).
ast.target: 2. 立方体以快速动作移动。如果立方体移动结束时与敌人交战，这些敌人中的每一个都必须进行一次豁免；失败时，立方体抓住他们（但他们未被吞噬）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 3. The cubahedron spits an engulfed creature into the air above it and makes a shlup’n’schlorp attack against that creature with a +5 attack bonus. Then the creature is engulfed again.
ast.target: 3. 立方体将一个被吞噬的生物吐向其上方的空中，并以+5攻击加值对该生物进行一次“吮吸与吞咽”攻击。然后该生物再次被吞噬。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 4. The cubahedron flattens itself slightly and crawls up a wall and possibly across the ceiling. The cube falls at the end of its turn. Each creature engulfed by the cube takes 30 damage, and it makes a gel drop attack against enemies below it.
ast.target: 4. 立方体稍微压扁自己，爬上墙壁并可能穿过天花板。立方体在其回合结束时坠落。被立方体吞噬的每个生物受到30点伤害，并且它对下方的敌人进行一次“胶状坠落”攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 5. The cubahedron moves one creature engulfed by it to the surface. The target gains a +4 bonus to attempts to escape the cube, but each time the cube is targeted by an attack, the engulfed creature must roll a save; on a failure, it becomes the target of the attack instead.
ast.target: 5. 立方体将一个被吞噬的生物移动到其表面。目标逃脱立方体的尝试获得+4加值，但每次立方体成为攻击目标时，被吞噬的生物必须进行一次豁免；失败时，它改为成为该攻击的目标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 6. The cubahedron spits out each enemy engulfed by it with great force in different directions; each of those creatures takes 50 damage.
ast.target: 6. 立方体以巨大力量将每个被吞噬的敌人吐向不同方向；这些生物中的每一个受到50点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target pops free from the dodecahedron and is knocked far away, and the ooze makes the attack again against a different nearby enemy as a free action.
ast.target: 目标从十二面体中弹出并被击飞很远，然后该软泥以自由动作对另一个附近的敌人再次进行该攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dodecahedron engulfs the target if it's samller than the dodecahedron.
ast.target: 如果目标比十二面体小，十二面体会吞噬目标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gelatinous creatures have no brains, sometimes they just do things. When the escalation die is odd, instead of making an attack or moving, roll a d4 to see what the tetrahedron does. If an option is not viable (you roll a 1 but there is no engaged enemy), reroll until you get a valid option.
ast.target: 胶状生物没有大脑，有时它们只是随机行动。当升级骰为奇数时，不进行攻击或移动，而是掷一个d4来决定四面体做什么。如果某个选项不可行（你掷出1但没有交战的敌人），则重新掷骰直到获得有效选项。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 4. As a standard action the ooze quickly moves around the battlefield, oozing over 1d3 nearby enemies. Those enemies become engaged with the ooze and stuck (save ends).
ast.target: 4. 作为标准动作，软泥快速在战场上移动，覆盖1d3个附近的敌人。这些敌人与软泥交战并被束缚（通过豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is engulfed instead of stuck.
ast.target: 目标改为被吞噬而非被束缚。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is vulnerable (attacks vs. it have crit range expanded by 2) to attacks by undead until the end of the ghoul’s next turn.
ast.target: 目标在食尸鬼的下一个回合结束前，对亡灵的攻击处于易伤状态（攻击它的攻击重击范围扩大2）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ghoul’s claws and bite attack deals +4 damage against vulnerable targets.
ast.target: 食尸鬼的爪击和啃咬攻击对易伤目标造成+4伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Any creature that is slain by a ghoul and not consumed will rise as a ghoul the next night.
ast.target: 任何被食尸鬼杀死且未被吞噬的生物将在次日晚上复活为食尸鬼。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the ghoul hits a vulnerable target with a natural even attack roll, the target is also stunned (save ends).
ast.target: 当食尸鬼以自然偶数攻击骰命中易伤目标时，目标还会被震慑（通过豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Until the target saves against the vulnerable effect, it also takes 2d6 ongoing damage each turn.
ast.target: 在目标通过豁免解除易伤效果之前，它每回合还会受到2d6点持续伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target pops free from each enemy it’s engaged with and is pulled to the ghoul licklash, who engages it.
ast.target: 目标从与其交战的每个敌人处弹出，并被拉向食尸鬼舔舐者，后者与其交战。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The licklash can make a flesh-seeking tongue attack against a different target as a free action.
ast.target: 舔舐者可以以自由动作对一个不同的目标进行一次寻肉舌击攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Any creature that is slain by a ghoul and not consumed will rise as a ghoul the next night.
ast.target: 任何被食尸鬼杀死且未被吞噬的生物将在次日晚上复活为食尸鬼。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per round when a nearby enemy makes a ranged attack, the ghoul licklash can make a flesh-seeking tongue attack against that enemy before the attack as a free action.
ast.target: 每轮一次，当附近敌人进行远程攻击时，食尸鬼舔舐者可以在该攻击前以自由动作对该敌人进行一次寻肉舌击攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 目标被眩晕（通过豁免结束）

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 1d3 ongoing acid damage.
ast.target: 目标还受到1d3点持续酸蚀伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A giant ant can climb on ceilings and walls as easily as it moves on the ground.
ast.target: 巨型蚂蚁可以像在地面上移动一样轻松地在天花板和墙壁上攀爬。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The giant bird of prey must move before making this attack.
ast.target: 这种巨型猛禽必须先移动才能发动此攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The giant bird of prey flies fast and strong, but needs a little time to maneuver. It can’t be intercepted during its movement except by a truly amazing enemy flyer.
ast.target: 这种巨型猛禽飞行迅捷而有力，但需要一点时间来调整姿态。除非遭遇真正出色的敌方飞行者，否则在其移动过程中无法被拦截。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The bird can make a talon grab attack.
ast.target: 这种巨鸟可以发动利爪抓取攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy fails a disengage check against the dire mantis, the mantis can make an opportunity attack against it.
ast.target: 当敌人对恐怖螳螂的脱离检定失败时，螳螂可以对其发动借机攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While the dire mantis might rate as a huge monster in terms of size, its stats are based on those for a large monster.
ast.target: 尽管恐怖螳螂在体型上可能被归类为巨型怪物，但其属性是基于大型怪物设定的。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the dire mantis starts its turn grabbing an enemy, it can make a chomp attack against that enemy as a free action.
ast.target: 当恐怖螳螂在回合开始时正抓取着一个敌人时，它可以对该敌人发动一次啃咬攻击，此为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The vrock can make a demonic screech attack as a free action.
ast.target: 弗洛克可以发动一次恶魔尖啸攻击，此为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Creatures hit by the vrock’s demonic screech attack that are already vulnerable are also hampered (save ends).
ast.target: 被弗洛克的恶魔尖啸攻击命中且已处于易伤状态的生物，还会受到阻碍（持续至豁免成功）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 2d6 ongoing poison damage if it’s dazed or stuck.
ast.target: 如果目标处于目眩或束缚状态，它还会受到2d6持续性毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is also stuck until the end of the spider’s next turn.
ast.target: 目标还会被束缚，直到蜘蛛的下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A giant web spider can climb on ceilings and walls as easily as it moves on the ground.
ast.target: 巨型网蛛可以像在地面上移动一样轻松地在天花板和墙壁上攀爬。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Both the zombie and its target take 6d10 damage!
ast.target: 僵尸和它的目标都会受到6d10点伤害！

ast.name: description
ast.source: A critical hit against a giant zombie mook deals triple damage instead of the normal double damage for a crit.
ast.target: 对巨型僵尸喽啰造成重击时，造成三倍伤害，而非通常重击的双倍伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The giant zombie mook counts as two 9th level mooks when you are building battles.
ast.target: 在构建战斗时，巨型僵尸喽啰算作两个9级喽啰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Target must begin making last gasp saves as it is slowly absorbed. Absorbed creatures can’t be resurrected by normal means.
ast.target: 目标必须开始进行最后挣扎豁免，因为它正被缓慢吸收。被吸收的生物无法通过常规手段复活。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The next time this battle that the target saves against shocked it is an easy save (6+).
ast.target: 在本次战斗中，下一次目标对抗“震惊”状态进行豁免时，这是一次简单豁免（6+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A gibbering mouther causes surrounding rocks and dirt to soften. On rounds when the escalation die is odd characters must succeed at a save (11+) when they attempt to move or their movement ends and they become stuck (save ends).
ast.target: 呓语吞噬者会使周围的岩石和泥土变软。在升级骰为奇数的回合中，角色尝试移动时必须通过一次豁免（11+），否则移动结束并陷入束缚状态（持续至豁免成功）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: These demons torment with their tickling tails. Enemies that disengage from them suffer a cumulative –1 penalty on all checks and attacks until the end of the character’s turn (no maximum penalty).
ast.target: 这些恶魔用它们的挠痒尾巴折磨敌人。从它们身边脱离的敌人，在该角色回合结束前，所有检定和攻击都会受到累积的-1减值（无上限）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When building battles with this monster, it only counts a half a normal mook.
ast.target: 在构建包含此怪物的战斗时，它只算作半个普通喽啰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The demon can grab the target as long as it isn’t already grabbing a creature. The grabbed foe can’t move except to teleport, pop free, or attempt to disengage, and disengage attempts take a -5 penalty unless the creature hit the glabrezou with an attack that turn.
ast.target: 只要恶魔当前没有抓取其他生物，它就可以抓取目标。被抓取的敌人无法移动，除非是传送、挣脱或尝试脱离，并且除非该生物在本回合内用攻击命中了格拉布雷祖，否则其脱离检定会受到-5减值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The glabrezou gains a +4 attack bonus against any enemy it is grabbing.
ast.target: 格拉布雷祖对其正在抓取的任何敌人获得+4攻击加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: success indicates a hit; failure is a miss that hits one of the mirror images instead, dealing no miss damage to the glabrezou but dispelling all the images.
ast.target: 成功表示命中；失败表示未命中，但会击中一个镜像，对格拉布雷祖不造成未命中伤害，但会驱散所有镜像。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once the glabrezou is staggered, it takes 2d10 damage whenever it uses mirror image, so movement or escape start registering as alternatives.
ast.target: 一旦格拉布雷祖进入重伤状态，每当它使用镜像术时，都会受到2d10点伤害，因此移动或逃跑开始成为备选方案。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The glittering bearer normally hovers a foot or two off the ground, and can glide over obstacles.
ast.target: 闪光携带者通常悬浮在离地一两英尺的高度，并且可以滑行越过障碍物。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This creature has resist damage 16+ to all damage except force damage, which damages it normally. A glittering bearer can move through solid objects but it can’t end its movement inside them.
ast.target: 这种生物对所有伤害具有16+伤害抗性，但力场伤害除外，力场伤害对其造成正常伤害。闪光携带者可以穿过固体物体，但不能在其内部结束移动。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 这种生物无法发动借机攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The fiendfletch can make a disengage check as a free action this turn after the attack.
ast.target: 恶魔箭手可以在本次攻击后，以自由动作进行一次脱离检定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is dazed until the end of its next turn as it suffers debilitating pain from a hellish arrow.
ast.target: 目标因遭受地狱之箭带来的剧烈痛苦而目眩，直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While making a ranged attack, the fiendfletch gains a +4 bonus to AC against opportunity attacks.
ast.target: 在进行远程攻击时，恶魔箭手对抗借机攻击的AC获得+4加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While the fiendfletch has at least one blocker, troop, or wrecker ally (like a shredder) between it and an enemy, it gains a +4 bonus to all defenses against ranged and close-quarters attacks from that enemy.
ast.target: 当恶魔箭手与敌人之间至少有一个阻挡者、部队或破坏者盟友（如撕裂者）时，它对抗该敌人的远程和近程攻击的所有防御获得+4加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the fiendfletch rolls a natural 16+ with a hellbent bow attack and hits, the target is weakened (save ends) instead of dazed.
ast.target: 当恶魔箭手使用地狱弓攻击掷出自然16+并命中时，目标会陷入虚弱状态（持续至豁免成功），而非目眩。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The gnoll can make a second longbow attack (no more) as a free action.
ast.target: 豺狼人可以发动第二次长弓攻击（仅限一次），此为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If more than one gnoll is engaged with the target, each gnoll melee attack that misses that target deals half damage.
ast.target: 如果有多于一个豺狼人与目标交战，每个豺狼人的近战攻击若未命中该目标，则造成半额伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the gnoll ranger is unengaged and an enemy moves to engage it, roll a . On a 11+, the gnoll ranger can make a longbow attack against that enemy as a free action just before being engaged.
ast.target: 当豺狼人游侠未交战且有敌人移动至与其交战时，掷一次骰。若结果为11+，豺狼人游侠可以在被交战前，以自由动作对该敌人发动一次长弓攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The crit range of attacks by gnoll rangers expands by 2 against humanoids.
ast.target: 豺狼人游侠对抗类人生物的攻击重击范围扩大2点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gnoll shredders gain a +2 bonus to opportunity attacks, and enemies take a -8 penalty to disengage checks against them.
ast.target: 豺狼人撕裂者发动借机攻击时获得+2加值，并且敌人对抗它们的脱离检定受到-8减值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die increases, if there are more gnolls in the battle than their enemies, one gnoll shredder in the battle can make a melee attack as a free action.
ast.target: 当升级骰增加时，如果战场上的豺狼人数量多于其敌人，则战场上的一名豺狼人撕裂者可以发动一次近战攻击，此为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy would pop free from the shredder, it must roll a disengage check as a free action instead. If it fails, the shredder can make a diabolical axe attack against that enemy as a free action.
ast.target: 当敌人试图从撕裂者身边挣脱时，它必须改为进行一次脱离检定，此为自由动作。如果失败，撕裂者可以对该敌人发动一次邪恶斧击攻击，此为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the shredder hits with an opportunity attack, it can make a spoiling strike attack against that enemy as a free action.
ast.target: 当撕裂者的借机攻击命中时，它可以对该敌人发动一次破坏性打击攻击，此为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is marked for death; until the end of the battle, all gnoll attacks against the target gain an attack bonus equal to the escalation die.
ast.target: 目标被标记为死亡；直到战斗结束，所有豺狼人对该目标的攻击获得等于升级骰的攻击加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The goblin bat mage pops free from the target and can move as a free action.
ast.target: 哥布林蝙蝠法师从目标身边挣脱，并可以移动，此为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If target is staggered after taking the damage, it’s also hampered until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 如果目标在受到伤害后进入重伤状态，它还会受到阻碍，直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: One random nearby ally of the target takes 2d6 negative energy damage.
ast.target: 目标附近的一名随机盟友受到2d6负能量伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a ranged attack targets this creature while it’s flying, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当远程攻击以正在飞行的此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然16+，否则只造成半额伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A goblin bat mage engaged with a conscious enemy after attacking it will attempt to disengage and fly into the air if it has a move action remaining that turn.
ast.target: 哥布林蝙蝠法师在攻击后若与清醒的敌人交战，并且该回合仍有移动动作剩余，它会尝试脱离并飞向空中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the goblin bat mage is staggered, it must roll an immediate save. On a failure, it loses its ability to fly until the end of its next turn. If flying near the ground, it lands immediately. If flying far away from the ground, it lands badly and takes 15 damage.
ast.target: 当哥布林蝙蝠法师进入重伤状态时，它必须进行一次即时豁免。若失败，它将失去飞行能力，直到其下一回合结束。如果在靠近地面处飞行，它会立即落地。如果在远离地面处飞行，它会重重摔落并受到15点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Goblins gain a +5 bonus to disengage checks.
ast.target: 哥布林的脱离检定获得+5加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose another nearby enemy; it also suffers from the engage/disengage effect until the end of the shaman’s next turn.
ast.target: 选择另一名附近的敌人；它也会受到交战/脱离效果影响，直到萨满的下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Goblins only need to roll a 6+ to disengage.
ast.target: 哥布林脱离只需掷出6+即可。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A nearby undead ally of the necromancer gains 60 temporary hp.
ast.target: 死灵法师附近的一个亡灵盟友获得60点临时生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an ally of the necromancer dies it instead heals to full hp and its creature type becomes UNDEAD if it was not already.
ast.target: 当死灵法师的盟友死亡时，它会恢复至满生命值，并且其生物类型变为亡灵（如果它原本不是亡灵的话）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the necromancer starts the combat as a living HUMANOID, then when it dies instead its type becomes UNDEAD and it instantly heals to 226 hp.
ast.target: 如果死灵法师在战斗开始时是活体类人生物，那么当它死亡时，其类型变为亡灵，并且立即恢复226点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragon regains the use of its dazzling breath if it’s expended and can use it during its next turn.
ast.target: 巨龙恢复其炫目吐息的使用能力（如果已耗尽），并可以在其下一个回合使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes no damage and is instead swallowed whole (see below).
ast.target: 目标不受到伤害，而是被整个吞下（见下文）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The gorge dragon can have up to two enemies grabbed at the same time.
ast.target: 峡谷巨龙最多可以同时抓取两名敌人。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gorge dragons swim well and can breathe underwater.
ast.target: 峡谷巨龙善于游泳，并且可以在水下呼吸。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target becomes vulnerable to the grandmother’s type of special damage until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 目标在战斗结束前，对祖母的特殊伤害类型变得脆弱。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This creature gains different abilities based on which name it has taken.
ast.target: 此生物根据其采用的名称获得不同的能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Ancient spell deals force damage, and when the grandmother scores a critical hit with the attack, the target is weakened (save ends) and 1d4 of the grandmother’s nearby allies heal 30 hp.
ast.target: 远古法术造成力场伤害，当祖母用该攻击造成重击时，目标被削弱（直到豁免结束），并且祖母附近的1d4名盟友恢复30点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Ancient spell now targets MD and deals psychic damage. In addition, a target hit by ancient spell can’t use the escalation die until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 远古法术现在以强韧防御为目标，并造成心灵伤害。此外，被远古法术命中的目标在其下一个回合结束前无法使用升级骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Ancient spell deals negative energy damage, and when grandmother rolls a natural even hit with ancient spell against an enemy engaged with her, she can make a pestle melee attack as a free action.
ast.target: 远古法术造成负能量伤害，当祖母用远古法术对一名与她交战的敌人掷出自然偶数命中时，她可以以一个自由动作进行一次研钵近战攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The grandmother flies somehow, either through a magic item or by using spells that have become second nature.
ast.target: 祖母以某种方式飞行，无论是通过魔法物品还是使用已成为第二天性的法术。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a creature attacks grandmother, it takes 1d6*10 damage of the grandmother’s special type on a hit, or 1d3*5 damage of that type on a miss.
ast.target: 当一个生物攻击祖母时，如果命中，它会受到1d6*10点祖母特殊类型的伤害；如果未命中，则受到1d3*5点该类型的伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The gravemeat can make another dirtcaked claw attack as a free action, then it takes 1d6 damage from the exertion.
ast.target: 墓肉可以以一个自由动作再进行一次泥爪攻击，然后它会因用力过度而受到1d6点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target loses the use of a random heroic-tier true magic item that the gray hoarder magically wrests away. The item can only be retrieved as a standard action from the body of the slain gray hoarder.
ast.target: 目标失去一件随机的英雄级真魔法物品的使用权，该物品被灰掠夺者以魔法夺走。该物品只能通过一个标准动作从被击杀的灰掠夺者尸体上取回。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The gray hoarder’s crit range expands by the number of heroic-tier true magic items that the target is attuned to. (Targets with more of these items are preferred prey.)
ast.target: 灰掠夺者的重击范围根据目标所调谐的英雄级真魔法物品数量而扩大。（拥有更多此类物品的目标是首选猎物。）

ast.name: description
ast.source: The gray hoarder has resist negative energy 16+, as well as a +2 bonus to defenses and saves against attacks and effects that specifically target undead.
ast.target: 灰掠夺者拥有负能量抗性16+，并且对专门针对亡灵的攻击和效果，在防御和豁免上有+2加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target loses use of a random true magic item as the raider wrests it away. The item can be retrieved as a standard action from the body of the slain gray raider.
ast.target: 目标失去一件随机的真魔法物品的使用权，掠夺者将其夺走。该物品可以通过一个标准动作从被击杀的灰掠夺者尸体上取回。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The gray raider’s crit range expands by the number of true magic items of champion-tier that the target is carrying.
ast.target: 灰掠夺者的重击范围根据目标携带的冠军级真魔法物品数量而扩大。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the great cat moves before making this attack, it takes a –1 penalty to the attack roll but gains a +4 bonus to the damage.
ast.target: 如果巨猫在进行此攻击前移动，它在攻击骰上受到-1减值，但在伤害上获得+4加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die is odd, the great cat can jump across the battlefield as a move action, avoiding obstacles and dangers. It can’t be intercepted when leaping.
ast.target: 当升级骰为奇数时，巨猫可以以一个移动动作跳过战场，避开障碍和危险。跳跃时无法被拦截。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a quick action when the escalation die is even, the great cat can make an *unnerving roar* attack.
ast.target: 当升级骰为偶数时，巨猫可以以一个快速动作进行一次*令人不安的咆哮*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The cadre can make a second double axe attack (no more) as a free action.
ast.target: 核心成员可以以一个自由动作进行第二次双斧攻击（仅限一次）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The attack targets PD instead of AC.
ast.target: 攻击以强韧防御为目标，而非护甲等级。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The crit range of melee attacks by great fang cadre orcs expands by 3 until half the great fang cadre mob has been dropped.
ast.target: 在巨牙核心兽人部落被消灭一半之前，巨牙核心兽人或其近战攻击的重击范围扩大3。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 1d20 damage vs. any enemy that starts its turn engaged with the orc, or +4 bonus to AC.
ast.target: 对任何与兽人开始回合时处于交战状态的敌人造成1d20点伤害，或获得+4护甲等级加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the escalation die is even, make another rip and peck attack.
ast.target: 如果升级骰为偶数，则再进行一次撕扯啄击攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: An owlbear that scores a critical hit against a hampered enemy tears a piece of the creature off (GM chooses a limb) and will subsequently attempt to retreat with the prize to feed its cubs. The torn-up enemy is stunned until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 枭熊对一名受阻碍的敌人造成重击时，会撕下该生物的一部分（由游戏主持人选择一个肢体），并随后试图带着战利品撤退去喂养幼崽。被撕裂的敌人在其下一个回合结束前被震慑。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Owlbears are nearly silent until they strike. Checks to hear them approaching take a -5 penalty.
ast.target: 枭熊在发动攻击前几乎无声。察觉它们接近的检定受到-5减值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is stuck and can’t make ranged attacks (save ends).
ast.target: 目标被定身且无法进行远程攻击（直到豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the hound scores a critical hit with its savage bite attack, it heals 20 hp.
ast.target: 当猎犬用其野蛮撕咬攻击造成重击时，它恢复20点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the hound hits with its savage bite attack, the target is also vulnerable (save ends).
ast.target: 当猎犬用其野蛮撕咬攻击命中时，目标也变得脆弱（直到豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the hound rolls a natural even miss with its savage bite attack, the target takes half damage and the warg’s rider, if any, takes the other half. In addition, a creature riding the hound deals only half damage with natural even misses with melee attacks.
ast.target: 当猎犬用其野蛮撕咬攻击掷出自然偶数未命中时，目标受到一半伤害，而座狼的骑手（如果有的话）受到另一半伤害。此外，骑乘猎犬的生物在近战攻击中掷出自然偶数未命中时，只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Add a dire feature. Roll a d6.

1: Armor plates

2: Spiky bits

3: Carnage

4: Poison

5: Dire regeneration

6: Fury
ast.target:
添加一个凶暴特性。掷一个d6。

1： 铠甲板

2： 尖刺

3： 杀戮

4： 毒素

5： 凶暴再生

6： 狂怒

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add +2 to the dire animal’s AC, and add +1 to its PD.
ast.target: 为凶暴动物的护甲等级增加+2，并为其强韧防御增加+1。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever an enemy hits the hound with a melee attack, deal 10 damage to that attacker.
ast.target: 每当一名敌人用近战攻击命中猎犬时，对该攻击者造成10点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hound’s attacks that miss deal 5 damage. When staggered, its missed attacks deal 10 damage.
ast.target: 猎犬未命中的攻击造成5点伤害。当它处于濒死状态时，其未命中的攻击造成10点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 野蛮撕咬还造成10点持续毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die is even, the hound heals 15 hp.
ast.target: 当升级骰为偶数时，猎犬恢复15点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While staggered, the hound gains a +2 attack bonus and deals +4 damage, but at the end of each of its turns it takes 2d6 damage.
ast.target: 当处于濒死状态时，猎犬获得+2攻击加值并造成+4伤害，但在其每个回合结束时，它会受到2d6点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While the target has 60 hp or fewer, it’s dazed from fear and doesn’t add the escalation die to its attacks (save ends all).
ast.target: 当目标生命值降至60点或更少时，它因恐惧而恍惚，并且不将升级骰加入其攻击骰（直到所有效果豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When you choose to add the escalation die to an attack against a great hubris devil, the devil can choose one of your magic items whose powers won’t work for the rest of the battle (default bonuses still apply).
ast.target: 当你选择将升级骰加入对大傲慢魔的攻击时，该魔可以选择你的一件魔法物品，其能力在战斗剩余时间内无法生效（默认加值仍然适用）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Teleport the sunder wraith somewhere nearby the target, but not engaged with an enemy.
ast.target: 将裂解幽魂传送到目标附近的某个地方，但不能与敌人交战。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sunder wraiths fly like the world is defined however they want it to be defined.
ast.target: 裂解幽魂的飞行方式仿佛世界是按照它们想要的方式定义的。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Three times per battle when the sunder wraith moves through a solid object like a wall, throne, door, or chest, the object must roll a hard save. If the save fails, the object is broken. Strongly magical objects get bonuses on the save, but err on the side of uh-oh.
ast.target: 每场战斗三次，当裂解幽魂穿过像墙壁、王座、门或箱子这样的固体物体时，该物体必须进行一次困难豁免。如果豁免失败，该物体被破坏。强大的魔法物品在豁免上有加值，但倾向于偏向于糟糕的结果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Make a bite attack against the target as a free action.
ast.target: 以一个自由动作对目标进行一次啃咬攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a move action the xorn can swim through the ground, or through a wall.
ast.target: 土巨怪可以以一个移动动作在地面或墙壁中游泳。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The xorn can’t be surprised, and rogues can’t use their Sneak Attack class feature on them.
ast.target: 土巨怪无法被突袭，并且盗贼无法对它们使用偷袭职业特性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The xorn can see through all types of rock and soil for some distance, let’s say “nearby”.
ast.target: 土元素能看穿一定距离内的所有岩石和土壤，我们称之为“附近”。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Xorn are used to the fires of the deep and the cold of solid rock—when a cold or fire attack targets a xorn, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 土元素习惯了地底的烈火与坚硬岩石的寒冷——当寒冷或火焰攻击针对土元素时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然16+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the xorn moves out of the floor or wall or ceiling into engagement with an enemy, deal 6d6 damage to that enemy.
ast.target: 当土元素从地板、墙壁或天花板中移动出来与敌人交战时，对该敌人造成6d6点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Twice per battle as a quick action (once per round), the xorn can heal 20 hit points.
ast.target: 每场战斗两次，作为快速动作（每回合一次），土元素可以恢复20点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The xorn’s attacks deal half damage on a miss.
ast.target: 土元素的攻击在未命中时造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle when the xorn attacks immediately after swimming out from rock, it can deal double damage on a hit.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，当土元素在从岩石中游出后立即攻击时，命中时可造成双倍伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy rolls a natural odd spell attack against the xorn, it only deals half damage. In addition, a natural 1 means that the spell is reflected back at the caster (the enemy rerolls the attack against itself).
ast.target: 当敌人对土元素进行自然奇数法术攻击时，只造成一半伤害。此外，自然1意味着法术被反射回施法者（敌人对自己重新进行攻击骰）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 12 extra damage from a wing buffet.
ast.target: 目标受到来自翼击的12点额外伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 20 extra damage from a claw strike.
ast.target: 目标受到来自爪击的20点额外伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragon can make a treasury master attack as a free action
ast.target: 龙可以作为自由动作进行一次宝库大师攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the dragon is in his lair, it has +1 to AC.
ast.target: 如果龙在其巢穴中，它的护甲值+1。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy scores a critical hit against the greathoard elder while it’s in its lair, the elder can reroll one of its missed attacks each round (cumulative) as its hoard sings a song of carnage to it.
ast.target: 当敌人在巨宝长老处于其巢穴中时对其造成重击时，长老每回合可以重新掷一次其未命中的攻击（累积），因为它的宝藏为它唱起杀戮之歌。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A greathoard elder can use precise breath 1d4 +1 times per battle, but never two turns in a row.
ast.target: 巨宝长老每场战斗可以使用精确吐息1d4 +1次，但不能连续两回合使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragon is enamored/envious of the icons with the greatest hoards. For each PC who has at least one positive or conflicted relationship point with one or more of those icons, the greathoard elder gains an extra use of treasury master this battle.
ast.target: 龙痴迷/嫉妒那些拥有最大宝藏的图标。对于每个与一个或多个此类图标拥有至少一点正面或冲突关系点的玩家角色，巨宝长老在本场战斗中获得一次额外的宝库大师使用次数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target pops free from all enemies engaged with it and is vulnerable to all attacks (save ends).
ast.target: 目标从所有与其交战的敌人处脱离，并且对所有攻击易伤（持续到豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The green bulette gains a +3 bonus to attack and damage with its first attack each battle.
ast.target: 绿色土龙兽在每场战斗的第一次攻击中获得+3的攻击和伤害加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While at least one creature in the battle is staggered or unconscious, the bulette gains a bonus to its attacks and damage equal to the escalation die but can’t use into the earth. Creatures that have no blood (constructs, oozes, plant creatures, etc.) don’t trigger this ability.
ast.target: 当战斗中至少有一个生物处于濒死或昏迷状态时，土龙兽的攻击和伤害获得等于升级骰的加值，但不能使用遁地。没有血液的生物（构装体、软泥怪、植物生物等）不会触发此能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Like all bulettes, the green bulette can burrow. While above ground, it prefers to move slowly on the surface and rely on its plant- and soil-covered shell to stay hidden until it attacks.
ast.target: 像所有土龙兽一样，绿色土龙兽可以掘地。在地面上时，它更喜欢在地表缓慢移动，并依靠其覆盖着植物和土壤的外壳保持隐藏，直到发动攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target becomes vulnerable to poison damage until the end of the battle. Creatures that resist poison damage ignore this effect.
ast.target: 目标对毒素伤害易伤，直到战斗结束。抵抗毒素伤害的生物忽略此效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target loses all its resistances and is weakened until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 目标失去所有抗性，并且虚弱直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 1/battle, but missing with the attack doesn’t expend it.
ast.target: 每场战斗1次，但攻击未命中不会消耗此次数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The crit range for this attack expands by 1 (to a maximum of 16+).
ast.target: 此攻击的重击范围扩大1（最大为16+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The first time this greenscale spineback becomes staggered, each nearby enemy must roll a save. If it fails, it’s confused and takes 10 ongoing poison damage (save ends both). Enemies who resist poison are immune to this effect.
ast.target: 当此绿鳞脊背兽首次进入濒死状态时，每个附近的敌人必须进行一次豁免。如果失败，它将陷入困惑并受到10点持续毒素伤害（持续到两者豁免结束）。抵抗毒素的敌人对此效果免疫。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a poison attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当毒素攻击针对此生物时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然16+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The spineback hates elves, and its crit range expands by 1 against them.
ast.target: 脊背兽憎恨精灵，其重击范围对精灵扩大1。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragonic deals 2d6 extra damage to a target it misses with a melee attack.
ast.target: 龙裔对用近战攻击未命中的目标造成2d6点额外伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This spineback is not so much scaly as slimy like a rare toxic frog. When an enemy makes an unarmed attack against it or otherwise grapples with the dragonic, that enemy takes 2d6 poison damage.
ast.target: 此脊背兽与其说是鳞片覆盖，不如说像稀有毒蛙一样黏滑。当敌人对其进行徒手攻击或以其他方式与龙裔缠斗时，该敌人受到2d6点毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ongoing poison damage increases by 2.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is also weakened (save ends both).
ast.target: 目标同时虚弱（持续到两者豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is partially blinded and takes a –2 penalty to attacks and defenses until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 目标部分失明，攻击和防御受到-2减值，直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a poison attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 14+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当毒素攻击针对此生物时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然14+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a quick action, a death shade can pass through a small or narrow solid object or pop free from all enemies engaged with it. When a creature intercepts a death shade, that creature takes 25 negative energy damage.
ast.target: 作为快速动作，死亡暗影可以穿过小型或狭窄的固体物体，或从所有与其交战的敌人处脱离。当一个生物拦截死亡暗影时，该生物受到25点负能量伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Until the end of its next turn, the target is affected by the reaver’s *fear aura* even if it has more than 72 hp.
ast.target: 直到其下一回合结束，目标受到掠夺者的*恐惧光环*影响，即使其生命值超过72点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Until the reaver drops to 0 hp, when one of its living (not undead or construct) enemies or non-mook allies rolls a death save or dies, a death shade enters the battle. Death shades act immediately after the reaver in initiative order.
ast.target: 直到掠夺者生命值降至0，当其一个活体（非亡灵或构装体）敌人或非喽啰盟友进行死亡豁免或死亡时，一个死亡暗影进入战斗。死亡暗影在先攻顺序中紧接掠夺者之后行动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die is 6+, all normal saves made during the battle become hard saves (16+).
ast.target: 当升级骰为6+时，战斗中进行的所有普通豁免变为困难豁免（16+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While engaged with this creature, enemies with 72 hp or fewer are dazed and do not add the escalation die to their attacks.
ast.target: 当与此生物交战时，生命值72点或更少的敌人陷入眩晕，并且不将升级骰加到其攻击上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reavers ignore the bonds of gravity while they’re phasing.
ast.target: 掠夺者在相位移动时无视重力束缚。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a creature disengages or moves away from a reaver that’s phasing, that creature is vulnerable to negative energy until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 当一个生物从正在相位移动的掠夺者处脱离或移动离开时，该生物对负能量易伤，直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Deal 3d10 negative energy damage to any creature that targets the gruesome reaver with an attack that deals holy damage.
ast.target: 对任何以造成神圣伤害的攻击针对恐怖掠夺者的生物造成3d10点负能量伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hag triggers one hag ability as a free action.
ast.target: 女巫触发一项女巫能力作为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hag triggers two hag abilities as a free action (can’t be the same ability twice).
ast.target: 女巫触发两项女巫能力作为自由动作（不能是同一能力两次）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The attack roll also targets a second different enemy of the hag’s choice (but not a third with another 16+).
ast.target: 攻击骰也针对女巫选择的第二个不同敌人（但不能通过另一个16+针对第三个）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As above, and the attack roll also targets a third different enemy of the hag’s choice (but not a fourth with another 18+).
ast.target: 如上所述，并且攻击骰也针对女巫选择的第三个不同敌人（但不能通过另一个18+针对第四个）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each hag can lay a curse upon the one who ends its horrible life. After dropping to 0 hit points, a hag always lingers long enough to pronounce the words of the curse. (See Death Curses.)
ast.target: 每个女巫都可以对结束其可怕生命的人施加诅咒。生命值降至0后，女巫总会拖延足够长的时间来念出诅咒之词。（参见死亡诅咒。）

ast.name: description
ast.source: While engaged with this creature, enemies with 30 hp or fewer are dazed (-4 attack) and do not add the escalation die to their attacks.
ast.target: 当与此生物交战时，生命值30点或更少的敌人陷入眩晕（攻击-4），并且不将升级骰加到其攻击上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target starts making last gasp saves. On the fourth failure, it becomes a shapeless ooze.
ast.target: 目标开始进行最后喘息豁免。第四次失败后，它变成无形软泥。

ast.name: description
ast.source: With each subsequent hit after the first, spontaneous metamorphosing limbs deals 20 less damage. The hagunemnon also doesn’t gain any extra attacks when it makes a basic attack.
ast.target: 在第一次命中之后，每次后续命中，自发变形肢体造成的伤害减少20点。哈古纳米农在进行基础攻击时也不会获得任何额外攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a move action when the escalation die is odd, the hagunemnon can teleport nearby or far away to a location it can see.
ast.target: 当升级骰为奇数时，作为移动动作，哈古纳米农可以传送到附近或远处它能看到的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a psychic attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 18+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当灵能攻击针对此生物时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然18+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a standard action, the hagunemnon can change its form to that of any large or medium creature, or back to its own shape. Seeing through the shapechange requires a DC 25 skill check.
ast.target: 作为标准动作，哈古纳米农可以将其形态改变为任何大型或中型生物，或变回自己的形态。识破变形需要一次DC 25的技能检定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a creature is engaged with the hagunemnon at the start of its turn, it takes 4d10 psychic damage. If it takes 31 or more damage this way during a single turn, it’s also confused until the start of its next turn.
ast.target: 当一个生物在其回合开始时与哈古尼蒙交战，它将受到4d10点心灵伤害。如果它在单次回合中以此方式受到31点或更多伤害，它还会陷入困惑状态，直到其下一回合开始。

ast.name: description
ast.source: One nearby lower-level mook makes an attack as a free action.
ast.target: 一名附近的低级小喽啰可以进行一次自由动作攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The half-orc commander gains 20 temporary hit points.
ast.target: 半兽人指挥官获得20点临时生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a nearby ally of the half-orc commander scores a critical hit, that ally can roll a save against a save ends effect as a free action.
ast.target: 当半兽人指挥官的一名附近盟友打出重击时，该盟友可以进行一次自由动作豁免，对抗一个“豁免结束”效果。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 部落勇士恢复5点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die is even, a tribal champion can roll two  for each melee attack roll it makes and use the result it prefers. If both dice are 11+, the melee attack is a critical hit.
ast.target: 当升级骰为偶数时，部落勇士可以为其进行的每次近战攻击骰投掷两次，并使用其偏好的结果。如果两次骰子结果均为11+，则该近战攻击为重击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Only when the hallowed gargoyle starts its turn flying and ends its turn engaged on the ground.
ast.target: 仅当圣化石像鬼在回合开始时处于飞行状态，并在回合结束时处于地面交战状态时。

ast.name: description
ast.source: One nearby ally can roll a save against a save ends effect. If no allies are affected by a save ends effect, one nearby ally can make a basic attack as a free action.
ast.target: 一名附近盟友可以进行一次豁免，对抗一个“豁免结束”效果。如果没有盟友受到“豁免结束”效果影响，则一名附近盟友可以进行一次自由动作基础攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 目标陷入受阻状态（豁免结束）

ast.name: description
ast.source: The first time the hallowed gargoyle is hit by an attack against MD, reroll the attack with a -2 attack penalty. (Sometimes the halo sputters, so if you forget to use it the first time, use the reroll later in the battle.)
ast.target: 当圣化石像鬼首次被针对MD的攻击命中时，以-2攻击惩罚重新投掷该攻击。（有时光环会闪烁，所以如果你第一次忘记使用它，可以在战斗后期使用重投。）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Hallowed gargoyles can fly, but not gracefully. Mid-air, they take a -2 penalty to all their defenses, and it takes them two move actions to get airborne unless they can launch from above.
ast.target: 圣化石像鬼可以飞行，但并不优雅。在空中，它们的所有防御值受到-2惩罚，并且除非它们能从高处起飞，否则需要两个移动动作才能升空。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hallowed gargoyle has resist damage 12+ against attacks targeting AC.
ast.target: 圣化石像鬼对针对AC的攻击具有12+伤害抗性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is hampered (easy save ends, 6+).
ast.target: 目标陷入受阻状态（简易豁免结束，6+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is weakened instead of hampered (easy save ends, 6+).
ast.target: 目标陷入虚弱状态而非受阻状态（简易豁免结束，6+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The harpy gains a +5 bonus to attack and damage with this attack against any enemy suffering from any fiendish song effect.
ast.target: 鹰身女妖使用此攻击对抗任何受到任何邪恶魔歌效果影响的敌人时，获得+5攻击和伤害加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Both the zombie and the target take 3d10 damage.
ast.target: 僵尸和目标各受到3d10点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a headless zombie drops to 0 hp, it flails with its fists and makes a mouthless cry attack as a free action before it dies.
ast.target: 当无头僵尸生命值降至0时，它会在死亡前挥舞拳头，进行一次无口嚎叫攻击作为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a creature tries to affect the zombie’s attack, such as forcing a reroll or applying a penalty, it must roll a normal save; on a failure, the effect is negated.
ast.target: 当一个生物试图影响僵尸的攻击时，例如强制重投或施加惩罚，它必须进行一次正常豁免；失败则该效果被抵消。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While nearby a headless zombie, when a creature would heal, it only heals half the normal hit points.
ast.target: 在无头僵尸附近时，当一个生物将要恢复生命值时，它只恢复正常生命值的一半。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die increases to 6, each headless zombie in the battle is restored to maximum hit points, including the dead ones.
ast.target: 当升级骰增加到6时，战斗中的每个无头僵尸（包括已死亡的）都恢复至最大生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When you choos to add the escalation die to an attack against a hell imp, the imp automatically hits with it next needign taunt attack this battle, and the target taes 2d6 extra psychic damage.
ast.target: 当你选择将升级骰加入对地狱小鬼的攻击时，该小鬼在本场战斗中的下一次需要的嘲讽攻击自动命中，且目标受到2d6点额外心灵伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Hell imps are capable of impressive feats of aerial agility, but only when teir lives depends on it.
ast.target: 地狱小鬼能够做出令人印象深刻的空中敏捷动作，但这仅在它们性命攸关时才会发生。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle as a move action, a hell imp can become invisible, pop free from all enemies engaged with it, move away somwhere nearby, and then reappear.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，作为移动动作，地狱小鬼可以变得隐形，从所有与其交战的敌人处脱离，移动到附近某处，然后重新现身。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The stinging tail attack deals 3 extra ongoing poison damage (11 total), but the target must succeed on two saves (one for ongoing and one for weakened).
ast.target: 蜇尾攻击造成3点额外持续性毒素伤害（总计11点），但目标必须成功通过两次豁免（一次针对持续伤害，一次针对虚弱）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hellcat must have its move action available to use *blazing pounce*.
ast.target: 地狱猫必须拥有可用的移动动作才能使用*烈焰猛扑*。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When you choose to add the escalation die to an attack against a hellcat, during its next turn it gains a cumulative +2 bonus to attack if it’s invisible. Otherwise, it gains a non-cumulative +2 bonus to all defenses until the start of its next turn as its form blurs.
ast.target: 当你选择将升级骰加入对地狱猫的攻击时，在其下一回合期间，如果它处于隐形状态，它获得累积+2攻击加值。否则，直到其下一回合开始，它获得非累积+2所有防御加值，因为其形态变得模糊。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy is engaged with the hellcat at the start of its turn, that enemy takes 5 fire damage.
ast.target: 当一个敌人在地狱猫回合开始时与其交战，该敌人受到5点火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While in bright light, the hellcat is invisible; attacks against it have a 50% miss chance.
ast.target: 在明亮光线下，地狱猫处于隐形状态；针对它的攻击有50%的失手几率。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Fire attacks that target an enemy engaged with the hellcat gain:

Natural 16+: The target takes 5 extra fire damage.
ast.target:
针对与地狱猫交战的敌人的火焰攻击获得：

\n

自然16+：目标受到5点额外火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A hellcat takes only half damage from opportunity attacks.
ast.target: 地狱猫只受到借机攻击一半的伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hellhound can make a fiery breath attack as a free action.
ast.target: 地狱犬可以进行一次自由动作火焰吐息攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each creature engaged with a hell hound at the start of its turn takes 2d6 fire damage.
ast.target: 每个在地狱犬回合开始时与其交战的生物受到2d6点火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever the hellstone gargoyle misses with a melee attack, *weathered claws* deals an additional 1d6 psychic damage until the end of the battle (maximum 4d6).
ast.target: 每当地狱岩石石像鬼的近战攻击未命中时，*风化之爪*在战斗结束前额外造成1d6点心灵伤害（最多4d6）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever an engaged enemy misses with an attack against AC or PD, the attacker is vulnerable to psychic until the end of their next turn (fyi, that applies to weathered claws attacks that now have bonus psychic damage).
ast.target: 每当一个交战中的敌人对AC或PD的攻击未命中时，攻击者在下一回合结束前变得易受心灵伤害（顺便说一句，这也适用于现在带有额外心灵伤害的*风化之爪*攻击）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hellstone gargoyle can't fly per se, but a clumsy glide can be achieved.
ast.target: 地狱岩石石像鬼本身不能飞行，但可以进行笨拙的滑翔。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When there's the chance of an ambush, give the PC's a hard champion-tier skill check (usually DC 25) to notice the gargoyle and avoid being surprised.
ast.target: 当有伏击的可能性时，给PC们一个困难的冠军级技能检定（通常是DC 25）来注意到石像鬼并避免被突袭。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hellstone gargoyle has a fear aura: enemies engaged with the hellstone gargoyle who are below 36 hit points are dazed and can't use the escalation die.
ast.target: 地狱岩石石像鬼拥有恐惧光环：生命值低于36点的、与地狱岩石石像鬼交战的敌人会陷入眩晕状态，并且不能使用升级骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Cloud of dust is now save ends (11+).

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hellwarped can make one aberrant attack as a free action.
ast.target: 地狱畸变体可以进行一次自由动作异能攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hellwarped gains a cumulative +1 attack bonus to its claw attacks until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 地狱畸变体的爪击攻击获得累积+1攻击加值，直到战斗结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hellwarped pops free from each enemy engaged with it after making its claws attacks, then moves to a nearby enemy as a free action and makes this attack.
ast.target: 地狱畸变体在进行爪击攻击后，从与其交战的每个敌人处脱离，然后作为自由动作移动到一名附近敌人处，并进行此攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As creatures created by the energies of hellholes, hellwarped beasts are usually also affected by powers that affect demons. GM, it’s your call. In exchange, feel free to allow the hellwarped to deal fire, cold, acid, lightning, or thunder damage with its aberrant attacks.
ast.target: 作为由地狱坑能量创造的生物，地狱畸变兽通常也会受到影响恶魔的能力影响。GM，由你决定。作为交换，你可以自由地让地狱畸变体的异能攻击造成火焰、寒冷、酸液、闪电或雷鸣伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hellwarped has flight, burrow, an extra move action, the ability to teleport as a move action, or some other movement related ability of your choice. Decrease all its defenses by 1 due to the weak points this anatomy creates.
ast.target: 地狱畸变体拥有飞行、掘地、一个额外移动动作、作为移动动作传送的能力，或你选择的其他移动相关能力。由于这种解剖结构造成的弱点，其所有防御值降低1点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: For its mutated form ability, choose one instead of rolling.
ast.target: 对于其变异形态能力，选择一项而非掷骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 5 ongoing acid damage (easy save ends, 6+), and the hellwasp can pop free from the target.
ast.target: 5点持续性酸液伤害（简易豁免结束，6+），并且地狱黄蜂可以从目标处脱离。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 1. 困惑；2. 虚弱；3. 眩晕；4. 易伤。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Hellwasps are adroit fliers that can hover and even fly backward.
ast.target: 地狱黄蜂是灵巧的飞行者，可以悬停甚至向后飞行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The save versus the stinger’s ongoing acid damage is a normal save (11+) instead of an easy save.
ast.target: 针对蜇刺持续性酸液伤害的豁免是正常豁免（11+）而非简易豁免。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The demon can grab the target if it isn’t already grabbing a creature. The grabbed foe can’t move except to teleport, pop free, or attempt to disengage, and disengage attempts take a -5 penalty unless the creature hit the hezrou with an attack that turn.
ast.target: 如果该恶魔尚未抓取一个生物，它可以抓取目标。被抓取的敌人无法移动，除非传送、挣脱或尝试脱离，且除非该生物在该回合用攻击命中了赫兹罗，否则脱离尝试将承受-5的惩罚。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hezrou gains a +4 attack bonus against any enemy it is grabbing.
ast.target: 赫兹罗对其正在抓取的任何敌人获得+4攻击加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While engaged with this creature, enemies with 84 hp or fewer are dazed (-4 attack) and do not add the escalation die to their attacks.
ast.target: 当与此生物交战时，生命值84或更少的敌人会陷入晕眩（-4攻击）且不将升级骰加入其攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Lower-level non-mook demons nearby the hezrou deal damage equal to their level when they miss with an attack.
ast.target: 赫兹罗附近的低等级非喽啰恶魔在攻击未命中时，造成等于其等级的伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hezrou’s allies gain a +4 attack bonus against any creature it is grabbing.
ast.target: 赫兹罗的盟友对其正在抓取的任何生物获得+4攻击加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The giant deals double damage with its attacks against staggered targets.
ast.target: 巨人对陷入踉跄的目标造成双倍伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is stuck until the end of its next turn as a stone hand rises from the ground to grasp it.
ast.target: 目标被束缚直到其下一回合结束，一只石手从地面升起抓住它。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 同上，但需通过豁免结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes the penalty to attacks.
ast.target: 目标还会承受攻击惩罚。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Nymphs are tied to an area of land or water. Land areas will be at most a couple miles wide; water areas might be much larger. As a rule, nymphs can’t leave the area they’re bound to.
ast.target: 宁芙与一片土地或水域相连。陆地面积最多几英里宽；水域面积可能大得多。通常，宁芙无法离开它们所绑定的区域。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Nymphs with the humanoid type probably remember themselves. Nymphs that have probably forgotten their original selves have the elemental type.
ast.target: 具有人形类型的宁芙可能还记得自己。可能已忘记原始自我的宁芙具有元素类型。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a weapon attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 12+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次武器攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然12+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is stuck under a pile of treasure until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 目标被埋在一堆财宝下，直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 15 extra damage from a precise strike.
ast.target: 目标因精准打击额外受到15点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the breath targeted multiple enemies, the target takes 20 ongoing fire damage instead of 10. If the breath targeted a single enemy, the target takes 40 ongoing fire damage instead of 20.
ast.target: 如果吐息针对多个敌人，目标受到20点持续火焰伤害，而非10点。如果吐息针对单个敌人，目标受到40点持续火焰伤害，而非20点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Until the start of its next turn, the first time an attack would hit the hobgoblin captain, it can partially avoid that attack if it has a nearby goblin ally. It only takes half damage from the attack, and that ally takes the rest.
ast.target: 直到其下一回合开始，第一次攻击将命中地精队长时，如果它附近有一个地精盟友，它可以部分躲避该攻击。它只受到该攻击的一半伤害，而该盟友承受剩余伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: For every two hobgoblins in the battle (round up, ignore mooks), one of them can use well-armored as a free action once during the battle.
ast.target: 每有两个地精参战（向上取整，忽略喽啰），其中一个可以在战斗中免费动作使用一次“重甲”。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Ignore all damage from a hit (but not a crit) against AC.
ast.target: 忽略一次命中（但不是重击）对AC造成的所有伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is also dazed (save ends).
ast.target: 目标还会陷入晕眩（需通过豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The honey devil can make a disengage check this turn as a free action.
ast.target: 蜜魔可以在本回合以一个自由动作进行一次脱离检定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the honey devil is staggered by an attack, it makes a confusing plea attack against the attacker as a free action after the attack.
ast.target: 当蜜魔因一次攻击而陷入踉跄时，它可以在该攻击后以一个自由动作对攻击者进行一次“迷惑恳求”攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This creature seems innocent, not someone a hero should hurt. At worst, it’s ugly, but is that a crime? When an enemy rolls a natural odd attack roll against a honey devil, the attack misses and has no effect.
ast.target: 这个生物看起来很无辜，不是英雄应该伤害的对象。最坏的情况是，它很丑陋，但这是罪过吗？当敌人对蜜魔掷出自然奇数攻击骰时，该攻击未命中且无效。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When building battles using this monster, it only counts as half a normal monster.
ast.target: 在使用此怪物构建战斗时，它只算作半个普通怪物。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If this is the devil’s first attack during its turn, it can make a telepathic harry attack as a free action.
ast.target: 如果这是该恶魔在本回合的第一次攻击，它可以以一个自由动作进行一次“心灵骚扰”攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If this is the devil’s first attack during its turn, it can make a crushing punch or kick attack as a free action.
ast.target: 如果这是该恶魔在本回合的第一次攻击，它可以以一个自由动作进行一次“重拳”或“踢击”攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When you choose to add the escalation die to an attack against a hooded devil, it adds the escalation die to its attacks until the end of the battle and no other attacks against it can use the escalation die.
ast.target: 当你选择将升级骰加入对兜帽恶魔的攻击时，它会将升级骰加入其攻击直到战斗结束，且其他对它的攻击不能使用升级骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: At the start of a hooded devil’s turn, it can roll a save against each save ends effect affecting it if it doesn’t attack that turn (so it could successfully save against confused or stunned conditions and still move that turn, for example.)
ast.target: 在兜帽恶魔的回合开始时，如果它在本回合不进行攻击，它可以对影响它的每个“需通过豁免结束”效果进行一次豁免检定（例如，它可以成功豁免对抗困惑或震慑状态，并在本回合仍然移动）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a hook scuttler moves to engage an enemy it wasn’t engaged with at the start of its turn, that enemy takes 1d6 damage. When an enemy tries to disengage from the hook scuttler and fails, it takes 1d6 damage.
ast.target: 当钩爪爬行者移动去与一个在其回合开始时未交战的敌人交战时，该敌人受到1d6点伤害。当一个敌人试图脱离钩爪爬行者但失败时，它受到1d6点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a nearby enemy drops to 0 hit points or below in the battle, the hook scuttler will ignore other enemies and move to attack that unconscious enemy until that enemy is dead.
ast.target: 当附近的一个敌人在战斗中生命值降至0或以下时，钩爪爬行者将忽略其他敌人，移动去攻击那个昏迷的敌人，直到该敌人死亡。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hooked demon can make another hooks and barbs attack as a free action (and yes, this can keep going up to a maximum number of attacks equal to the escalation die +1).
ast.target: 钩魔可以以一个自由动作再进行一次“钩刺与倒刺”攻击（是的，这可以持续进行，最大攻击次数等于升级骰+1）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever the hooked demon hits a creature with hooks and barbs, that creature takes 10 damage each time it makes a non-basic attack (save ends).
ast.target: 每当钩魔用“钩刺与倒刺”命中一个生物时，该生物每次进行非基础攻击时受到10点伤害（需通过豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The horned azinth adult can make a trample attack as a quick action this turn.
ast.target: 有角阿辛斯成年体可以在本回合以一个快速动作进行一次践踏攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Attacks against the horned azinth adult have a 30% miss chance. An attacker must roll the miss chance before an attack roll. In addition, the azinth is nearly invisible while standing still or slowly grazing, as it blends in with its surroundings.
ast.target: 对有角阿辛斯成年体的攻击有30%的失手几率。攻击者必须在攻击骰之前掷失手几率。此外，当阿辛斯静止不动或缓慢吃草时，它几乎不可见，因为它与周围环境融为一体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Increase the miss chance from the azinth’s natural blurring by 5*@ed.
ast.target: 将阿辛斯自然模糊的失手几率提高5*@ed。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The first time this battle the azinth is staggered, it becomes harder to detect until the end of the battle, gaining a +4 bonus to all defenses.
ast.target: 本次战斗中阿辛斯第一次陷入踉跄时，它变得更难被侦测，直到战斗结束，所有防御获得+4加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Attacks against the horned azinth calf have a 20% miss chance. An attacker must roll the miss chance before the attack roll. In addition, the azinth is nearly invisible while standing still or slowly grazing, as it blends in with its surroundings.
ast.target: 对有角阿辛斯幼崽的攻击有20%的失手几率。攻击者必须在攻击骰之前掷失手几率。此外，当阿辛斯静止不动或缓慢吃草时，它几乎不可见，因为它与周围环境融为一体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each horned azinth adult gains a +1 attack bonus during a battle that includes one or more calves, +2 if any calves are attacked, and +4 if any calves are killed!
ast.target: 在包含一只或多只幼崽的战斗中，每只成年有角阿辛斯获得+1攻击加值；如果任何幼崽受到攻击，则为+2；如果任何幼崽被杀死，则为+4！

ast.name: description
ast.source: The horned devil can make a slicing tail attack against a different target as a free action.
ast.target: 有角恶魔可以以一个自由动作对一个不同的目标进行一次“切割尾击”攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The horned devil can make a slicing tail attack as a free action.
ast.target: 有角恶魔可以以一个自由动作进行一次“切割尾击”攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 30 ongoing fire damage.
ast.target: 目标还会受到30点持续火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When you choose to add the escalation die to an attack against a horned devil, you are weakened until the end of your next turn after you make the attack.
ast.target: 当你选择将升级骰加入对有角恶魔的攻击时，在你进行该攻击后，你将陷入虚弱状态直到你的下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Horned devils are clumsy but determined fliers.
ast.target: 有角恶魔是笨拙但坚定的飞行者。

ast.name: description
ast.source: All enemies who start their turn nearby the salamander take 15 fire damage. All enemies who do not resist fire and who end their turn nearby the salamander take 15 fire damage. Salamanders ignore damage from heat haze aura.
ast.target: 所有在火蜥蜴附近开始其回合的敌人受到15点火焰伤害。所有不抵抗火焰且在火蜥蜴附近结束其回合的敌人受到15点火焰伤害。火蜥蜴忽略热浪光环的伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: All enemies wearing metal armor who start their turn nearby the salamander take 2d12 fire damage. All enemies wearing metal armor who do not resist fire and who end their turn nearby the salamander take 2d12 fire damage.
ast.target: 所有穿着金属盔甲且在火蜥蜴附近开始其回合的敌人受到2d12点火焰伤害。所有穿着金属盔甲、不抵抗火焰且在火蜥蜴附近结束其回合的敌人受到2d12点火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 15 ongoing acid damage.
ast.target: 目标还会受到15点持续酸液伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A huge black dragon can use acid breath 2d3 times per battle, but never two turns in a row.
ast.target: 一条巨大的黑龙每场战斗可以使用酸液吐息2d3次，但不能连续两回合使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Black dragons swim well and can breathe underwater.
ast.target: 黑龙游泳能力出色，可以在水下呼吸。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an acid attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 18+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次酸液攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然18+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragon can make a bite attack as a free action.
ast.target: 龙可以以一个自由动作进行一次啮咬攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is also dazed (save ends). After the target saves, it takes a -1 attack penalty (non-cumulative) until its next full heal-up (because it’s vibrating slightly out of synch with the rest of the world).
ast.target: 目标同时陷入晕眩（通过豁免结束）。目标豁免成功后，其攻击检定受到-1减值（不可叠加），直到其下一次完全恢复（因其轻微振动，与世界其他部分不同步）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A huge blue dragon can use far slashing lightning breath 2d4 times per battle, but never two turns in a row.
ast.target: 巨型蓝龙每场战斗可使用远程斩击闪电吐息2d4次，但不能连续两回合使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: impossible unless the dragon has a save bonus from some other source).
ast.target: 除非龙从其他来源获得豁免加值，否则不可能）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a lightning attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 18+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当闪电攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然18+，否则攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragon can make a mind-bending babble attack as a free action.
ast.target: 龙可以自由动作进行一次心灵扭曲呓语攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is confused instead of dazed (save ends).
ast.target: 目标陷入困惑而非晕眩（通过豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragon can pop free from the target.

ast.name: description
ast.source: While an enemy has 24 hp or fewer, it takes a -4 penalty to limited attacks against the dragon.
ast.target: 当敌人的生命值为24点或更少时，其对龙的有限攻击受到-4减值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragon can pop free from one enemy engaged with it.
ast.target: 龙可以从与其交战的一名敌人处脱离。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While an enemy has 72 hp or fewer, it takes a -4 penalty to limited attacks against the dragon.
ast.target: 当敌人的生命值为72点或更少时，其对龙的有限攻击受到-4减值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle as an interrupt action when an enemy targets it with an attack, the dragon can make a lightning breath against that attacker (and yes, if the dragon hits, the interrupted attack takes the -4 penalty due to dazed).
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，当敌人以攻击指定龙为目标时，龙可以作为反应动作对该攻击者进行一次闪电吐息（并且，如果龙命中，被中断的攻击会因晕眩而受到-4减值）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a creature attacks the dragon, if it used another action this turn before the attack, the dragon gains a +4 bonus to all defenses against the attack.
ast.target: 当生物攻击龙时，如果它在本回合攻击前使用了另一个动作，龙对该攻击的所有防御获得+4加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragon can make an acrid smoke attack as a free action.
ast.target: 龙可以自由动作进行一次刺鼻烟雾攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While an enemy has 120 hp or fewer, it takes a -4 penalty to limited attacks against the dragon.
ast.target: 当敌人的生命值为120点或更少时，其对龙的有限攻击受到-4减值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle as a free action when an enemy rolls a natural even attack against the dragon, the dragon negates the attack (no damage or effects). In addition, this effect against natural even attacks lasts against the dragon’s enemies until the start of the dragon’s next turn.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，当敌人对龙进行攻击检定掷出自然偶数时，龙可以作为自由动作抵消该攻击（无伤害或效果）。此外，此效果对自然偶数攻击的持续时间直到龙的下一回合开始。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle as a free action when an attack targets the dragon’s MD, it can force the attacker to reroll the attack.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，当攻击指定龙的MD时，龙可以作为自由动作强制攻击者重掷该攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragon can make a stultifying smoke attack as a free action.
ast.target: 龙可以自由动作进行一次令人窒息的烟雾攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 40 ongoing fire damage and is dazed (save ends both).
ast.target: 目标受到40点持续火焰伤害并陷入晕眩（通过豁免结束两者）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While an enemy has 240 hp or fewer, it takes a -4 penalty to limited attacks against the dragon.
ast.target: 当敌人的生命值为240点或更少时，其对龙的有限攻击受到-4减值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle as a quick action while the escalation die is 3+, the dragon can fly into the air, popping free from all enemies engaged with it, and make a fiery breath attack against each enemy that was engaged with it.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，当升级骰为3+时，龙可以作为快速动作飞向空中，从所有与其交战的敌人处脱离，并对每个曾与其交战的敌人进行一次烈焰吐息攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle as a free action at the start of its turn, the dragon can heal 300 hp and cancel all effects and conditions on it, including ongoing damage. It can heal and cancel these effects even if it’s prevented from taking actions, such as by being stunned.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，在其回合开始时，龙可以作为自由动作恢复300点生命值并取消其身上所有效果和状态，包括持续伤害。即使它被阻止采取动作（例如被震慑），它也可以恢复和取消这些效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragon can make a poison breath attack as a free action.
ast.target: 龙可以自由动作进行一次毒气吐息攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 20 ongoing poison damage.
ast.target: 目标同时受到20点持续毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a poison attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 18+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当毒素攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然18+，否则攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Roll a fourth fangs, claws, and tail attack.
ast.target: 进行第四次獠牙、利爪和尾击攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Roll a fifth fangs, claws, and tail attack.
ast.target: 进行第五次獠牙、利爪和尾击攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A huge red dragon can use fiery breath 1d6 times per battle, but never two turns in a row.
ast.target: 巨型红龙每场战斗可使用烈焰吐息1d6次，但不能连续两回合使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While engaged with this creature, enemies with 144 hp or fewer are dazed (-4 attack) and do not add the escalation die to their attacks.
ast.target: 当与此生物交战时，生命值为144点或更少的敌人陷入晕眩（攻击-4）且不将升级骰加入其攻击检定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragon can make a paralyzing smoke attack as a free action.
ast.target: 龙可以自由动作进行一次麻痹烟雾攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle as a free action when an attack targets the dragon, it can force the attacker to reroll the attack and has resist damage 18+ against that attack. If the attack misses, the dragon can make a paralyzing smoke attack as free action.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，当攻击指定龙为目标时，龙可以作为自由动作强制攻击者重掷该攻击，并对该攻击具有18+伤害抗力。如果攻击未命中，龙可以自由动作进行一次麻痹烟雾攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While an enemy has 192 hp or fewer, it takes a -4 penalty to limited attacks against the dragon.
ast.target: 当敌人的生命值为192点或更少时，其对龙的有限攻击受到-4减值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a cold attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 18+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当寒冷攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然18+，否则攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The white dragon can make an ice breath attack as a free action.
ast.target: 白龙可以自由动作进行一次寒冰吐息攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The thug deals +6 damage with its next attack this battle.
ast.target: 暴徒的下一次攻击在本场战斗中造成+6伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Both the zombie and its target take 1d6 damage!
ast.target: 僵尸和其目标都受到1d6点伤害！

ast.name: description
ast.source: More dangerous zombies don’t try to kill the moving targets before feasting on brains; they keep attacking any enemy they’ve knocked unconscious, rolling attacks against the helpless enemy until it’s dead.
ast.target: 更危险的僵尸不会在享用大脑前试图杀死移动的目标；它们会继续攻击任何被它们击倒的敌人，对无助的敌人进行攻击检定直到其死亡。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 目标陷入束缚（通过豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 每场战斗1次，当生命值减半时

ast.name: description
ast.source: After using its distending jaw attack, the hungry mouth ghost has a fear ability against engaged enemies with fewer than 30 hit points.
ast.target: 在使用其扩张下颌攻击后，饥饿之口幽灵对生命值少于30点的交战敌人拥有恐惧能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the target is taking ongoing psychic damage, the attack deals +2d6 damage.
ast.target: 如果目标正在承受持续心灵伤害，该攻击造成+2d6伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While the target is taking the ongoing psychic damage, it is dazed (-4 attacks).
ast.target: 当目标正在承受持续心灵伤害时，它陷入晕眩（攻击-4）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While the target is taking the ongoing psychic damage, it is confused instead of dazed.
ast.target: 当目标正在承受持续心灵伤害时，它陷入困惑而非晕眩。

ast.name: description
ast.source: For every two hungry stars in the battle (round up), one of them can use warp-pulse once during the battle.
ast.target: 每场战斗中，每有两个饥饿之星（向上取整），其中一个可以在战斗中使用一次扭曲脉冲。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Hungry stars flap and glide and hover, always within seven or eight feet of the ground.
ast.target: 饥饿之星拍打、滑翔和悬停，总是在离地面七八英尺的范围内。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 1d8 ongoing poison damage.
ast.target: 目标同时受到1d8点持续毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A hunting spider can turn its own failed disengage check into a success by taking 1d4 damage.
ast.target: 狩猎蜘蛛可以通过承受1d4点伤害，将自己失败的脱离检定转变为成功。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A hunting spider can climb on ceilings and walls as easily as it moves on the ground.
ast.target: 狩猎蜘蛛可以像在地面上移动一样轻松地在天花板和墙壁上攀爬。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a free action, one of the ice devil’s nearby allies of its level or lower can make a basic attack as the ice devil sets the battlefield. That attack only deals half damage.
ast.target: 作为自由动作，冰魔附近一个等级等于或低于它的盟友可以进行一次基础攻击，因为冰魔正在布置战场。该攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When you choose to add the escalation die to an attack against an ice devil, you are stuck (save ends).
ast.target: 当你选择将升级骰加入对冰魔的攻击时，你会陷入束缚状态（通过豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a lower level nearby ally of the ice devil attacks a creature that’s stuck, the crit range of that attack expands by the escalation die.
ast.target: 当冰魔附近一个等级较低的盟友攻击一个被束缚的生物时，该攻击的暴击范围会扩大，扩大值等于升级骰的值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a cold attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 13+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次寒冷攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然13+，否则该攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The sorceress can make an icy delusions attack against the target as a free action.
ast.target: 女巫可以作为自由动作对目标进行一次冰冷幻象攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: confused (hard save ends, 16+); OR stunned (save ends). After saving, the creature rerolls its initiative.
ast.target: 困惑（困难豁免结束，16+）；或眩晕（豁免结束）。豁免后，该生物重新掷先攻。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per round as a free action, the giant can make an ice wall attack to conjure forth a wall of ice that stops one enemy’s movement or ranged attack. The giant can’t use this ability to target creatures making fire attacks or wielding weapons that deal fire damage.
ast.target: 每轮一次，作为自由动作，巨人可以进行一次冰墙攻击，召唤出一道冰墙，阻止一名敌人的移动或远程攻击。巨人不能使用此能力来攻击进行火焰攻击或挥舞造成火焰伤害武器的生物。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ice sorceress has resist damage 16+ unless the attack deals fire damage.
ast.target: 冰女巫拥有16+伤害抗性，除非攻击造成火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Ice zombies have frozen, iron-hard flesh that makes them tougher than normal zombies—critical hits that deal fire damage deal triple damage to ice zombies; other critical hits just deal double damage.
ast.target: 冰僵尸拥有冻结、坚硬如铁的血肉，使它们比普通僵尸更坚韧——造成火焰伤害的暴击对冰僵尸造成三倍伤害；其他暴击只造成双倍伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a spell attack misses the chimera, it has no miss effect and the chimera heals 40 hp.
ast.target: 当一次法术攻击未命中奇美拉时，该攻击没有未命中效果，且奇美拉恢复40点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The crit range of melee attacks against the chimera expands by 2.
ast.target: 对奇美拉的近战攻击的暴击范围扩大2。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the chimera saves against a condition, it becomes immune to that condition until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 当奇美拉对某个状态进行豁免时，它对该状态免疫，直到战斗结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The crit range of spell attacks against the chimera expands by 2.
ast.target: 对奇美拉的法术攻击的暴击范围扩大2。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a creature is engaged with the chimera at the start of its turn, it takes 20 fire damage.
ast.target: 当一个生物在回合开始时与奇美拉交战时，它受到20点火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each time the chimera scores a critical hit, it takes a cumulative -2 penalty to all defenses.
ast.target: 每次奇美拉造成暴击时，它所有防御承受-2的累积减值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Any damage dice that roll maximum damage against the chimera count as 1s.
ast.target: 任何对奇美拉掷出最大伤害的伤害骰都视为1。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The chimera won’t willingly disengage from a creature engaged with it.
ast.target: 奇美拉不会自愿脱离与它交战的生物。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die is odd, the chimera gains an additional standard action that turn.
ast.target: 当升级骰为奇数时，奇美拉在该回合获得一个额外的标准动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The chimera’s form is unusually frail, and any damage dice that roll 1s against the chimera count as 2s.
ast.target: 奇美拉的形态异常脆弱，任何对奇美拉掷出1的伤害骰都视为2。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enemies engaged with the chimera who are below 48 hit points are dazed and can’t use the escalation die.
ast.target: 与奇美拉交战且生命值低于48的敌人会陷入迟钝状态，并且不能使用升级骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the chimera makes a fiery breath attack, it can make another fiery breath attack that turn as a quick action.
ast.target: 当奇美拉进行一次炽焰吐息攻击时，它可以在该回合作为快速动作再进行一次炽焰吐息攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the chimera rolls a natural odd miss with fiery breath, it takes 20 fire damage.
ast.target: 当奇美拉用炽焰吐息掷出自然奇数未命中时，它受到20点火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The chimera is constantly evolving and changing. When an enemy rolls a natural 1-5 on an attack roll against it, the chimera adds the escalation die to its attack rolls until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 奇美拉在不断进化和变化。当敌人对它进行攻击骰掷出自然1-5时，奇美拉将升级骰加入其攻击骰，直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The crit range of poison attacks against the chimera expands by 2.
ast.target: 对奇美拉的毒素攻击的暴击范围扩大2。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy rolls a natural even miss with a melee attack against the chimera, the weapon temporarily loses all its bonuses and powers and the wielder is weakened (save ends both).
ast.target: 当敌人用近战攻击对奇美拉掷出自然偶数未命中时，该武器暂时失去所有加成和能力，且持用者陷入虚弱状态（两者均通过豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The crit range of holy attacks against the chimera expands by 2.
ast.target: 对奇美拉的神圣攻击的暴击范围扩大2。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a standard action, the chimera can make a tusk charge attack. It can’t make any other attacks the same turn.
ast.target: 作为标准动作，奇美拉可以进行一次獠牙冲锋攻击。它在同一回合不能进行任何其他攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The horns and tusks of the chimera lock together at inopportune moments. When it rolls a natural 1-5 with an attack against multiple targets, it loses any further attacks that turn.
ast.target: 奇美拉的角和獠牙会在不合时宜的时刻卡住。当它对多个目标进行攻击掷出自然1-5时，它失去该回合的任何后续攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The chimera can fly like an eagle, swooping in and out of the battle.
ast.target: 奇美拉可以像鹰一样飞行，在战斗中俯冲进出。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The crit range of negative energy attacks against the chimera expands by 2.
ast.target: 对奇美拉的负能量攻击的暴击范围扩大2。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the chimera rolls a natural 1-5 with an attack and misses, the target takes 20 ongoing poison damage.
ast.target: 当奇美拉进行攻击掷出自然1-5并未命中时，目标受到20点持续毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The first time each turn the chimera hits with an attack, it rerolls the attack and takes the lower roll.
ast.target: 每回合奇美拉第一次用攻击命中时，它重新掷该攻击并取较低的结果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While not staggered, the chimera rolls 2d20 with its melee attacks and uses the higher roll.
ast.target: 当未陷入蹒跚状态时，奇美拉用近战攻击掷2d20并取较高的结果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever the chimera moves, it rolls an easy save (6+). On a failure, it provokes opportunity attacks from each nearby enemy.
ast.target: 每当奇美拉移动时，它进行一次简单豁免（6+）。失败时，它会引发每个附近敌人的借机攻击。

ast.name: description
