ast.source: the target is weakened instead of dazed; OR the imp can make a blight jet attack against a different target as a free action.
ast.target: 目标陷入虚弱状态而非迟钝状态；或小鬼可以作为自由动作对另一个目标进行一次枯萎喷射攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever a creature attacks the imp and rolls a natural 1-5, that creature takes 1d10 psychic damage.
ast.target: 每当一个生物攻击小鬼并掷出自然1-5时，该生物受到1d10点心灵伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: An intellect assassin’s crit range with attacks against MD expands by 2.
ast.target: 智力刺客对MD的攻击暴击范围扩大2。

ast.name: description
ast.source: An intellect devourer remembers the current escalation die value the first time it becomes unhosted in a battle and gains a bonus equal to that value to all attacks and defenses until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 智力吞噬者在战斗中第一次脱离宿主时，会记住当前的升级骰值，并获得等于该值的加值，应用于所有攻击和防御，直到战斗结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target can't add the escalation die to its attacks (save ends)
ast.target: 目标不能将升级骰加入其攻击（通过豁免结束）

ast.name: description
ast.source: The intellect devourer’s crit range with attacks against MD expands by 2.
ast.target: 智力吞噬者对MD的攻击暴击范围扩大2。

ast.name: description
ast.source: An intellect devourer remembers the current escalation die value the first time its host body drops to 0 hit points in a battle and gains a bonus equal to that value to all attacks and defenses until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 智力吞噬者在战斗中其宿主身体第一次生命值降至0时，会记住当前的升级骰值，并获得等于该值的加值，应用于所有攻击和防御，直到战斗结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Increased trauma: Add the following extra effect trigger to the intellect devourer’s recall trauma attack.

Natural 5, 10, 15, 20: The target can’t cast spells until the end of its next turn.
ast.target:
增加创伤：将以下额外效果触发条件添加到智力吞噬者的回忆创伤攻击中。

自然5、10、15、20：目标直到其下一回合结束不能施放法术。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The first time the iron golem is staggered, poison gas leaks from it into the area. It can make a poison gas cloud attack as a free action.
ast.target: 当铁魔像第一次陷入蹒跚状态时，毒气从它身上泄漏到区域中。它可以作为自由动作进行一次毒气云攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: For every two jackal gravewreckers in the battle (round up), one of them can use sack full of bonegrit as a free action once during the battle.
ast.target: 战斗中每有两个豺狼掘墓者（向上取整），其中一个可以在战斗中使用一次装满骨粉的袋子作为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: With a resounding “WHANG!”, the shovel leaves the target dazed until the end of their next turn.
ast.target: 随着一声响亮的“当！”，铲子使目标陷入迟钝状态，直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: For every two jackal gravewreckers in the battle (round up), one of them can use shovel to the face once during the battle.
ast.target: 战斗中每有两个豺狼掘墓者（向上取整），其中一个可以在战斗中使用一次铲击面部。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a jackal gravewrecker mook rolls a natural 1 with an attack, its cowardly nature takes over and it flees, leaving the rest of its mob to fight on.
ast.target: 当一个豺狼掘墓者喽啰攻击掷出自然1时，它怯懦的本性占据上风，它会逃跑，留下其余的群体继续战斗。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The mage can make a second attack against the same target as a free action.
ast.target: 法师可以作为自由动作对同一目标进行第二次攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 5 negative energy damage
ast.target: 目标受到5点负能量伤害

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy hits the jackal high mage with a melee attack, that enemy takes 15 ongoing negative energy damage.
ast.target: 当敌人以近战攻击命中豺狼高阶法师时，该敌人将受到15点持续负能量伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The high priest can make a *cull the weak* attack as a free action.
ast.target: 高阶祭司可以将*弱者清除*攻击作为自由动作使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While engaged with this creature, if the target has 72 hp or fewer, it’s dazed (–4 attack) and does not add the escalation die to its attacks.
ast.target: 当与该生物交战时，如果目标生命值为72点或更低，它将陷入眩晕状态（攻击骰-4），并且其攻击不加入升级骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a jackal high priest drops to 0 hp, each creature that isn’t allied with it must roll a hard save (16+). On a failure, it takes 12 psychic damage. In addition, the high priest can use summon ghouls as a free action.
ast.target: 当豺狼高阶祭司生命值降至0点时，所有非其盟友的生物必须进行一次困难豁免（16+）。豁免失败时，该生物将受到12点心灵伤害。此外，高阶祭司可以将召唤食尸鬼作为自由动作使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 1/battle, as the jackal mage uses its psychic connection with the Fallen Icon to show an image of the moment of death (always past, not future) of someone the target loved or someone they let down.
ast.target: 每场战斗1次，豺狼法师利用其与堕落圣像的心灵连接，向目标展示其挚爱或辜负之人死亡瞬间的幻象（总是过去，而非未来）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The jackal mage can use the those you left behind attack.
ast.target: 豺狼法师可以使用你抛下之人攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 5 ongoing damage
ast.target: 目标同时受到5点持续伤害

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 10 extra psychic damage.
ast.target: 目标额外受到10点心灵伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When building battles with this monster, it counts as 1.5 of a monster at 7th level.
ast.target: 在组建包含此怪物的战斗时，它在7级时按1.5个怪物计算。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As the jackal priest drops to 0 hp, she can use summon ghouls as a free action.
ast.target: 当豺狼祭司生命值降至0点时，她可以将召唤食尸鬼作为自由动作使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The scout can take an additional move action this turn.
ast.target: 侦察兵在本回合可以额外进行一次移动动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Speedy reload. If not engaged, the scout can make a second attack against a different nearby enemy as a free action.
ast.target: 快速装填。如果未处于交战状态，侦察兵可以将对另一个附近敌人的第二次攻击作为自由动作进行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Creatures that can’t hear or that have attempted to reduce their hearing are only affected by a jest bones’ puns attack if the natural roll is odd.
ast.target: 无法听到声音或已尝试减弱听觉的生物，只有在骰子自然结果为奇数时，才会受到谐骨小丑的双关语攻击影响。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The haunted skull can glide and hover, always within seven or eight feet of the ground. It also performs barrel rolls.
ast.target: 幽魂骷髅可以滑翔和悬浮，始终离地七八英尺。它还会进行桶滚飞行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The jotun auroch can make a fiery or frosty breath attack as a free action.
ast.target: 约顿野牛可以将炽热或寒霜吐息攻击作为自由动作使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a cold or fire attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 18+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当寒冷或火焰攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然18+，否则攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the kelpling reaches 0 hp, it doesn’t die. Instead, it separates into 1d3 +1 constituent symbionts, known as kelplets.
ast.target: 当凯普林生命值降至0点时，它不会死亡。相反，它会分裂成1d3+1个被称为凯普莱特的组成共生体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Kobolds take no damage from missed attacks.
ast.target: 狗头人不会受到未命中攻击的伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When one of the kobold’s allies engages a creature engaged with the kobold, the kobold can pop free as a free action.
ast.target: 当狗头人的一个盟友与和该狗头人交战的生物交战时，该狗头人可以将脱离交战作为自由动作进行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Make another *blackscale throwing* star attack against a different nearby enemy.
ast.target: 对另一个附近敌人进行一次额外的*黑鳞飞星*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The kobold assassin can choose to roll an 11 whenever it rolls a disengage check. (In other words, it can get away from any one normal enemy, it takes two enemies and/or the need to roll at least a 12 to force the kobold assassin to actually roll the check.)
ast.target: 狗头人刺客在进行脱离检定时，可以选择直接掷出11。（换句话说，它可以摆脱任何一个普通敌人，需要两个敌人和/或至少掷出12才能迫使狗头人刺客实际进行检定。）

ast.name: description
ast.source: This kobold berserker mook transforms into an undamaged *really angry kobold* after the attack.
ast.target: 这名狗头人狂战士小兵在攻击后会变身为一个未受损的*暴怒狗头人*。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the save result is 6+, transform one of the remaining kobold berserker mooks into a really angry kobold. If the save result is 16+, instead transform one of the remaining kobold berserker mooks into a red haze berserker.
ast.target: 如果豁免结果为6+，将一名剩余的狗头人狂战士小兵变身为暴怒狗头人。如果豁免结果为16+，则改为将一名剩余的狗头人狂战士小兵变身为红雾狂战士。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Roll 2d20 for each of the kobold’s attacks and use the higher result.
ast.target: 为狗头人的每次攻击掷2d20，并使用较高的结果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The kobold pushes or trips the target into a trap. See Trapster Kobold ability.
ast.target: 狗头人将目标推入或绊入陷阱。参见陷阱师狗头人能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the escalation die is 3+ and this creature has at least two bravescale allies in the battle, whenever an enemy moves to engage the bravescale, it can make a spear porcupine attack against that enemy as a free action.
ast.target: 如果升级骰为3+，且此生物在战斗中至少有两名勇鳞盟友，每当敌人移动与勇鳞交战时，勇鳞可以将矛刺猬攻击作为自由动作对该敌人使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: For each other kobold bravescale next to the bravescale or engaged with a creature that this bravescale is engaged with, the bravescale gains a +2 bonus to AC (maximum of +4), and each enemy engaged with the bravescale takes a -2 penalty (maximum of -4) to disengage checks.
ast.target: 对于每个与该勇鳞相邻或与该勇鳞交战的生物交战的其他狗头人勇鳞，该勇鳞获得+2护甲加值（最高+4），并且每个与该勇鳞交战的敌人在进行脱离检定时受到-2减值（最高-4）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The kobold and its steed pop free from all enemies and can move as a free action.
ast.target: 狗头人及其坐骑脱离所有敌人的交战，并可以作为自由动作移动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: There is line tied to the barbed dart, pulling/tripping the target into a trap. See Trapster Kobold ability.
ast.target: 倒刺飞镖上系有绳索，可将目标拉入或绊入陷阱。参见陷阱师狗头人能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The steed can’t be targeted separately from the kobold. If the kobold dies the dog runs away.
ast.target: 坐骑不能被单独选为目标。如果狗头人死亡，狗会逃跑。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 8 ongoing acid damage.
ast.target: 目标同时受到8点持续酸蚀伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If flying, the kobold can remain in the air until the end of its next turn if it would normally have to land at the end of this turn.
ast.target: 如果正在飞行，狗头人可以在本回合结束时保持在空中，即使它通常需要在本回合结束时降落。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A dragon-soul’s wings aren’t strong enough for sustained flapping flight, but with a headwind and a tall place to launch from it can glide for hours. During battle, however, it must land at the end of its turn if the escalation die is even (but see fire spit).
ast.target: 龙魂的翅膀不足以支撑持续的拍打飞行，但在有逆风和高处起飞点的情况下，它可以滑翔数小时。然而，在战斗中，如果升级骰为偶数，它必须在回合结束时降落（但参见火焰喷吐）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The kobold drags the target into a trap. See Trapster Kobold ability.
ast.target: 狗头人将目标拖入陷阱。参见陷阱师狗头人能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The kobold summons a trap that was not previously there, which the target triggers. See Trapster Kobold ability.
ast.target: 狗头人召唤一个之前不存在的陷阱，该陷阱被目标触发。参见陷阱师狗头人能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The engineer’s kobold allies gain a +2 attack bonus against the target until the start of the engineer’s next turn.
ast.target: 工程师的狗头人盟友在工程师的下一回合开始前，对目标获得+2攻击加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The blast knocks the target into a trap. See Trapster Kobold ability.
ast.target: 爆炸将目标炸入陷阱。参见陷阱师狗头人能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each other glinter in the battle gains a +1 attack bonus (cumulative) until the end of the turn.
ast.target: 战斗中每个其他闪光者在回合结束前获得+1攻击加值（可累积）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A mob of glinters can use this attack only once during the battle. On the turn that they use the attack, each glinter in the mob can choose whether to make the attack or not. Any who don’t use it, lose it.
ast.target: 一群闪光者在整场战斗中只能使用此攻击一次。在使用该攻击的回合，群中的每个闪光者可以选择是否进行攻击。任何未使用者，将失去机会。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever three or more glinters drop from a single attack (possibly involving multiple attack rolls), one-third of those glinters are undamaged instead (round down).
ast.target: 每当三个或更多闪光者因单次攻击（可能涉及多次攻击骰）而倒下时，其中三分之一的闪光者未受损（向下取整）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a glinter mob is reduced to half its number or less, the surviving glinters gain a +4 bonus to all defenses until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 当一群闪光者数量减少到一半或更少时，幸存的闪光者在战斗结束前获得所有防御+4加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle as a free action, the glinter mob can utter a war cry in unison and each member of the mob gains a +4 attack bonus that turn.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，作为自由动作，闪光者群体可以齐声发出战吼，该回合每个群体成员获得+4攻击加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A kobold shadow-warrior can climb on ceilings and walls as easily as it moves on the ground.
ast.target: 狗头人暗影战士可以像在地面上移动一样轻松地在天花板和墙壁上攀爬。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Kobolds take no damage from missed attacks.
ast.target: 狗头人不会受到未命中攻击的伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The kobold warrior can pop free from the target.
ast.target: 狗头人战士可以从目标处脱离交战。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Kobold warriors with single digit hit points will run away the first chance they get.
ast.target: 生命值为个位数的狗头人战士一有机会就会逃跑。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When staggered, the kohwa enforcer gains a bonus to damage equal to triple the escalation die (3*@ed).
ast.target: 当陷入蹒跚状态时，科瓦执法者获得等于升级骰三倍的伤害加值（3*@ed）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The first time the enforcer is struck by a critical hit, provided it survives the blow, it sprays horrible acidic urine on its enemies using its pitter patter attack as a free action.
ast.target: 当执法者首次被暴击命中时，若其幸存，它会使用其噼啪攻击作为自由动作，向敌人喷洒可怕的酸性尿液。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Kohwa are winged, and therefore capable of flight. While they are strong fliers and able to travel great distances in this way, they are acutely aware of how ungainly they look while doing so, and therefore prefer to walk or run unless they are certain no one is watching.
ast.target: 科瓦有翅膀，因此能够飞行。虽然它们是强壮的飞行者，能够以此方式长途旅行，但它们敏锐地意识到自己在飞行时看起来多么笨拙，因此除非确定无人观看，否则更喜欢步行或奔跑。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unlike many cat species, kohwa are perfectly at home in the water, so diving into a lake or river is a poor defense against them.
ast.target: 与许多猫科动物不同，科瓦在水中完全自在，因此跳入湖泊或河流是对抗它们的糟糕防御。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Kohwa are capable of short-range telepathy with non-kohwa. It is assumed (although no one is entirely sure) that they are capable of communicating with others of their species at greater distances, as when one is in trouble, others are sure to appear—eventually.
ast.target: 科瓦能够与非科瓦生物进行短距离心灵感应。据推测（尽管无人完全确定），它们能够与同类进行更远距离的交流，因为当一只陷入困境时，其他科瓦迟早会出现。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the enforcer is unengaged and moves to engage an enemy, it can make a leaping strike attack as a standard action.
ast.target: 如果执法者未交战并移动去攻击敌人，它可以作为标准动作进行一次跃击攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each time the kohwa messenger makes a natural odd roll when using this attack, it can immediately make another *piercing gaze* attack roll against a different target it has not already targeted this turn.
ast.target: 每当科瓦信使使用此攻击时，若其自然骰点为奇数，它可以立即对本轮尚未攻击过的不同目标进行一次*刺穿凝视*攻击检定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Cannot be used until the escalation die reaches 4+
ast.target: 在升级骰达到4+之前无法使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The kowha messenger can use the implacable dread attack.
ast.target: 科瓦信使可以使用无情恐惧攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The koruku landkiller makes a second *thrashing tail* attack against a different target.
ast.target: 科鲁库陆行杀手对一个不同的目标进行第二次*猛击尾扫*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The koruku landkiller regains its *stolen magic* attack if it’s expended.
ast.target: 科鲁库陆行杀手恢复其*窃取魔法*攻击（若已消耗）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: One nearby koruku servitor can make a *wild magic blast* attack (fire damage) as a free action.
ast.target: 一名附近的科鲁库仆从可以作为自由动作进行一次*狂野魔法冲击*攻击（火焰伤害）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: All nearby koruku servitors gain a +4 attack bonus against stuck targets on their next turn.
ast.target: 所有附近的科鲁库仆从在下一轮对被束缚的目标获得+4攻击加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add a cumulative +2 to the defenses of all koruku servitors until the end of the servitors’ next turn.
ast.target: 为所有科鲁库仆从的防御累积+2，直到仆从的下一轮结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: All nearby koruku servitors gain a +4 damage bonus until the end of their next turn.
ast.target: 所有附近的科鲁库仆从获得+4伤害加值，直到其下一轮结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add a koruku servitor to the battle.
ast.target: 在战斗中添加一名科鲁库仆从。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The koruku landkiller adds twice the escalation die (2*@ed) to its saves.
ast.target: 科鲁库陆行杀手将其豁免检定加上升级骰的两倍（2*@ed）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the koruku landkiller is hit by an attack, add a koruku servitor to the battle.
ast.target: 当科鲁库陆行杀手被攻击命中时，在战斗中添加一名科鲁库仆从。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The koruku larva can make a *blood-sucking proboscis* attack against the target as a quick action this turn.
ast.target: 科鲁库幼虫可以在本轮作为快速动作对目标进行一次*吸血口器*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 5 additional damage and the koruku larva can heal 5 hit points.
ast.target: 目标受到5点额外伤害，科鲁库幼虫可以恢复5点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each creature engaged with a damaged koruku larva at the start of its turn takes 2d6 acid damage.
ast.target: 在科鲁库幼虫的回合开始时，任何与受损的科鲁库幼虫交战的生物受到2d6点酸液伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The koruku larva can physically and magically bond with a willing humanoid, or a humanoid it has reduced to 0 hp, and evolve over the course of a day into a koruku symbiont.
ast.target: 科鲁库幼虫可以与一个自愿的人形生物，或一个它已将生命值降至0的人形生物进行物理和魔法结合，并在一天内进化为科鲁库共生体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The koruku servitor takes 10 damage and the target gains a random Wild Magic Benefit from the table below.
ast.target: 科鲁库仆从受到10点伤害，目标从下表获得一个随机的狂野魔法增益。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Koruku servitors fade away if they fly too far from their koruku landkiller, but are quick and agile fliers in battle.
ast.target: 科鲁库仆从如果飞离其科鲁库陆行杀手太远会消失，但在战斗中是敏捷快速的飞行者。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is weakened (normal save ends) and the koruku symbiont can pop free of the target.
ast.target: 目标被削弱（正常豁免结束），科鲁库共生体可以从目标身上脱离。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 8 ongoing poison damage (normal save ends).
ast.target: 目标受到8点持续毒素伤害（正常豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The koruku symbiont can make an *acid spew* attack as a quick action.
ast.target: 科鲁库共生体可以作为快速动作进行一次*酸液喷吐*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is stunned until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 目标被震慑直到其下一轮结束。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，当升级骰为4+时。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is hampered (normal save ends).
ast.target: 目标被阻碍（正常豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The lammasu priest can make a righteous ray of faith attack against a different target.
ast.target: 拉玛苏祭司可以对一个不同的目标进行一次正义信仰射线攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle, the lammasu priest can make this invocation as a quick action. At the start of each of the lammasu priest’s turns until the roll succeeds, roll a d4. If the roll is less than or equal to the escalation die, each nearby enemy is hampered (easy save ends, 6+).
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，拉玛苏祭司可以作为快速动作进行此祈唤。在拉玛苏祭司的每个回合开始时，直到检定成功，掷一个d4。如果掷骰结果小于或等于升级骰，每个附近的敌人被阻碍（简易豁免结束，6+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy misses the lammasu warrior with a melee attack, that enemy takes 2d10 damage.
ast.target: 当敌人用近战攻击未命中拉玛苏战士时，该敌人受到2d10点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target can’t cast spells (easy save ends, 6+).
ast.target: 目标无法施放法术（简易豁免结束，6+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: One spell or effect created by the target this battle is canceled (lammasu’s choice).
ast.target: 目标在本场战斗中创造的一个法术或效果被取消（拉玛苏选择）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 10 ongoing acid damage.
ast.target: 目标还受到10点持续酸液伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A large black dragon can use acid breath 1d3 times per battle, but never two turns in a row.
ast.target: 大型黑龙每场战斗可以使用酸息1d3次，但不能连续两回合使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an acid attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当酸液攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然16+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A large blue dragon can use lightning breath 1d6 times per battle, but never two turns in a row.
ast.target: 大型蓝龙每场战斗可以使用闪电吐息1d6次，但不能连续两回合使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a lightning attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当闪电攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然16+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragon can make a babble attack as a free action.
ast.target: 龙可以作为自由动作进行一次胡言乱语攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle as a free action when an enemy rolls a natural even attack against the dragon, the dragon negates the attack (no damage or effects).
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，作为自由动作，当敌人对龙进行自然偶数攻击时，龙可以抵消该攻击（无伤害或效果）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle as a free action at the start of its turn, the dragon can cancel all effects and conditions on it, including ongoing damage. It can cancel these effects even if it’s prevented from taking actions, such as by being stunned.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，作为自由动作，在其回合开始时，龙可以取消其身上的所有效果和状态，包括持续伤害。即使它被阻止采取行动（例如被震慑），它也可以取消这些效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 10 ongoing poison damage.
ast.target: 目标还受到10点持续毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Roll a third fangs, claws, and tail attack.
ast.target: 进行第三次獠牙、利爪和尾扫攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A large red dragon can use fiery breath 1d4 times per battle, but never two turns in a row.
ast.target: 大型红龙每场战斗可以使用烈焰吐息1d4次，但不能连续两回合使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While engaged with this creature, enemies with 72 hp or fewer are dazed (-4 attack) and do not add the escalation die to their attacks.
ast.target: 当与此生物交战时，生命值72或更少的敌人被眩晕（-4攻击），并且不将升级骰加到其攻击上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle as a free action when an attack targets the dragon, it can force the attacker to reroll the attack and has resist damage 16+ against that attack.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，作为自由动作，当攻击以此龙为目标时，它可以迫使攻击者重投该攻击，并对该攻击具有16+抗性伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: One demon ally of the laughing demon can regain the use of a limited use ability it has already expended this battle.
ast.target: 一名狂笑恶魔的盟友可以恢复其在本次战斗中已消耗的一项有限使用能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While one or more laughing demons are in a battle, deal psychic damage equal to twice the laughing demon’s level (2*@lvl) to each enemy who fails a save. Yes, that means death saves also. Nasty.
ast.target: 当一名或多名狂笑恶魔在场时，对每个豁免失败的敌人造成等于狂笑恶魔等级两倍（2*@lvl）的心灵伤害。是的，这包括死亡豁免。真够狠的。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When you choose to add the escalation die to an attack against a lemure, another lemure in the mob somehow ends up in an unwanted place in the battle, though it’s hard to say how exactly. They don’t seem to teleport, but there are so many of the things squirming around it just happens.
ast.target: 当你选择将升级骰加入对一名劣魔的攻击时，另一名劣魔不知怎的会出现在战斗中某个意想不到的位置，尽管很难说具体是怎么发生的。它们似乎没有传送，但因为有太多这种东西在蠕动，所以就发生了。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When three or more lemures engage an enemy, they can pick it up and move it along with them as they please without taking opportunity attacks. The enemy getting moved around pops free of any other enemies engaged with it.
ast.target: 当三名或更多劣魔与一名敌人交战时，它们可以随心所欲地将其抬起并移动，且不会引发借机攻击。被移动的敌人会脱离与其他交战敌人的接触。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Heedless of each other’s safety or their own, lemures use sheer numbers to press through locked doors, climb walls, or dog pile on defenders.
ast.target: 劣魔不顾彼此或自身的安全，纯粹依靠数量优势来挤过锁住的门、爬墙或堆叠在防御者身上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: For every separate mob of lesser haunting mooks in the battle (mobs start with at least four mooks), add a +1 bonus to the lesser haunting’s attacks and damage.
ast.target: 战斗中每存在一个独立的低级幽魂喽啰群（每个群至少由四名喽啰组成），低级幽魂的攻击和伤害就获得+1加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The xorn can see through all types of rock and soil for some distance, let’s say "nearby".
ast.target: 土巨怪可以看穿一定距离内的所有类型的岩石和土壤，姑且称之为“附近”。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the xorn moves out of the floor or wall or ceiling into engagement with an enemy, deal 2d6 damage to that enemy.
ast.target: 当土巨怪从地板、墙壁或天花板中移动出来与一名敌人交战时，对该敌人造成2d6点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Any woven engaged with the target can attack it as a free action.
ast.target: 任何与目标交战的织网者都可以将其作为自由动作进行攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the lich baroness scores a critical hit, the target loses a death save until the end of the battle (effectively, it now dies after failing three death saves, and the effect is cumulative). In addition, the crit range of attacks by the lich against the target expands by the escalation die.
ast.target: 当巫妖女爵造成重击时，目标失去一次死亡豁免，直到战斗结束（实际上，它现在会在失败三次死亡豁免后死亡，且此效果可叠加）。此外，巫妖对该目标的攻击重击范围会因升级骰而扩大。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the lich drops to 0 hit points, it crumbles to dust but does not die. It begins to reform near its phylactery, taking a number of days to regain its full strength equal to its level. If the phylactery has been destroyed, the lich dies when it drops to 0 hit points.
ast.target: 当巫妖的生命值降至0时，它会化为尘土但不会死亡。它开始在其护命匣附近重塑形体，恢复全部力量所需的天数等于其等级。如果护命匣已被摧毁，巫妖在生命值降至0时死亡。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is weakened instead of dazed (hard save ends, 16+)
ast.target: 目标被削弱而非眩晕（困难豁免结束，16+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is encased in shadows (save ends). While under the effect, it’s weakened and takes 10 ongoing cold damage.
ast.target: 目标被暗影包裹（豁免结束）。在此效果下，它被削弱并受到10点持续寒冷伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 20 ongoing fire damage instead of 10.
ast.target: 目标受到20点持续火焰伤害，而非10点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While engaged with this creature, if the target has 48 hp or fewer, it’s dazed (-4 attack) and does not add the escalation die to its attacks.
ast.target: 当与该生物交战时，如果目标生命值为48或更低，它会被眩晕（攻击-4）且不将升级骰加入其攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While engaged with the lich flower, non-undead and non-plant creatures are dazed (-4 attacks).
ast.target: 当与巫妖花交战时，非亡灵和非植物生物会被眩晕（攻击-4）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the lich flower drops to 0 hit points, it’s destroyed until the start of its next turn. At the start of its next turn, it returns to life as a blood rose or poison dandelion that lacks the black-gray resurgence ability but is otherwise undamaged and whole.
ast.target: 当巫妖花的生命值降至0时，它被摧毁，直到其下一回合开始。在其下一回合开始时，它会复活为血玫瑰或毒蒲公英，缺乏黑灰复苏能力，但除此之外完好无损。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is weakened instead of dazed (hard save ends, 16+).
ast.target: 目标被削弱而非眩晕（困难豁免结束，16+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each enemy engaged with the lich prince pops free from it as a bubble of arcane energy pushes them away.
ast.target: 每个与巫妖王子交战的敌人都会因一股奥术能量将其推开而脱离接触。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle when an attack would hit the lich prince, the attack misses instead and the lich teleports to a nearby location it can see as a free action.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，当一次攻击将要命中巫妖王子时，该攻击改为未命中，且巫妖可以自由动作传送到一个它能看到的附近位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While engaged with this creature, if the target has 120 hp or fewer, it’s dazed (-4 attack) and does not add the escalation die to its attacks.
ast.target: 当与该生物交战时，如果目标生命值为120或更低，它会被眩晕（攻击-4）且不将升级骰加入其攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The lizardman savage can make a bite attack against the target or another creature engaged with it as a free action.
ast.target: 蜥蜴人狂战士可以对目标或与其交战的另一名生物进行一次啃咬攻击，作为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each time the lokkris hits with the attack, the crit range for all lokkris against that target expands by 1 until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 每当洛克里斯命中目标时，所有洛克里斯对该目标的重击范围扩大1，直到战斗结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Lokkris are quick darting fliers that move with an angry buzzing sound.
ast.target: 洛克里斯是快速飞行的生物，移动时发出愤怒的嗡嗡声。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A lokkris can climb on ceilings and walls as easily as it moves on the ground.
ast.target: 洛克里斯可以像在地面上移动一样轻松地在天花板和墙壁上攀爬。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target loses use of one random epic tier true magic item. The item can be retrieved as a standard action from a slain loyal gatherer.
ast.target: 目标失去使用一件随机史诗级真魔法物品的能力。该物品可以从一名被击杀的忠诚收集者身上以标准动作取回。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The loyal gatherer’s crit range expands by number of true magic items of epic tier the target is carrying. Targets with more of these items are preferred prey.
ast.target: 忠诚收集者的重击范围扩大，扩大值等于目标携带的史诗级真魔法物品数量。携带更多此类物品的目标是更受偏好的猎物。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A dirt-fisher can burrow incredibly quickly for short distances, but it prefers to attack from within its pre-dug trap-door pit. It usually has a few pits dug nearby if forced to leave its current pit.
ast.target: 土钓者可以极快地短距离掘地，但它更喜欢从预先挖好的活板门坑中发起攻击。如果被迫离开当前坑洞，它通常会在附近挖几个坑。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dirt-fisher deals double damage against creatures engaged with it in its pit.
ast.target: 土钓者对在其坑中与其交战的生物造成双倍伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 6 extra fire damage.
ast.target: 目标受到6点额外火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy engaged with the brute attacks it, that enemy takes 2 fire damage.
ast.target: 当一名与蛮兽交战的敌人攻击它时，该敌人受到2点火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: For every separate mob of major haunting mooks in the battle (mobs start with at least four mooks), add a +1 bonus to the major haunting’s attacks and +2 to its damage.
ast.target: 战斗中每存在一个独立的主要幽魂喽啰群（每个群至少由四名喽啰组成），主要幽魂的攻击获得+1加值，伤害获得+2加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While there are three or more lesser or major haunting mooks in a battle, the fear abilities of their allies affect enemies with half again as many hit points as usual.
ast.target: 当战斗中有三名或更多低级或主要幽魂喽啰时，其盟友的恐惧能力会影响生命值比通常多一半的敌人。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The naga and each of its nearby allies can use the escalation die unless the naga has been targeted by an enemy’s spell since its last turn.
ast.target: 娜迦及其附近的每名盟友都可以使用升级骰，除非娜迦自其上一回合以来已被敌人的法术指定为目标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The manticore can make a single volley of tail spikes attack (one attack roll) against a different target as a free action.
ast.target: 蝎尾狮可以对一个不同的目标进行一次尾刺齐射攻击（一次攻击检定），作为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each time the manticore uses its volley of tail spikes attack, it takes 1d6 damage, or 2d6 damage if it is staggered.
ast.target: 每当蝎尾狮使用其尾刺齐射攻击时，它会受到1d6点伤害，如果它处于踉跄状态则受到2d6点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The manticore can make a single volley of tail spikes attack (one attack roll) against a different target as a free action without taking an opportunity attack.
ast.target: 蝎尾狮可以对一个不同的目标进行一次尾刺齐射攻击（一次攻击检定），作为自由动作，且不会引发借机攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: In addition, the target can’t use the escalation die until it saves.
ast.target: 此外，目标在豁免成功前无法使用升级骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The manticore can use musical voice only 1d4 times during the battle, and never two turns in a row.
ast.target: 蝎尾狮在战斗中只能使用音乐之声1d4次，且不能连续两回合使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each time the manticore uses its volley of tail spikes attack, it takes 1d6 damage, or 2d6 damage if it’s staggered.
ast.target: 每当蝎尾狮使用其尾刺齐射攻击时，它会受到1d6点伤害，如果它处于踉跄状态则受到2d6点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fortissimo—Each of the manticore’s allies gains a +2d6 damage bonus with attacks that hit until the end of the battle (non-cumulative).
ast.target: 强音——蝎尾狮的每名盟友在命中攻击时获得+2d6伤害加值，直到战斗结束（不可叠加）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Profundo—The manticore’s musical voice attack now deals 40 psychic damage instead of 20 until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 低音——蝎尾狮的音乐之声攻击现在造成40点心灵伤害，而非20点，直到战斗结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Furioso—The target is confused instead of dazed.
ast.target: 狂怒——目标被困惑而非眩晕。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Largo—The manticore can make a musical voice attack during its next turn as a free action, but with a +3 attack bonus. This free attack won’t trigger another battle music effect.
ast.target: 广板——蝎尾狮可以在其下一回合作为自由动作进行一次音乐之声攻击，但攻击获得+3加值。这次自由攻击不会触发另一个战斗音乐效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The mantikumhar pulls its target under the soil/ground. The target is stuck, hampered, and takes 5 ongoing damage from suffocation (save ends all)
ast.target: 曼提库哈尔将其目标拖入土壤/地面下。目标被困住、受阻，并因窒息受到5点持续伤害（所有效果豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The mantikumhar can move rapidly through sand, loose soil, or dry eroded earth. It prefers to dig out a wide pit and lie in wait for prey. (See Burrowing.)
ast.target: 曼提库哈尔可以在沙地、松散土壤或干燥侵蚀的土壤中快速移动。它更喜欢挖出一个宽阔的坑并埋伏等待猎物。（参见掘地。）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Between nictitating membranes that keep its eyes from being scratched out by the sand and its weird burrowing echolocation sense, the mantikumhar can’t be blinded.
ast.target: 凭借保护眼睛不被沙子刮伤的瞬膜以及其奇特的掘地回声定位感，曼提库哈尔不会被致盲。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each time the mantikumhar uses its serpent sting attack, it takes 1d6 damage, or 2d6 damage if it’s staggered.
ast.target: 每当曼提库哈尔使用其蛇尾刺攻击时，它会受到1d6点伤害，如果它处于踉跄状态则受到2d6点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A mantikumhar can burrow into the soil as a move action, concealing itself from attacks. A hunkered mantikumhar gains a +3 bonus to AC and PD, but it can’t use crushing leonine jaws.
ast.target: 曼提库哈尔可以作为移动动作掘入土壤中，隐藏自己免受攻击。蹲伏的曼提库哈尔获得+3的AC和PD加值，但无法使用碎裂狮颚。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The mantikumhar’s extensible tail can strike by surprise like a cobra from anywhere in its pit.
ast.target: 曼提库哈尔可伸展的尾巴可以像眼镜蛇一样从其坑中的任何位置发起突袭。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The golem can make a backswing attack as a free action
ast.target: 魔像可以将一次回摆攻击作为自由动作执行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Non-organic golems are immune to effects. They can’t be dazed, weakened, confused, made vulnerable, or touched by ongoing damage. You can damage a golem, but that’s about it.
ast.target: 非有机魔像免疫效果。它们不会被震慑、虚弱、困惑、变得易受伤害，或受到持续伤害。你可以伤害魔像，但仅此而已。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Statues that capture even more themes make stronger marble golems. Add one or two more virtues to the golem.
ast.target: 捕捉更多主题的雕像能制造出更强的大理石魔像。为魔像增加一到两种美德。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The marilith’s crit range with melee attacks expands by a number equal to the escalation die.
ast.target: 蛇蝎魔的近战攻击暴击范围，其数值等于升级骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is hampered and weakened (hard save ends both, 16+).
ast.target: 目标受到妨碍和虚弱（困难豁免结束两者，16+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy is engaged with the chuul at the start of its turn, that creature must roll a normal save; on a failure, it’s hampered (easy save ends, 6+).
ast.target: 当敌人在巨蟹怪回合开始时与其交战时，该生物必须进行一次普通豁免；失败时，它受到妨碍（简单豁免结束，6+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The mutant chuul can make three crushing claws attacks instead of two. If two of the attacks hit the same target, the chuul grabs it.
ast.target: 变异巨蟹怪可以进行三次碾压爪击攻击，而非两次。如果两次攻击命中同一目标，巨蟹怪会抓住它。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the chuul rolls a natural even hit with crushing claws, it deals 120 damage instead of 70.
ast.target: 当巨蟹怪的碾压爪击攻击掷出自然偶数命中时，它造成120点伤害，而非70点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The chuul gains a venom spit attack.
ast.target: 巨蟹怪获得一次毒液喷吐攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The chuul can make a second venom spit attack against the same group as a free action.
ast.target: 巨蟹怪可以对同一组目标进行第二次毒液喷吐攻击，作为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The crippling tentacles attack is now a close attack against 1d3 enemies in a group.
ast.target: 致残触手攻击现在是一次针对一组中1d3个敌人的近程攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The mausoleum dragon can make an infused ice breath attack as a free action.
ast.target: 陵墓龙可以将一次灌注寒冰吐息攻击作为自由动作执行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 7 ongoing holy damage.
ast.target: 目标还受到7点持续神圣伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy is engaged with the dragon at the start of its turn, it takes 5 holy damage.
ast.target: 当敌人在龙回合开始时与其交战时，它受到5点神圣伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a cold or negative energy attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次寒冷或负能量攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然16+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 4 ongoing acid damage.
ast.target: 目标还受到4点持续酸液伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A medium black dragon can use acid breath 1d3 times per battle, but never two turns in a row.
ast.target: 中型黑龙每场战斗可以使用酸液吐息1d3次，但不能连续两回合使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an acid attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 12+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次酸液攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然12+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A medium blue dragon can use lightning breath 1d4 times per battle, but never two turns in a row.
ast.target: 中型蓝龙每场战斗可以使用闪电吐息1d4次，但不能连续两回合使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a lightning attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 12+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次闪电攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然12+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a fire attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 12+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次火焰攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然12+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle as a free action when an enemy rolls a natural even hit against the dragon, the dragon negates the attack (no damage or effects).
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，作为自由动作，当敌人对龙掷出自然偶数命中时，龙可以抵消该攻击（无伤害或效果）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a poison attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 12+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次毒素攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然12+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Roll another fangs, claws, and tail attack.
ast.target: 再进行一次獠牙、利爪和尾巴攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A medium red dragon can use fiery breath 1d3 times per battle, but never two turns in a row.
ast.target: 中型红龙每场战斗可以使用烈焰吐息1d3次，但不能连续两回合使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle as a free action when an attack targets the dragon, it can force the attacker to reroll the attack and has resist damage 12+ against that attack.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，作为自由动作，当一次攻击以龙为目标时，它可以迫使攻击者重骰该攻击，并对该攻击具有抗性伤害12+。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a cold attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 12+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次寒冷攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然12+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The medusa can make a petrifying gaze attack against the target as a free action.
ast.target: 美杜莎可以对目标进行一次石化凝视攻击，作为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The medusa deals 1d6 x 10 lightning damage to all nearby enemies.
ast.target: 美杜莎对所有附近敌人造成1d6 x 10点闪电伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The medusa can make a lightning fork attack against a different target as a free action; keep making lightning fork attacks until you run out of targets that have taken damage from lightning fork or roll a natural odd attack.
ast.target: 美杜莎可以对另一个目标进行一次闪电叉攻击，作为自由动作；持续进行闪电叉攻击，直到没有受到过闪电叉伤害的目标，或掷出自然奇数攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever a nearby enemy attacks the medusa noble and rolls a natural 1-5, the medusa can make a petrifying gaze attack against that attacker as a free action.
ast.target: 每当附近敌人攻击美杜莎贵族并掷出自然1-5时，美杜莎可以对该攻击者进行一次石化凝视攻击，作为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Thrice per battle, as a free action, the medusa noble can force an enemy to reroll a spell attack that targeted it. The attacker can’t use the escalation die for the reroll.
ast.target: 每场战斗三次，作为自由动作，美杜莎贵族可以迫使敌人重骰一次针对它的法术攻击。攻击者不能在重骰时使用升级骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If lightning isn’t working against her target, the medusa noble can take a -2 attack penalty to change the energy type of her ranged attack to fire or thunder.
ast.target: 如果闪电对她的目标无效，美杜莎贵族可以承受-2攻击惩罚，将其远程攻击的能量类型改为火焰或雷鸣。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever a nearby enemy attacks the medusa outlaw and rolls a natural 1 or 2, the medusa can make a petrifying gaze attack against that attacker as a free action.
ast.target: 每当附近敌人攻击美杜莎法外之徒并掷出自然1或2时，美杜莎可以对该攻击者进行一次石化凝视攻击，作为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: At the start of each of the medusa’s turns, roll a d4. If you roll less than or equal to the escalation die, the medusa can also use petrifying gaze as a quick action once during that turn.
ast.target: 在美杜莎每个回合开始时，掷一个d4。如果你掷出的数字小于或等于升级骰，美杜莎在该回合期间还可以将石化凝视作为快速动作使用一次。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 目标陷入困惑（豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Only in her true form when no enemy is confused.
ast.target: 仅在无敌人困惑时，她才以真实形态出现。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If in her true form, the melusine has limited flight capability, which she uses to effect an escape if sufficiently close to a convenient source of fresh water.
ast.target: 如果处于真实形态，梅吕西娜拥有有限的飞行能力，如果足够靠近方便的淡水来源，她会利用此能力逃脱。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The first time the melusine is staggered in battle, she becomes invisible and attempts to extricate herself from the fight. She remains invisible until she either attacks someone, or performs a flashy maneuver (such as regaining her true form and flying away).
ast.target: 梅吕西娜在战斗中首次被击至踉跄时，她会变得隐形并试图脱离战斗。她保持隐形，直到她攻击某人，或执行一个炫目的动作（例如恢复真实形态并飞走）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a standard action, the melusine can change her form to that of any humanoid or fish (the latter usually only if already in water), or turn back into her true form. A successful DC 25 skill check is required to see through the shapechange.
ast.target: 作为标准动作，梅吕西娜可以将她的形态变为任何类人生物或鱼（后者通常仅在已在水中时），或变回她的真实形态。需要一次成功的DC 25技能检定才能看穿变形。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The attack does double damage, but the xombie takes 1d6 damage.
ast.target: 该攻击造成双倍伤害，但僵尸受到1d6点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: For every four meteorite xombies in the battle (round up), one of them can use vomit tentacles once during the battle.
ast.target: 每有四个陨石僵尸参战（向上取整），其中一个可以在战斗中使用一次呕吐触手。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This attack only uses a quick action rather than a standard action.
ast.target: 此攻击仅使用快速动作，而非标准动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
As a move action, the minotaur adept teleports somewhere nearby that it can see. Through the earth it looks like burrowing, through air like teleporting, etc.

Limited use: 1d3 times per battle.
ast.target:
作为移动动作，牛头人术士可以传送到它能看到的附近某处。穿过地面看起来像挖掘，穿过空气像传送，等等。

\n

有限使用：每场战斗1d3次。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The adept gains a bonus to saves equal to the escalation die.
ast.target: 术士获得等于升级骰的豁免加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The attack instead deals 40 damage on a hit if the minotaur first moves before attacking an enemy it was not engaged with at the start of its turn.
ast.target: 如果牛头人先移动，然后攻击一个在回合开始时未与其交战的敌人，该攻击在命中时改为造成40点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Minotaurs gain a +4 melee attack bonus against staggered enemies.
ast.target: 牛头人对踉跄的敌人获得+4近战攻击加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The first time each round the minotaur takes damage, prevent 2d6 of it.
ast.target: 每轮首次受到伤害时，米诺陶斯可防止其中2d6点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While engaged with this creature, enemies that have 24 hp or fewer are dazed (-4 attack) and do not add the escalation die to their attacks.
ast.target: 与该生物交战时，生命值不超过24的敌人会陷入眩晕（攻击-4），且攻击时不将升级骰加入攻击骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The moon dragon can make an ice breath attack as a free action.
ast.target: 月龙可以自由动作进行一次寒冰吐息攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the full moon is within seven days, the moon dragon’s next ice breath attack this battle will deal double damage.
ast.target: 若满月在七天内出现，月龙在本次战斗中的下一次寒冰吐息攻击将造成双倍伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: fire when the new moon is within seven days.
ast.target: 当新月在七天内出现时，使用火焰。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 目标被束缚（直到豁免成功）

ast.name: description
ast.source: After using its distending jaw attack, the hungry mouth ghost has a fear ability against engaged enemies with fewer than 96 hit points.
ast.target: 饥饿之口幽灵使用其下颌扩张攻击后，可对生命值低于96点的交战敌人使用恐惧能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target’s flesh begins to rot and the ongoing damage increases by +40 (cumulative). Saves granted by special powers don’t increase this damage if they fail, only end of turn failures.
ast.target: 目标的血肉开始腐烂，持续伤害增加+40（累积）。特殊能力提供的豁免若失败不会增加此伤害，仅回合结束时的豁免失败才会增加。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the target is already affected by mummy rot, increase the ongoing negative energy damage by 40. If the target isn’t affected by mummy rot already, it takes 40 ongoing negative energy damage and is affected by mummy rot (save ends both)
ast.target: 若目标已受木乃伊腐烂影响，其持续负能量伤害增加40点。若目标未受木乃伊腐烂影响，则受到40点持续负能量伤害并受木乃伊腐烂影响（直到两项豁免均成功）

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the mummy takes 20 damage or less from a non-fire attack, it takes no damage instead.
ast.target: 当木乃伊受到非火焰攻击造成的20点或更少伤害时，改为不受到伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The mummy has a +4 bonus to all defenses until it takes damage.
ast.target: 木乃伊在受到伤害前，所有防御获得+4加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle as a quick action, the mummy can issue a bone-chilling cry that seems to echo from some unseen tomb or portal and it makes a call of the sarcophagus attack.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，木乃伊可以快速动作发出一声仿佛来自无形墓穴或传送门的刺骨寒嚎，并进行一次石棺呼唤攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The bullfrog may also make a bite attack as a free action
ast.target: 牛蛙也可以自由动作进行一次啃咬攻击

ast.name: description
ast.source: The bullfrog may also make a bite attack as a free action.
ast.target: 牛蛙也可以自由动作进行一次啃咬攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If smaller than the mutant bullfrog, the target is partially-swallowed, and takes 10 ongoing damage (disengaging or popping free ends).
ast.target: 若目标体型小于变异牛蛙，则被部分吞噬，并受到10点持续伤害（脱离或挣脱可终止）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The bullfrog bellows as a free action when first staggered or when the escalation die becomes even.
ast.target: 牛蛙在首次被击伤或升级骰变为偶数时，可以自由动作发出咆哮。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The bullfrog may add the escalation die to its attack rolls when staggered.
ast.target: 牛蛙在被击伤时，可将升级骰加入其攻击骰中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Nalfeshnee always have at least two random demon abilities.
ast.target: 纳尔菲什尼总是至少拥有两种随机恶魔能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle, if the nalfeshnee is staggered, it can gate in 2d4 hooked demons as a quick action. Roll initiative for the hooked demons; they do not appear in the battle and take their turns until their next initiative count comes up.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，若纳尔菲什尼被击伤，它可以快速动作召唤2d4只钩爪恶魔。为钩爪恶魔投掷先攻；它们不会立即出现在战斗中，直到其下一个先攻顺序到来时才行动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The newly-risen ghoul’s scrabbling claws attack deals +2 damage against vulnerable targets.
ast.target: 新复活食尸鬼的抓挠攻击对易伤目标造成+2点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Can only be used when the escalation die is even.
ast.target: 仅当升级骰为偶数时可使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The first time an ochre jelly takes 20 or more damage from a single attack, it splits into two normal-size ochre jellies, each with half the original’s current hit points plus 2d6 hp. Treat the new jellies as undamaged jellies at their new hit point totals without the splitter ability.
ast.target: 当赭色果冻首次受到单次攻击20点或更多伤害时，它会分裂成两个正常大小的赭色果冻，每个拥有原果冻当前生命值的一半加上2d6点生命值。将新果冻视为在其新的生命值总数下未受损的果冻，且不具备分裂能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ogre berserker gains the escalator ability (it adds the escalation die to its attacks) until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 狂暴食人魔获得升级者能力（攻击时加入升级骰），直到战斗结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy engaged with the berserker scores a critical hit against it, that enemy takes 7d6 damage.
ast.target: 当与狂暴者交战的敌人对它打出重击时，该敌人受到7d6点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy makes an opportunity attack against the berserker, hit or miss, that enemy takes 2d6 damage.
ast.target: 当敌人对狂暴者进行借机攻击时，无论命中与否，该敌人受到2d6点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle as a free action, when the ogre berserker fails a save, it can take 3d6 damage to succeed at the save instead.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，当狂暴食人魔豁免失败时，它可以自由动作承受3d6点伤害以改为豁免成功。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ogre champion gains a second standard action this turn, but not a third.
ast.target: 食人魔勇士在本回合获得第二个标准动作，但不能获得第三个。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever a nearby dwarf or elf enemy attempts to use their racial power, they must roll a hard save (16+). On a failure, the power fails and has no effect that turn (but they can try again next turn).
ast.target: 每当附近的矮人或精灵敌人尝试使用其种族能力时，他们必须进行一次困难豁免（16+）。若失败，该能力在本回合无效且无效果（但下回合可再次尝试）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Creatures engaged with the ogre champion take opportunity attacks from it when casting close spells as if they were casting ranged spells.
ast.target: 与食人魔勇士交战的生物在施放近距离法术时，会像施放远程法术一样引发它的借机攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ogre champion adds the escalation die to the damage it deals with its attacks, hit or miss.
ast.target: 食人魔勇士将其攻击造成的伤害加入升级骰，无论命中与否。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ogre crusader can make a war-curse attack as a free action.
ast.target: 食人魔十字军可以自由动作进行一次战争诅咒攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the ogre crusader attacks an enemy that has a positive or conflicted relationship with an icon that is aligned opposite to the Ogre’s aligned icon, it adds the escalation die to the attack roll.
ast.target: 当食人魔十字军攻击一个与食人魔所结盟图标对立的图标有正面或矛盾关系的敌人时，其攻击骰加入升级骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ogre lightning mage can cancel one spell or magical effect created by the target.
ast.target: 食人魔闪电法师可以取消目标创造的一个法术或魔法效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ogre lightning mage flies well using the sheer power of its superior mind.
ast.target: 食人魔闪电法师凭借其卓越心智的纯粹力量飞行自如。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While not engaged, the ogre lightning mage can turn invisible as an at-will standard action. It becomes visible when it attacks. The ogre mage takes 1d10 damage each time it uses invisibility while it’s staggered.
ast.target: 未交战时，食人魔闪电法师可以随意动作变为隐形。攻击时显形。当它被击伤时，每次使用隐形会受到1d10点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a limited attack (not an at-will attack) targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当有限攻击（非随意攻击）以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰中投出自然16+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While an ogre mage is damaged, its uncanny flesh heals 20 hit points at the start of the ogre mage’s turn. It can regenerate five times per battle. If it heals to its maximum hit points, then that use of regeneration doesn’t count against the five-use limit.
ast.target: 当食人魔巫师受伤时，其诡异肉体在食人魔巫师回合开始时恢复20点生命值。每场战斗可再生五次。若恢复至最大生命值，则该次再生不计入五次限制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the ogre mage is hit by an attack that deals fire or acid damage, it loses one use of its regeneration, and it can’t regenerate during its next turn.
ast.target: 当食人魔巫师被造成火焰或酸液伤害的攻击命中时，它失去一次再生机会，且下回合无法再生。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Dropping an ogre mage to 0 hp doesn’t kill it if it has any uses of regeneration left.
ast.target: 将食人魔巫师生命值降至0不会杀死它，只要它还有再生次数剩余。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Make a second naginata attack against a nearby enemy as a free action (engaging it is not required)
ast.target: 对附近敌人进行第二次薙刀攻击，作为自由动作（无需与其交战）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per round when a nearby enemy misses the ogre mage with an attack, the ogre mage can make an aura of treachery attack against it as a free action.
ast.target: 每轮一次，当附近敌人未命中食人魔巫师的攻击时，食人魔巫师可以自由动作对其进行背叛光环攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ogre mage flies using the sheer power of its superior mind.
ast.target: 食人魔巫师凭借其卓越心智的纯粹力量飞行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the ogre mage is not engaged, it can turn invisible as an at-will standard action. It becomes visible when it attacks. The ogre mage takes 1d10 damage each time it uses invisibility while it’s staggered.
ast.target: 若食人魔巫师未交战，它可以随意动作变为隐形。攻击时显形。当它被击伤时，每次使用隐形会受到1d10点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 25 damage, and the ogre mage knight can use lightning pulse as a free action.
ast.target: 25点伤害，且食人魔巫师骑士可以自由动作使用闪电脉冲。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 20 damage, and the ogre mage knight can use voice of thunder as a free action.
ast.target: 20点伤害，且食人魔巫师骑士可以自由动作使用雷霆之声。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 10 damage, and the ogre mage knight can teleport to any nearby location it can see before using magi's lightning chain as a free action.
ast.target: 10点伤害，且食人魔巫师骑士可以在使用巫师闪电链作为自由动作前，传送至任何可见的附近位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a limited attack (not an at-will attack) targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当有限攻击（非随意攻击）以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰中投出自然16+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gain /gmr 1d4 ki at the start of each battle. Spend a point of ki as a free action, once per round, to change the ogre mage knight’s natural attack result by one; a natural 1 could become a 2, a natural 19 could become a natural 20, and so on.
ast.target: 每场战斗开始时，获得/gmr 1d4气。每回合一次，可作为自由动作消耗一点气，将食人魔巫师骑士的自然攻击结果改变一点；自然骰1可变为2，自然骰19可变为自然骰20，以此类推。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy makes an opportunity attack against the ogre minion, hit or miss, that enemy takes 4d6 damage.
ast.target: 当敌人对食人魔仆从发动借机攻击时，无论命中与否，该敌人受到4d6点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ogre minion mook counts as two 9th level mooks when you’re building battles.
ast.target: 在构建战斗时，食人魔仆从喽啰算作两个9级喽啰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per round, the ogre minion mob can take 5d10 damage to reroll an attack (a member of the mob takes one for the team).
ast.target: 每回合一次，食人魔仆从团伙可承受5d10点伤害，以重骰一次攻击（团伙中的一名成员为团队挡刀）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Until the end of the battle, when an enemy engaged with the ogre attacks it, that enemy can’t target other enemies with that attack.
ast.target: 直到战斗结束，当与食人魔交战的敌人攻击它时，该敌人无法用该攻击瞄准其他敌人。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While staggered, the ogre penitent gains a +4 attack bonus.
ast.target: 当食人魔忏悔者处于踉跄状态时，其攻击加值+4。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each time the ogre fails a save, it takes 1d8 psychic damage.
ast.target: 每次食人魔豁免失败时，它受到1d8点心灵伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the ogre penitent rolls a natural 1 or 2 with an attack roll, it can take an extra standard action during its next turn.
ast.target: 如果食人魔忏悔者的攻击骰掷出自然骰1或2，它可以在下回合获得一个额外的标准动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This power only requires a quick action (once per round) instead of a standard action when the escalation die is even.
ast.target: 当升级骰为偶数时，此能力只需一个快速动作（每回合一次），而非标准动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever the ogre takes weapon damage, reduce that damage by 1d8 points.
ast.target: 每当食人魔受到武器伤害时，将该伤害减少1d8点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enemies take a -5 penalty to disengage checks against the orc band.
ast.target: 敌人对抗兽人乐队的脱离检定时承受-5减值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The crit range of attacks by orcs expands by 3 unless they are staggered.
ast.target: 除非兽人处于踉跄状态，否则其攻击的重击范围扩大3点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an orc berserker drops to 0 hp, it does not immediately die. Ignore any damage in excess of 0 hp, roll 2d6, and give the berserker that many temporary hit points. No other healing can affect the berserker or give it more temporary hit points. When the temporary hp are gone, the berserker dies.
ast.target: 当兽人狂战士生命值降至0时，它不会立即死亡。忽略超过0生命值的任何伤害，掷2d6，给予狂战士该数量的临时生命值。其他治疗无法影响狂战士或给予其更多临时生命值。当临时生命值耗尽时，狂战士死亡。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The crit range of melee attacks by orc ragers expands by 3 until half the orc rager mob has been dropped.
ast.target: 兽人狂暴者的近战攻击重击范围扩大3点，直到兽人狂暴者团伙中一半成员被击倒。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an orc rager drops to 0 hp, it can make a final attack as a free action. (These extra attacks can come from ragers engaged with a PC.)
ast.target: 当兽人狂暴者生命值降至0时，它可以作为自由动作发动一次最终攻击。（这些额外攻击可以来自与玩家角色交战的狂暴者。）

ast.name: description
ast.source: The attack instead deals 12 damage on a hit if the orc tusker first moves before attacking an enemy it was not engaged with at the start of its turn.
ast.target: 如果兽人长牙者在攻击一个回合开始时未与之交战的敌人之前先移动，则该攻击改为命中时造成12点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reroll the attack against a random nearby creature. If the rerolled attack is also a natural 1-5, the orcish archer takes 3 damage from sheer agonized frustration, but it doesn’t get to make another attack.
ast.target: 对附近一个随机生物重骰攻击。如果重骰的攻击也是自然骰1-5，兽人弓箭手因极度痛苦的挫败感受到3点伤害，但无法再发动另一次攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die is 3+, the orcish archer gains a +3 bonus to melee attacks and melee damage
ast.target: 当升级骰为3+时，兽人弓箭手的近战攻击和近战伤害获得+3加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The otyugh can grab the target.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The otyugh can grab the target and make a big toothy maw attack against it as a free action.
ast.target: 食腐兽可以抓取目标，并作为自由动作对其发动一次巨齿利口攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The otyugh gains a +2 bonus to all defenses while fighting in its nest or in similar piles of excrement and trash.
ast.target: 食腐兽在其巢穴或类似的粪便和垃圾堆中战斗时，所有防御获得+2加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per round, an otyugh can make a grasping tentacles attack as a free action against a moving nearby creature it is not engaged with; on a natural even hit, the target is grabbed and its movement stops.
ast.target: 每回合一次，食腐兽可以作为自由动作，对一个它未与之交战的移动中的附近生物发动一次攫抓触手攻击；若自然骰为偶数命中，则目标被抓住且其移动停止。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the escalation die is even, make another rip and peck attack.
ast.target: 如果升级骰为偶数，则再发动一次撕扯啄击攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: One special dybbuk ability triggers as a free action (see below).
ast.target: 一项特殊恶灵能力作为自由动作触发（见下文）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a standard action, the dybbuk can change its host’s form to that of another humanoid, or back to its own shape. Seeing through the shapechange requires a DC 25 skill check. When the dybbuk is driven out of the host body, the body reverts to its original form.
ast.target: 作为标准动作，恶灵可以将其宿主的形态变为另一个人形生物，或变回其自身形态。识破变形需要通过DC 25的技能检定。当恶灵被驱逐出宿主身体时，该身体会恢复原状。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A dybbuk can climb on ceilings and walls as easily as it moves on the ground.
ast.target: 恶灵可以像在地面上移动一样轻松地在天花板和墙壁上攀爬。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the target is engaged with the dybbuk at the start of its turn, it takes 20 damage.
ast.target: 当目标在回合开始时与恶灵交战，它受到20点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the dybbuk rolls a natural odd hit or miss with unearthly glare, one special dybbuk ability triggers.
ast.target: 当恶灵的超自然凝视攻击骰掷出自然骰奇数命中或未命中时，一项特殊恶灵能力触发。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dybbuk can hover 6 feet off the ground and make boneless flea-like leaps.
ast.target: 恶灵可以悬浮在离地6英尺的空中，并做出无骨跳蚤般的跳跃。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 5 lightning damage.
ast.target: 目标额外受到5点闪电伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 5 extra lightning damage.
ast.target: 目标受到5点额外闪电伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The beetles fly badly, usually just enough to get back to the worm when they’ve been shaken off from their hiding spots in its segments.
ast.target: 这些甲虫飞行能力很差，通常只是在从其藏身的蠕虫体节上被抖落后，勉强飞回蠕虫身边。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever one or more parasitic lightning beetles drop to 0 hp, roll a d6. If you roll less than or equal to the number of beetles that were destroyed by that attack, all beetles in the battle stop fighting, using all their actions during their next turn to disengage and fly away.
ast.target: 每当一只或多只寄生闪电甲虫生命值降至0时，掷一个d6。如果你掷出的点数小于或等于被该次攻击摧毁的甲虫数量，则战斗中所有甲虫停止战斗，在下回合使用所有动作脱离并飞走。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Petulant never-was can make a *disparaging rummage* attack as a free action
ast.target: 怨念的失意者可以作为自由动作发动一次*轻蔑翻找*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Petulant never-was takes 3d6 damage that ignores its ghostly resistance.
ast.target: 怨念的失意者受到3d6点伤害，此伤害无视其幽灵抗性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This creature has resist damage 16+ to all damage except holy damage AND force damage. A ghost can move through solid objects, but can’t end its turn inside them.
ast.target: 此生物对所有伤害（神圣伤害和力场伤害除外）具有16+伤害抗性。幽灵可以穿过固体物体，但不能在其内部结束回合。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each enemy that has one or more icon relationship points with the Magic Icon that misses an attack with a natural odd roll takes a -2 penalty to all its defenses until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 每个与魔法之眼拥有一个或多个图标关系点的敌人，若其攻击骰掷出自然骰奇数未命中，则直到战斗结束，其所有防御承受-2减值。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 当处于非物质状态时，幻影可以飞行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Those affected by the face of death must save to end their fear instead of it ending at the end of their next turn.
ast.target: 受死亡面容影响的生物必须通过豁免才能结束其恐惧状态，而非在其下回合结束时自动结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 6 ongoing negative energy damage, and the target becomes vulnerable to all attacks by undead creatures until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 6点持续负能量伤害，且直到战斗结束，目标对所有亡灵生物的攻击变得脆弱。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The phantomaton is armed with a farming implement, and once per battle can make an *iron hoe* attack as a quick action.
ast.target: 幻影人偶装备了一件农具，每场战斗一次，可以作为快速动作发动一次*铁锄*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This phantomaton has been built with sturdier materials than other phantomatons: it has +2 AC and 20 extra hp.
ast.target: 此幻影人偶由比其他人偶更坚固的材料制成：它拥有+2护甲等级和20点额外生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The phantomaton has a ranged weapon built directly into its body, and can make a *spike-thrower* attack.
ast.target: 幻影人偶体内内置了一件远程武器，可以发动一次*尖刺投射器*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The spider can make a rummage and filch attack against the target as a free action, even if the target isn’t staggered.
ast.target: 蜘蛛可以作为自由动作对目标发动一次翻找窃取攻击，即使目标未处于踉跄状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As long as it didn’t just return from being out of phase, at the start of the phase spider’s turn, roll a d6 to see which of its phase and teleport abilities it can access that turn. The spider doesn’t have to use the available ability and can attack normally, if it wishes.
ast.target: 只要相位蜘蛛上回合没有刚从相位外返回，在其回合开始时，掷一个d6，以确定该回合它可以使用哪些相位和传送能力。蜘蛛不必使用可用能力，如果愿意，可以正常攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Short teleport—As a move action, the spider can teleport anywhere it can see nearby.
ast.target: 短程传送——作为移动动作，蜘蛛可以传送到它视线内附近的任何位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Long teleport—As a move action, the spider can teleport anywhere it can see nearby or far away.
ast.target: 远程传送——作为移动动作，蜘蛛可以传送到它视线内附近或远处的任何位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Phase out—As a move action, the spider can remove itself from the battlefield, returning on its next initiative turn anywhere it chooses nearby. It doesn’t get to make a phase roll at the start of its next turn though.
ast.target: 相位脱离——作为移动动作，蜘蛛可以将自身移出战场，并在其下一个先攻回合时选择附近任意位置返回。不过，它无法在下回合开始时进行相位检定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Teleport away—If the spider has stolen at least one magic item, as a move action it can teleport back to its lair, or to its master if it has one. It leaves the battle. If it hasn’t stolen an item yet, it won’t leave and can use its choice of the other abilities this turn.
ast.target: 传送逃离——如果蜘蛛已窃取至少一件魔法物品，作为移动动作，它可以传送回自己的巢穴，或传送到其主人身边（如果它有主人）。它将离开战场。如果它尚未窃取任何物品，则不会离开，并可在本回合使用其他能力中的任意一项。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the spider is slain before it leaves battle, all items stolen from the party are recovered. If a  roll results in a 20, other magic items are found.
ast.target: 如果蜘蛛在离开战场前被击杀，所有从队伍中窃取的物品都将被找回。如果一次检定结果为20，则会发现其他魔法物品。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The pit fiend can make an entangling tail attack against a different target as a free action.
ast.target: 深渊魔将可以使用自由动作，对一个不同的目标发动缠尾攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The pit fiend can use fiendish vigor as a free action.
ast.target: 深渊魔将可以使用自由动作发动魔裔活力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When you choose to add the escalation die to an attack against a pit fiend, the escalation die does not increase at the start of the next round. Special circumstances and PC powers can still increase it.
ast.target: 当你选择将升级骰加入对深渊魔将的攻击时，升级骰在下一轮开始时不会增加。特殊情况和玩家角色能力仍可使其增加。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a standard action, the pit fiend can heal 300 hp and roll a save against each ongoing effect on it. It can use fiendish vigor up to five times per battle.
ast.target: 作为标准动作，深渊魔将可以恢复300点生命值，并对自身每个持续效果进行一次豁免检定。它每场战斗最多可使用五次魔裔活力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Amidst wind and flames, a pit fiend can fly with surprising agility.
ast.target: 在狂风与烈焰之中，深渊魔将能以惊人的敏捷飞行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a creature is engaged with the pit fiend at the start of its turn, that creature takes 20 fire damage.
ast.target: 当一个生物在深渊魔将回合开始时与其交战，该生物将受到20点火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The crit range for pit-spawn orcs is 17+. Whenever a pit-spawn orc scores a critical hit, each pit-spawn orc mook in the battle gains a +1 cumulative bonus to damage until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 深渊裔兽人的重击范围为17+。每当一个深渊裔兽人造成重击时，战场中每个深渊裔兽人喽啰都将获得+1的累积伤害加成，直至战斗结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy engaged with the orc hits it with an attack, the enemy takes 4 damage as the orc bites and claws it back.
ast.target: 当一个与兽人交战的敌人用攻击命中它时，该敌人将受到4点伤害，因为兽人会反咬并抓挠回去。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The pixie knight flies, but never too far from the ground.
ast.target: 仙精骑士会飞行，但从不远离地面。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The pixie knight can’t be intercepted and doesn’t provoke opportunity attacks by moving.
ast.target: 仙精骑士无法被拦截，且移动时不会引发借机攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add a new podling into the battle in a random location.
ast.target: 在随机位置向战场中添加一个新的豆荚精。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle when the pixie pod rolls a natural even hit with peripheral summoning, it adds a number of podlings into the battle equal to the escalation die instead of only one.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，当仙精豆荚通过外围召唤掷出自然偶数命中时，它会向战场中添加数量等于升级骰的豆荚精，而非仅一个。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Although its podlings occasionally pick up and move it around out of combat, in battle the pixie pod can’t move and is stuck except for its teleport ability.
ast.target: 尽管其豆荚精偶尔会在战斗外将其拾起并移动，但在战斗中，仙精豆荚无法移动，且除了其传送能力外无法行动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle as a move action, the pixie-pod can teleport to a nearby location. But its control sucks. The teleport goes in a random direction. Roll it using a d8 for direction.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，作为移动动作，仙精豆荚可以传送至附近位置。但其控制力很差。传送方向是随机的。使用d8骰子来确定方向。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The pixie pod is normally accompanied by five active podlings that don’t count toward the total when building a battle with the pod. Additional podlings do count, however.
ast.target: 仙精豆荚通常由五个活跃的豆荚精伴随，这些豆荚精在构建包含豆荚的战斗时不计入总数。然而，额外的豆荚精会计入。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The pixie warrior can make a madness attack against the target as a free action.
ast.target: 仙精战士可以使用自由动作对目标发动疯狂攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: During battle, pixies fill the air with the light and sound of countless flashy illusions. The effects are disorienting enough that the PCs don’t get to add the escalation die to their attacks.
ast.target: 战斗期间，仙精们用无数炫目幻术的光与声充斥空气。其效果令人迷失方向，以至于玩家角色无法将升级骰加入其攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Pixies make flying look like a lot of fun.
ast.target: 仙精让飞行看起来充满乐趣。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy attacks a pixie and misses, the pixie turns invisible until the start of its next turn (even if it makes opportunity attacks). A pixie can also turn invisible as a standard action, in which case the invisibility still lasts until the start of its next turn.
ast.target: 当敌人攻击仙精并失手时，仙精会变得隐形，直到其下一个回合开始（即使它发动借机攻击）。仙精也可以使用标准动作变得隐形，在这种情况下，隐形效果仍持续到其下一个回合开始。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target can’t choose to search for the pixie-pod plant until all podlings in the battle are slain.
ast.target: 在战斗中所有豆荚精被击杀之前，目标无法选择搜寻仙精豆荚植株。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The podling that can fly, hovering out of reach and firing arrows.
ast.target: 能飞行的豆荚精，悬浮在无法触及之处并射出箭矢。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the poison dandelion drops to 0 hit points, it’s destroyed until the start of its next turn. At the start of its next turn, it returns to life as a death blossom or lich flower that lacks the red-yellow resurrection ability but is otherwise undamaged and whole.
ast.target: 当毒蒲公英生命值降至0时，它将被摧毁，直到其下一个回合开始。在其下一个回合开始时，它会复活为死亡之花或巫妖花，缺乏红黄复活能力，但除此之外完好无损。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The prismatic ogre mage can use prismatic blast as a free action without provoking an opportunity attack.
ast.target: 棱镜食人魔巫师可以使用自由动作发动棱镜爆破，且不会引发借机攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This power only requires a quick action (once per round) instead of a standard action when the escalation die is odd.
ast.target: 当升级骰为奇数时，此能力仅需一个快速动作（每轮一次），而非标准动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 50 damage, and the target is confused (save ends).
ast.target: 50点伤害，且目标陷入困惑（通过豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target loses a recovery, and the prismatic ogre mage heals 70 hp.
ast.target: 目标失去一次恢复机会，棱镜食人魔巫师恢复70点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 目标被震慑（通过豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is dazed and confused (save ends both). When the target saves, it takes 40 psychic damage.
ast.target: 目标陷入目眩和困惑（通过两次豁免分别结束）。当目标通过豁免时，它受到40点心灵伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is transported into the future. Remove that creature from play, returning it to the battle in (or near) its previous location at the end of its next turn. No time seems to pass for the target while it’s gone.
ast.target: 目标被传送至未来。将该生物移出游戏，在其下一个回合结束时将其返回至战场中（或附近）其先前位置。对目标而言，在其消失期间似乎没有时间流逝。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If a nearby Protector Icon priest or Protector Icon demon drake takes miss damage, the Protector Icon cultist can take it instead.
ast.target: 如果附近的守护者神像祭司或守护者神像恶魔龙受到失手伤害，守护者神像信徒可以代替承受该伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Demons gain a +2 attack bonus and a +7 damage bonus against the target (hard save ends, 16+).
ast.target: 恶魔对目标获得+2攻击加值和+7伤害加值（通过困难豁免结束，16+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This creature takes no damage from enemies’ misses.
ast.target: 此生物不会受到敌人失手造成的伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: One ally engaged with the target can attempt to disengage as a free action.
ast.target: 一名与目标交战的盟友可以尝试使用自由动作脱离交战。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The larvae can make a tail stinger attack against a random enemy engaged with it as a free action.
ast.target: 幼虫可以使用自由动作，对与其交战的一个随机敌人发动尾刺攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Purple larvae can dig quickly in and out of the skin of the purple worm as if they were burrowing but without needing die rolls to succeed.
ast.target: 紫色幼虫可以快速地在紫色蠕虫的皮肤下钻进钻出，仿佛它们在挖掘，但无需掷骰成功。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The worm takes 10 damage (but it still deals miss damage on a 2-5)
ast.target: 蠕虫受到10点伤害（但它在掷出2-5时仍会造成失手伤害）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Any enemy of the salamander who is not taking ongoing fire damage, and who during any point on their turn is next to or engaged with a creature taking ongoing fire damage, must roll a save (11+) or take 50 ongoing fire damage.
ast.target: 任何未受到持续火焰伤害的火蜥蜴敌人，如果在其回合的任何时刻与一个受到持续火焰伤害的生物相邻或交战，必须进行一次豁免检定（11+），否则将受到50点持续火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enemies take a penalty to saves against ongoing fire damage equal to the escalation die.
ast.target: 敌人对抗持续火焰伤害的豁免检定受到等于升级骰的减值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Ranged weapon attacks with non-magical weapons or non-magical ammunition against the salamander fail—the missiles simply burn up mid-air.
ast.target: 使用非魔法武器或非魔法弹药对火蜥蜴进行的远程武器攻击会失败——投射物会在半空中燃烧殆尽。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The rakshasa can make a rend mind attack as a free action.
ast.target: 罗刹可以使用自由动作发动撕裂心智攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a standard action, the rakshasa can change its form to that of any humanoid, or back to its own shape. Seeing through the shapechange requires a DC 25 skill check.
ast.target: 作为标准动作，罗刹可以将自身形态变为任何类人生物，或变回自身形态。识破变形需要通过DC 25的技能检定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The rakshasa gains a bonus to all defenses equal to the current number of confused enemies in the battle.
ast.target: 罗刹获得等于当前战斗中困惑敌人数量的所有防御加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per day as a quick action, the rakshasa steals the escalation die; until the end of the battle, the rakshasa gains an attack bonus equal to the die’s value when it was stolen. Reset the escalation die to 0 for the players and increase it normally with each new round.
ast.target: 每日一次，作为快速动作，罗刹窃取升级骰；直到战斗结束，罗刹获得等同于窃取时骰子数值的攻击加值。将玩家的升级骰重置为0，并在每个新回合正常增加。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the target is no longer confused it takes 50 psychic damage.
ast.target: 当目标不再困惑时，它受到50点心灵伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die advances the rakshasa teleports as a free action to any spot it can see nearby or faraway. If the rakshasa is engaged with a PC, that character’s player can choose to prevent the teleportation at the cost of the escalation die not advancing.
ast.target: 当升级骰推进时，罗刹可以作为自由动作传送到它能看到的任何附近或远处地点。如果罗刹正与一名玩家角色交战，该角色的玩家可以选择阻止传送，代价是升级骰不推进。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per round as a free action when an enemy moves into engagement with the rakshasa it can roll a save (11+), on a success the rakshasa teleports into engagement with the enemy with the fewest hit points.
ast.target: 每回合一次，作为自由动作，当一名敌人移动进入与罗刹的交战状态时，它可以进行一次豁免检定（11+），成功后罗刹传送进入与生命值最低的敌人的交战状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a standard action, the rakshasa can change its form to that of any humanoid, or back to its own shape. Seeing through the shapechange requires a DC 20 skill check.
ast.target: 作为标准动作，罗刹可以将自身形态变为任何类人生物，或变回原形。识破变形需要通过DC 20的技能检定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The rakshasa isn’t alone—it bought a team of hirelings and hangers-on into the dungeon with it, though they are currently elsewhere. When the escalation die reaches 3+ these allies rush into the fight and act at the start of the round.
ast.target: 罗刹并非孤身一人——它带了一队雇佣兵和随从进入地牢，尽管他们目前在别处。当升级骰达到3+时，这些盟友冲入战斗，并在回合开始时行动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The rakshasa can make a *rend mind* attack as a free action.
ast.target: 罗刹可以作为自由动作进行一次*撕裂心智*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a standard action, the rakshasa can change its form to that of any humanoid, or back to its own shape. Seeing through the shapechange requires a DC 25 skill check.
ast.target: 作为标准动作，罗刹可以将自身形态变为任何类人生物，或变回原形。识破变形需要通过DC 25的技能检定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The rakshasa gains a bonus to all defenses equal to the current number of confused enemies in the battle.
ast.target: 罗刹获得等同于当前战斗中困惑敌人数量的所有防御加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per day as a quick action, the rakshasa steals the escalation die; until the end of the battle, the rakshasa gains an attack bonus equal to the die’s value when it was stolen. Reset the escalation die to 0 for the players and increase it normally with each new round.
ast.target: 每日一次，作为快速动作，罗刹窃取升级骰；直到战斗结束，罗刹获得等同于窃取时骰子数值的攻击加值。将玩家的升级骰重置为0，并在每个新回合正常增加。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target’s saves against ongoing damage become hard (16+) until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 目标对抗持续伤害的豁免检定变为困难（16+），直到战斗结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enemies who are no longer stuck take 40 ongoing force damage.
ast.target: 不再被困住的敌人受到40点持续力场伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The rakshasa saint can use a quick action to command 1d3 confused enemies to move as a free action, or take another non-attack action (drop a weapon, destroy a potion, unlock a door) as a free action.
ast.target: 罗刹圣者可以使用快速动作命令1d3名困惑的敌人作为自由动作移动，或进行另一个非攻击动作（丢弃武器、摧毁药水、开锁）作为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Target is confused until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 目标困惑直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The psychic seduction attack is not expended can be used again this battle.
ast.target: 心灵诱惑攻击未被消耗，可在本次战斗中再次使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The rakshasa has a stash of illicit substances—once per battle as a quick action, it can either deal 20 ongoing poison damage to one enemy that it has just left engagement with OR become dazed but heal 30 hit points at the end of each of its turns (save ends).
ast.target: 罗刹藏有违禁品——每场战斗一次，作为快速动作，它可以对一名刚刚脱离交战状态的敌人造成20点持续毒素伤害，或者变得眩晕但在其每个回合结束时恢复30点生命值（通过豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle as a quick action the rakshasa changes forms to something that causes consternation and misunderstanding among its enemies—causing each enemy to become dazed until the enemy with the lowest MD saves.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，作为快速动作，罗刹变形为某种引起敌人困惑和误解的形态——使每名敌人眩晕，直到最低精神防御的敌人通过豁免。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The devourer of wizards adds the escalation die to its attacks and damage when it targets a creature that has one or more icon relationship points with the Magic Icon.
ast.target: 当吞噬法师攻击一个或多个与魔法图标有关系点的生物时，它将升级骰加入其攻击和伤害检定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 5 ongoing damage.
ast.target: 目标还受到5点持续伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Rat swarms gain a +5 bonus to disengage checks and take only half damage from opportunity attacks.
ast.target: 鼠群获得+5脱离交战检定加值，并且只受到借机攻击的一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy engaged with the rat swarm heals using a recovery, they must reroll the highest die and take the second roll.
ast.target: 当一名与鼠群交战的敌人使用恢复治疗时，它必须重掷最高的骰子并采用第二次的结果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enemies engaged with the rat swarm take a –2 penalty to attack any other enemy than the rat swarm.
ast.target: 与鼠群交战的敌人攻击鼠群以外的任何其他敌人时，受到-2减值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While at least one creature in the battle is staggered or unconscious, the bulette gains a bonus to its attacks and damage equal to the escalation die. Creatures that have no blood (constructs, oozes, plant creatures, etc.) don’t trigger this ability.
ast.target: 当战斗中至少有一名生物被重创或失去意识时，掘地虫获得等同于升级骰的攻击和伤害加值。没有血液的生物（构装体、软泥怪、植物生物等）不会触发此能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever the bumoorah takes damage from an attack, it rolls a save; on a 16+ it can immediately dive beneath the ground, preventing further attacks against it until it surfaces at the start of its next turn. Force attacks and opportunity attacks don’t trigger this ability.
ast.target: 每当布姆拉受到攻击伤害时，它进行一次豁免检定；在16+时，它可以立即潜入地下，防止进一步的攻击，直到其下一回合开始时浮出地面。力场攻击和借机攻击不会触发此能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The bumoorah can burrow incredibly quickly for short distances. Bumoorahs are renowned for the dust-spurts and vibrating sound they generate as they shoot through the ground like hungry spears.
ast.target: 布姆拉可以极快地挖掘短距离。布姆拉以其穿越地面时产生的尘土喷涌和振动声而闻名，如同饥饿的长矛般疾驰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add another ravenous cannibal mook to the mob (it must have been hiding somewhere nearby, or wasn’t really dead when it dropped earlier in the battle).
ast.target: 向暴徒中添加另一名贪婪的食人族小兵（它一定藏在附近某处，或者在战斗早期倒下时并未真正死亡）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Increase the damage by +1 for each razor shark mook that has dropped this battle.
ast.target: 每有一名剃刀鲨小兵在本次战斗中被击倒，伤害增加+1。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target and the razor shark each take 1d6 damage.
ast.target: 目标和剃刀鲨各受到1d6伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When two or more razor sharks in the same mob are dropped to 0 hp by an attack, as a free action each dropped razor shark attacks one random nearby non-razor shark creature before it dies. That creature takes 1d8 damage.
ast.target: 当同一暴徒中的两名或更多剃刀鲨被一次攻击降至0生命值时，作为自由动作，每名被击倒的剃刀鲨在死亡前攻击一名随机的附近非剃刀鲨生物。该生物受到1d8伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sharks breathe underwater and swim very well. They’re not so good out of sea water (even if they jump), so treat them as semi-hazardous terrain while they’re busy thrashing to death outside the water.
ast.target: 鲨鱼在水下呼吸并游得很好。它们在海水外表现不佳（即使它们跳跃），因此当它们在水外挣扎死亡时，将其视为半危险地形。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This really angry kobold transforms into an undamaged red haze berserker after the attack.
ast.target: 这只非常愤怒的地精在攻击后变形为一个未受损的红色狂暴者。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When building battles using this monster, it only counts as half a normal monster.
ast.target: 在使用此怪物构建战斗时，它只算作半个普通怪物。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Until the end of its next turn, the target is affected by the reaver’s *fear aura* even if it has more than 36 hp.
ast.target: 直到其下一回合结束，目标受到掠夺者的*恐惧光环*影响，即使其生命值超过36点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While engaged with this creature, enemies with 36 hp or fewer are dazed and do not add the escalation die to their attacks.
ast.target: 当与此生物交战时，生命值36点或更少的敌人被眩晕，并且不将升级骰加入其攻击检定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Deal 2d6 bonus damage to the target

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the redcap scores a critical hit OR when a PC or a player at the table says the bad word, the redcap can teleport to a nearby hidden location it can see as a free action.
