ast.target: 当红帽地精造成重击，或者当一名玩家角色或桌边的玩家说出那个坏词时，红帽地精可以作为自由动作传送到它能看到的附近隐蔽地点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the redcap starts its turn and no enemy can see it, it can make a pop-out and ride ‘em attack that turn as a standard action
ast.target: 当红帽地精开始其回合且没有敌人能看到它时，它可以在该回合作为标准动作进行一次突袭攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The fiery vanquisher can make a *burning breath* attack against the target as a free action.
ast.target: 火焰征服者可以作为自由动作对目标进行一次*燃烧吐息*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die is odd, the fiery vanquisher can roll two d20s for its heavy axe attack and use the best result.
ast.target: 当升级骰为奇数时，火焰征服者可以为其重斧攻击掷两个d20并采用最佳结果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a fire attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 14+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次火焰攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然14+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the flamewing is forced to land, it rolls 3d20 for its next attack roll and takes the best result.
ast.target: 当火翼被迫降落时，它为其下一次攻击检定掷3个d20并采用最佳结果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The flamewing can fly, and fly fast—soaring on wings of flame. However, its turning circle isn’t great and it can’t hover, so in tight quarters it needs to land. Also, its wings are made of fire, and overusing its fireball breath can cause the wings to gutter and fade.
ast.target: 火翼能够飞行，而且飞得很快——在火焰之翼上翱翔。然而，它的转弯半径不大，无法悬停，因此在狭窄空间中需要降落。此外，它的翅膀由火焰构成，过度使用火球吐息可能导致翅膀熄灭和消退。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The first time each battle the flamewing is hit by a fire attack, instead of taking the fire damage it heals that many hit points.
ast.target: 每场战斗中，火翼第一次被火焰攻击命中时，它不承受火焰伤害，而是恢复等量的生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragonic deals 2d12 extra damage to a target it misses with a melee attack.
ast.target: 龙裔对一名其近战攻击未命中的目标造成2d12额外伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As the standard monster ability, except the remorhaz only needs to roll 6+ in snow and ice.
ast.target: 作为标准怪物能力，但霜虫在雪地和冰面上只需掷出6+即可。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a creature is engaged with the remorhaz (or grabbed by it) at the start of its turn, it takes fire damage equal to 10 x the escalation die.
ast.target: 当一名生物在霜虫开始其回合时与霜虫交战（或被其抓住），它受到等同于10乘以升级骰的火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The queen may be sluggish after eating unsuccessful suitors, laying eggs, or moving across the ice like a rushing avalanche. Roll 2d10 to determine her current initiative.
ast.target: 女王可能在吞噬失败的追求者、产卵或像雪崩一样在冰面上移动后行动迟缓。掷2d10来确定她当前的先攻值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The remorhaz is melting the ice/snow all the time and obscuring steam rises into the air. Ranged attacks against the remorhaz take a –2 penalty, or a –4 penalty if the attacker is far away.
ast.target: 霜虫一直在融化冰雪，遮蔽性的蒸汽升入空中。对霜虫的远程攻击受到-2减值，如果攻击者距离很远，则受到-4减值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The remorhaz is covered in red-hot spines. When a nearby enemy rolls a natural 1–5 with an attack roll, it takes 30 fire damage unless it has somehow protected itself from the heat.
ast.target: 霜虫身上覆盖着炽热的尖刺。当附近的敌人进行攻击骰时，若掷出自然1–5，则会受到30点火焰伤害，除非它以某种方式保护自己免受高温影响。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 1/battle, as an interrupt action when an enemy makes a melee attack against the phoenix.
ast.target: 每场战斗1次，当敌人对凤凰进行近战攻击时，可作为打断动作使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The resurgent phoenix can fly as well or better than anything you’ve seen airborne.
ast.target: 重生凤凰的飞行能力与你见过的任何空中生物一样出色，甚至更胜一筹。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The resurgent phoenix deals 7 fire damage to each enemy that ends it turn engaged with the phoenix.
ast.target: 重生凤凰对每个在回合结束时与其交战的敌人造成7点火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the phoenix is dealt a critical hit, it must roll an easy save (6+). If the save fails, the phoenix drops to 0 hit points; see the reborn in fire ability below!
ast.target: 当凤凰受到重击时，它必须进行一次简易豁免（6+）。若豁免失败，凤凰的生命值降至0；请参见下方的浴火重生能力！

ast.name: description
ast.source: When you choose to add the escalation die to an attack against a river devil minion, you must only attack river devil minions until the end of the battle or until all river devil minion mobs have dropped to 0 hp.
ast.target: 当你选择将升级骰加入对河魔仆从的攻击时，你必须只攻击河魔仆从，直到战斗结束或所有河魔仆从群体的生命值降至0。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 10 ongoing damage.
ast.target: 目标同时受到10点持续伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The attack targets another nearby enemy unless it’s already targeted three enemies this way.
ast.target: 攻击会转向另一个附近的敌人，除非它已经以此方式攻击了三个敌人。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A naiad can walk on the surface of water, making it seem shallow, and it can swim through the water and breathe underwater with ease. Its enemies might have a more difficult time engaging it.
ast.target: 水泽仙女可以在水面上行走，使水面看起来很浅，并且它能轻松地在水中游泳和水下呼吸。它的敌人可能更难与它交战。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each time a target confused by watery words fails its save, it will forget something important. GM’s choice or player’s suggestion!
ast.target: 每次被水语术迷惑的目标豁免失败时，它会忘记一些重要的事情。由游戏主持人选择或玩家建议！

ast.name: description
ast.source: While engaged with the river-spirit, enemies with 36 hp or fewer are dazed (–4 to attack) and do not add the escalation die to their attacks.
ast.target: 当与河灵交战时，生命值36点或更少的敌人会陷入恍惚（攻击骰-4），并且不能将升级骰加入其攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the river-spirit scores a critical hit with otherworldly aria, it also stunned the target (save ends).
ast.target: 当河灵使用异界咏叹造成重击时，它还会使目标陷入震慑（通过豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Targets hit by the river-spirit’s enchanting touch attack must start rolling last gasp saves instead of being confused. On the fourth failure, they fall into a long sleep that mortals call a coma.
ast.target: 被河灵的迷人之触攻击命中的目标必须开始进行临终喘息豁免，而不是陷入迷惑。第四次失败后，它们会陷入凡人称为昏迷的长眠。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The river-spirit’s otherworldly aria attack becomes haunting wail, deals negative energy damage, and on a natural 18+, the target is weakened (save ends).
ast.target: 河灵的异界咏叹攻击变为萦绕哀嚎，造成负能量伤害，并且在自然骰18+时，目标会陷入虚弱（通过豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No choice, the target suffers both effects.
ast.target: 别无选择，目标同时承受两种效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The glittering bearer normally hovers a foot or two off the ground, though it can achieve impressive elevation and mobility if need be.
ast.target: 闪光携带者通常悬浮在离地一两英尺的地方，不过如果需要，它也能达到令人印象深刻的飞行高度和机动性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is now considered to be wearing no armor (the armor is damaged beyond repair; adjust defenses accordingly). If the target’s armor is magical, the target must roll a hard save (16+). On a success, the armor isn’t affected. This effect is permanent until the creature obtains new armor.
ast.target: 目标现在被视为未穿戴护甲（护甲已损坏无法修复；相应调整防御）。如果目标的护甲是魔法的，目标必须进行一次困难豁免（16+）。成功则护甲不受影响。此效果永久持续，直到生物获得新护甲。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever a creature hits the rust monster with a melee weapon, the attacker must roll a save; on a failure, the weapon is destroyed. Magic weapons require an easy save (6+) instead. This effect is permanent.
ast.target: 每当生物用近战武器击中锈蚀怪时，攻击者必须进行一次豁免；失败则武器被摧毁。魔法武器改为需要简易豁免（6+）。此效果永久持续。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Magic items wielded by creatures with 100 hp or more are not affected by the rust monster’s ability to destroy items (but the target still takes damage).
ast.target: 生命值100点或以上的生物所持有的魔法物品不受锈蚀怪摧毁物品能力的影响（但目标仍会受到伤害）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy targets the rust monster obliterator with a spell, the rust monster rolls a save. On a success, the spell has no effect on the rust monster. If the rust monster is staggered, it must roll a hard save (16+) instead.
ast.target: 当敌人以法术瞄准锈蚀怪毁灭者时，锈蚀怪进行一次豁免。成功则该法术对锈蚀怪无效。如果锈蚀怪已陷入踉跄，则改为进行困难豁免（16+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever a creature hits the rust monster with a melee weapon, the attacker must roll a save; on a failure, the weapon is destroyed. Magic weapons require an easy save (6+) instead. This effect is permanent.
ast.target: 每当生物用近战武器击中锈蚀怪时，攻击者必须进行一次豁免；失败则武器被摧毁。魔法武器改为需要简易豁免（6+）。此效果永久持续。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Magic items wielded by creatures with 60 hp or more are not affected by the rust monster’s ability to destroy items (but the target still takes damage).
ast.target: 生命值60点或以上的生物所持有的魔法物品不受锈蚀怪摧毁物品能力的影响（但目标仍会受到伤害）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the rust monster scores a critical hit, it can try to destroy another random magic item in the target’s possession (or a random normal item if the target has no other magic items). The creature must roll a save for the item, as usual.
ast.target: 当锈蚀怪造成重击时，它可以尝试摧毁目标携带的另一件随机魔法物品（如果目标没有其他魔法物品，则摧毁一件随机普通物品）。生物必须照常为该物品进行一次豁免。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 目标陷入受阻（通过豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each enemy that misses an attack with a natural odd roll this battle takes a -2 penalty to all its defenses until they score a critical hit or the sadsack is reduced to 0 hit points. (As usual, this ability does not stack.)
ast.target: 在本场战斗中，每次敌人攻击未命中且自然骰为奇数时，其所有防御受到-2惩罚，直到它造成重击或悲伤袋生命值降至0。（通常，此能力不叠加。）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sadsacks are also vulnerable to the type of weapon or attack that ended their lives. Interpret this liberally, GM.
ast.target: 悲伤袋也对结束其生命的武器或攻击类型脆弱。游戏主持人，请对此进行宽泛解释。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gravity does not influence sadsacks unless they are staggered. When they’re staggered, they sink to the ground and stay there.
ast.target: 重力不会影响悲伤袋，除非它们陷入踉跄。当它们踉跄时，会沉到地面并停留在那里。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The priest teleports the target next to one of its nearby allies that it can see, who engages it as a free action. It can’t teleport the target to a location that causes it direct damage (so into a pool of flaming oil is out, but off a ship into the sea is fine).
ast.target: 牧师将目标传送到其可见的一个附近盟友旁边，该盟友以自由动作与目标交战。它不能将目标传送到会对其造成直接伤害的位置（所以传送到燃烧的油池中不行，但从船上传送到海里可以）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: One random nearby conscious enemy takes 4d6 negative energy damage.
ast.target: 一个随机的附近清醒敌人受到4d6负能量伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each target that was hit takes a -2 penalty (non-cumulative) to all saves until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 每个被命中的目标在战斗结束前，所有豁免受到-2惩罚（不叠加）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Until the start of the glowpriest’s next turn, each sahuagin and demon in the battle adds the escalation die to its attacks and the PCs don’t.
ast.target: 直到辉光牧师的下一回合开始，战斗中的每个沙华鱼人和恶魔将其升级骰加入攻击，而玩家角色则不能。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Remove the glowpriest from play. At the start of its next turn, return it to play nearby its original location. It gains a +4 bonus to all defenses until the end of its next turn after it returns to play.
ast.target: 将辉光牧师从游戏中移除。在其下一回合开始时，将其返回到原始位置附近。它获得+4加值到所有防御，直到其返回游戏后的下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sahuagin breathe underwater and swim very well.
ast.target: 沙华鱼人可以在水下呼吸并且游泳能力很强。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The sahuagin mutant adds the escalation die to its attacks until the die is 5+.
ast.target: 沙华鱼人变种人将其升级骰加入攻击，直到升级骰为5+。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy intercepts the sahuagin mutant, it takes 4d8 damage from the mutant’s claws and teeth.
ast.target: 当敌人拦截沙华鱼人变种人时，它会受到变种人利爪和牙齿造成的4d8伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy makes a melee attack against the sahuagin mutant and rolls a natural odd miss, that enemy takes 2d8 damage.
ast.target: 当敌人对沙华鱼人变种人进行近战攻击且自然骰为奇数未命中时，该敌人受到2d8伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The sahuagin raider gains a +2 attack bonus while it’s staggered.
ast.target: 沙华鱼人掠夺者在踉跄时获得+2攻击加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Increase the escalation die by 1, and the target is hampered (makes only basic attacks) until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 将升级骰增加1，并且目标陷入受阻（只能进行基础攻击）直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Make a note of the escalation die when the sahuagin becomes staggered. The sahuagin gains a bonus to its melee attacks and damage equal to the escalation die value for the rest of the battle.
ast.target: 当沙华鱼人陷入踉跄时，记下升级骰的值。在战斗剩余时间内，沙华鱼人的近战攻击和伤害获得等于升级骰值的加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Roll a d6 on the demon abilities table. The sahuagin gains that ability.
ast.target: 在恶魔能力表上掷一个d6。沙华鱼人获得该能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The screaming hoardling drops its weapon and makes a *howl of emptiness* attack as a free action.
ast.target: 尖叫囤积者丢下武器，并以自由动作进行一次*虚空嚎叫*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The screaming hoardling drops its weapon and makes a *howl of emptiness* attack
ast.target: 尖叫囤积者丢下武器并进行一次*虚空嚎叫*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The screaming hoardling is dazed and vulnerable until the start of its next turn as it scrambles for its ‘lost treasure’, the weapon it just dropped.
ast.target: 尖叫囤积者陷入恍惚和脆弱，直到其下一回合开始，因为它正在寻找它刚刚丢下的“失落宝藏”——武器。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the screaming hoardling survives a critical hit to AC it makes a howl of emptiness attack as a free action, as a piece of its scavenged armor falls away. Knock a point off its AC.
ast.target: 当尖叫囤积者在护甲上受到重击并幸存时，它以自由动作进行一次虚空嚎叫攻击，同时一块拾荒的护甲掉落。将其护甲值降低1点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: For every four star-masks in the battle (round up), one of them can use suffocating thoughts once during the battle.
ast.target: 战斗中每有四个星面者（向上取整），其中一个可以在战斗中使用一次窒息思维。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die is odd, the star-mask can move and engage a nearby enemy as a quick action.
ast.target: 当升级骰为奇数时，星面者可以移动并以快速动作与一个附近的敌人交战。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die is odd.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The nereid can walk atop the waves and move (and breathe) underwater without restraint. Its enemies might have a more difficult time engaging it.
ast.target: 海仙女可以在波浪上行走，并且在水下移动（和呼吸）不受限制。它的敌人可能更难与它交战。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While staggered, if the iron sea shark is unengaged at the start of its turn, it must roll an easy save (6+). On a failure, the shark must move and attack a random nearby enemy that’s staggered, or a random nearby if there are no staggered enemies.
ast.target: 当铁海鲨陷入踉跄时，如果在其回合开始时未与任何敌人交战，它必须进行一次简易豁免（6+）。失败则鲨鱼必须移动并攻击一个随机的附近已踉跄的敌人，如果没有已踉跄的敌人，则攻击一个随机的附近敌人。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy misses with a melee attack against an iron sea shark and rolls a natural 1-5, the attacker takes 2d6 damage.
ast.target: 当敌人对铁海鲨进行近战攻击未命中，且骰出自然骰1-5时，攻击者将受到2d6点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The seven-headed hydra has all the same abilities as the five-headed hydra, except that the heads that get sprouted are the 8th and 9th and those heads/attacks come with 50 new hit points apiece.
ast.target: 七头蛇拥有与五头蛇相同的所有能力，但其新生的头颅是第8和第9个，这些头颅/攻击各自附带50点新生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an opportunity attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当借机攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上骰出自然骰16+，否则该攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the hydra gets a natural even attack roll with a gnashing teeth attack, its next attack that turn (if it has one) is a flame breath attack instead. Note that flame breath attacks don’t lead to other flaming breaths; the hydra has to return to making a gnashing teeth attack first.
ast.target: 当九头蛇在一次撕咬攻击中骰出自然偶数攻击骰时，其本回合的下一次攻击（如果有的话）将变为火焰吐息攻击。请注意，火焰吐息攻击不会引发其他火焰吐息；九头蛇必须先进行一次撕咬攻击才能再次使用火焰吐息。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is confused (hard save ends, 16+).
ast.target: 目标陷入困惑状态（硬豁免结束，16+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While a living shadow, the target can’t physically interact with or gain aid from companions or aid them (including healing, bonuses, and effects) but is otherwise “normal.”
ast.target: 当目标处于活影状态时，无法与同伴进行物理互动或获得其援助（包括治疗、加值和效果），也无法援助同伴，但在其他方面“正常”。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When in poorly lit areas of shadow, the dragon adds the escalation die to its attack rolls. Complete darkness or bright daylight negates the ability.
ast.target: 在光线昏暗的阴影区域时，龙将其攻击骰加上升级骰。完全黑暗或明亮的日光会消除此能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die is even, natural odd attack rolls against the dragon automatically miss. When the escalation die is odd, natural even attack rolls against the dragon automatically miss. Attacks that deal holy damage ignore this ability.
ast.target: 当升级骰为偶数时，针对该龙的自然奇数攻击骰自动未命中。当升级骰为奇数时，针对该龙的自然偶数攻击骰自动未命中。造成神圣伤害的攻击无视此能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: After the current battle is over, the next time this day that the target takes ongoing damage, the shadow mongoose gets to make a *destruction of fate* attack against the target.
ast.target: 当前战斗结束后，本日内目标下一次受到持续伤害时，影猫鼬可对目标进行一次*命运毁灭*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: …and the shadow mongoose steals an item belonging to the target, preferably a magic one but sometimes the most vital one (a key, a map).
ast.target: …影猫鼬会偷走目标的一件物品，最好是魔法物品，但有时是最关键的物品（如钥匙、地图）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The shadow mongoose can move over any solid surface, slithering like a shadow.
ast.target: 影猫鼬可以在任何固体表面上移动，像影子一样滑行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The shadow mongoose can change shape, though not mid-battle. Shadow mongoose destroyers of fate use this ability to seem innocuous until they are ready to strike.
ast.target: 影猫鼬可以改变形态，但不能在战斗中进行。影猫鼬命运毁灭者会利用此能力显得无害，直到准备好发动攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the shadow mongoose dies all the icon relationship dice that it stole return to their owners. The person who killed the shadow mongoose gains a magic item that the shadow mongoose had stolen (though maybe not one that it had stolen from the party).
ast.target: 当影猫鼬死亡时，它偷走的所有徽记关系骰都会归还给其所有者。杀死影猫鼬的人将获得一件影猫鼬偷来的魔法物品（但可能不是从队伍中偷来的）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The shadow mongoose flees the battle. One nearby enemy of the shadow mongoose has their icon relationships flip positive to negative and vise-versa (conflicted relationships are unaffected). This relationship inversion is temporary, lasting only until the end of the next game session.
ast.target: 影猫鼬逃离战斗。影猫鼬附近的一名敌人，其徽记关系将从正面翻转为负面，或从负面翻转为正面（冲突关系不受影响）。这种关系反转是暂时的，仅持续到下一次游戏会话结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the shadow mongoose doesn’t attack on its turn it can turn into a flat shadow, and cannot be intercepted or attacked it is moving in this form. When it returns to its normal form, it deals double damage with its next attack, hit or miss.
ast.target: 如果影猫鼬在其回合不进行攻击，它可以变成扁平的影子，在此形态下移动时无法被拦截或攻击。当它恢复到正常形态时，其下一次攻击（无论命中与否）将造成双倍伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: d12 damage to a nearby target not engaged with the shadow mongoose.
ast.target: 对附近未与影猫鼬交战的目标造成d12点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: …and the shadow mongoose steals an aspect belonging to the target. The target might lose their age, or lose part of their appearance, or an outward personality quirk. The character’s race, class, attributes etc. remain intact, as does their core personality and their memories.
ast.target: …影猫鼬会偷走目标的一个特质。目标可能会失去年龄、部分外貌或一个外在的性格怪癖。角色的种族、职业、属性等保持不变，其核心性格和记忆也保持不变。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The shadow mongoose may become a thing of dark smoke and shadow, flying swiftly through the air or through the smallest cracks.
ast.target: 影猫鼬可以变成一团黑暗的烟雾和影子，在空中或通过最小的缝隙快速飞行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The shadow mongoose can change shape, though not mid-battle. Shadow mongoose subverters sometimes take on non-shadowy visages so that they can set up shop as traders, offering to take aspects that others do not want, or selling stolen or traded aspects to those that do desire them.
ast.target: 影猫鼬可以改变形态，但不能在战斗中进行。影猫鼬颠覆者有时会采用非影子的外表，以便以商人的身份开店，主动接收他人不想要的特质，或将偷来或交易来的特质卖给那些确实想要的人。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the shadow mongoose dies all the aspects that it stole return to their owners. Stolen aspects that have been traded away also return, but slowly. The person who killed the shadow mongoose gains a random aspect chosen by the GM.
ast.target: 当影猫鼬死亡时，它偷走的所有特质都会归还给其所有者。已被交易走的被盗特质也会归还，但速度较慢。杀死影猫鼬的人将获得一个由GM随机选择的特质。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The shadow mongoose flees the battle. One nearby enemy of the shadow mongoose gains an unwanted aspect. This new unwanted aspect is temporary, lasting only until the end of the next game session.
ast.target: 影猫鼬逃离战斗。影猫鼬附近的一名敌人获得一个不想要的特质。这个新的不想要的特质是暂时的，仅持续到下一次游戏会话结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Make a second *tenebrous claws* attack as a free action.
ast.target: 以自由动作进行第二次*幽暗之爪*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: …and the relationship that the adventurer has with that icon flips from positive to negative or negative to positive. Conflicted relationships are unaffected.
ast.target: …冒险者与该徽记的关系将从正面翻转为负面，或从负面翻转为正面。冲突关系不受影响。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a move action the shadow mongoose may teleport into engagement with a target that it missed the previous round.
ast.target: 作为移动动作，影猫鼬可以传送至与上一轮未命中的目标交战。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The shadow mongoose can change shape, though not mid-battle. Shadow mongooses sometimes join adventuring parties as helpful hirelings, love interests, or local guides to repeatedly steal icon relationships from adventurers.
ast.target: 影猫鼬可以改变形态，但不能在战斗中进行。影猫鼬有时会以有用的雇佣兵、恋爱对象或当地向导的身份加入冒险队伍，以便反复从冒险者身上偷取徽记关系。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The shadow mongoose flees the battle. One nearby enemy of the shadow mongoose gains an unwanted icon relationship worth 1d3 icon dice. This new relationship is temporary, lasting only until the end of the next game session.
ast.target: 影猫鼬逃离战斗。影猫鼬附近的一名敌人获得一个不想要的徽记关系，价值1d3个徽记骰。这个新关系是暂时的，仅持续到下一次游戏会话结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 20 negative energy damage, and the shadow thief can make a shadow possession attack as a free action (but see group ability).
ast.target: 目标受到20点负能量伤害，且影贼可以自由动作进行一次影子附身攻击（但参见群体能力）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: For every four shadow thieves in the battle (round up), one of them can use shadow possession during the battle.
ast.target: 战斗中每有四名影贼（向上取整），其中一名可以在战斗中使用影子附身。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hound leaves teeth in the wound; the target takes 5 ongoing damage, and the hound takes 1d6 damage.
ast.target: 猎犬将牙齿留在伤口中；目标受到5点持续伤害，且猎犬受到1d6点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enemies with a lower initiative than the hound take a –5 penalty to disengage checks against it.
ast.target: 先攻值低于猎犬的敌人，在对抗其脱离交战检定时承受-5减值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per round, an engaged skeletal hound can attempt to pop free and intercept an enemy moving past it. Roll a normal save; on 11+, it succeeds.
ast.target: 每轮一次，已交战的骷髅猎犬可以尝试脱离交战并拦截一名从其身边经过的敌人。进行一次普通豁免；11+即成功。

ast.name: description
ast.source: At the start of its turn, a skin devil heals 8 hp. If it doesn’t heal up to its maximum hit points, it loses its ability to heal from this ability until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 在其回合开始时，皮魔恢复8点生命值。如果未恢复至其最大生命值，则在战斗结束前失去此能力的治疗效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While the skin devil is staggered, when an enemy damages it, it loses an additional 4 hp as the hapless thing fails to hold its boneless, bulky mass together.
ast.target: 当皮魔处于蹒跚状态时，若敌人对其造成伤害，它将额外失去4点生命值，因为这个不幸的生物无法维持其无骨、笨重的躯体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The skull crab has burrowed its tentacles into the target’s flesh; the target takes a –1 penalty to all d20 rolls (save ends). Until the target saves, whenever it moves the skull crab comes with it, and the crab will continue to bite the target.
ast.target: 颅蟹已将其触手钻入目标的肉体；目标的所有d20骰承受-1减值（豁免结束）。在目标豁免成功前，每当其移动时，颅蟹都会随之移动，并继续啃咬目标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The penalty to all d20 rolls increases by –1 (first failed save = –2 penalty, etc.)
ast.target: 所有d20骰的减值增加-1（第一次豁免失败=-2减值，以此类推）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If a creature fails three consecutive saves against the scrabbling tentacles effect, attacks against the skull crab deal half damage to it and half to that creature as the crab burrows deep. The effect lasts until the creature saves.
ast.target: 如果一个生物对爬行触手效果连续三次豁免失败，则对颅蟹的攻击将对其造成一半伤害，另一半伤害由该生物承受，因为螃蟹钻得更深了。该效果持续到该生物豁免成功为止。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle as a move action, the skull crab can engage a nearby or far away enemy.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，作为移动动作，颅蟹可以与附近或远处的敌人交战。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy making saves against the scrambling tentacles effect drops to 0 hp or below, the skull crab eggs rush out of its skull and the crab dies. That enemy must start making last gasp saves in addition to any death saves, with it turning into a xombie on the fourth failure.
ast.target: 当一名正在对爬行触手效果进行豁免的敌人生命值降至0或以下时，颅蟹的卵会从其头骨中涌出，螃蟹死亡。该敌人必须在任何死亡豁免之外，开始进行最后喘息豁免，第四次失败时将变成僵尸。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is stuck (save ends) from looking into the void within it.
ast.target: 目标因凝视其内部的虚空而陷入束缚状态（豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While engaged with this creature, enemies that have 60 hp or fewer are dazed (-4 attack) and do not add the escalation die to their attacks.
ast.target: 当与此生物交战时，生命值60或以下的敌人会陷入眩晕状态（攻击-4），并且不将升级骰加入其攻击骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a nearby non-mook undead ally drops to 0 hit points, the slaughter pit shade immediately removes one ongoing condition.
ast.target: 当附近一名非喽啰亡灵盟友生命值降至0时，屠杀坑幽影会立即移除一个持续状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 3 extra acid damage and is stuck (hard save ends, 16+).
ast.target: 目标受到3点额外酸液伤害，并陷入束缚状态（硬豁免结束，16+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a creature is engaged with the slime-skull or stuck from its grasping slime tendrils attack at the start of its turn, it takes 3 acid damage.
ast.target: 当一个生物在回合开始时与黏液骷髅交战，或因其抓握黏液触手攻击而陷入束缚状态时，它将受到3点酸液伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy engaged with the slime-skull hits it with a melee attack, the slime-skull fires a blast of acidic slime back at that creature, which takes 1d4 acid damage.
ast.target: 当一名与黏液骷髅交战的敌人用近战攻击命中它时，黏液骷髅会向该生物喷射一股酸性黏液，使其受到1d4点酸液伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This creature is slow. It only moves when the escalation die is odd or 6+.
ast.target: 此生物行动缓慢。仅当升级骰为奇数或6+时才会移动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A slime-skull can climb on ceilings and walls as easily as it moves on the ground.
ast.target: 黏液骷髅可以像在地面上移动一样轻松地在天花板和墙壁上攀爬。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the earth elemental is targeted by a natural attack roll of 10 or less, the elemental heals 1d6 damage before taking any damage from the attack.
ast.target: 当土元素被自然骰10或更低的攻击骰指定为目标时，该元素在受到攻击伤害前恢复1d6点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Not all earth elementals burrow, though if yours is particularly nasty or associated with a particular icon, it can.
ast.target: 并非所有土元素都会钻地，但如果你的土元素特别凶恶或与某个特定徽记相关联，它可以钻地。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy makes a natural odd melee attack roll against the fire elemental, that attacker takes 1d8 fire damage.
ast.target: 当敌人对火元素进行自然奇数近战攻击骰时，攻击者将受到1d8点火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the target is the only creature engaged with the smoke devil, the attack deals 30 poison damage instead.
ast.target: 如果目标是唯一与烟魔交战的生物，则该攻击改为造成30点毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each time the smoke devil hits an enemy, the embers floating in the center of its body glow more brightly. Once per battle as a free action during its turn, the devil can make an ember burst attack. It also makes this attack as an interrupt action when it drops to 0 hp.
ast.target: 每次烟雾恶魔命中敌人，其体内漂浮的余烬都会更加明亮。每场战斗一次，作为其回合中的自由动作，恶魔可以发动一次余烬爆发攻击。当其生命值降至0时，也会作为中断动作发动此攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When you choose to add the escalation die to an attack against a smoke devil, it gains resist damage 16+ against the attack.
ast.target: 当你选择将升级骰加入对烟雾恶魔的攻击时，它对该攻击获得伤害抗性16+。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Smoke devils drift and eddy as if blown by an evil wind.
ast.target: 烟雾恶魔漂浮盘旋，仿佛被邪恶之风吹动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Smoke devils have a preternatural ability to get to their chosen victims. Keeping the smoke devil out is a hard, champion-tier challenge (DC 25).
ast.target: 烟雾恶魔拥有超自然的能力，能够接近其选定的受害者。将烟雾恶魔阻挡在外是一项困难的、冠军级挑战（DC 25）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A smoke devil can “take 12” on disengage checks, taking a natural result of 12 instead of rolling (which normally would allow it to disengage automatically from up to two enemies).
ast.target: 烟雾恶魔可以在脱离检定中“取12”，即不掷骰而直接采用12的自然结果（这通常允许它自动脱离最多两名敌人的近战）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is hampered from burning eyes and gases in its lungs until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 目标因眼睛灼烧和肺部吸入气体而受阻碍，直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Until the end of the snowy owlbear’s next turn, the target is hampered while engaged with the owlbear.
ast.target: 直到雪鸮熊的下一回合结束，目标在与雪鸮熊交战时受阻碍。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A snowy owlbear that scores a critical hit against a hampered enemy tears a piece of the creature off (GM chooses a limb) and will subsequently attempt to retreat with the prize, screeching to its cubs to flee with it. The torn-up enemy is stunned until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 雪鸮熊对受阻碍的敌人造成重击时，会撕下该生物的一部分（由GM选择一个肢体），随后会试图带着战利品撤退，并向其幼崽尖叫着一同逃离。被撕裂的敌人将被震慑，直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The snowy owlbear’s crit range expands by 1 for each owlbear cub that has dropped this battle.
ast.target: 雪鸮熊的重击范围每有一只在本场战斗中倒下的雪鸮熊幼崽，就扩大1点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Attacks that deal cold damage deal half damage to the snowy owlbear unless they roll a natural 14+.
ast.target: 造成寒冷伤害的攻击对雪鸮熊只造成一半伤害，除非它们掷出自然14+。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Checks to hear a snowy owlbear take a -5 penalty.
ast.target: 察觉雪鸮熊的检定受到-5减值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gains a +3 bonus on disengage checks, or adds the escalation die, whichever is higher.
ast.target: 在脱离检定中获得+3加值，或加入升级骰，取两者中较高者。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Attacks that deal cold damage deal half damage to the snowy owlbear cub unless they roll a natural 14+.
ast.target: 造成寒冷伤害的攻击对雪鸮熊幼崽只造成一半伤害，除非它们掷出自然14+。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This monster only counts as half a normal monster when building battles.
ast.target: 在构建战斗时，此怪物只算作半个普通怪物。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The phoenix may move again this turn as a quick action if it has already made a flying move on its turn.
ast.target: 如果凤凰在本回合已进行过飞行移动，它可以作为快速动作再次移动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The solar phoenix teleports to a point nearby or faraway.
ast.target: 太阳凤凰传送到附近或远处的一个点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The solar phoenix flies like the sun unleashed.
ast.target: 太阳凤凰如释放的太阳般飞翔。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The solar phoenix deals 20 fire damage to each enemy that ends it turn engaged with the phoenix.
ast.target: 太阳凤凰对每个在其回合结束时与凤凰交战的敌人造成20点火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the solar phoenix is dealt a critical hit, it must roll an easy save (6+). If the save fails, the phoenix drops to 0 hit points; see the reborn in fire ability below!
ast.target: 当太阳凤凰受到重击时，它必须进行一次简易豁免（6+）。如果豁免失败，凤凰的生命值降至0；请参见下方的浴火重生能力！

ast.name: description
ast.source: Randomly select one of the target’s limited-use powers or spells. The soul flenser flenses it away, removing it from the target until that creature regains it via a successful connection to the oversoul (see below).
ast.target: 随机选择目标的一个有限使用能力或法术。灵魂剥离者将其剥离，将其从目标身上移除，直到该生物通过成功连接超灵（见下文）重新获得它。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the target is already weakened, it’s also stunned until end of its next turn.
ast.target: 如果目标已经处于虚弱状态，它还会被震慑，直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a creature slays a soul flenser, it can roll a hard save (16+). If it succeeds, the creature regains one power it has had flensed away.
ast.target: 当一个生物杀死灵魂剥离者时，它可以进行一次困难豁免（16+）。如果成功，该生物恢复一个曾被剥离的能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy misses the soul flenser with an attack against MD, that attacker takes half the miss damage, if any.
ast.target: 当敌人对灵魂剥离者的攻击未命中（针对MD）时，该攻击者受到一半的未命中伤害（如果有的话）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The soul flenser gains an attack bonus equal to the escalation die against creatures that have had one or more powers flensed away.
ast.target: 灵魂剥离者对已被剥离一个或多个能力的生物获得等同于升级骰的攻击加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While confused by a soul flenser’s effect, a creature that has had a power flensed away can use and re-use that limited power against their erstwhile allies, if the GM sees how to use the power in a useful way.
ast.target: 当受灵魂剥离者效果影响而困惑时，一个已被剥离能力的生物可以对其昔日盟友使用并重复使用该有限能力，前提是GM知道如何以有用的方式使用该能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each nearby enemy takes 10 thunder damage
ast.target: 每个附近的敌人受到10点雷鸣伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the target is staggered, it is also hampered (makes only basic attacks) until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 如果目标处于蹒跚状态，它还会被阻碍（只能进行基础攻击），直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each enemy engaged with the specter (including the target) takes 4 negative energy damage.
ast.target: 每个与幽魂交战的敌人（包括目标）受到4点负能量伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy attacks the specter and misses, it takes 8 negative energy damage.
ast.target: 当敌人攻击幽魂未命中时，它受到8点负能量伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is hampered (hard save ends, 16+) instead.
ast.target: 目标被阻碍（困难豁免结束，16+）代替。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 1d2 random magic items on the target are also affected. One-shot items like potions and oils are ruined; true magic items lose their default bonus and any powers until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 目标身上的1d2件随机魔法物品也会受到影响。药水和油膏等一次性物品被毁坏；真正的魔法物品失去其默认加值和所有能力，直到战斗结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A golem warder can’t be dazed, weakened, confused, or made vulnerable. Ongoing damage doesn’t harm it either, unless it’s acid, fire, or lightning.
ast.target: 魔像守卫不能被眩晕、虚弱、困惑或变得易受伤害。持续伤害也不会伤害它，除非是酸液、火焰或闪电。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Instead of wood, stronger materials were used to create the golem, such as crystal or brass. This golem is non-organic and has golem immunity (so ongoing acid, fire, and lightning don't harm it).
ast.target: 使用更强的材料（如水晶或黄铜）代替木材来制造魔像。此魔像是非有机体，并具有魔像免疫（因此持续的酸液、火焰和闪电伤害不会伤害它）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The warder pops free from each enemy engaged with it and can move as a free action, usually next to an ally.
ast.target: 守卫从与其交战的每个敌人身边脱离，并可以作为自由动作移动，通常是移动到盟友旁边。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While the golem warder is next to an ally, once per round when a melee attack targets that ally, it can try to intercept the attack as a free action. Roll an easy save (6+); if it succeeds, the warder becomes the target of the attack instead.
ast.target: 当魔像守卫在盟友旁边时，每轮一次，当一次近战攻击以该盟友为目标时，它可以尝试作为自由动作拦截该攻击。进行一次简易豁免（6+）；如果成功，守卫成为该攻击的目标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Only natural even spell attack rolls deal damage to the golem.
ast.target: 只有自然偶数的法术攻击骰才能对魔像造成伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A spider mount can climb on ceilings and walls as easily as it moves on the ground, and so can its rider.
ast.target: 蜘蛛坐骑可以像在地面上移动一样轻松地在天花板和墙壁上攀爬，其骑手也是如此。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A riderless spider mount will eventually run away. At the start of the spider’s turn roll a d4; if you roll less than the escalation die, the mount flees.
ast.target: 无骑手的蜘蛛坐骑最终会逃跑。在蜘蛛的回合开始时掷一个d4；如果你掷出的数字小于升级骰，坐骑就会逃跑。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Target is flung 1d6 * 10 feet in a random direction. (If that’s going to put it into a very dangerous place or over a cliff or similar bad spot, it can roll a normal save to catch itself before being thrown and take another 2d6 damage.
ast.target: 目标被抛掷1d6 * 10英尺，方向随机。（如果这会将其置于非常危险的地方、悬崖边或类似的糟糕地点，它可以进行一次正常豁免，在被抛出前稳住自己，并额外受到2d6伤害。）

ast.name: description
ast.target: 每场战斗1次，但不能在蹒跚状态下使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die is even, the spiketail can target a nearby enemy with its thagomizer attack instead of needing to be engaged.
ast.target: 当升级骰为偶数时，刺尾龙可以用其尾刺攻击瞄准一个附近的敌人，而无需与其交战。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 2 ongoing damage.
ast.target: 目标还受到2点持续伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target can’t cast a spell until the end of its next turn or until the splotchcap drops to 0 hp, whichever comes first.
ast.target: 目标无法施法，直到其下一回合结束或斑点帽菇生命值降至0，以先发生者为准。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the splotchcap scores a critical hit OR when a PC or a player at the table says the bad word, the splotchcap can teleport to a nearby hidden location it can see as a free action.
ast.target: 当斑点帽菇造成重击时，或者当PC或桌边的玩家说出那个坏词时，斑点帽菇可以作为自由动作传送到一个它能看到的附近隐蔽位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the splotchcap starts its turn and no enemy can see it, it can make a pop-out and stab ‘em attack that turn as a standard action.
ast.target: 当斑点帽菇开始其回合且没有敌人能看到它时，它可以在该回合作为标准动作发动一次“突然出现并刺击”攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The sporrior can make a spore cloud attack this turn as a quick action.
ast.target: 孢子战士可以在本回合作为快速动作发动一次孢子云攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A sporrior gains an extra move action when the escalation die is odd.
ast.target: 当升级骰为奇数时，孢子战士获得一个额外的移动动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A sporrior can climb on ceilings and walls as easily as it moves on the ground.
ast.target: 孢子战士可以像在地面上移动一样轻松地在天花板和墙壁上攀爬。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Only usable when the spriggan is at its normal size; but still usable if hampered!
ast.target: 仅在精怪处于其正常体型时可用；但即使处于受阻碍状态仍可使用！

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle, with an additional use for each critical hit scored by the spriggan’s enemies this battle.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，精怪的敌人每造成一次重击，额外增加一次使用次数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is thrown somewhere faraway but non-harmful (like over a cliff) and loses its next move action.
ast.target: 目标被抛到远处但无害的地方（例如悬崖边），并失去其下一个移动动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target can make an opportunity attack against the spriggan.
ast.target: 目标可以对树精发动借机攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Only usable when the spriggan is at its larger size.
ast.target: 仅在树精处于其较大体型时可用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The sprite flies, but never too far from the ground.
ast.target: 精灵飞行，但从不离地面太远。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the sprite scores a critical hit with its whispered song attack, instead of taking damage, the target falls unconscious (save ends).
ast.target: 当精灵的低语之歌攻击造成重击时，目标不会受到伤害，而是陷入昏迷（持续至豁免成功）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the sprite rolls a natural odd hit with its whispered song attack, the target loses its next move action as it begins dancing uncontrollably.
ast.target: 当精灵的低语之歌攻击掷出自然奇数命中时，目标开始不受控制地跳舞，失去其下一个移动动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a creature is engaged with the squib swarm at the start of its turn, it takes cold damage equal to the escalation die.
ast.target: 当生物在其回合开始时与鱿鱼群交战，它将受到等同于升级骰数值的寒冷伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The stalker locks onto its victim with its powerful jaws. If it’s still engaged with the target at the start of its next turn, it can make a *tearing claws* attack.
ast.target: 潜行者用其强大的颚部锁定猎物。如果它在下一个回合开始时仍与目标交战，它可以发动一次*撕裂利爪*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Despite its size, as an ambush hunter, the stalker is very good at shadowing its prey. Checks to notice it and avoid surprise are ridiculously hard.
ast.target: 尽管体型庞大，作为伏击猎手，潜行者非常擅长跟踪猎物。察觉它和避免突袭的检定难度极高。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Any enemy that dies due to ongoing damage from mutagenic emanations instantly rejoins the fight as a star-mask brain zealot allied to the dungeon heart.
ast.target: 任何因诱变辐射持续伤害而死亡的敌人，会立即作为星面脑狂信徒重新加入战斗，效忠于地城之心。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The first time the dungeon heart is staggered, it makes a *mind-erasing blast* attack.
ast.target: 地城之心首次被击至濒死时，会发动一次*抹除心智冲击波*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dungeon heart can’t make opportunity attacks.
ast.target: 地城之心无法发动借机攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The brain doesn’t move about by itself, but it does infect nearby matter, turning wherever it is into more of itself: if you are close enough to fight the brain, you are de-facto engaged with it, and will be affected by its *mutagenic emanations* attack.
ast.target: 大脑本身不会移动，但它会感染附近的物质，将其所在之处变成更多自身：如果你足够近能与大脑战斗，你就事实上与它交战，并将受到其*诱变辐射*攻击的影响。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy fails to save against the ongoing damage from mutagenic emanations, the dungeon heart heals 20 hp.
ast.target: 当敌人未能通过诱变辐射持续伤害的豁免时，地城之心恢复20点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enemies killed by the dungeon heart become mindless living husks with no resurrection or healing possible—their soul is gone. (Of course, there may be some miraculous quest for healing magic that could restore them.)
ast.target: 被地城之心杀死的敌人会变成无心智的活体空壳，无法复活或治疗——他们的灵魂已逝。（当然，可能有一些奇迹般的任务可以找到治疗魔法来恢复他们。）

ast.name: description
ast.source: While the escalation die is odd, the star-mask brain zealot can’t be intercepted, doesn’t suffer opportunity attacks, and takes only half damage from attacks that target AC or PD.
ast.target: 当升级骰为奇数时，星面脑狂信徒无法被拦截，不会受到借机攻击，并且只受到针对AC或PD的攻击的一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is confused (save ends) instead of dazed.
ast.target: 目标被困惑（持续至豁免成功）而非眩晕。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 20 psychic damage, but no dazed or confused effect.
ast.target: 20点心灵伤害，但没有眩晕或困惑效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The star-mask brute can make a throw attack against the target as a free action.
ast.target: 星面蛮兵可以对目标发动一次投掷攻击，作为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: One dead (or unconscious or otherwise out of the fight) star-mask cultist, dead star-mask cult leader, or dead star-mask brute becomes a living scuttling star-mask mook.
ast.target: 一名死亡（或昏迷或以其他方式退出战斗）的星面教徒、死亡的星面教领袖或死亡的星面蛮兵，会变成一个活蹦乱跳的星面杂兵。

ast.name: description
ast.source: For every star-mask puppet engaged with an enemy, other star-masks not engaged with that enemy gain a +1 attack bonus against that enemy (maximum +4).
ast.target: 每有一个星面傀儡与敌人交战，其他未与该敌人交战的星面生物对该敌人的攻击获得+1加值（最高+4）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The star-mask puppet can use oily tentacles to climb on ceilings and walls as easily as it moves on the ground.
ast.target: 星面傀儡可以使用油腻的触手在天花板和墙壁上攀爬，就像在地面上移动一样轻松。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 1/round, as a quick action when the escalation die is odd.
ast.target: 每轮1次，作为快速动作，当升级骰为奇数时。

ast.name: description
ast.source: For every two star-mask cultists in the battle (round up), one of them can use coordinated attack once as a free action during the battle.
ast.target: 每有两名星面教徒参战（向上取整），其中一名可以在战斗中使用一次协同攻击，作为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Until the start of its next turn, the star-mask cultist gains a +2 attack bonus against enemies that are engaged with the cultist’s allies.
ast.target: 直到其下一个回合开始，星面教徒对与其盟友交战的敌人获得+2攻击加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When this cultist drops to 0 hp, a new scuttling star-mask joins the battle (in the same location as the dead cultist) and immediately makes a suffocating thoughts attack as a free action against the closest enemy.
ast.target: 当此教徒生命值降至0时，一个新的爬行星面加入战斗（位于死亡教徒所在位置），并立即对最近的敌人发动一次窒息思绪攻击，作为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The floating brain’s crit range expands to 11+ for the attack.
ast.target: 浮游脑的重击范围扩展至11+。

ast.name: description
ast.source: For every three star-mask floating brains in the battle (round up), one of them can use psychic puppetry once during the battle.
ast.target: 每有三个星面浮游脑参战（向上取整），其中一个可以在战斗中使用一次心灵傀儡术。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a star-mask floating brain scores a critical hit with psychic pulse, instead of dealing extra damage, the target becomes confused (save ends) instead of hampered.
ast.target: 当星面浮游脑的灵能脉冲造成重击时，目标不会受到额外伤害，而是被困惑（持续至豁免成功）而非受阻。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The brain uses telepathic energy to float in the air at about head height.
ast.target: 大脑使用心灵能量漂浮在大约头部高度的空中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Star-mask floating brains can’t make opportunity attacks.
ast.target: 星面浮游脑无法发动借机攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: At the start of the target’s next turn, it must use its move action to engage the omnipotent brain. It won’t take opportunity attacks to do so, instead trying to disengage.
ast.target: 在目标的下一个回合开始时，它必须使用其移动动作与全能脑交战。它不会为此承受借机攻击，而是试图脱离。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the target saves against the ongoing damage, it must choose one: it makes a basic attack against itself or an ally with its next standard action, OR it becomes weakened until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 当目标通过持续伤害的豁免时，它必须选择一项：它用下一个标准动作对自己或盟友发动一次基础攻击，或者它变得虚弱直到其下一个回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is immune to the aftereffect of psionic supremacy until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 目标对灵能霸权的后续效果免疫，直到战斗结束。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 每轮2次，作为独立的快速动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The brain can crawl about on tentacles but prefers to use its telekinetic grasp to move enemies toward it or its allies.
ast.target: 大脑可以用触手爬行，但更喜欢使用其念力抓取将敌人拉向自己或盟友。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Creatures engaged with the star-mask omnipotent brain that have 120 hp or fewer can’t target the omnipotent brain with attacks.
ast.target: 与星面全能脑交战且生命值为120或更低的生物无法将全能脑作为攻击目标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy targets the omnipotent brain with a ranged attack and rolls a natural 1–5, it must reroll the attack against an ally engaged with the brain, if any, as if it had fumbled.
ast.target: 当敌人以远程攻击瞄准全能脑并掷出自然1-5时，它必须将攻击重骰为攻击与大脑交战的盟友（如果有的话），如同它失手一样。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The omnipotent brain can use a standard action to allow a nearby ally to make an attack as a free action with a +4 attack bonus. If the ally misses it takes 1d8 damage and the brain heals 50 hp.
ast.target: 全能脑可以使用一个标准动作，允许一名附近的盟友以自由动作发动一次攻击，并获得+4攻击加值。如果盟友未命中，它受到1d8点伤害，大脑恢复50点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Stirges fly well. Also, the pitch of their wings is high and thin, allowing a stirge to get very close without tipping off its prey.
ast.target: 蚊蝠飞行能力出色。此外，它们翅膀的音调高而细，使得蚊蝠能够非常接近猎物而不被察觉。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose one effect, and then the stirgeling mob takes 4 damage (killing this creature first).
ast.target: 选择一项效果，然后蚊蝠幼虫群受到4点伤害（首先杀死此生物）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 3 damage, and 3 ongoing damage.
ast.target: 目标受到3点伤害，以及3点持续伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 3 damage and is stuck until end of its next turn.
ast.target: 目标受到3点伤害，并被束缚直到其下一个回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: They aren’t strong fliers but they are quick and agile.
ast.target: 它们不是强壮的飞行者，但它们快速而敏捷。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The stone giant can also make a stomp attack against a single target as a free action.
ast.target: 石巨人还可以对单个目标发动一次践踏攻击，作为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The stone giant has resist weapons 16+.

ast.name: description
ast.source: 20 damage, and the target is hampered (save ends).
ast.target: 20点伤害，且目标受阻（持续至豁免成功）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 20 damage, and the target is dazed (save ends).
ast.target: 20点伤害，且目标眩晕（持续至豁免成功）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Evoke the powers of an ancient culture’s strange rites by giving the stone golem any weird power you wish. If you’re stuck for inspiration, consider starting with random abilities from the demons that aren’t related to energy or the cone of cold from the ogre mage.
ast.target: 通过赋予石魔像任何你想要的奇异力量，来唤醒一种古老文化中神秘仪式的力量。如果缺乏灵感，可以考虑从与能量无关的恶魔能力或食人魔巫师的寒冰锥开始。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The giant can make a lightning bolt attack against a random nearby enemy as a free action.
ast.target: 巨人可以作为自由动作，对一名随机的附近敌人进行闪电束攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The giant can make a lightning bolt attack against a random enemy that is nearby the target of the longbow attack.
ast.target: 巨人可以对长弓攻击目标附近的一名随机敌人进行闪电束攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Keep count of the number of times the storm giant uses its lightning bolt attack during the battle. Add that number to the escalation die to get the current building thunder value.
ast.target: 记录风暴巨人在战斗中使用闪电束攻击的次数。将该次数加到升级骰上，得到当前的累积雷鸣值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A storm giant can use its standard action to walk or run through the air, using move actions to continue. If the storm giant makes a standard action attack, it settles back to the ground below it without falling.
ast.target: 风暴巨人可以使用标准动作在空中行走或奔跑，并使用移动动作继续。如果风暴巨人进行标准动作攻击，它会落回其下方的地面而不会坠落。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The storm giant has resist thunder 16+ and resist lightning 16+.
ast.target: 风暴巨人拥有抗雷鸣16+和抗闪电16+。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
This creature has resist damage 16+ to all damage (yes, even holy damage) except force damage, which damages it normally.

A sunder wraith can move through solid objects, but it can’t end its movement inside them.
ast.target:
此生物对所有伤害（是的，包括神圣伤害）拥有抗伤害16+，但力场伤害除外，力场伤害对其造成正常伤害。

\n

毁灭幽魂可以穿过固体物体，但不能在其内部结束移动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Twice per battle when the sunder wraith moves through a solid object like a wall, throne, door, or chest, the object must roll a normal save. If the save fails, the object is broken. Strongly magical objects get bonuses on the save, but err on the side of uh-oh.
ast.target: 每场战斗两次，当毁灭幽魂穿过墙壁、王座、门或箱子等固体物体时，该物体必须进行一次普通豁免。如果豁免失败，该物体被破坏。强大的魔法物品在豁免时获得加值，但请做好最坏的打算。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The swarm prince gains a +1 bonus to all defenses for each nearby Woven.
ast.target: 蜂群王子每有一名附近的织体，其所有防御获得+1加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is hampered until the end of its next turn. It can end the effect by attacking the swarm, or if the swarm drops to 0 hp.
ast.target: 目标受到阻碍，持续至其下一回合结束。它可以通过攻击蜂群来结束此效果，或者如果蜂群生命值降至0。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The swarm of bats can’t make opportunity attacks, and enemies can’t make opportunity attacks against it.
ast.target: 蝙蝠群无法进行借机攻击，敌人也无法对它进行借机攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each turn, the swarm of bats gains resist damage 18+ to all damage from attacks by enemies that the swarm did NOT attack that turn.
ast.target: 每回合，蝙蝠群对本回合未被其攻击的敌人所造成的所有伤害获得抗伤害18+。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The swarming maw can teleport to engage a nearby enemy it can see that is already engaged by at least one other hellbug.
ast.target: 群聚之颚可以传送至与一名它能看到的、且已被至少一只其他地狱虫交战的附近敌人交战。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The serrated maw also deals miss damage the second time it misses with a serrated maw attack each battle.
ast.target: 锯齿之颚在每场战斗中第二次锯齿之颚攻击未命中时，也会造成未命中伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The naga and each of its nearby allies can use the escalation die unless the naga has been targeted by an enemy’s spell since its last turn.
ast.target: 娜迦及其每名附近的盟友可以使用升级骰，除非娜迦自上一回合以来已被敌人的法术指定为目标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The taranar avalanche deals damage to itself equal to 1d6 per point on the escalation die 1d6*@ed; damage is not reduced by the all-rock ability.
ast.target: 塔拉纳尔雪崩对自身造成等于升级骰点数×1d6的伤害（1d6*@ed）；此伤害不被全岩能力减少。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 塔拉纳尔雪崩已经无可救药了。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 9 lightning damage released by the taranar’s all-pervading crystalline components on contact.
ast.target: 目标受到9点闪电伤害，该伤害由塔拉纳尔无处不在的结晶成分在接触时释放。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 每场战斗1次，当升级骰为3+时。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The summoned stones attacking the target fall from above, dazed them (save ends).
ast.target: 攻击目标的召唤石从上方落下，使其目眩（豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The summoned stones attacking the target roll into them, hampered them (save ends).
ast.target: 攻击目标的召唤石滚向它们，使其受到阻碍（豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle, the taranar bugler can cause the stones it summons to coalesce into animated conglomerates, whose number is determined by the escalation die +1. The conglomerates take their turns immediately after the bugler when they first appear and each round thereafter.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，塔拉纳尔号手可以使其召唤的石头凝聚成活化的聚合体，其数量由升级骰+1决定。聚合体首次出现时，以及此后每轮，在号手之后立即行动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 5 lightning damage from the electrical discharge caused by the impact of crystal-laced stone feet on their person.
ast.target: 目标受到5点闪电伤害，该伤害由晶体镶嵌的石足撞击其身体时释放的放电造成。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is hampered as the localized earth tremors generated by the dancing stones causes them to struggle to maintain their balance (save ends).
ast.target: 目标受到阻碍，因为舞动之石引发的局部地震使其难以保持平衡（豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The coryphée can use this ability only when the escalation die is even.
ast.target: 领舞者仅当升级骰为偶数时才能使用此能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The taranar smashes the target into the ground, the target is either stuck, hard save ends (if the ground was soft), or takes 20 damage (if the ground was hard).
ast.target: 塔拉纳尔将目标砸入地面，目标要么被卡住（困难豁免结束，如果地面是软的），要么受到20点伤害（如果地面是硬的）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The taranar ends up just pounding the ground, and can make a follow-up seism attack as a quick action.
ast.target: 塔拉纳尔最终只是猛击地面，并可以作为快速动作进行一次后续的地震攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The taranar great stone can use an enemy as a missile weapon, making the heave attack.
ast.target: 塔拉纳尔巨石可以将敌人用作投射武器，进行投掷攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 7 lightning damage from the electrical energy released on impact by the taranar’s integral crystals.
ast.target: 目标受到7点闪电伤害，该伤害由塔拉纳尔内置晶体在撞击时释放的电能造成。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The taranar smashes its fists together to generate a fearsome bolt of lightning that also dazed the target (save ends).
ast.target: 塔拉纳尔双拳相击，产生一道可怕的闪电，同时使目标目眩（豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When reduced to 0 hp the taranar hunter explodes in a shower of rock splinters, causing 10 damage to anyone it is engaged with and 1d3 other nearby enemies.
ast.target: 当生命值降至0时，塔拉纳尔猎手会爆炸成一阵岩石碎片，对其交战的任何人造成10点伤害，并对1d3名其他附近敌人造成伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 10 lightning damage from the electrical energy released on impact by the taranar’s integral crystals.
ast.target: 目标受到10点闪电伤害，该伤害由塔拉纳尔内置晶体在撞击时释放的电能造成。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The taranar smashes its fists together to generate a fearsome bolt of lightning that also weakened the target until the end of their next turn.
ast.target: 塔拉纳尔双拳相击，产生一道可怕的闪电，同时使目标虚弱，持续至其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The tarrasque grabs the target. It will swallow a grabbed enemy in 1d3 rounds (see swallow whole).
ast.target: 塔拉斯克抓住目标。它将在1d3回合内吞下被抓住的敌人（参见整体吞噬）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The tarrasque swallows the target immediately (see swallow whole).
ast.target: 塔拉斯克立即吞下目标（参见整体吞噬）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 9d6 extra damage and pops free from the tarrasque as it’s hurled far away.
ast.target: 目标受到9d6额外伤害，并在被远远抛出时从塔拉斯克身上挣脱。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The tarrasque can make one close attack and one melee attack each round as a standard action. Note that flying is usually no defense against the tarrasque, which is huge and powerful enough to pluck or whack enemies out of the sky with surprising leaps.
ast.target: 塔拉斯克每轮可以作为标准动作进行一次近程攻击和一次近战攻击。请注意，飞行通常无法防御塔拉斯克，它体型巨大且力量惊人，能够以惊人的跳跃从空中抓取或击打敌人。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The tarrasque can swim and breathe underwater (or it holds so much air in its vast lungs that it makes no difference).
ast.target: 塔拉斯克可以游泳并在水下呼吸（或者它巨大的肺部容纳了如此多的空气，以至于这无关紧要）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The tarrasque is so huge that it ignores opportunity attacks. In addition, normal-sized enemies are like fleas to it, and disengaging from the tarrasque requires only an easy save (6+), unless the target is grabbed.
ast.target: 塔拉斯克体型如此巨大，以至于它忽略借机攻击。此外，普通体型的敌人对它来说就像跳蚤，脱离与塔拉斯克的交战只需要一次简单豁免（6+），除非目标被抓住。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The tarrasque doesn’t have scales on the inside. It takes a –5 penalty to all defenses against attacks from inside its gullet, though only melee and close attacks can be made in there. The tarrasque’s insides are immune to acid damage, however.
ast.target: 塔拉斯克的内部没有鳞片。它对来自其喉咙内部的攻击，所有防御受到-5减值，尽管在那里只能进行近战和近程攻击。然而，塔拉斯克的内部对酸液伤害免疫。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While engaged with the tarrasque, enemies that have 216 hp or fewer are dazed (–4 attack) and do not add the escalation die to their attacks.
ast.target: 在与塔拉斯克交战时，生命值为216或更少的敌人会目眩（攻击-4），并且不将升级骰加到其攻击上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The temple lion can make another *stone claws* attack against a different engaged enemy.
ast.target: 寺庙狮可以对另一名交战中的敌人进行一次额外的*石爪*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Target is weakened until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 目标虚弱，持续至其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This spell only requires a quick action to use.
ast.target: 此法术仅需一个快速动作即可使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The temple lion has resist damage 12+ against attacks targeting AC.
ast.target: 寺庙狮对针对AC的攻击拥有抗伤害12+。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is thrown faraway from the tempter.
ast.target: 目标被远远抛离诱惑者。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is pulled into engagement with the tempter.
ast.target: 目标被拉入与诱惑者的交战。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While the target is taking the ongoing damage it is also hampered (basic attacks only).
ast.target: 当目标承受持续伤害时，它也受到阻碍（仅限基础攻击）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Normal non-magical armor and shields shatter under this monster’s supernatural strength attack. When the tempter crits, the if the target is wearing non-magical heavy armor the armor is destroyed (count as a -4 penalty to AC until the end of the battle).
ast.target: 普通的非魔法盔甲和盾牌会在该怪物的超自然力量攻击下粉碎。当诱惑者暴击时，如果目标穿着非魔法重甲，该盔甲被摧毁（在战斗结束前视为AC-4减值）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 50 ongoing damage.
ast.target: 目标还受到50点持续伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When you choose to add the escalation die to an attack against the Final Devil, one of the Final Devil’s nearby allies can make an attack as an interrupt action before your attack.
ast.target: 当你选择将升级骰加入对最终恶魔的攻击时，最终恶魔附近的一名盟友可以在你的攻击前进行一次借机攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Icon relationship dice don’t provide any help in a battle (or even an adventure) that involves the Final Devil. The Devil broke the icons’ hold on it, and it’s up to pure mortals to solve this problem, because the icons can’t cope.
ast.target: 在涉及最终恶魔的战斗（甚至冒险）中，图标关系骰不会提供任何帮助。恶魔挣脱了图标对它的束缚，这个问题只能由凡人来解决，因为图标们无能为力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the Final Devil is fighting in a sea or river, when a nearby enemy rolls a normal save, it’s a hard save (16+) instead. The same goes for easy saves; they’re normal saves instead.
ast.target: 如果最终恶魔在海洋或河流中战斗，当附近的敌人进行一次普通豁免时，它将变为困难豁免（16+）。同样，容易豁免也会变为普通豁免。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a creature slays one of the flensed, it can roll a hard save (16+). If it succeeds, the creature regains one power it had flensed away.
ast.target: 当一个生物击杀一名被剥皮者时，它可以进行一次困难豁免（16+）。如果成功，该生物将恢复一项被剥皮者夺走的能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Flensed gains an attack bonus equal to the escalation die against creatures that have had one or more powers flensed away.
ast.target: 剥皮者对已被夺走一项或多项能力的生物获得等同于升级骰的攻击加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Make a second bladed fan attack, and if that is a natural even roll make a third bladed fan attack.
ast.target: 进行第二次刃扇攻击，如果该次攻击为自然偶数命中，则进行第三次刃扇攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is blown back from the Purple Dragon.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Purple Dragon pops free and moves away from the target (blown by the wind of the fan).
ast.target: 紫龙脱离接触并远离目标（被扇风吹开）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target must start making last gasp saves, if they fail they believe that they are the Purple Dragon. Removing this delusion from the target’s mind is as difficult as turning a petrified character back from stone (hard, but not impossible).
ast.target: 目标必须开始进行濒死豁免，如果失败，他们会相信自己就是紫龙。从目标的脑海中消除这种妄想，其难度不亚于将石化角色变回原状（困难，但并非不可能）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Purple Dragon uses their powers of illusion and mind-control to make one of their attackers look and sound like them; the next attack has a 50% chance of being targeted against the wrong target.
ast.target: 紫龙运用他们的幻术和心灵控制能力，使一名攻击者看起来和听起来都像他们自己；下一次攻击有50%的几率会攻击错误的目标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Purple Dragon can use their psychoactive breath 2d4 times each combat but never two turns in a row. They can also choose to make their targets confused (save ends) on a hit or miss with their psychoactive breath, but that uses up their breath for the rest of the battle.
ast.target: 紫龙每次战斗可以使用他们的精神活性吐息2d4次，但不能连续两回合使用。他们也可以选择在精神活性吐息命中或未命中时使目标陷入困惑（通过豁免结束），但这会耗尽他们剩余战斗中的吐息次数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: That bladed fan attack? Yeah, that was the Purple Dragon’s wings hidden by an illusion. The Purple Dragon can use the bladed fan attack in this form, but now it is clear that they are using their wings so it is only +9 to attack.
ast.target: 那个刃扇攻击？没错，那是紫龙被幻术隐藏的翅膀。紫龙在此形态下可以使用刃扇攻击，但现在很明显他们是在使用翅膀，因此攻击加值仅为+9。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a quick action the Purple Dragon fills the battlefield with illusions that give enemies attacking them a -2 penalty to their attacks. This lasts until they next attack.
ast.target: 作为快速动作，紫龙用幻术充斥战场，使攻击他们的敌人受到-2攻击惩罚。此效果持续到他们下次攻击为止。

ast.name: description
ast.source: In their dragon form the Purple Dragon can fly. The Purple Dragon can also fly using magic, but prefers to not do so unless they need to fight a flying enemy.
ast.target: 在龙形态下，紫龙可以飞行。紫龙也可以使用魔法飞行，但除非需要与飞行敌人战斗，否则他们更倾向于不这样做。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is dazzled by light and takes a cumulative -1 penalty to attacks (up to a maximum of -4) until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 目标被强光炫目，受到累积-1攻击惩罚（最高-4），直到战斗结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is also dazed and stuck (save once for both effects and the ongoing damage).
ast.target: 目标同时陷入眩晕和束缚状态（为两种效果和持续伤害进行一次豁免）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once the target saves against the ongoing damage if the save was a natural odd roll the target is dazed (save ends).
ast.target: 一旦目标通过了持续伤害的豁免，如果豁免是自然奇数命中，则目标陷入眩晕状态（通过豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Purple Dragon can use their psychoactive breath 2d4 times each combat but never two turns in a row. They can choose to make their targets confused (save ends) on a hit or miss with their psychoactive breath, but that uses up their breath for the rest of the battle.
ast.target: 紫龙每次战斗可以使用他们的精神活性吐息2d4次，但不能连续两回合使用。他们可以选择在精神活性吐息命中或未命中时使目标陷入困惑（通过豁免结束），但这会耗尽他们剩余战斗中的吐息次数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Just like adventurer tier, the bladed fan attack translates in dragon form to wing buffet but with only +13 to attack.
ast.target: 与冒险者等级相同，刃扇攻击在龙形态下转化为翼击，但攻击加值仅为+13。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once the target saves against weakened or confused they take 100 psychic damage for each failed save against the effect before they successfully passed the save.
ast.target: 一旦目标通过了虚弱或困惑的豁免，他们将为之前未能通过该效果的每次豁免承受100点心灵伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is also weakened and stuck (save once for both effects and the ongoing damage).
ast.target: 目标同时陷入虚弱和束缚状态（为两种效果和持续伤害进行一次豁免）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once the target saves against the ongoing damage if the save was a natural odd roll the target is weakened (save ends).
ast.target: 一旦目标通过了持续伤害的豁免，如果豁免是自然奇数命中，则目标陷入虚弱状态（通过豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Just like the previous tiers, the bladed fan attack translates in dragon form to wing buffet but with only +17 to attack.
ast.target: 与之前的等级相同，刃扇攻击在龙形态下转化为翼击，但攻击加值仅为+17。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a quick action the Purple Dragon becomes invisible until they next attack. Characters attacking the Purple Dragon ‘blind’ have a 50% miss chance before rolling their attack.
ast.target: 作为快速动作，紫龙变得隐形，直到他们下次攻击。攻击紫龙的‘盲目’角色在进行攻击前有50%的失手几率。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Purple Dragon gets one last cunning escape at epic tier, and though their plans are ruined by their defeat they’ll return one last time to exact their vengeance upon the party.
ast.target: 紫龙在史诗等级获得了最后一次狡猾的逃脱，尽管他们的计划因失败而破灭，但他们将最后一次返回，向队伍复仇。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The rascal’s opportunity attacks deal 3 additional damage.
ast.target: 流氓的借机攻击造成3点额外伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the rascal rolls a natural even hit with its small tool attack, one nearby ally can roll a save against an effect that can be ended by a save.
ast.target: 当流氓的小工具攻击为自然偶数命中时，一名附近的盟友可以进行一次豁免，以对抗一个可通过豁免结束的效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The rascal deals additional damage equal to the escalation die (@ed) with its small tool attack.
ast.target: 流氓使用其小工具攻击时，造成等同于升级骰（@ed）的额外伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the rascal gets a natural even roll with its small tool attack, the target takes a –2 penalty to AC if it’s wearing heavy armor (save ends; non-cumulative but it does apply to that attack).
ast.target: 当流氓的小工具攻击为自然偶数命中时，如果目标穿着重甲，则其护甲受到-2惩罚（通过豁免结束；不可累积，但适用于该次攻击）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 20 ongoing thunder damage.
ast.target: 目标受到20点持续雷鸣伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a thunder attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当雷鸣攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然16+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the thunder bat is staggered, it must roll an immediate save. On a failure, it loses its ability to fly until the end of its next turn. If flying near the ground, it lands immediately. If flying far away from the ground, it lands badly and takes 25 damage.
ast.target: 当雷鸣蝙蝠被击伤时，它必须进行一次即时豁免。如果失败，它将失去飞行能力，直到其下一回合结束。如果在靠近地面处飞行，它会立即落地。如果在远离地面处飞行，它会重重摔落并受到25点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This creature has resist damage 16+ to all damage except fire damage and melee attacks against AC, which damage it normally.
ast.target: 此生物对所有伤害具有16+伤害抗性，但火焰伤害和针对护甲的近战攻击除外，这些伤害正常生效。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the treant takes 35 or more fire damage from a single attack, it releases all grabbed creatures.
ast.target: 当树人受到单次攻击35点或更多火焰伤害时，它会释放所有被擒抱的生物。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This creature has resist damage 18+ to all damage except fire damage and melee weapon damage, which damages it normally.
ast.target: 此生物对所有伤害具有18+伤害抗性，但火焰伤害和近战武器伤害除外，这些伤害正常生效。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the treant titan hits with a titanic rend attack, the target is pulled into a hollow chamber within the treant. While grabbed by the treant this way, the target can’t be the target of its allies’ powers or spells.
ast.target: 当树人泰坦以泰坦撕裂攻击命中时，目标会被拉入树人体内的一个空腔中。当以此方式被树人擒抱时，目标不能成为其盟友能力或法术的目标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Countless smaller branches whip through the air around the treant titan. When a creature engaged with the treant misses it with an attack, that creature takes 12 damage from the whipping branches.
ast.target: 无数较小的树枝在树人泰坦周围的空气中鞭打。当一个与树人交战的生物攻击未命中时，该生物会受到鞭打树枝造成的12点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target becomes stunned until the start of its next turn.
ast.target: 目标陷入震慑状态，直到其下一回合开始。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 对被击伤的敌人攻击时获得+4加值。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 此牛头人造成10点未命中伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The minotaur’s crit range against staggered enemies expands by 2 (to 18+).
ast.target: 牛头人对被击伤敌人的重击范围扩大2（变为18+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The minotaur is a gladiator (perhaps an escaped one), and gains +1 to its attacks against armed enemies (but not against magic-users).
ast.target: 此牛头人是一名角斗士（或许是逃跑的），对武装敌人（但不对施法者）的攻击获得+1加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The *three-pronged attack* instead deals +10 damage on a hit if the trihorn first moves before attacking an enemy it was not engaged with at the start of its turn.
ast.target: 如果三觭龙在攻击一个回合开始时未交战的敌人前先移动，那么三觭攻击在命中时改为造成+10伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Underground, or in swamps and rivers, attacks against troglodytes by enemies who aren’t engaged with them take a -4 penalty.
ast.target: 在地下，或在沼泽和河流中，未与穴居人交战的敌人对穴居人的攻击受到-4惩罚。

ast.name: description
ast.source: All nearby humanoids who saved against trog stench earlier in the battle are affected again by it.
ast.target: 所有在战斗早期通过了穴居恶臭豁免的附近类人生物将再次受到其影响。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the chieftain drops an enemy to 0 hp or below, each nearby troglodyte can roll a saving throw against one effect on it. If that enemy is a dwarf or elf, the save gains a +5 bonus.
ast.target: 当酋长将一名敌人生命值降至0或以下时，每名附近的穴居人可以对其身上的一个效果进行一次豁免。如果该敌人是矮人或精灵，豁免获得+5加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Underground, or in swamps and rivers, attacks against troglodytes by enemies who aren’t engaged with them take a –4 penalty.
ast.target: 在地下，或在沼泽和河流中，未与穴居人交战的敌人对穴居人的攻击受到-4惩罚。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While an enemy is affected by the fear aura of the trog chieftain’s bellow of dominance, that enemy can’t attack a troglodyte.
ast.target: 当敌人受到穴居酋长统治咆哮的恐惧光环影响时，该敌人不能攻击穴居人。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target pops free from the trog fouler and loses its next move action.
ast.target: 目标从穴居人恶臭者身上挣脱，并失去其下一个移动动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Until the trog fouler drops to 0 hp, while a creature is nearby the fouler, it is subject to trog stench and doesn’t roll saves against the stench at the end of its turn.
ast.target: 直到穴居人恶臭者生命值降至0为止，当生物在其附近时，该生物会受到穴居人恶臭影响，并且在其回合结束时无需对抗恶臭进行豁免检定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Dropping the trog fouler to 0 hit points isn’t enough. The PCs need to use a magical effect of some sort—or possibly an icon relationship advantage—to end the stench after the fouler has fallen, or move the fight so that it’s no longer nearby the fouler’s corpse.
ast.target: 仅将穴居人恶臭者的生命值降至0是不够的。玩家角色需要使用某种魔法效果——或者可能利用图标关系优势——在恶臭者倒下后结束恶臭，或者将战斗移至不再靠近恶臭者尸体的地方。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is again affected by trog stench if it had saved against the effect.
ast.target: 如果目标之前成功对抗了该效果，它将再次受到穴居人恶臭的影响。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Until the trog shaman drops to 0 hp, the melee attacks of each trog nearby the shaman deals 6 extra damage to elves and dwarves, and 3 extra damage to half-elves.
ast.target: 直到穴居人萨满生命值降至0为止，每个在萨满附近的穴居人的近战攻击对精灵和矮人造成额外6点伤害，对半精灵造成额外3点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: *Grimy spear* now re-applies trog stench on any natural odd roll (other than a natural 1, of course)
ast.target: *肮脏长矛*现在会在任何自然奇数骰（当然，自然1除外）上重新施加穴居人恶臭效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While a troll is damaged, its rubbery flesh heals 10 hit points at the start of the troll’s turn. It can regenerate five times per battle. If it heals to its maximum hit points, then that use of regeneration doesn’t count against the five-use limit.
ast.target: 当巨魔受伤时，其橡胶般的肉体在巨魔回合开始时恢复10点生命值。它每场战斗可以再生五次。如果它恢复到最大生命值，则该次再生不计入五次限制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the troll is hit by an attack that deals fire or acid damage, it loses one use of its regeneration, and it can’t regenerate during its next turn.
ast.target: 当巨魔被造成火焰或酸液伤害的攻击命中时，它会失去一次再生机会，并且在其下一个回合中无法再生。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Dropping a troll to 0 hp doesn’t kill it if it has any uses of regeneration left.
ast.target: 如果巨魔还有剩余的再生次数，将其生命值降至0并不会杀死它。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Increase the troll’s regeneration dice; the baseline amount a troll regenerates should run about 1/9 of its total hp, but you can go higher to be nasty.
ast.target: 增加巨魔的再生骰；巨魔再生的基础量应约为其总生命值的1/9，但你可以设定得更高以增加难度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fire and acid don’t hurt the troll’s regeneration; lightning does instead.
ast.target: 火焰和酸液不会伤害巨魔的再生能力；闪电则会。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If both claw attacks hit the same target, the target also takes 10 ongoing damage.
ast.target: 如果两次爪击都命中同一目标，该目标还会受到10点持续伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Twisted soul can make a *weird muttering* attack as a free action.
ast.target: 扭曲灵魂可以使用*怪异低语*攻击作为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each enemy that has one or more icon relationship points with the Demonic Icon that misses an attack with a natural odd roll takes a -2 penalty to all its defenses until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 每个与恶魔图标拥有一个或多个图标关系点的敌人，如果攻击未命中且骰子为自然奇数，则其所有防御受到-2惩罚，直到战斗结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target can’t use the escalation die until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 目标无法使用升级骰，直到其下一个回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The tyrant lizard can use earsplitting roar during its first turn of a battle and when the escalation die is odd.
ast.target: 暴君蜥蜴可以在战斗的第一个回合以及升级骰为奇数时使用震耳欲聋的咆哮。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The tyrant lizard’s *earsplitting roar* attack instead weakened the target until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 暴君蜥蜴的*震耳欲聋的咆哮*攻击改为使目标虚弱，直到其下一个回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is stuck (easy save ends, 6+).
ast.target: 目标被束缚（简单豁免结束，6+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This ability only requires a quick action (once per round) instead of a standard action when the umluppuk starts its turn unengaged (or without an enemy consumed if you are using the nastier special!).
ast.target: 当乌姆卢普克回合开始时未被缠住（或者如果你使用更恶劣的特殊规则，则没有敌人被吞噬），此能力只需要一个快速动作（每回合一次）而非标准动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per round during its turn, the umluppuk can make a consume attack against a stuck enemy as a quick action. The umluppuk can only one target consumed at a time.
ast.target: 每回合一次，在其回合内，乌姆卢普克可以对一个被束缚的敌人进行吞噬攻击，作为快速动作。乌姆卢普克一次只能吞噬一个目标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each cultist counts as two monsters for the purpose of disengage checks (disengaging from one requires a disengage check of 12+, from two is 14+, three is 16+, etc.).
ast.target: 每个邪教徒在脱离检定中算作两个怪物（脱离一个需要12+的脱离检定，脱离两个需要14+，三个需要16+，依此类推）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This mook has twice as many hit points as other mooks.
ast.target: 此小兵的生命值是其他小兵的两倍。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When this mook dies, it rises immediately on full hit points but is now UNDEAD not HUMANOID.
ast.target: 当此小兵死亡时，它会立即以满生命值复活，但现在是亡灵而非类人生物。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is also weakened until the end of its next turn (-4 attacks and defenses). In addition, the target expends one unused limited trait (a spell, power, or talent with a once-per-battle or daily use, but not magic item powers) of its choice.
ast.target: 目标还会虚弱，直到其下一个回合结束（攻击和防御-4）。此外，目标会消耗其选择的一个未使用的有限特性（一个法术、能力或天赋，具有每场战斗一次或每日使用次数，但不包括魔法物品能力）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The vampire regenerates 1 hp per level at the start of each round indefinitely, but it turns to mist if it drops to 0 hp (see below).
ast.target: 吸血鬼在每轮开始时恢复每等级1点生命值，无限持续，但如果其生命值降至0，则会化为迷雾（见下文）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unless it is slain in a manner appropriate for truly killing vampires in the campaign, a vampire that drops to 0 hp drifts away to return and fight some other day.
ast.target: 除非以战役中真正杀死吸血鬼的适当方式将其杀死，否则生命值降至0的吸血鬼会飘散离去，改日再战。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The vampire spawn can make a fangs attack against the target as a free action.
ast.target: 吸血鬼衍体可以对目标进行獠牙攻击，作为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The venomous snake gains a +2 bonus to attack rolls with this ability against creatures with a lower initiative.
ast.target: 毒蛇使用此能力时，对先攻较低的生物获得+2攻击加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy hits the venomous snake with a melee attack, that enemy takes 3 poison damage.
ast.target: 当敌人以近战攻击命中毒蛇时，该敌人受到3点毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a free action during its turn, the venomous snake can take 4 damage to end any ongoing effect on it.
ast.target: 作为其回合内的自由动作，毒蛇可以承受4点伤害以结束其身上的任何持续效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragon regains the use of its ensorceling breath if it’s expended and can use it during its next turn.
ast.target: 巨龙恢复其魅惑吐息的使用次数（如果已消耗），并可以在其下一个回合使用它。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The void beast spawns a new void beast at full hit points. It follows the same rules for beasts formed by ensorceling breath.
ast.target: 虚空兽生成一个新的虚空兽，生命值全满。它遵循由魅惑吐息形成的野兽的相同规则。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each beast appears next to the dragon, acts as it wishes, and enters the initiative order after the next two creatures have taken their turns. See void beast.
ast.target: 每只野兽出现在巨龙旁边，按其意愿行动，并在接下来的两个生物行动后进入先攻顺序。参见虚空兽。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Target is dazed (save ends). Target takes 10 negative energy damage each time it fails the save.
ast.target: 目标被眩晕（豁免结束）。目标每次豁免失败时受到10点负能量伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The void phoenix can fly amazingly well for a creature that is turning itself spiritually inside out.
ast.target: 对于一只正在精神上自我颠覆的生物来说，虚空凤凰的飞行能力惊人地出色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enemies that end their turns engaged with the void phoenix must attempt an easy save (6+). If the save fails, they’re dazed until the end of their next turn.
ast.target: 在虚空凤凰附近结束回合的敌人必须尝试一次简单豁免（6+）。如果豁免失败，他们将被眩晕，直到其下一个回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a fire attack or negative energy attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当火焰攻击或负能量攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然16+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the phoenix is dealt a critical hit, it must roll an easy save (6+). If the save fails, the phoenix drops to 0 hit points; see the reborn in void ability below!
ast.target: 当凤凰受到重击时，它必须进行一次简单豁免（6+）。如果豁免失败，凤凰的生命值降至0；请参见下面的虚空重生能力！

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 5 extra damage from a wing buffet.
ast.target: 目标受到翼击时额外受到5点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 10 extra damage from a claw strike.
ast.target: 目标受到爪击时额外受到10点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 10 ongoing fire damage instead of 5.
ast.target: 目标受到10点持续火焰伤害，而非5点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy is engaged with the volcanic dragon at the start of its turn, it takes 5 fire damage.
ast.target: 当敌人在火山龙回合开始时与其缠斗，它会受到5点火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A volcanic dragon can use volcanic breath 1d3 times per battle, but if it does not use its breath weapon on consecutive rounds, it loses its remaining volcanic breath attacks for the battle.
ast.target: 火山龙每场战斗可以使用1d3次火山吐息，但如果它没有在连续回合中使用其吐息武器，它将失去本场战斗剩余的火山吐息攻击次数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a fire attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 14+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当火焰攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然14+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While the target has 36 hp or fewer, it’s dazed from fear and doesn’t add the escalation die to its attacks (save ends all).
ast.target: 当目标生命值为36点或更少时，它会因恐惧而眩晕，并且其攻击不加入升级骰（所有效果豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is confused until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 目标被困惑，直到其下一个回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: At the start of each of the warped beast’s turns, roll a d6. The warped beast gains the corresponding ability until the start of its next turn.
ast.target: 在扭曲野兽的每回合开始时，掷一个d6。扭曲野兽获得相应的能力，直到其下一回合开始。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The beast has resist damage 11+ to all damage.
ast.target: 该野兽对所有伤害具有11+的伤害抗性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once during its turn, the warped beast can teleport anywhere nearby it can see as a move action. Each enemy engaged with it when it teleports is confused until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 在其回合内一次，扭曲野兽可以作为移动动作传送到其视线范围内的任何附近位置。当它传送时，与其交战的每个敌人都会陷入困惑状态，直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While engaged with the warped beast, enemies that have 24 hp or fewer are dazed (-4 attack) and do not add the escalation die to their attacks.
ast.target: 当与扭曲野兽交战时，生命值为24点或更少的敌人会陷入迟钝状态（攻击-4），并且不会将升级骰加入其攻击中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an enemy ends its turn engaged with the warped beast, it’s confused until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 当一个敌人在其回合结束时与扭曲野兽交战，它会陷入困惑状态，直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the warped beast hits a creature with a tentacle maw attack, the target also takes 5 ongoing psychic damage and a -2 penalty to saves (save ends both).
ast.target: 当扭曲野兽用触须巨口攻击命中一个生物时，目标还会受到5点持续心灵伤害，并且豁免检定受到-2惩罚（通过豁免检定可同时结束两者）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Roll two madness features instead of one each round (reroll similar results).
ast.target: 每轮掷两个疯狂特性，而不是一个（重掷相同结果）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 1d3 nearby enemies hear the alarm and join the battle. The creatures attracted by the constant screeching are (usually) level 1 mooks of a type that would be appropriate for the skull’s location.
ast.target: 1d3个附近的敌人听到警报并加入战斗。被持续尖叫声吸引来的生物通常是（通常）与头骨所在位置相称的1级小卒。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The skull can’t hop, jump, roll, or fly. It can’t even move its jaw.
ast.target: 头骨不能跳跃、翻滚或飞行。它甚至无法移动下巴。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Creatures that have been mystically “keyed” to the skull aren’t affected by its screech attack.
